category.en: Debt service, indemnity provisions, and foreign-related payments
Court, imperial clan, and banner stipends

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央与各省库储分散，账面储备有限，且大量款项被指定用于军费、河工、赈务和债务。1900年庚子事变爆发后，北方财政秩序急剧紊乱，北京与天津一带库藏和海关收入均受战事冲击
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury funds were fragmented between the center and the provinces, with only limited liquid reserves on paper and many monies already earmarked for military expenses, river works, relief, and debt. After the Boxer crisis erupted in 1900, fiscal order in North China deteriorated sharply, and treasuries and customs revenues around Beijing and Tianjin were disrupted by war

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持统治与应急筹款为主，重视临时加派、厘金、借款和挪用专款，缺乏统一近代预算制度。东南各省相对重视保商与维持税源，中央则在军事、宫廷和外交危机之间被动调度
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was centered on regime maintenance and emergency fund-raising, relying heavily on surcharges, likin, borrowing, and diversion of earmarked funds rather than a unified modern budget. The southeastern provinces were relatively more concerned with protecting commerce and preserving revenues, while the center reacted under pressure from military, court, and diplomatic crises

description.zh: 传统满洲、蒙古与汉军旗兵体系，政治象征意义仍大，但战斗力和训练水平普遍衰退，驻京与驻防城市为主
description.en: The traditional Manchu, Mongol, and Han banner system retained strong political symbolism, but its combat effectiveness and training had broadly declined; it was concentrated in Beijing and garrison cities

description.zh: 以汉人营兵为主的旧式地方治安与守备力量，分散于各省，负责巡缉、驻防和辅助治安，但装备陈旧、饷糈不足
description.en: An older Han-dominated provincial force used for policing, garrison duty, and local security across the provinces, but generally poorly equipped and underfunded

description.zh: 由地方督抚控制的湘军、淮军余脉及各类新旧练军构成，是晚清最重要的实战力量来源，但地域性、私属性和统属分裂严重
description.en: Composed of provincial yongying lineages such as the remnants of the Xiang and Huai armies and various trained forces, these were the most important practical fighting troops of the late Qing, though highly regionalized, personalized, and fragmented in command

description.zh: 采用较新式编制、操典和枪炮装备的部队，以袁世凯的武卫右军等北方新军最具战斗力，是清廷未来军事改革的核心雏形
description.en: Troops organized along more modern lines with updated drill and firearms, including Yuan Shikai's forces in North China; these were the most effective Qing units and the embryonic core of future military reform

description.zh: 甲午战败后北洋海军基本毁灭，残余舰船与南洋、福建、广东等水师继续存在，但规模有限、经费紧张，难以与列强海军抗衡
description.en: After defeat in the Sino-Japanese War, the Beiyang Fleet had been largely destroyed; residual naval forces and regional fleets in the south continued to exist, but were small, underfunded, and incapable of matching the great powers

commanderInChief.zh: 皇帝为名义最高统帅，实际军政主导者为慈禧太后及各省督抚、统兵大臣
commanderInChief.en: The emperor was the nominal commander-in-chief, but actual military direction lay with Empress Dowager Cixi and powerful provincial governors and field commanders

technology.zh: 军队技术处于新旧并存阶段。部分新军装备毛瑟步枪、克虏伯火炮、马克沁机枪和较现代化操典，但绝大多数旧军仍依赖落后火器、冷兵器、低效后勤与分散训练体系。铁路、电报和近代兵工虽已引入，却远未形成全国一体化军备体系
technology.en: Military technology was uneven and transitional. Some new-model troops used Mauser rifles, Krupp artillery, Maxim guns, and relatively modern drill, but most older formations still relied on obsolete firearms, edged weapons, weak logistics, and fragmented training. Railways, telegraphy, and modern arsenals had been introduced, yet had not produced an integrated national war machine

threats.zh: 1900年面临义和团运动、华北失控、八国联军干涉、俄国在满洲扩张、日本对朝鲜与华北的战略压力，以及列强在沿海和通商口岸的军事优势。内部则有地方军权坐大、财政崩溃和部队忠诚分裂等严重问题
threats.en: In 1900 the Qing faced the Boxer uprising, the breakdown of control in North China, intervention by the Eight-Nation Alliance, Russian expansion in Manchuria, Japanese strategic pressure after Korea, and overwhelming foreign naval power along the coast and treaty ports. Internally it also faced provincial militarization, fiscal breakdown, and deeply divided troop loyalties

populationDescription.zh: 清帝国人口约四亿，是当时世界人口最多的国家之一。人口主要集中于华北平原、长江流域、四川盆地、华南沿海及珠江流域，东北和西北边疆人口相对稀疏。19世纪后期长期人口压力、土地细分、灾荒与区域迁徙并存
populationDescription.en: With about 400 million people, the Qing Empire was one of the most populous states in the world. Population was concentrated in the North China Plain, the Yangzi basin, the Sichuan basin, the South China coast, and the Pearl River watershed, while Manchuria and the northwestern frontiers remained much more thinly settled. By the late nineteenth century severe demographic pressure, land subdivision, famine, and large-scale regional migration coexisted

socialClasses.zh: 传统上以士、农、工、商为理想秩序，但现实社会由皇族宗室、旗人、官员、绅士地主、佃农与自耕农、手工业者、行商坐贾、盐商票号资本、矿工码头工人、兵丁、僧道教职人员及大量边疆民族社群构成。晚清通商口岸还出现买办、工厂工人、近代学生和新式知识分子
socialClasses.en: Ideally society was framed as scholars, peasants, artisans, and merchants, but in reality it comprised the imperial clan, bannermen, officials, gentry-landlords, tenants and owner-cultivators, artisans, merchants, salt and finance capital, miners and dockworkers, soldiers, clergy, and many frontier ethnic communities. In the treaty ports the late Qing also saw compradors, factory workers, modern students, and new intellectual strata

allies.zh: 1900年清廷几乎没有可靠盟友。形式上可依赖的只有部分仍承认清朝宗主传统的边疆与藩属关系残余，但在国际政治上难以转化为有效支持。个别列强内部立场不一，东南督抚则试图通过“东南互保”避免与西方全面开战
allies.en: In 1900 the Qing court had virtually no dependable allies. Formally it could still invoke remnants of older suzerain and frontier relationships, but these had little value in international power politics. Some foreign powers differed in attitude, and the southeastern governors pursued the 'Mutual Protection of Southeast China' to avoid full-scale war with the West

enemies.zh: 主要敌对力量为入侵华北的八国联军成员国，尤其是日本、俄国、英国、德国、法国、美国、奥匈和意大利；此外还面临传教冲突引发的多国压力与列强对铁路、矿山、港口和势力范围的竞争
enemies.en: Its principal enemies were the members of the Eight-Nation Alliance intervening in North China, especially Japan, Russia, Britain, Germany, France, the United States, Austria-Hungary, and Italy; it also faced multinational pressure arising from missionary conflict and great-power competition over railways, mines, ports, and spheres of influence

foreignPolicy.zh: 晚清外交核心是在不平等条约体系下求取生存，尽量平衡列强、保全主权残余并争取时间进行有限改革。1900年政策严重分裂：中央部分主战势力支持排外与利用义和团，东南督抚则倾向保境安民、维持条约秩序与地方贸易
foreignPolicy.en: Late Qing foreign policy aimed at survival within the unequal treaty system, balancing the powers, preserving what remained of sovereignty, and buying time for limited reform. In 1900 policy became deeply divided: some at the center favored anti-foreign confrontation and the use of the Boxers, while southeastern governors preferred preserving order, treaty relations, and regional commerce

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 已引入电报、铁路、近代兵工厂、轮船航运、机器纺织、近代矿业、海关统计、外语翻译机构与新式学堂。江南制造局、汉阳铁厂、轮船招商局和各地电报铁路建设体现了洋务运动遗产，但技术扩散有限，工业基础薄弱，制度改革滞后
keyInnovations.en: Telegraphy, railways, modern arsenals, steam shipping, machine spinning, modern mining, customs statistics, translation bureaus, and new schools had all been introduced. The Jiangnan Arsenal, Hanyang Iron Works, China Merchants Steam Navigation Company, and various telegraph and railway projects embodied the legacy of the Self-Strengthening Movement, but technological diffusion remained limited, the industrial base was weak, and institutional reform lagged

strengths.zh: 拥有庞大人口、广阔领土、深厚农业基础、成熟市场网络、丰富区域经济互补性和强大的文化整合能力；地方精英与商人阶层仍具相当资源动员潜力，若能整顿财政军政，仍具恢复能力
strengths.en: It possessed an enormous population, vast territory, a deep agrarian base, mature market networks, strong regional complementarities, and substantial cultural integrative power; provincial elites and merchant groups still retained significant mobilizational resources, giving the dynasty some capacity for recovery if fiscal and military institutions could be reformed

weaknesses.zh: 中央权威衰落，军制破碎，财政不足，法律与行政近代化迟缓，海防陆防皆弱，不平等条约束缚严重，民族与地方问题复杂，宫廷保守与改革派冲突不断。1900年义和团危机更使国家面临军事失败、外交羞辱和财政崩盘的叠加危险
weaknesses.en: Central authority was declining, the military system was fragmented, finances were inadequate, legal and administrative modernization was slow, both naval and land defense were weak, and unequal treaties imposed severe constraints; ethnic and regional issues were complex, while court conservatives and reformers remained in constant conflict. The Boxer crisis of 1900 compounded these problems with the threat of military defeat, diplomatic humiliation, and fiscal collapse

outlook.zh: 短期前景极为严峻。若北方战事失利，清廷将被迫接受更沉重赔款与外国驻兵，并进一步依赖地方督抚维系统治。然而危机也可能迫使朝廷推进新政、重建新军、改革教育与财政。若改革不足，则帝国在未来十余年内极可能走向体制性崩解
outlook.en: The short-term outlook was extremely grave. Defeat in North China would force the dynasty to accept heavier indemnities and foreign military presence while relying even more on provincial governors to sustain rule. Yet the crisis might also compel sweeping reforms in the military, education, and fiscal system. If such reforms proved insufficient, the empire was highly likely to move toward systemic collapse within the following decade

description.zh: 中国名义上的统治帝国，1900年因义和团运动与列强干涉而陷入严重危机。
description.en: The nominal ruling empire of China, plunged into severe crisis in 1900 by the Boxer Uprising and foreign intervention.

leader.en: Cao Futian, Zhang Decheng, et al.

ideology.zh: 扶清灭洋、民间宗教与武术结社
ideology.en: Support the Qing, destroy the foreigners; folk religion and martial arts societies

description.zh: 民间武装约10万人，无正规训练和统一指挥，以刀矛冷兵器为主
description.en: Approximately 100,000 irregular fighters without formal training or unified command, mainly armed with swords and spears

relationship.zh: 1900年得到慈禧太后默许和部分支持，以「扶清灭洋」为号召。围攻北京使馆区，直接导致八国联军入侵。
relationship.en: In 1900, tacitly endorsed and partially supported by Empress Dowager Cixi under the slogan 'Support Qing, Destroy Foreigners.' The siege of Beijing's Legation Quarter directly led to the Eight-Nation Alliance invasion.

description.zh: 19世纪末兴起于山东的民间反洋教运动，融合民间宗教与武术。1900年在慈禧默许下进入北京，引发八国联军侵华，最终导致《辛丑条约》的签订。
description.en: An anti-foreign popular movement that arose in Shandong in the late 19th century, combining folk religion with martial arts. In 1900, with Cixi's tacit approval, they entered Beijing, triggering the Eight-Nation Alliance invasion and the Boxer Protocol.

ideology.zh: 君主立宪、西学中用、制度改革
ideology.en: Constitutional monarchy, learning from the West, institutional reform

relationship.zh: 1898年戊戌变法失败后被镇压，康梁流亡海外。1900年仍试图通过保皇会等组织推动改革，但影响力有限。
relationship.en: Suppressed after the failure of the Hundred Days' Reform in 1898, with Kang and Liang in exile. In 1900, they still attempted reform through organizations like the Protect the Emperor Society, but with limited influence.

description.zh: 以康有为、梁启超为代表的晚清改良派，主张学习日本明治维新，推行君主立宪。1898年百日维新失败后转入海外活动。
description.en: Late Qing reformists represented by Kang Youwei and Liang Qichao, advocating learning from Japan's Meiji Restoration to implement constitutional monarchy. After the failure of the Hundred Days' Reform in 1898, they shifted to overseas activities.

title.en: President of Protect the Emperor Society

role.zh: 维新运动理论领袖
role.en: Theoretical leader of reform movement

role.zh: 维新思想传播者
role.en: Propagator of reform ideas

ideology.zh: 民族主义、民权主义、推翻满清
ideology.en: Nationalism, democracy, overthrow of Manchu Qing

headquarters.zh: 日本东京、檀香山（海外流亡）

description.zh: 海外华侨和国内秘密会党力量，多次发动武装起义均告失败
description.en: Overseas Chinese and domestic secret society forces, multiple armed uprisings all failed

relationship.zh: 致力于推翻清朝统治，建立民主共和国。1900年发动惠州起义失败。与维新派在路线上存在根本分歧——革命还是改良。
relationship.en: Dedicated to overthrowing Qing rule and establishing a democratic republic. The 1900 Huizhou Uprising failed. Had fundamental disagreements with reformists over revolution vs. reform.

description.zh: 孙中山1894年创立兴中会，后发展为同盟会（1905年），是辛亥革命的领导力量。1900年正在海外积极筹划反清武装起义。
description.en: Sun Yat-sen founded the Xingzhonghui in 1894, later evolving into the Tongmenghui (1905), which led the 1911 Revolution. In 1900, they were actively planning anti-Qing armed uprisings overseas.

ruler.zh: 克里希纳拉贾·瓦迪亚尔四世

governmentForm.zh: 君主制土邦，在英属印度宗主权下实行受约束的藩属统治
governmentForm.en: Monarchical princely state under British Indian paramountcy with constrained subordinate rule

socialStructure.zh: 社会以乡村农业人口为主体，叠加种姓、地主、宫廷贵族、城市商人、手工业者与新兴受教育中产阶层构成；国家在传统印度社会结构之上推动官僚化与现代教育改革
socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly rural and agrarian, layered by caste, landlords, court nobility, urban merchants, artisans, and a growing educated middle class; the state pursued bureaucratic and educational modernization atop traditional Indian social structures.

rulingClass.zh: 瓦迪亚尔王室、宫廷贵族、迪万及其文官体系、地方地主与与王室合作的高种姓精英
rulingClass.en: The Wadiyar royal house, court nobility, the Diwan and civil bureaucracy, local landed elites, and high-caste notables aligned with the state

succession.zh: 王朝世袭，通常按瓦迪亚尔家族父系继承；继承须获英印政府承认
succession.en: Hereditary dynastic succession, usually through the patrilineal Wadiyar line; succession required recognition by the Government of India.

structure.zh: 1900年的迈索尔由大君名义统治，实际行政由迪万及国务机构负责，并受驻迈索尔英国参政官监督。中央政府处理财政、司法、公共工程、教育、警务与宫廷事务，地方则通过县、塔卢克与村社层级管理
structure.en: In 1900 Mysore was formally ruled by the Maharaja, while day-to-day administration was conducted through the Diwan and state departments under the watch of the British Resident. The central government managed finance, justice, public works, education, police, and court affairs, while local administration operated through districts, taluks, and villages.

function.zh: 统筹全邦行政、起草政令、协调各部门并向大君与英国参政官汇报
function.en: Coordinated the state administration, drafted orders, supervised departments, and reported to the Maharaja and the British Resident.

function.zh: 负责地税、预算、审计、国库、盐酒税及各类国家收入
function.en: Handled land revenue, budgeting, audit, treasury management, excise, and other state revenues.

function.zh: 管理各级法院、民刑审判、法律解释与监狱行政
function.en: Administered courts, civil and criminal justice, legal interpretation, and prison administration.

function.zh: 建设和维护道路、桥梁、灌溉、官署、铁路配套与城市基础设施
function.en: Built and maintained roads, bridges, irrigation works, government buildings, rail facilities, and urban infrastructure.

function.zh: 管理学校、师范教育、奖学金、教材与近代行政人才培养
function.en: Managed schools, teacher training, scholarships, textbooks, and the formation of modern administrative talent.

function.zh: 负责治安、情报、地方秩序、边境巡查与集会监管
function.en: Oversaw policing, intelligence, internal order, frontier patrols, and supervision of assemblies.

function.zh: 管理宫廷开支、典礼、王室产业与对外礼宾事务
function.en: Managed court expenditure, ceremonies, royal estates, and matters of protocol.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为若干县与塔卢克，由国家任命官员征收地税、维持治安并监督村社。村级层面仍依赖传统首领、会计与地方长老协助治理，形成现代官僚制度与乡村惯例并存的格局
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into districts and taluks, where state-appointed officers collected land revenue, maintained order, and supervised village affairs. At the village level, traditional headmen, accountants, and elders remained important, producing a mixed system of modern bureaucracy and customary rural governance.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为英印法制影响下的混合法：民事和刑事审判逐步制度化，部分领域沿用印度习惯法、宗教个人法与王国成文规章；终审与重大政治事项受英国宗主权框架影响
legalSystem.en: The legal system was a hybrid shaped by British Indian legal influence: civil and criminal adjudication became increasingly regularized, while customary law, religious personal law, and state regulations remained important in some areas; final authority in major political matters was constrained by British paramountcy.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以土地税为核心，辅以消费税、关卡及国家专卖或许可收入。对农业社会而言地税仍是最重要税源，但改革倾向于较规范的测量、分类与征收制度，以减少旧式包税弊端
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was centered on land revenue, supplemented by excise, transit duties, and state monopoly or licensing receipts. For this agrarian society, land tax remained the principal source, but reforms favored more regular survey, classification, and collection methods to reduce older farming abuses.

religion.zh: 居民以印度教为主，兼有伊斯兰教、耆那教与基督教少数群体。王室传统上支持印度教宗教机构，同时在近代行政体制下对多宗教社群维持相对包容
religion.en: The population was predominantly Hindu, with Muslim, Jain, and Christian minorities. The royal house traditionally patronized Hindu institutions while maintaining a relatively inclusive stance toward multiple religious communities within the modernizing state.

philosophy.zh: 文化思想结合南印度婆罗门学术传统、印度教王权观念以及19世纪末的实用改革主义，强调教育、秩序、公共工程与有限度的制度现代化
philosophy.en: The intellectual climate combined South Indian Brahmanical scholarship, Hindu ideas of kingship, and late nineteenth-century pragmatic reformism, emphasizing education, order, public works, and limited institutional modernization.

writingSystem.zh: 行政与文学主要使用卡纳达文，部分高级行政、法政与对英事务使用英语；另有梵文、乌尔都文与泰米尔文在宗教、法务和社群生活中流通
writingSystem.en: Kannada was the principal language of administration and literature, while English was important in higher administration, law, and dealings with the British; Sanskrit, Urdu, and Tamil also circulated in religious, legal, and community contexts.

culturalAchievements.zh: 迈索尔以宫廷音乐、卡纳达文学、宗教建筑赞助、手工艺和近代教育发展著称。19世纪后期以来，该邦因较高行政效率、学校扩张、公共工程建设以及对技术与工业试验的支持而在印度土邦中声誉突出
culturalAchievements.en: Mysore was noted for court music, Kannada literature, patronage of religious architecture, handicrafts, and advances in modern education. From the late nineteenth century onward, the state gained distinction among Indian princely states for relatively efficient administration, school expansion, public works, and support for technical and industrial experimentation.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属德拉威语系，以卡纳达语为主，并有乌尔都语、泰米尔语、泰卢固语等区域语言
languageFamily.en: The principal language belonged to the Dravidian family, especially Kannada, alongside Urdu, Tamil, Telugu, and other regional languages.

gdpDescription.zh: 迈索尔1900年的经济以农业为主，但在印度土邦中现代化程度较高。其经济基础来自稻米、杂粮、棉花、甘蔗、桑蚕和林产，同时受益于较完善的财政管理、灌溉与交通建设。与英属印度相比规模不大，但在南印度属于富庶且治理较有效的王国之一
gdpDescription.en: Mysore's economy in 1900 was primarily agrarian, but relatively advanced for a princely state. Its base rested on rice, millets, cotton, sugarcane, sericulture, and forest products, while benefiting from comparatively sound fiscal management and investments in irrigation and transport. Small beside British India as a whole, it was nonetheless one of the more prosperous and effectively governed states in South India.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、蚕桑与生丝、棉纺与织造、制糖、林业、檀香相关产业、手工艺、采矿及初步近代制造业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, sericulture and raw silk, cotton spinning and weaving, sugar processing, forestry, sandalwood-related industries, handicrafts, mining, and early modern manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 大米、杂粮、棉花、生丝、纺织品、糖、咖啡、檀香木、木材、皮革及手工业品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, millets, cotton, raw silk, textiles, sugar, coffee, sandalwood, timber, leather, and handicraft goods

householdWealth.zh: 普通农村家庭财富有限，主要体现在小块耕地、牲畜、农具与首饰。城市商人、放贷者、地主及与国家合同有关者积累了更可观资产。与周边多数农业地区相比，迈索尔因行政较稳健而具备略高的民间储蓄与土地价值
householdWealth.en: Ordinary rural households possessed modest wealth, mainly in small plots, livestock, tools, and jewelry. Urban merchants, moneylenders, landlords, and those tied to state contracts accumulated more substantial assets. Compared with many neighboring agrarian regions, Mysore's steadier administration supported somewhat better household savings and land values.

economicSystem.zh: 以农业地租经济为基础、受国家改革推动的混合型经济；私营市场、手工业与区域贸易活跃，但铁路、税制、法制和部分资源开发 increasingly 与英印市场整合
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy grounded in agrarian rents but increasingly shaped by state reform; private markets, handicrafts, and regional trade were active, while railways, taxation, legal institutions, and parts of resource extraction became increasingly integrated with the British Indian market.

source.zh: 林业、国有产业与王室地产收益
source.en: Forestry, state enterprises, and crown estate income
Transit duties, rail-related receipts, and miscellaneous fees

category.zh: 债务、准备金与其他支出

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，拥有可观现金准备与较强借贷信誉，这使迈索尔能够支持铁路、灌溉和教育等长期建设。其财政健康在印度土邦中颇具声望，但仍受英印总体金融环境和银价波动影响
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound, with substantial cash reserves and comparatively strong creditworthiness, enabling Mysore to support long-term investments in railways, irrigation, and education. Its fiscal health was highly regarded among princely states, though still affected by the wider British Indian financial environment and silver-price fluctuations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏谨慎稳健，强调平衡预算、积累准备金并将盈余投入基础设施、学校和行政改良，而非大规模对外扩张。国家倾向以渐进式投资促进生产力与社会秩序
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was cautious and stability-oriented, emphasizing balanced budgets, reserve accumulation, and reinvestment of surpluses into infrastructure, schools, and administrative improvements rather than external expansion. The state favored gradual investment to raise productivity and social order.

description.zh: 构成迈索尔州军核心，承担驻防、仪仗、内部安全与必要时协助英印行动的任务，装备以后装步枪为主
description.en: Formed the core of the Mysore State Forces, handling garrison duty, ceremonial functions, internal security, and if required support to British Indian operations, armed mainly with breech-loading rifles.

description.zh: 规模不大，兼具宫廷仪仗、通信、侦察与快速治安用途
description.en: Small in scale, serving court ceremonial roles as well as communication, reconnaissance, and rapid security functions.

description.zh: 装备有限数量野战炮与礼炮，作战能力从属于英印总体军事体系
description.en: Equipped with a limited number of field guns and ceremonial artillery pieces, with combat capability subordinate to the wider British Indian military framework.

description.zh: 用于维持国内秩序、押运、边界巡查与镇压地方骚乱
description.en: Used for internal order, escorts, frontier patrols, and suppression of local disturbances.

name.zh: 预备役与地方征调部队

description.zh: 由退伍军人、地方武装传统和可动员人力构成，主要用于战时补充与应急治安任务
description.en: Composed of veterans, local martial traditions, and mobilizable manpower, chiefly intended for wartime reinforcement and emergency security duties.

commanderInChief.zh: 迈索尔大君名义上为最高统帅，实际军事事务由英印监督下的州军指挥官负责
commanderInChief.en: The Maharaja was the nominal commander-in-chief, while practical military affairs were handled by the commander of the state forces under British Indian supervision.

technology.zh: 军事技术处于19世纪末水平，使用后装步枪、有限火炮、电报通信和铁路运输支援，但缺乏独立军工体系与现代参谋制度。其军力更适合内部治安与象征性防务，而非独立对外战争
technology.en: Military technology stood at a late nineteenth-century level, using breech-loading rifles, limited artillery, telegraph communications, and railway support, but lacking an independent industrial armaments base and fully modern staff system. Its forces were better suited to internal security and symbolic defense than to independent external warfare.

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非邻国入侵，而是内部骚乱、财政压力、旱灾引发的社会不稳以及在英国宗主权框架下军事自主权受限。对外安全基本依赖英属印度体系
threats.en: The principal threats were not foreign invasion but internal unrest, fiscal strain, social instability during drought, and the limited military autonomy imposed by British paramountcy. External security depended largely on the British Indian system.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约五百万，绝大多数居住于乡村，从事农业与相关副业。人口分布受灌溉条件、土壤与商业通道影响，南部和中部核心地区较为稠密，城市人口比例仍低但呈缓慢上升
populationDescription.en: The population was about five million, with the overwhelming majority living in the countryside and engaged in agriculture and related work. Distribution was shaped by irrigation, soils, and commercial routes; the southern and central core zones were denser, while the urban share remained low but was gradually rising.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括王室与宫廷贵族、婆罗门及其他高种姓官僚精英、地主与村社首领、城市商人和放贷者、手工业者、小农、佃农、农业劳工，以及处于社会底层并受歧视的被压迫种姓群体。19世纪末教育扩张后，教师、律师、书记员和工程技术人员构成新兴中间阶层
socialClasses.en: Social strata included the royal family and court nobility, Brahman and other high-caste bureaucratic elites, landlords and village headmen, urban merchants and moneylenders, artisans, smallholders, tenants, agricultural laborers, and oppressed caste groups facing discrimination. With the spread of education in the late nineteenth century, teachers, lawyers, clerks, and technical personnel formed an emerging middle stratum.

allies.zh: 无独立同盟体系；实际上依附并合作于英属印度及大英帝国
allies.en: No independent alliance system; in practice aligned and cooperative with British India and the British Empire

enemies.zh: 无正式宿敌；政治约束主要来自英国宗主权而非公开敌对国家
enemies.en: No formal state enemies; the main political constraint came from British paramountcy rather than open hostile powers

foreignPolicy.zh: 迈索尔并无完全独立外交权，其对外政策主要体现为对英合作、维持内部稳定、展示行政能力，并在宗主权许可范围内争取更大声望与自治空间
foreignPolicy.en: Mysore did not possess fully independent foreign policy powers; its external posture consisted mainly of cooperation with the British, maintenance of internal stability, display of administrative competence, and the pursuit of greater prestige and room for autonomy within the limits of paramountcy.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代的晚期工业化与殖民现代化阶段
era.en: Late industrial and colonial-modernizing phase of the Age of Imperialism

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路延伸、电报、近代灌溉工程、制度化财政审计、现代学校教育、城市供水与道路建设，以及对电力与工业试验的早期兴趣。迈索尔在印度土邦中属于较积极吸收近代技术和行政方法者
keyInnovations.en: Railway extension, telegraphy, modern irrigation works, institutionalized fiscal audit, modern schooling, urban water supply and road building, and early interest in electricity and industrial experimentation. Mysore ranked among the more active princely states in adopting modern technologies and administrative methods.

strengths.zh: 政治稳定、财政较健全、行政改革声誉高、教育与公共工程投入积极、农业基础稳固且具备一定工业化潜力。王室与官僚体系合作相对顺畅，使其成为南印度治理最受赞誉的土邦之一
strengths.en: Political stability, comparatively healthy finances, a strong reputation for administrative reform, active investment in education and public works, and a solid agrarian base with some industrial potential. Cooperation between the monarchy and bureaucracy made it one of the most highly regarded princely states in South India.

weaknesses.zh: 主权受限，外交与国防依赖英属印度；经济仍以农业为主，易受季风失常和价格波动影响；社会结构受种姓不平等与乡村贫困制约，工业规模仍有限
weaknesses.en: Its sovereignty was restricted, with diplomacy and defense dependent on British India; the economy remained largely agrarian and vulnerable to monsoon failure and price fluctuations; social development was constrained by caste inequality and rural poverty, while industrial scale remained limited.

outlook.zh: 1900年的迈索尔前景总体良好。只要维持审慎财政、继续推进教育、灌溉与交通建设，并在英国框架内争取更大行政自主，该邦有望在20世纪初进一步成为印度最现代化、最富治理声望的土邦之一
outlook.en: Mysore's outlook in 1900 was broadly favorable. If it maintained prudent finances, continued expanding education, irrigation, and transport, and secured greater administrative latitude within the British framework, it was well positioned to become one of the most modernized and best-governed princely states in early twentieth-century India.

description.zh: 南印度重要土邦，以行政改革和近代化趋势著称。
description.en: A major South Indian princely state noted for administrative reform and modernization.

governmentForm.zh: 君主专制下的世袭王国，中央权力薄弱并受列强财政与外交压力严重制约
governmentForm.en: A hereditary kingdom under autocratic monarchy, with weak central authority heavily constrained by foreign financial and diplomatic pressure

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与卡扎尔宗族贵族、宫廷官僚、乌理玛与宗教土地持有者、部族首领、城市商人、手工业者、农民及游牧民构成，地方与部族势力常强于中央官僚体系
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the royal house and Qajar tribal aristocracy, court officials, ulama and religious landholders, tribal chiefs, urban merchants, artisans, peasants, and nomads, with provincial and tribal forces often stronger than the central bureaucracy

rulingClass.zh: 卡扎尔王室、宫廷显贵、大地主、部族汗王与高阶什叶派宗教学者
rulingClass.en: The Qajar royal family, court grandees, major landholders, tribal khans, and senior Shi'a religious scholars

succession.zh: 王位由卡扎尔王朝男性宗室世袭，通常由在位沙阿指定王储并获宫廷与主要权贵承认
succession.en: The throne was inherited within the male line of the Qajar dynasty, usually through a crown prince designated by the reigning shah and recognized by the court and major elites

structure.zh: 国家以沙阿及宫廷为核心，通过首相、大臣、省长和税务包收人治理；正式机构存在，但决策高度依赖个人关系、恩庇网络、地方协商与外国贷款条件
structure.en: The state was centered on the shah and court, governing through the grand vizier, ministers, provincial governors, and tax farmers; formal institutions existed, but decision-making depended heavily on personal ties, patronage networks, provincial bargaining, and the conditions of foreign loans

function.zh: 管理王室事务、宫廷财政、礼仪、任命与对沙阿的日常奏报
function.en: Managed royal affairs, court finances, ceremony, appointments, and daily reporting to the shah

function.zh: 协调各部、发布诏令、处理中央行政与地方督办
function.en: Coordinated ministries, issued decrees, and handled central administration and provincial supervision

function.zh: 征收地税、关税、管理借款、预算、国债与国库支付
function.en: Collected land taxes and customs, managed loans, budgets, public debt, and treasury payments

function.zh: 处理与俄国、英国、奥斯曼及其他列强的关系、条约与使节事务
function.en: Handled relations, treaties, and diplomatic missions with Russia, Britain, the Ottoman Empire, and other powers

function.zh: 管理常备军、哥萨克旅、军饷、军械与地方征调
function.en: Managed the standing army, the Cossack Brigade, military pay, arms, and provincial levies

name.en: Posts, Telegraphs, and Public Works Administration

function.zh: 负责邮政、电报线路、道路、部分桥梁与国家通讯设施
function.en: Oversaw postal services, telegraph lines, roads, some bridges, and state communications infrastructure

function.zh: 协调世俗官署与伊斯兰法庭、登记文书、处理部分刑民案件与宗教捐产事务
function.en: Coordinated secular offices and Islamic courts, registered documents, handled some civil and criminal matters, and oversaw religious endowments

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由各省总督、城镇官员、税务承包者、部族首领与宗教名流共同运作；中央对偏远地区控制有限，阿塞拜疆、呼罗珊、法尔斯与南部湾岸常依赖地方协商
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provincial governors, town officials, tax contractors, tribal chiefs, and religious notables; central control over distant regions was limited, and areas such as Azerbaijan, Khorasan, Fars, and the southern Gulf often depended on local bargaining

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系并存：什叶派伊斯兰法庭处理婚姻、继承与许多民事事务，王室与总督则通过习惯法、敕令和行政裁断处理治安、税务与政治案件
legalSystem.en: The legal system was dual: Shi'a Islamic courts handled marriage, inheritance, and many civil matters, while the crown and governors used customary law, decrees, and administrative judgment for security, taxation, and political cases

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以地税、农业税、关税、王室领地收入、垄断与特许经营费为主，征税效率低且常由包税制度与地方中介层层盘剥；关税收入 increasingly tied to foreign-supervised debt service
taxationSystem.en: Revenue relied on land taxes, agricultural dues, customs, crown land income, monopolies, and concession fees; collection was inefficient and often siphoned off through tax farming and intermediaries, while customs revenue was increasingly tied to foreign-supervised debt service

religion.zh: 官方与社会主导宗教为十二伊玛目派什叶派伊斯兰教，宗教学者在教育、司法、慈善和政治动员中影响深远，同时国内亦有逊尼派、亚美尼亚基督徒、犹太人和琐罗亚斯德教徒等少数群体
religion.en: The official and dominant religion was Twelver Shi'a Islam, whose scholars exerted deep influence in education, law, charity, and political mobilization, while Sunni Muslims, Armenian Christians, Jews, and Zoroastrians formed important minorities

philosophy.zh: 思想以什叶派法学、伊斯兰哲学、波斯王权传统和日益增长的改革主义为核心；19世纪末出现要求限制专制、整顿财政与引入法治的知识潮流
philosophy.en: Intellectual life centered on Shi'a jurisprudence, Islamic philosophy, Persian traditions of kingship, and growing reformism; by the late nineteenth century currents had emerged calling for limits on autocracy, fiscal reform, and the rule of law

writingSystem.zh: 书写系统为波斯-阿拉伯字母，行政、文学和宗教文献主要以波斯文书写，阿拉伯文在宗教学术中仍具重要地位
writingSystem.en: The writing system used the Perso-Arabic script, with Persian dominant in administration, literature, and public life, while Arabic retained major importance in religious scholarship

culturalAchievements.zh: 波斯在诗歌、历史编纂、细密画、地毯、金属工艺、建筑装饰与城市礼仪文化方面传统深厚；卡扎尔时期还发展出宫廷摄影、石版印刷、报刊出版与近代旅行文学
culturalAchievements.en: Persia possessed deep traditions in poetry, historiography, miniature painting, carpets, metalwork, architectural ornament, and urban courtly culture; the Qajar era also saw the growth of court photography, lithographic printing, newspapers, and modern travel writing

languageFamily.zh: 主导语言波斯语属印欧语系伊朗语族，国内并存阿塞拜疆突厥语、库尔德语、阿拉伯语、俾路支语、亚美尼亚语等多种语言
languageFamily.en: The dominant language, Persian, belonged to the Iranian branch of the Indo-European family, while Azerbaijani Turkic, Kurdish, Arabic, Balochi, Armenian, and other languages were also spoken across the country

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年前后的波斯经济以低生产率农业、游牧畜产、手工业和转口贸易为主，国家财政脆弱、交通基础设施薄弱，虽保持名义独立，但经济命脉 increasingly受俄英贷款、关税安排与特许权渗透影响
gdpDescription.en: Around 1900 the Persian economy was dominated by low-productivity agriculture, pastoral output, handicrafts, and transit trade; state finances were fragile and transport infrastructure weak, and although the country remained nominally independent, key economic arteries were increasingly affected by Russian and British loans, customs arrangements, and concessions

mainIndustries.zh: 粮食种植、畜牧、地毯织造、丝绸、棉纺与织布、皮革、染料、鸦片、小规模采矿、地方手工业与商队贸易
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, livestock raising, carpet weaving, silk, cotton spinning and weaving, leather, dyes, opium, small-scale mining, local handicrafts, and caravan trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口地毯、鸦片、棉花、皮张、羊毛、干果、丝绸与少量米；进口纺织品、糖、茶、金属制品、军火、机械、煤油和奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included carpets, opium, cotton, hides, wool, dried fruits, silk, and some rice; imports included textiles, sugar, tea, metal goods, arms, machinery, kerosene, and luxury items

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭财产有限，主要以土地使用权、牲畜、地毯、谷物储备和银币形式保存；城市商人和部分地主拥有显著财富，而农民普遍受债务、赋税与收成波动影响
householdWealth.en: Most households possessed little wealth, storing value mainly in land-use rights, livestock, carpets, grain reserves, and silver coin; urban merchants and some landlords held substantial wealth, while peasants were widely constrained by debt, taxation, and harvest fluctuations

economicSystem.zh: 以农业与手工业为基础的君主制传统经济，夹杂地方市场、行会、税务包收、特许垄断和对外依附性贸易，呈半殖民地式不平等整合
economicSystem.en: A monarchical traditional economy based on agriculture and handicrafts, mixed with local markets, guilds, tax farming, concessionary monopolies, and externally dependent trade, amounting to a semi-colonially unequal integration into world markets

source.zh: 特许经营费与垄断收入

category.zh: 邮电、道路与有限公共工程
category.en: Posts, telegraphs, roads, and limited public works

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库现金储备偏低且常被预支，部分关税收入被抵押给外债；财政稳定高度依赖俄英贷款与对未来收入的质押
treasuryDescription.en: Cash reserves in the treasury were low and often pre-committed, with part of customs income mortgaged against foreign debt; fiscal stability depended heavily on Russian and British loans and the pledging of future revenue

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以临时加税、借外债、出让特许权和提前抵押关税为主，缺乏系统预算改革，短期维持王朝运转却进一步削弱主权与信用
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy relied mainly on ad hoc taxation, foreign borrowing, concession grants, and the advance mortgaging of customs, lacking systematic budget reform; this sustained the dynasty in the short term while further weakening sovereignty and creditworthiness

description.zh: 装备与训练不均，部分部队采用欧式操练，但军纪、后勤和薪饷普遍不足
description.en: Unevenly equipped and trained; some units used European drill, but discipline, logistics, and pay were generally inadequate

description.zh: 由地方和部族首领动员，在边境巡防和快速突袭中仍有价值，但难以统一指挥
description.en: Mobilized by local and tribal leaders, they retained value in frontier patrol and rapid raiding but were difficult to command uniformly

description.zh: 受俄国军官影响最深、训练和纪律最佳的精锐部队，负责宫廷保卫与关键政治军事任务
description.en: The best-trained and most disciplined elite force, strongly influenced by Russian officers and used for court protection and key political-military tasks

description.zh: 拥有一定数量旧式与部分近代火炮，但维护、弹药供应和机动能力不足
description.en: Possessed a number of older and some more modern guns, but maintenance, ammunition supply, and mobility were insufficient

description.zh: 负责城镇治安、交通线与税收保护，质量参差不齐，常受地方权势人物左右
description.en: Responsible for urban security, communications lines, and tax protection; quality varied widely and units were often influenced by local power holders

commanderInChief.zh: 穆扎法尔丁·沙阿

technology.zh: 军队主要使用19世纪后期步枪、旧式火炮、电报与有限铁路配合；训练体系薄弱，装备来源杂乱，精锐单位依赖外国教官与进口军械
technology.en: The military chiefly used late nineteenth-century rifles, older artillery, telegraph communications, and limited rail support; training institutions were weak, equipment sources mixed, and elite units depended on foreign instructors and imported arms

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非全面外敌入侵，而是俄国与英国势力竞争、边境部族骚动、地方离心、奥斯曼边境纠纷以及国家财政不足导致的军队失能
threats.en: The main threats were not full-scale foreign conquest but Russo-British rivalry, frontier tribal unrest, provincial centrifugalism, Ottoman border disputes, and military dysfunction caused by fiscal weakness

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千万，分布高度分散，多数居于乡村绿洲、山谷与农业带，另有相当比例为季节性游牧或半游牧群体；全国人口受饥荒、疫病和交通阻隔影响显著
populationDescription.en: The population was about ten million and highly dispersed, with most people living in rural oases, valleys, and agricultural belts, while a significant share remained seasonally nomadic or semi-nomadic; famine, disease, and poor communications strongly affected demographic life

socialClasses.zh: 上层包括王室、贵族、部族首领、大地主、高阶乌理玛与大商人；中间阶层为文书、较富裕手工业者、小地主和城市店主；下层主要是佃农、贫农、城市雇工、手工业徒工与游牧牧民
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the royal house, nobles, tribal chiefs, major landlords, senior ulama, and great merchants; the middle layers consisted of clerks, better-off artisans, small landholders, and urban shopkeepers; the lower strata were mainly tenant farmers, poor peasants, urban laborers, craft apprentices, and pastoral nomads

allies.zh: 波斯在1900年缺乏可靠平等盟友，通常在俄国与英国之间谨慎周旋，偶尔寻求法国、奥斯曼或其他欧洲国家作为平衡力量
allies.en: Persia lacked reliable equal allies in 1900, generally maneuvering cautiously between Russia and Britain while occasionally seeking France, the Ottoman Empire, or other European states as counterweights

enemies.zh: 没有明确宣战中的主要敌国，但俄英两国对内政和财政的深度干预构成最严重外部压力；同时与奥斯曼在边界、部族与宗教圣地事务上存在长期摩擦
enemies.en: It had no principal enemy in a declared war, but Russian and British penetration of domestic politics and finance posed the gravest external pressure; there was also longstanding friction with the Ottoman Empire over borders, tribes, and holy sites

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护名义独立、通过列强平衡保存王朝、避免直接军事冲突并争取贷款和外交承认为主，但谈判地位日益削弱
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed above all to preserve nominal independence, protect the dynasty through great-power balancing, avoid direct military confrontation, and secure loans and diplomatic recognition, though Persia's bargaining position was steadily weakening

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 电报网络、石版印刷、近代邮政、宫廷摄影、有限的蒸汽交通联系、欧式军训、近代学校与报刊传播开始改变国家治理与城市公共生活，但工业化程度仍低
keyInnovations.en: Telegraph networks, lithographic printing, modern postal services, court photography, limited steam transport links, European-style military drill, modern schools, and newspaper circulation began to reshape state administration and urban public life, though industrialization remained low

strengths.zh: 波斯拥有深厚文明传统、强烈宗教凝聚力、重要的商路位置、活跃的城市商人与手工业网络，以及在俄英之间维持形式独立的外交经验
strengths.en: Persia possessed a deep civilizational heritage, strong religious cohesion, an important commercial position, active urban merchant and artisanal networks, and diplomatic experience in preserving formal independence between Russia and Britain

weaknesses.zh: 国家财政破产化倾向严重，中央集权薄弱，军队现代化不足，地方与部族分权明显，行政腐败普遍，外债与特许权侵蚀主权，交通与教育发展落后
weaknesses.en: The state suffered from severe tendencies toward fiscal bankruptcy, weak centralization, inadequate military modernization, marked provincial and tribal fragmentation, widespread corruption, the erosion of sovereignty through debt and concessions, and lagging transport and education

outlook.zh: 1900年的波斯处于衰落但未崩解的关口；若不进行财政、法律与行政改革，列强控制将进一步加深，而城市商人、知识分子与乌理玛的不满正积累为未来立宪运动的政治能量
outlook.en: In 1900 Persia stood at a point of decline without total collapse; unless fiscal, legal, and administrative reforms were undertaken, great-power control would deepen further, while mounting dissatisfaction among merchants, intellectuals, and the ulama was accumulating into the political energy that would soon feed the Constitutional Movement

description.zh: 名义独立但深受俄英经济与外交渗透影响的西亚王国。
description.en: A nominally independent West Asian kingdom deeply penetrated by Russian and British influence.

governmentForm.zh: 以埃米尔为核心的世袭伊斯兰君主制，中央集权有限，依赖部族协商与地方权贵合作
governmentForm.en: A hereditary Islamic monarchy centered on the Emir, with limited centralization and reliance on tribal consultation and cooperation with regional notables

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与萨达尔贵族、部族首领、乌里玛与苏非教团、城市商人和手工业者、农民与游牧民构成，地方身份与部族关系比统一国家认同更强
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the royal house and sardār nobles, tribal chiefs, ulama and Sufi networks, urban merchants and artisans, peasants, and nomads; local and tribal identities were often stronger than a unified national identity

rulingClass.zh: 巴拉克宰王室、穆罕默德宰贵族家族、重要普什图部族首领以及与朝廷合作的宗教领袖
rulingClass.en: The Barakzai royal family, Muhammadzai noble lineages, major Pashtun tribal chiefs, and religious leaders aligned with the court

succession.zh: 王朝内部的世袭继承，以埃米尔指定与实力均衡为主，但常受宫廷派系、兄弟竞争与部族支持影响
succession.en: Dynastic hereditary succession within the ruling house, guided by emirial designation and political balance, though often shaped by court factions, fraternal rivalry, and tribal backing

structure.zh: 中央政府规模不大，以埃米尔宫廷为核心，设有处理财政、军务、内政、司法和对外事务的宫廷机构；对各省与边地的控制通过总督、军事驻防、补助金和部族协议实现
structure.en: The central government was modest in size and revolved around the emirial court, with palace offices handling finance, military affairs, internal administration, justice, and foreign relations; authority over provinces and frontier regions was exercised through governors, garrisons, subsidies, and tribal agreements

name.zh: 埃米尔宫廷与御前秘书处

function.zh: 管理诏令、奏报、官员任命、情报与宫廷协调，是国家决策中枢
function.en: Managed decrees, petitions, appointments, intelligence, and court coordination, serving as the core of state decision-making

function.zh: 征收地税、关税、牲畜税与各类杂税，监督国库与地方上缴
function.en: Collected land tax, customs duties, livestock taxes, and assorted levies, and supervised the treasury and provincial remittances

function.zh: 负责常备军、军械、边防驻军、征召与部族武装联络
function.en: Oversaw the standing army, armaments, frontier garrisons, mobilization, and coordination with tribal forces

function.zh: 管理省长、地方治安、道路、驿站和中央对地方的行政联系
function.en: Managed provincial governors, local security, roads, post stations, and administrative links between the center and the provinces

function.zh: 协调伊斯兰法官、宗教学校、瓦克夫事务与重要案件裁决
function.en: Coordinated Islamic judges, religious schools, waqf affairs, and adjudication of major cases

function.zh: 处理与英属印度、俄国、波斯和布哈拉等外部政权的关系，并管理边界联络
function.en: Handled relations with British India, Russia, Persia, Bukhara, and other external powers, and managed frontier communications

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以省、地区和县级单位为框架，但实际治理高度依赖总督、驻军指挥官、部族长老与宗教人士。喀布尔、坎大哈、赫拉特、阿富汗突厥斯坦等地受中央影响较强，东部山地与边界部落区则多以协议和津贴维持服从。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was structured around provinces, districts, and county-level jurisdictions, but actual governance depended heavily on governors, garrison commanders, tribal elders, and religious figures. Kabul, Kandahar, Herat, and Afghan Turkestan were more directly influenced by the center, while eastern mountain and tribal frontier regions were often managed through agreements and subsidies.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以哈乃斐派伊斯兰法为核心，辅以埃米尔敕令、习惯法和部族规范。城市与定居地区更多由卡齐法庭处理民事与宗教事务，边地则常由部族议会和地方首领仲裁。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was centered on Hanafi Islamic law, supplemented by emirial decrees, customary law, and tribal norms. In towns and settled regions, qazi courts handled civil and religious matters, while frontier areas were often governed through tribal councils and local arbitration.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要包括农业土地税、灌溉耕地课税、牲畜税、市场税、关税、过路费和若干临时摊派。边地部族有时以兵役、忠诚承诺或集体贡纳代替规则税制。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied chiefly on agricultural land taxes, assessments on irrigated cultivation, livestock taxes, market dues, customs duties, transit tolls, and various extraordinary levies. Frontier tribes sometimes substituted military service, loyalty undertakings, or collective tribute for regular taxation.

religion.zh: 国教与社会主导信仰为逊尼派伊斯兰教，主要遵循哈乃斐法学；什叶派社群、伊斯玛仪派群体以及多种苏非教团亦存在于国内若干地区
religion.en: The dominant religion of state and society was Sunni Islam, chiefly following the Hanafi school; Shia communities, Ismaili groups, and various Sufi orders were also present in several parts of the country

philosophy.zh: 思想生活以伊斯兰法学、波斯文学传统、苏非伦理、部族荣誉观念和君主保境安民的实用政治思想为主，尚未形成系统性的现代民族主义意识形态
philosophy.en: Intellectual life was shaped by Islamic jurisprudence, the Persian literary tradition, Sufi ethics, tribal codes of honor, and a practical monarchical concern with order and defense, rather than a fully developed modern nationalist ideology

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母书写的波斯语和普什图语，行政与文书中波斯语地位尤为重要
writingSystem.en: Persian and Pashto written in the Arabic script were the principal written languages, with Persian especially prominent in administration and formal documentation

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿富汗在1900年前后以宫廷诗歌、波斯语文书传统、清真寺与堡垒建筑、地毯编织、金属工艺、木雕与区域性史传写作为主要文化成就。喀布尔与赫拉特保留了连接伊朗、突厥与印度文化圈的复合传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Around 1900, Afghanistan’s major cultural achievements lay in courtly poetry, Persian bureaucratic literary traditions, mosque and fortress architecture, carpet weaving, metalwork, wood carving, and regional historical writing. Kabul and Herat preserved composite traditions linking the Iranian, Turkic, and Indian cultural spheres.

languageFamily.zh: 全国语言以伊朗语族为主，主要包括普什图语和达里波斯语，另有突厥语族、努里斯坦语和若干地方语言
languageFamily.en: The country’s languages were predominantly from the Iranian family, chiefly Pashto and Dari Persian, alongside Turkic languages, Nuristani languages, and other local tongues

gdpDescription.zh: 阿富汗经济以自给性农业、畜牧、区域性商路与有限手工业为基础。全国地形崎岖、交通困难、市场整合度低，因此总体经济规模不大，但作为中亚与印度之间通道仍保有战略与商业价值。
gdpDescription.en: Afghanistan’s economy was based on subsistence agriculture, pastoralism, regional trade routes, and limited handicraft production. Rugged terrain, difficult transport, and weak market integration kept the total economy modest, though the country retained strategic and commercial value as a corridor between Central Asia and India.

mainIndustries.zh: 灌溉农业、牧业、地毯与纺织、皮革、干果加工、马匹与牲畜贸易、小规模军械修造和城市手工业
mainIndustries.en: Irrigated agriculture, pastoralism, carpet and textile production, leatherwork, dried fruit processing, horse and livestock trade, small-scale arms repair, and urban handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以羊毛、皮张、地毯、马匹、牲畜、干果、阿魏和部分药材为主；进口以印度棉布、糖、茶、金属制品、枪械弹药和奢侈品为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wool, hides, carpets, horses, livestock, dried fruits, asafoetida, and some medicinal products; imports included Indian cotton textiles, sugar, tea, metal goods, firearms and ammunition, and luxury items

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭财富集中于土地使用权、灌溉水权、牲畜、粮食储备、地毯和贵金属首饰。现金持有量普遍有限，农村家庭常通过宗族网络与季节性贸易应对风险。
householdWealth.en: Most household wealth was held in land-use rights, irrigation access, livestock, grain stores, carpets, and precious-metal jewelry. Cash holdings were generally limited, and rural households often relied on kinship networks and seasonal trade to manage risk.

economicSystem.zh: 以农村自给经济为主体、由王室控制关键税关和军需工坊、并受部族权力和区域商帮影响的前工业混合经济
economicSystem.en: A preindustrial mixed economy dominated by rural subsistence production, with the crown controlling key customs points and military workshops, while tribal authority and regional merchant networks shaped exchange

source.zh: 市场税、许可费与杂项收入
source.en: Market dues, fees, and miscellaneous income

source.zh: 英方补助与边务相关收入

category.en: Court, royal household, and noble stipends

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库在阿卜杜勒·拉赫曼汗晚年积累较为可观，为哈比布拉汗初期政权稳定提供了缓冲。储备以银币、贵金属、实物仓储和可迅速征调的地方资源为主，而非现代银行化资产。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury accumulated to a relatively substantial level in the later years of Abdur Rahman Khan, giving Habibullah Khan’s early reign a stabilizing cushion. Reserves consisted chiefly of silver coin, precious metals, stored goods, and rapidly callable provincial resources rather than modern banked assets.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调保守储备、优先军费、维持边地忠诚与避免对农村过度榨取，以防激发部族叛乱和地方逃税。国家在稳定上倾向于积蓄而非大规模公共投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized conservative reserves, military priority, maintaining frontier loyalty, and avoiding excessive extraction from the countryside so as not to provoke tribal revolt and local tax evasion. In the interest of stability, the state preferred accumulation over large-scale public investment.

description.zh: 军队主体，装备以步枪为主，训练与纪律参差不齐，中央直属部队优于地方征集兵
description.en: The main body of the army, armed chiefly with rifles; training and discipline varied, with centrally controlled troops generally superior to locally raised forces

description.zh: 用于侦察、边地巡逻、快速机动和部族作战，仍保留强烈传统色彩
description.en: Used for reconnaissance, frontier patrols, rapid movement, and tribal warfare, retaining a strongly traditional character

description.zh: 配备数量有限的野战炮和山炮，主要集中于喀布尔及重要要塞，技术与后勤能力有限
description.en: Equipped with limited field and mountain artillery, concentrated mainly around Kabul and key fortresses, with restricted technical and logistical capacity

description.zh: 由边地驻军、地方民兵和受津贴部族武装构成，适合山地防御但服从性不稳定
description.en: Composed of frontier garrisons, local militia, and subsidized tribal fighters, well suited to mountain defense but unreliable in obedience

commanderInChief.zh: 哈比布拉汗埃米尔

technology.zh: 军队处于晚期前现代向有限近代化过渡阶段，装备以步枪和少量火炮为核心，国内有小规模兵工修造能力，但严重依赖进口弹药、机械零件和部分现代武器。铁路、电报和工业后勤极为不足。
technology.en: The army stood in a late premodern to limited modernizing phase, centered on rifles and a modest artillery arm. The country had small-scale armament repair and production capacity, but remained heavily dependent on imported ammunition, machine parts, and some modern weapons. Railways, telegraphy, and industrial logistics were severely underdeveloped.

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非立即外来入侵，而是大国压力、边界争议、东部部族自治倾向、地方叛乱以及在英俄竞争中失去回旋空间。若内乱爆发，外部干预风险将显著上升。
threats.en: The principal threats were not immediate conquest so much as great-power pressure, border disputes, autonomous tendencies among eastern tribes, local rebellions, and the danger of losing room for maneuver in Anglo-Russian rivalry. Should internal disorder erupt, the risk of outside intervention would rise sharply.

populationDescription.zh: 1900年阿富汗人口约五百万，分布高度不均，集中于灌溉河谷、绿洲城市和高原农牧混合区。人口由普什图人、塔吉克人、哈扎拉人、乌兹别克人、土库曼人、努里斯坦诸族和其他区域群体构成。
populationDescription.en: Around 1900, Afghanistan’s population was about five million and unevenly distributed, concentrated in irrigated valleys, oasis towns, and mixed farming-pastoral uplands. The population included Pashtuns, Tajiks, Hazaras, Uzbeks, Turkmens, Nuristani peoples, and other regional groups.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大体可分为王室与贵族、部族首领和地方地主、宗教学者与苏非世系、城市商人和工匠、定居农民、游牧与半游牧牧民，以及在部分地区承受歧视与重负的从属社群。
socialClasses.en: Social strata may be broadly divided into the royal house and nobility, tribal chiefs and local landholders, religious scholars and Sufi lineages, urban merchants and artisans, settled peasants, nomadic and semi-nomadic pastoralists, and subordinate communities in some regions that bore heavier burdens and discrimination.

allies.zh: 阿富汗在1900年没有正式意义上的牢固军事盟友，但与英属印度维持条约化关系并接受补助；同时谨慎避免激怒俄国，是一种以平衡求生存的准中立局面。
allies.en: Afghanistan had no firm military allies in the formal sense in 1900, but maintained a treaty-based relationship with British India and received subsidies; at the same time it was careful not to provoke Russia, producing a quasi-neutral posture aimed at survival through balance.

enemies.zh: 无公开宣战中的固定敌国，但对俄国南下意图和英国干预内政都保持深刻警惕；边界部落冲突与波斯方向的局部摩擦也构成长期紧张来源。
enemies.en: It had no fixed enemy in a state of open war, but remained deeply wary both of Russian southward ambitions and British interference in domestic affairs; tribal frontier conflict and occasional frictions toward Persia also formed enduring sources of tension.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策核心是维持正式独立、避免沦为附庸、以有限开放换取英方承认边界与补助，并通过克制对俄接触来保持缓冲国地位。埃米尔对外谨慎，优先内部稳定而非积极扩张或改革外交网络。
foreignPolicy.en: The core of foreign policy was to preserve formal independence, avoid vassalization, trade limited openness for British recognition of borders and subsidies, and maintain buffer-state status by restraining contacts with Russia. The Emir was cautious abroad and prioritized internal stability over expansion or an activist diplomatic network.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代下的有限近代化前工业国家
era.en: A limited-modernizing preindustrial state in the Age of Imperialism

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术变化主要体现在现代步枪与火炮引入、小规模兵工厂与军械修造、宫廷电报和邮政试验性扩展，以及对道路和行政通信的谨慎改进。整体而言，铁路、重工业、现代学校体系和大规模机械化仍十分缺乏。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological changes were seen mainly in the introduction of modern rifles and artillery, small-scale arsenals and weapons repair, tentative expansion of court telegraphy and postal services, and cautious improvements in roads and administrative communications. Overall, railways, heavy industry, modern school systems, and large-scale mechanization remained very weak.

strengths.zh: 阿富汗的优势在于险峻地形、顽强的地方武装传统、缓冲国战略价值、在英俄之间争取回旋空间的外交经验，以及由前任统治者留下的较稳财政和相对整合的中央王权。
strengths.en: Afghanistan’s strengths lay in its formidable terrain, resilient local martial traditions, strategic value as a buffer state, diplomatic experience in maneuvering between Britain and Russia, and the relatively stable finances and strengthened central monarchy inherited from the previous reign.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点是经济基础薄弱、交通闭塞、民族与部族分裂显著、中央行政能力有限、现代教育和工业不足，并且对外贸通道与外国军火来源存在依赖。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were a fragile economic base, poor communications, marked ethnic and tribal fragmentation, limited central administrative capacity, insufficient modern education and industry, and dependence on external trade routes and foreign sources of arms.

outlook.zh: 1900年的阿富汗总体稳定，但这种稳定高度依赖埃米尔权威、财政储备和对外平衡。一旦王位继承、部族关系或英俄博弈出现重大变化，国家可能迅速转入紧张。短期前景谨慎乐观，中长期则取决于能否在不激发内乱的前提下推进有限现代化。
outlook.en: Afghanistan in 1900 was broadly stable, but that stability depended heavily on the Emir’s authority, treasury reserves, and external balancing. If succession, tribal relations, or Anglo-Russian rivalry shifted sharply, the state could quickly enter a period of strain. The short-term outlook was cautiously favorable, while the medium and long term depended on whether limited modernization could proceed without provoking internal unrest.

description.zh: 位于英俄势力之间的缓冲君主国，维持形式上的独立。
description.en: A buffer monarchy between British and Russian power, maintaining formal independence.

governmentForm.zh: 阿拉伯世袭酋长制，在名义上承认奥斯曼宗主权，但实际上在英国保护下保持高度自治
governmentForm.en: Hereditary Arab sheikhdom, nominally under Ottoman suzerainty but in practice highly autonomous under British protection

socialStructure.zh: 社会以统治家族、商人兼船主家族、宗教学者、城镇手工业者与海员、贝都因部落以及依附劳工构成。沿海城镇社会以贸易和航海为中心，内陆联系依赖部落网络。
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around the ruling family, merchant and ship-owning families, religious scholars, urban craftsmen and seamen, Bedouin tribes, and dependent laborers. Coastal town life centered on trade and seafaring, while inland connections relied on tribal networks.

rulingClass.zh: 萨巴赫家族与科威特城主要逊尼派商人家族共同构成统治精英
rulingClass.en: The Al Sabah family together with the leading Sunni merchant families of Kuwait City formed the ruling elite

succession.zh: 由萨巴赫家族内部世袭继承，通常通过家族协商与实力平衡决定继承人
succession.en: Hereditary succession within the Al Sabah family, usually determined through family consensus and balance of power

structure.zh: 政权高度个人化，以谢赫宫廷为核心。正式官僚机构规模很小，治理依赖家族成员、商人顾问、宗教法官和地方代理人。1900年前后对外事务尤其受到1899年与英国达成协议的影响。
structure.en: The polity was highly personalized, centered on the sheikh's court. Formal bureaucracy was very small, and governance relied on family members, merchant advisers, religious judges, and local agents. By around 1900, external affairs were especially shaped by the 1899 agreement with Britain.

function.zh: 处理政令发布、部落调停、口岸与城镇治安协调以及与商人领袖的日常协商
function.en: Handled issuance of orders, tribal mediation, coordination of port and town security, and daily consultation with merchant leaders

function.zh: 征收进口、转口和港口相关税费，管理码头、锚地、仓储与海关监督
function.en: Collected import, re-export, and port-related duties and managed docks, anchorage, storage, and customs supervision

function.zh: 由卡迪和宗教学者主持婚姻、继承、契约和民事争端审理，维持伊斯兰法秩序
function.en: Led by qadis and religious scholars to oversee marriage, inheritance, contracts, and civil disputes under Islamic law

function.zh: 统筹城防守卫、海岸巡逻、武装船只与紧急动员
function.en: Coordinated town defense, coastal patrols, armed vessels, and emergency mobilization

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理集中于科威特城，周边居民点和季节性营地由部落首领、家族长老和谢赫任命的代理人管理。国家没有近代意义上的省制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was concentrated in Kuwait City, while surrounding settlements and seasonal camps were managed by tribal chiefs, family elders, and agents appointed by the sheikh. There was no modern provincial system.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以逊尼派伊斯兰教法为基础，辅以部落习惯法、商事惯例和谢赫裁断。商业纠纷常通过调解与声望仲裁解决。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on Sunni Islamic law, supplemented by tribal customary law, mercantile practice, and the sheikh's adjudication. Commercial disputes were often settled through mediation and reputation-based arbitration.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自海关关税、港口收费、贸易执照、珍珠业相关征收以及对部落和商贸活动的零散税费。总体税负较轻，以鼓励转口贸易和吸引商人定居。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from customs duties, port fees, trading licenses, pearl-related levies, and assorted charges on tribal and commercial activity. The overall tax burden was light in order to encourage re-export trade and attract merchants.

religion.zh: 居民主要信奉逊尼派伊斯兰教，亦有什叶派商人群体和少量外来社群。宗教生活围绕清真寺、斋月、慈善和伊斯兰法实践展开。
religion.en: The population was predominantly Sunni Muslim, with a Shia merchant community and small foreign groups. Religious life centered on mosques, Ramadan, charity, and the practice of Islamic law.

philosophy.zh: 社会价值以伊斯兰伦理、阿拉伯部落荣誉、家族忠诚、商贸信用和海湾务实主义为核心。
philosophy.en: Social values were rooted in Islamic ethics, Arab tribal honor, family loyalty, mercantile trust, and Gulf pragmatism.

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语，行政与商贸记录多为手写账册、契约和书信
writingSystem.en: Arabic was written in the Arabic script, and administration and commerce relied largely on handwritten ledgers, contracts, and correspondence

culturalAchievements.zh: 科威特以航海传统、珍珠采集文化、阿拉伯口述诗歌、宗教教育和海湾商人网络著称。虽然规模不大，但其港口文化在北部海湾具有鲜明影响力。
culturalAchievements.en: Kuwait was noted for its seafaring traditions, pearling culture, Arabic oral poetry, religious education, and Gulf merchant networks. Though small, its port culture had a distinct influence in the northern Gulf.

languageFamily.zh: 闪含语系阿拉伯语支
languageFamily.en: Semitic, Arabic branch

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年前后的科威特经济体量很小，但在海湾地区具有超过其人口规模的重要性。经济依赖珍珠采集、海运、造船、转口贸易、渔业和有限的沙漠畜牧联系，易受气候、航运安全与地区政治影响。
gdpDescription.en: Around 1900, Kuwait's economy was very small in absolute scale but important in the Gulf beyond its population size. It depended on pearling, shipping, shipbuilding, re-export trade, fishing, and limited desert pastoral links, and was vulnerable to climate, maritime security, and regional politics.

mainIndustries.zh: 珍珠采集、航运、转口贸易、木帆船建造与修理、渔业、枣椰与日用品贸易、畜产品交换
mainIndustries.en: Pearling, shipping, re-export trade, dhow building and repair, fishing, trade in dates and daily goods, and exchange in pastoral products

tradeGoods.zh: 出口或转口货物包括珍珠、马匹、枣椰、羊毛、皮革、木帆船及海产品；进口货物包括印度纺织品、米、茶、咖啡、糖、金属器、木材、武器和日用品。
tradeGoods.en: Exported or re-exported goods included pearls, horses, dates, wool, hides, dhows, and marine products; imports included Indian textiles, rice, tea, coffee, sugar, metalware, timber, weapons, and household goods.

householdWealth.zh: 财富分化明显。商人和船主家庭拥有船队、仓储、信贷网络和海外商业联系；普通潜水采珠者、海员和手工业者收入不稳定，受季节和债务影响较大。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Merchant and ship-owning families controlled fleets, storage, credit networks, and overseas ties; ordinary pearl divers, sailors, and craftsmen had unstable incomes and were heavily affected by seasonality and debt.

economicSystem.zh: 以私营商贸为主导的港口经济，国家干预有限。统治者依靠关税和政治庇护获取收入，商业活动由家族网络、信用关系和区域市场联结。
economicSystem.en: A port economy led by private commerce with limited state intervention. The ruler derived income through customs and political patronage, while commercial life was tied together by family networks, credit relations, and regional markets.

source.zh: 珍珠业与贸易执照征收

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，主要以现金储备、贵金属、商人借款能力和可迅速征集的港口收入构成。财政弹性不强，但在稳定年份足以维持小型政权运转。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was limited in size, consisting mainly of cash reserves, precious metals, the ability to borrow from merchants, and rapidly collectible port income. Fiscal flexibility was modest, but in stable years it was enough to sustain a small polity.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向保守，维持低税、优先稳定贸易与航运，并通过补助和协商维护城内商人及周边部落的忠诚。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative, maintaining low taxation, prioritizing trade and shipping stability, and preserving the loyalty of urban merchants and surrounding tribes through stipends and negotiation.

description.zh: 负责科威特城城门、要点和统治者驻地警卫，兼具治安与战时守备功能
description.en: Guarded Kuwait City's gates, key points, and the ruler's residence, serving both policing and wartime defensive roles

description.zh: 由忠于谢赫的部落战士和骑乘武装组成，战时按需要征集，适合沙漠巡逻、护送和突袭作战
description.en: Made up of tribal warriors and mounted retainers loyal to the sheikh, mobilized as needed for desert patrol, escort, and raiding operations

description.zh: 由少量装武木帆船及其船员构成，用于护航、海岸警戒与港口防卫
description.en: Consisted of a small number of armed dhows and their crews for escort, coastal watch, and port defense

commanderInChief.zh: 穆巴拉克·萨巴赫谢赫

technology.zh: 武器以步枪、火绳枪和少量现代后装枪为主，辅以轻型火炮和传统冷兵器。军力主要依靠机动性、地方熟悉度和海陆小规模作战经验，而非现代化常备军体系。
technology.en: Weapons were mainly rifles, older muskets, and a limited number of more modern breech-loaders, supplemented by light artillery and traditional blades. Military strength relied on mobility, local knowledge, and experience in small-scale land and sea warfare rather than a modern standing army system.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自奥斯曼帝国试图加强控制、内志阿拉伯势力如拉希德与沙特阵营的竞争、海湾海上安全问题以及更广泛的英奥角力。
threats.en: Principal threats came from Ottoman attempts to tighten control, rivalry among central Arabian powers such as the Rashidis and the Saudis, maritime insecurity in the Gulf, and the broader Anglo-Ottoman contest.

populationDescription.zh: 人口规模很小，主要集中于科威特城及其附近沿海地区，另有与城镇经济密切相关的季节性流动人口和周边贝都因群体。
populationDescription.en: The population was very small, concentrated mainly in Kuwait City and nearby coastal areas, with additional seasonal populations tied to the urban economy and surrounding Bedouin groups.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为萨巴赫家族、显赫商人和船主；中层为小商人、宗教学者、书记员和熟练工匠；下层为潜水采珠者、海员、搬运工、仆役和依附劳工；外围则有与城镇经济互通的贝都因部落。
socialClasses.en: The upper stratum consisted of the Al Sabah family, prominent merchants, and shipowners; the middle stratum included small traders, religious scholars, scribes, and skilled artisans; the lower stratum comprised pearl divers, sailors, porters, servants, and dependent laborers; beyond them were Bedouin tribes linked to the urban economy.

allies.zh: 英国为最重要的外部保护者；同时通过务实关系维持与海湾商人网络、部分阿拉伯部落及邻近港口的合作
allies.en: Britain was the most important external protector; Kuwait also maintained pragmatic relations with Gulf merchant networks, certain Arab tribes, and neighboring ports

enemies.zh: 无固定意义上的正式敌国，但与奥斯曼地方当局关系紧张，并警惕拉希德酋长国及其他内志势力对边境和贸易路线的威胁
enemies.en: There was no fixed formal enemy state, but relations with Ottoman local authorities were tense, and Kuwait was wary of the Rashidi Emirate and other Najdi forces threatening frontiers and trade routes

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策核心是在奥斯曼帝国与大英帝国之间保持生存空间，借英国海上保护抵御吞并风险，同时避免在形式上完全脱离奥斯曼体系，以维持合法性与地区回旋余地。
foreignPolicy.en: The core of foreign policy was to preserve room for survival between the Ottoman Empire and the British Empire, using British maritime protection to reduce the risk of annexation while avoiding a complete formal break with the Ottoman framework in order to preserve legitimacy and regional maneuverability.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 技术以传统海湾航海和商贸技艺为主，包括木帆船建造、珍珠采集装备、天文与经验导航、港口仓储和区域信用账簿制度。现代电报、蒸汽船与工业制造主要通过英国印度和海湾港口间接影响科威特。
keyInnovations.en: Technology remained centered on traditional Gulf maritime and mercantile skills, including dhow construction, pearling gear, celestial and practical navigation, port storage, and regional credit-ledger systems. Modern telegraphy, steamships, and industrial manufacture affected Kuwait mainly indirectly through British India and Gulf ports.

strengths.zh: 地理位置优越，港口贸易活跃，统治家族具有较强政治手腕，商人网络广泛，并成功争取英国保护以抵御更大帝国压力。
strengths.en: It possessed a favorable geographic position, active port commerce, a politically adept ruling family, extensive merchant networks, and had successfully secured British protection against larger imperial pressures.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少、财政基础狭窄、军事实力有限，经济对珍珠业和转口贸易依赖很大，容易受地区战争、航运变化和外部强权干预冲击。
weaknesses.en: It had a small population, a narrow fiscal base, and limited military strength, while its economy depended heavily on pearling and re-export trade and was vulnerable to regional war, shifts in shipping, and intervention by outside powers.

outlook.zh: 1900年的科威特总体稳定，若能继续在英奥之间维持平衡并保持港口繁荣，短期内可延续自治地位；但长期命运仍高度取决于海湾贸易格局、阿拉伯内陆政治变化与帝国竞争走向。
outlook.en: In 1900 Kuwait was broadly stable, and if it could continue balancing between Britain and the Ottomans while preserving port prosperity, it could maintain its autonomous position in the short term; its long-term fate, however, remained highly dependent on Gulf trade patterns, political change in Arabia, and the course of imperial rivalry.

description.zh: 波斯湾小型酋长政体，在奥斯曼与英国之间寻求保护与自治。
description.en: A small Gulf sheikhdom seeking autonomy and protection between Ottoman and British power.

governmentForm.zh: 君主专制下带有近代官僚机构的伊斯兰帝国，名义上保留宪制记忆但实际上由苏丹个人统治
governmentForm.en: An Islamic empire with a modernizing bureaucratic apparatus under autocratic monarchy, retaining only a nominal memory of constitutionalism while effectively ruled personally by the Sultan

socialStructure.zh: 帝国社会由宫廷与官僚精英、军官阶层、乌里玛与宗教人士、地方显贵、城市商人和手工业者、农民、游牧与部族社群构成，并按宗教共同体与族群差异分层
socialStructure.en: Imperial society was composed of the court and bureaucratic elite, officer corps, ulema and religious personnel, provincial notables, urban merchants and artisans, peasants, and nomadic and tribal communities, with additional stratification by religious communities and ethnicity

rulingClass.zh: 以苏丹宫廷、高级文官、军官集团、乌里玛上层和地方显贵为核心的奥斯曼穆斯林统治阶层
rulingClass.en: The Ottoman Muslim ruling class centered on the Sultan's court, senior civil officials, the officer corps, upper ulema, and provincial notables

succession.zh: 奥斯曼王朝世袭继承，通常由王朝内部最有力的男性成员即位，1900年时继承秩序趋向长子优先但仍受宫廷政治影响
succession.en: Hereditary succession within the Ottoman dynasty, usually by the most viable male dynast; by 1900 the order tended toward seniority and de facto primogeniture, though still shaped by palace politics

structure.zh: 中央政府以苏丹、御前机构和各部为核心，形成经过坦齐马特改革重组的部会制；地方上分为行省、桑贾克、卡扎和乡村层级，由总督、地方行政官与法官共同治理
structure.en: The central government centered on the Sultan, palace institutions, and ministries, forming a ministerial system reorganized by the Tanzimat reforms; provincially it was divided into vilayets, sanjaks, kazas, and villages, governed by governors, local administrators, and judges

function.zh: 管理地方行政、治安、人口登记、通信监督与省级官员任命
function.en: Managed provincial administration, internal security, population registration, supervision of communications, and appointment of provincial officials

function.zh: 负责税收征解、预算编制、债务支付、国库管理与财政统计
function.en: Handled tax collection, budget preparation, debt service, treasury management, and fiscal statistics

function.zh: 统辖陆军、征兵、军官学校、军需和军事动员
function.en: Oversaw the army, conscription, military academies, logistics, and mobilization

function.zh: 管理舰队、海军基地、造船设施与海上防务
function.en: Managed the fleet, naval bases, dockyards, and maritime defense

function.zh: 处理列强关系、使馆事务、条约谈判与国际危机应对
function.en: Handled relations with the Great Powers, diplomatic missions, treaty negotiations, and responses to international crises

function.zh: 管理世俗法院、法典实施、检察事务与监狱行政
function.en: Managed secular courts, implementation of legal codes, prosecutorial matters, and prison administration

function.zh: 监督官立学校、中等教育、师范教育与课程标准
function.en: Supervised state schools, secondary education, teacher training, and curricular standards

localAdmin.zh: 地方实行维拉耶特制度，核心行省包括安纳托利亚、叙利亚、巴格达、摩苏尔、也门、希贾兹、贝鲁特、塞萨洛尼基、科索沃、爱第尔内等。总督受中央任命，但在阿拉伯诸省、库尔德与也门山区、阿尔巴尼亚地区等地，中央必须与部族首领、宗教名流和地方大地主妥协共治
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through the vilayet system, with key provinces including Anatolia, Syria, Baghdad, Mosul, Yemen, Hejaz, Beirut, Salonica, Kosovo, and Edirne. Governors were appointed by the center, but in the Arab provinces, Kurdish and Yemeni highlands, and Albanian regions, the state had to share authority in practice with tribal chiefs, religious notables, and major landholders

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系并行：伊斯兰沙里亚法院处理婚姻、继承等事务，尼扎米耶世俗法院依据近代法典处理民刑案件；商业法、刑法和程序法明显受法国法影响，外国人与受保护人还受治外法权限制
legalSystem.en: The legal system was plural: Islamic sharia courts handled matters such as marriage and inheritance, while Nizamiye secular courts applied modern legal codes in civil and criminal cases; commercial, penal, and procedural law were heavily influenced by French models, and jurisdiction was further constrained by capitulatory privileges for foreigners and protected persons

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以地税、什一税替代后的农业征收、房产税、印花税、关税、盐与烟草专卖收益、牲畜税及各类地方附加为主。由于公共债务管理局控制部分收入，国家主权财政能力受限
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on land taxes, agricultural levies replacing older tithes, property taxes, stamp duties, customs, revenues from salt and tobacco monopolies, livestock taxes, and various local surcharges. Because the Public Debt Administration controlled portions of revenue, the state's fiscal sovereignty was constrained

religion.zh: 帝国以逊尼派伊斯兰教为国教和统治正当性基础，苏丹兼任哈里发；同时境内有大量东正教徒、亚美尼亚使徒教徒、天主教徒、犹太教徒、德鲁兹派及其他社群，延续米利特传统但受国家集中化影响
religion.en: Sunni Islam served as the state religion and principal basis of legitimacy, with the Sultan also claiming the caliphate; the empire also contained large Orthodox, Armenian Apostolic, Catholic, Jewish, Druze, and other communities, preserving aspects of the millet tradition while increasingly subject to centralization

philosophy.zh: 思想领域兼具伊斯兰法学、奥斯曼官僚实用主义、泛伊斯兰主义、有限的奥斯曼主义以及日益增长的土耳其民族意识；在知识界中，实证主义、宪政主义与欧洲政治思想也有影响
philosophy.en: The intellectual sphere combined Islamic jurisprudence, Ottoman bureaucratic pragmatism, Pan-Islamism, a limited Ottomanism, and growing Turkish consciousness; among educated circles, positivism, constitutionalism, and European political thought also exerted influence

writingSystem.zh: 官方书写使用奥斯曼土耳其语的阿拉伯字母书写系统，行政和文学语言高度波斯化、阿拉伯化；同时阿拉伯语、希腊语、亚美尼亚语、库尔德语、拉迪诺语等文字传统并存
writingSystem.en: Official writing used the Arabic-script Ottoman Turkish system, with an administrative and literary language heavily infused with Persian and Arabic; Arabic, Greek, Armenian, Kurdish, Ladino, and other written traditions also coexisted

culturalAchievements.zh: 奥斯曼文化成就包括古典清真寺建筑遗产、宫廷音乐、书法、细密画传统，以及19世纪末兴起的报刊、小说、官立学校和现代军事教育。哈米德时期还重视铁路、学校和公共建筑作为王权文明化象征
culturalAchievements.en: Ottoman cultural achievements included the heritage of classical mosque architecture, court music, calligraphy, and miniature painting, along with the late nineteenth-century growth of newspapers, novels, state schools, and modern military education. The Hamidian era also emphasized railways, schools, and public buildings as symbols of royal civilizing authority

languageFamily.zh: 统治语言奥斯曼土耳其语属突厥语系；帝国内还广泛使用阿拉伯语、库尔德语、希腊语、亚美尼亚语、阿尔巴尼亚语、拉迪诺语等多语系语言
languageFamily.en: The ruling language, Ottoman Turkish, belonged to the Turkic family; the empire also widely used Arabic, Kurdish, Greek, Armenian, Albanian, Ladino, and other languages from multiple language families

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年的奥斯曼经济以农业为主，区域差异极大。帝国已通过铁路、港口和对外贸易更加融入世界市场，但工业化水平低，财政和关税自主权受欧洲资本与债务体制牵制，整体处于半边缘化、依附性发展状态
gdpDescription.en: The Ottoman economy in 1900 remained predominantly agrarian and highly regionally uneven. The empire had become more integrated into world markets through railways, ports, and foreign trade, but industrialization was weak and fiscal and tariff autonomy were constrained by European capital and debt arrangements, leaving it in a semi-peripheral and dependent developmental position

mainIndustries.zh: 粮食与棉花农业、烟草种植、畜牧业、丝绸、地毯、皮革、肥皂、面粉加工、港口贸易、手工业纺织、小型采矿和铁路运输
mainIndustries.en: Grain and cotton agriculture, tobacco cultivation, livestock raising, silk, carpets, leather, soap, flour milling, port commerce, artisanal textiles, small-scale mining, and railway transport

tradeGoods.zh: 出口烟草、葡萄干、无花果、棉花、生丝、羊毛、地毯、鸦片、矿产和皮革；进口纺织品、机械、铁钢制品、煤、成品消费品和军用装备
tradeGoods.en: Exports included tobacco, raisins, figs, cotton, raw silk, wool, carpets, opium, minerals, and leather; imports included textiles, machinery, iron and steel goods, coal, manufactured consumer goods, and military equipment

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富高度依赖土地、牲畜和地方商业网络。安纳托利亚与阿拉伯乡村家庭资产有限，易受歉收、税负和债务影响；伊斯坦布尔、士麦那、贝鲁特、塞萨洛尼基等港口城市的商人、放债人和地主拥有更高财富水平
householdWealth.en: Household wealth depended heavily on land, livestock, and local commercial networks. Rural households in Anatolia and the Arab lands held limited assets and were vulnerable to crop failures, taxes, and debt, while merchants, moneylenders, and landholders in port cities such as Constantinople, Smyrna, Beirut, and Salonica enjoyed much higher wealth levels

economicSystem.zh: 国家监管下的农业主导市场经济，夹杂税农遗产、地方特权、外国资本控制、租让和专卖制度。帝国寻求通过铁路、银行和教育现代化经济，但在很大程度上依赖欧洲贷款、投资与贸易网络
economicSystem.en: A state-regulated, agriculture-dominated market economy mixed with the legacy of tax farming, local privilege, foreign capital control, concessions, and monopolies. The empire sought economic modernization through railways, banking, and education but remained heavily dependent on European loans, investment, and trade networks

source.en: Salt tax, tobacco, and monopoly revenues
Livestock taxes and miscellaneous local taxes

source.zh: 印花税、司法费用与行政收费
source.en: Stamp taxes, judicial fees, and administrative charges

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库名义上仍有储备，但实际财政空间受常年赤字、债务偿付义务和奥斯曼公共债务管理局控制所挤压。可自由调配的现金远少于账面总额
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury retained nominal reserves, but actual fiscal room was squeezed by chronic deficits, debt-service obligations, and the control exercised by the Ottoman Public Debt Administration. Freely disposable cash was much smaller than the headline total

fiscalPolicy.zh: 哈米德政权追求财政集中、压缩政治风险、保障债务支付并维持军警和交通建设。政策偏保守，强调增税、专卖和外债维持信用，但限制了更深层次的社会与工业投资
fiscalPolicy.en: The Hamidian regime pursued fiscal centralization, political risk containment, guaranteed debt service, and maintenance of the army, police, and transport projects. Policy was conservative, relying on taxation, monopolies, and external borrowing to preserve credit, but this limited deeper social and industrial investment

description.zh: 帝国军力核心，包括安纳托利亚、鲁米利亚、叙利亚、伊拉克等军区部队，装备毛瑟步枪、现代火炮与参谋体系，但训练、补给和运输能力不均
description.en: The core of imperial military power, including forces in Anatolia, Rumelia, Syria, and Iraq, equipped with Mauser rifles, modern artillery, and a staff system, though training, supply, and transport remained uneven

description.zh: 由退役与地方动员人员组成，理论上可扩军，实际上战备质量参差不齐，地方训练和装备经常不足
description.en: Composed of former servicemen and locally mobilized manpower; theoretically useful for expansion in wartime, but in practice of highly uneven readiness, often lacking training and equipment

description.zh: 负责省份治安、护路、缉匪和税收秩序，在巴尔干、安纳托利亚东部和阿拉伯诸省承担大量准军事任务
description.en: Responsible for provincial order, route protection, bandit suppression, and tax enforcement, carrying out extensive paramilitary duties in the Balkans, eastern Anatolia, and the Arab provinces

description.zh: 名义上保有装甲舰和鱼雷艇，但长期搁置和维护不善，整体战斗力逊于主要欧洲海军，主要用于海峡防御和象征性存在
description.en: Nominally maintained ironclads and torpedo craft, but long neglect and poor maintenance left it inferior to the major European navies, used mainly for straits defense and symbolic presence

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹阿卜杜勒哈米德二世

technology.zh: 军队采用后膛步枪、克虏伯火炮、电报、铁路动员和德式参谋训练模式；但工业基础薄弱，海军现代化滞后，弹药、维修和军官政治化问题明显
technology.en: The military employed breech-loading rifles, Krupp artillery, telegraphy, railway mobilization, and German-style staff training; however, the industrial base was weak, naval modernization lagged, and problems in ammunition supply, maintenance, and politicization of the officer corps were evident

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自俄国在黑海和高加索方向的压力、巴尔干民族主义与马其顿危机、英国对埃及和海湾的扩张、法德列强的经济与战略渗透，以及也门、阿拉伯和东安纳托利亚的内部叛乱与边疆不稳
threats.en: Major threats came from Russian pressure in the Black Sea and Caucasus regions, Balkan nationalism and the Macedonian crisis, British expansion in Egypt and the Gulf, the economic and strategic penetration of France and Germany, and internal unrest and frontier instability in Yemen, the Arab lands, and eastern Anatolia

populationDescription.zh: 1900年奥斯曼帝国人口约2500万，分布于安纳托利亚、阿拉伯诸省和残余巴尔干领地。人口构成极为多元，包括土耳其人、阿拉伯人、库尔德人、阿尔巴尼亚人、希腊人、亚美尼亚人、犹太人、斯拉夫穆斯林及其他群体。出生率较高，但疾病、饥荒、迁徙和战争记忆影响明显
populationDescription.en: In 1900 the Ottoman Empire had roughly 25 million inhabitants spread across Anatolia, the Arab provinces, and its remaining Balkan territories. The population was highly diverse, including Turks, Arabs, Kurds, Albanians, Greeks, Armenians, Jews, Slavic Muslims, and other groups. Birth rates were high, but disease, famine, migration, and the legacy of warfare significantly shaped demographic life

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致包括宫廷与帕夏阶层、文官与军官、乌里玛、地方地主与部族首领、城市商人和行会手工业者、小农、佃农、牧民、劳工与贫民。非穆斯林中产和商业阶层在部分港口与城市中尤为重要
socialClasses.en: Social classes broadly included the court and pasha elite, civil and military officials, the ulema, provincial landholders and tribal chiefs, urban merchants and guild artisans, smallholders, tenants, pastoralists, laborers, and the poor. Non-Muslim middle and commercial classes were especially important in some ports and cities

allies.zh: 帝国没有稳定的正式同盟体系，但在1900年前后与德意志帝国关系最为密切，德国在军事顾问、铁路投资和外交支持方面具有特殊地位；在某些议题上也试图平衡英国、法国与俄国
allies.en: The empire lacked a stable formal alliance system, but by around 1900 its closest external relationship was with the German Empire, which held a special position through military advisory missions, railway investment, and diplomatic support; on some issues the Porte still tried to balance Britain, France, and Russia

enemies.zh: 主要对手包括俄国、在埃及实际控制局势的英国，以及支持巴尔干民族运动或借债务和保护权干预帝国内政的若干欧洲列强。内部敌对力量则包括亚美尼亚革命组织、巴尔干分离主义团体和地方叛乱势力
enemies.en: Its principal adversaries included Russia, Britain as the effective power in Egypt, and various European powers that supported Balkan national movements or interfered in imperial affairs through debt and protective privileges. Internal hostile forces included Armenian revolutionary groups, Balkan separatist organizations, and provincial rebel forces

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持帝国完整、利用列强竞争、避免单独对抗任何一强、强化哈里发号召力并争取穆斯林臣民忠诚为主。哈米德二世特别重视泛伊斯兰主义作为对俄英法压力的政治工具
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve imperial integrity, exploit rivalry among the Great Powers, avoid isolated confrontation with any one power, strengthen the appeal of the caliphate, and secure the loyalty of Muslim subjects. Abdul Hamid II especially emphasized Pan-Islamism as a political tool against Russian, British, and French pressure

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键近代技术包括铁路建设、电报网络、蒸汽航运、现代兵工与火炮、官立中学与军校体系、城市煤气与供水设施，以及以柏林—巴格达铁路为代表的基础设施项目。不过这些技术扩散不均，多依赖外国资本、工程师和设备
keyInnovations.en: Key modern technologies included railway construction, telegraph networks, steam navigation, modern armaments and artillery, state secondary schools and military academies, urban gas and water systems, and infrastructure projects exemplified by the Berlin-Baghdad Railway. Yet the spread of these technologies was uneven and depended heavily on foreign capital, engineers, and equipment

strengths.zh: 帝国仍拥有横跨欧亚非的战略位置、君士坦丁堡和海峡控制权、相当规模的人口与军队、深厚的行政传统，以及伊斯兰哈里发身份带来的跨区域号召力。铁路、电报和教育改革也增强了部分中央控制力
strengths.en: The empire still possessed a strategic position spanning Europe, Asia, and Africa, control of Constantinople and the Straits, a substantial population and army, deep administrative traditions, and cross-regional legitimacy derived from the Islamic caliphate. Railways, telegraphy, and educational reforms also strengthened central control in some respects

weaknesses.zh: 其根本弱点在于财政脆弱、外债沉重、工业化不足、民族与宗派矛盾尖锐、地方统治不均、海军落后以及对欧洲资本和外交斡旋的依赖。专制统治压制宪政与公开政治，也削弱了制度自我修复能力
weaknesses.en: Its fundamental weaknesses lay in fiscal fragility, heavy foreign debt, insufficient industrialization, sharp ethnic and sectarian tensions, uneven provincial control, naval backwardness, and dependence on European capital and diplomacy. Autocratic rule also suppressed constitutional and open political life, weakening the system's capacity for self-correction

outlook.zh: 1900年的奥斯曼帝国仍有通过行政整顿、有限工业化、德意合作和交通建设延缓衰落的可能，但若无法解决债务、民族主义、列强干涉和政治合法性问题，未来数十年极可能经历革命、领土丧失与大战冲击
