rulingClass.en: The Oyoko royal line, provincial omanhene and local chiefs, queen-mother institutions, court nobility, and military aristocracy

succession.zh: 王位依母系继承原则，由王族合格男性在王母与长老认可下继位；必要时可由贵族会议废立
succession.en: Succession followed matrilineal principles, with an eligible male of the royal line chosen under the approval of the queen mother and elders; nobles could depose or install rulers when necessary

structure.zh: 中央政体以库马西宫廷和全国酋长会议为核心。阿散蒂王名义上统辖各属邦，各邦保留内部治理权并承担贡赋、司法协助与军事义务。1900年在阿散蒂王被流放后，王母雅阿桑特瓦及若干地方首领成为抵抗时期的政治核心。
structure.en: The central polity was organized around the Kumasi court and a national council of chiefs. The Asantehene nominally ruled subordinate states, which retained internal administration while owing tribute, judicial cooperation, and military service. In 1900, after the exile of the Asantehene, Queen Mother Yaa Asantewaa and several local leaders became the political center of resistance.

function.zh: 管理宫廷礼仪、王室财产、使节接待、仓储与象征权威事务
function.en: Managed court ceremony, royal property, reception of envoys, storehouses, and matters of symbolic authority

name.zh: 联盟议事与酋邦联络署
name.en: Confederal Council and Provincial Liaison Office

function.zh: 协调各州酋长、传达命令、处理盟约义务、组织大议会
function.en: Coordinated provincial chiefs, transmitted orders, managed confederal obligations, and organized grand councils

function.zh: 征收贡赋、管理金粉税收、监督市场收费与王室储藏
function.en: Collected tribute, managed gold-dust revenues, supervised market dues, and oversaw royal stores

function.zh: 处理上诉、土地与继承纠纷、执行习惯法与罚金裁决
function.en: Handled appeals, land and inheritance disputes, and enforced customary law and fines

name.zh: 军事动员与道路通信署

function.zh: 负责集结兵员、维护战路、组织传令与战争补给
function.en: Responsible for mustering troops, maintaining war roads, organizing messengers, and supplying campaigns

name.zh: 市场、手工业与对外贸易署
name.en: Markets, Crafts, and External Trade Office

function.zh: 监管主要市场、度量衡、工匠行当与对海岸贸易联系
function.en: Supervised major markets, weights and measures, craft occupations, and trade links with the coast

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由各州王、公社长老与村社首领实施。联盟内部层级大致为库马西中央、属州、城镇与村落。各地酋长拥有征税、司法与动员职能，但须向中央表达效忠。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was exercised by provincial rulers, town elders, and village heads. The internal hierarchy broadly ran from the Kumasi center to provinces, towns, and villages. Chiefs exercised taxation, judicial, and mobilization powers while acknowledging the center.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以阿散蒂习惯法、长老裁判、神圣誓约与王权裁决为基础。案件常以赔偿、罚金、宣誓、调解与族群和解方式处理，重大案件可上诉至库马西。
legalSystem.en: Law rested on Ashanti customary practice, elder adjudication, sacred oaths, and royal judgment. Cases were commonly resolved through compensation, fines, oath-taking, mediation, and communal settlement, with major appeals reaching Kumasi.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要依赖属邦贡赋、市场税、通行税、战争时期征发、罚金以及金矿与金粉相关收入。税收并非现代统一定额，而是以贡纳、劳役、物资与贵金属混合形式征收。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue relied mainly on provincial tribute, market taxes, transit dues, wartime levies, judicial fines, and income linked to gold mining and gold dust. Taxation was not a uniform modern schedule but a mixed system of tribute, labor, goods, and precious metal.

religion.zh: 以阿肯传统宗教为主，崇拜至上神尼亚梅及诸神灵、祖先与神圣黑凳，同时海岸与贸易地区已有少量基督教影响
religion.en: Predominantly Akan traditional religion, centered on Nyame, various spirits, ancestors, and the sacred stools, with limited Christian influence present in coastal and trading areas

philosophy.zh: 政治伦理强调祖先合法性、母系继承、共同体义务、酋长作为神圣托付的守护者，以及秩序、荣誉和勇武
philosophy.en: Political ethics emphasized ancestral legitimacy, matrilineal inheritance, communal obligation, the chief as guardian of a sacred trust, and values of order, honor, and martial courage

writingSystem.zh: 以口述传统为主；行政与对外交涉中使用阿坎语口传、记忆官传统，以及有限的阿拉伯文和拉丁字母书写记录
writingSystem.en: Primarily an oral culture; administration and diplomacy relied on Akan speech, memory specialists, and limited written records in Arabic and the Latin alphabet

culturalAchievements.zh: 以金器工艺、织锦与肯特布、木雕、鼓乐、谚语文学、宫廷礼仪、凳子象征体系与高度组织化的节庆文化闻名于西非
culturalAchievements.en: Renowned in West Africa for goldsmithing, weaving and kente cloth, woodcarving, drum music, proverb literature, court ritual, sacred stool symbolism, and highly organized festival culture

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系夸语支阿坎语群
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo, Kwa branch, Akan language group

gdpDescription.zh: 阿散蒂经济在西非内陆属较强水平，以农耕、黄金、区域贸易和手工业为基础，但1896年英国占领库马西、王室流放与1900年战争严重破坏了正常生产与运输。
gdpDescription.en: The Ashanti economy remained relatively strong by inland West African standards, based on farming, gold, regional trade, and handicrafts, but the British occupation of Kumasi in 1896, royal exile, and the war of 1900 severely disrupted normal production and transport.

mainIndustries.zh: 山地与林地农耕、山药与蕉类种植、棕榈制品、金矿开采、长途商贸、纺织、金工、木工与武器修造
mainIndustries.en: Forest and upland agriculture, cultivation of yams and plantains, palm products, gold mining, long-distance trade, weaving, metalwork, carpentry, and weapon repair

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、可乐果、棕榈油、家畜、布匹、盐、奴隶后期遗留劳动力市场相关人口流动产品、火器、火药与进口制成品
tradeGoods.en: Gold, kola nuts, palm oil, livestock, textiles, salt, labor flows linked to the late legacy of slavery, firearms, gunpowder, and imported manufactured goods

name.en: Gold dust and British currency in parallel

unitName.zh: 金粉衡量单位与英镑先令

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富多以耕地使用权、可可尚未普及前的粮食与棕榈作物、黄金饰物、布匹、家畜和亲属劳力体现；战乱使大量家庭资产转为隐匿储藏或被掠夺
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was held mainly in cultivation rights, food and palm crops before cocoa became widespread, gold ornaments, cloth, livestock, and kin labor; warfare pushed many families to conceal or lose assets

unit.en: 1900 international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以王权贡赋、地方市场交换、亲属组织生产与长途商路相结合的混合经济；1900年已 increasingly受到英帝国海岸贸易体系支配
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy combining royal tribute, local market exchange, kin-based production, and long-distance trade routes; by 1900 it was increasingly subordinated to the British imperial coastal trade system

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库并非现代集中现金金库，而是由金粉、贵重器物、贡赋存货、武器与分散在宫廷和属邦中的储藏构成。英国军事行动与掠夺使其完整性大受损害。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was not a modern centralized cash vault but a combination of gold dust, valuable regalia, tribute stocks, weapons, and reserves dispersed across the court and provinces. British military action and seizure badly damaged its integrity.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持宫廷权威、稳住属邦忠诚和筹措战时资源为核心；在1900年抵抗中，征发与非常动员明显增加，财政压力极大。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on sustaining court authority, preserving provincial loyalty, and gathering wartime resources; during the resistance of 1900, extraordinary levies and mobilization increased sharply, creating intense fiscal strain.

description.zh: 由库马西及核心地区维持的战士与卫队组成，装备火枪、少量现代步枪、刀矛与护符，负责王都防御与核心作战。
description.en: Composed of warriors and guards maintained by Kumasi and the core districts, armed with muskets, some modern rifles, blades, spears, and charms, responsible for defense of the capital and core operations.

description.zh: 由各州酋长按义务召集，是战争时期主力，人数众多但装备和训练不均，擅长森林伏击与围困。
description.en: Raised by provincial chiefs according to obligation, these were the main wartime forces, numerous but unevenly equipped and trained, skilled in forest ambush and siege operations.

description.zh: 承担侦察、道路控制、补给搬运、工事修筑和战时通信，在森林地形中极其重要。
description.en: Handled reconnaissance, road control, supply carrying, fieldworks, and wartime communications, and were especially important in forest terrain.

commanderInChief.zh: 名义最高统帅为阿散蒂王；1900年实际抵抗领袖为埃吉苏王母雅阿桑特瓦与各州战争首领
commanderInChief.en: The nominal commander-in-chief was the Asantehene; in 1900 the practical leaders of resistance were Queen Mother Yaa Asantewaa of Ejisu and the war chiefs of the provinces

technology.zh: 军队主要使用旧式火枪、缴获或贸易获得的后装步枪、冷兵器和传统防御工事。熟悉森林战、隐蔽接敌和围攻，但在火炮、马克沁机枪、现代后勤和工程能力上远逊于英国。
technology.en: The military relied mainly on older muskets, some breech-loading rifles acquired by trade or capture, edged weapons, and traditional defensive works. It was adept at forest warfare, concealment, and siege tactics, but was far inferior to Britain in artillery, Maxim guns, modern logistics, and engineering.

threats.zh: 压倒性主要威胁是英国帝国的征服与保护国化。其次是沿海贸易封锁、属邦离心和长期战争导致的物资枯竭。
threats.en: The overwhelmingly dominant threat was conquest and protectorate rule by the British Empire. Secondary threats included coastal trade disruption, centrifugal tendencies among subordinate states, and material exhaustion from prolonged war.

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要由阿坎语诸群体构成，阿散蒂人为核心，另有附属与邻近民族社区、商人群体及战争和奴役历史形成的流动人口。森林农业承载大量乡村人口。
populationDescription.en: The population was composed mainly of Akan-speaking groups with the Ashanti at the core, along with subordinate and neighboring communities, merchant populations, and mobile peoples shaped by warfare and the history of slavery. Forest agriculture supported a heavily rural population.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王族、王母系与酋长贵族；中层为自由民农户、商人、工匠、战士和祭司；下层包括侍从、债役者以及奴隶制遗存人群。社会流动受亲属、战功与政治庇护影响。
socialClasses.en: The upper stratum consisted of royal lineages, queen-mother networks, and chiefly nobility; the middle included free farming households, traders, artisans, warriors, and priests; lower strata included retainers, debt dependents, and people within the lingering legacy of slavery. Social mobility depended on kinship, military service, and political patronage.

allies.zh: 1900年没有真正意义上的强大国际盟友；主要依靠联盟内部忠于王权的属邦、地方酋长与民众支持
allies.en: In 1900 it had no powerful international allies in any meaningful sense; it relied chiefly on loyal provinces, local chiefs, and popular support within the confederacy

enemies.zh: 英国帝国及其黄金海岸殖民当局
enemies.en: The British Empire and its Gold Coast colonial authorities

foreignPolicy.zh: 其外交目标已从传统的地区均势与海岸贸易谈判，转为维护王权象征、阻止英国完全吞并并争取政治生存。由于军事与外交孤立，回旋空间极为有限。
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy had shifted from traditional regional balance and coastal trade negotiation to preserving royal legitimacy, resisting total British annexation, and seeking political survival. Military and diplomatic isolation left very little room for maneuver.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 在本土层面，优势技术体现在森林道路网络、金工与织造、动员通信、工事构筑和适应热带环境的军事经验；但在工业制造、铁路、电报与现代火炮方面明显落后于欧洲列强。
keyInnovations.en: At the local level, strengths lay in forest road networks, goldworking and weaving, mobilization communications, field fortification, and military experience adapted to tropical conditions; however, it lagged far behind European powers in industrial production, railways, telegraphy, and modern artillery.

strengths.zh: 阿散蒂拥有深厚的王权合法性、成熟的联盟政治传统、强烈的共同体认同、丰富的黄金与农业资源，以及适应森林作战的军事文化。
strengths.en: Ashanti possessed deep royal legitimacy, a mature confederal political tradition, strong communal identity, substantial gold and agricultural resources, and a military culture well adapted to forest warfare.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于对现代火器与火炮严重不足、财政和后勤无法长期支撑对英战争、内部属邦忠诚度不稳，以及王室流放后中央权威受损。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in severe shortages of modern firearms and artillery, finances and logistics inadequate for a prolonged war against Britain, unstable loyalty among subordinate states, and damage to central authority after the royal exile.

outlook.zh: 1900年的前景极为严峻。尽管雅阿桑特瓦起义展现了顽强抵抗意志，但在英国军事优势和帝国体系压力下，阿散蒂独立政权已接近终结，未来大概率被完全并入英属黄金海岸殖民统治。
outlook.en: The outlook in 1900 was extremely grim. Although the Yaa Asantewaa War demonstrated fierce resistance, Ashanti's independent state was approaching its end under British military superiority and imperial pressure, and was likely to be fully absorbed into the colonial rule of the Gold Coast.

description.zh: 西非著名王权联盟，在1900年正经历对英国的最后大规模抵抗。
description.en: A renowned West African royal confederacy undergoing its final major resistance against Britain in 1900.

governmentForm.zh: 中央集权君主制，正在由传统曼陀罗式王权向现代官僚国家转型
governmentForm.en: A centralized monarchy in transition from a traditional mandala-style kingship to a modern bureaucratic state

socialStructure.zh: 社会正从旧有的等级与庇护关系体系转向以官僚、地主、僧团、商人和自由农民为主的结构；奴隶制与劳役制度正在被逐步废除
socialStructure.en: Society was shifting from older ranked patron-client structures toward one centered on officials, landholders, the Buddhist sangha, merchants, and free peasants; slavery and corvée obligations were being gradually abolished

rulingClass.zh: 国王、王族、高级贵族、大臣、省级总督与新式受教育官僚构成统治阶层
rulingClass.en: The king, royal family, senior nobles, ministers, provincial governors, and newly educated bureaucrats formed the ruling class

succession.zh: 由却克里王朝世袭继承，原则上由国王指定并获宫廷与高层贵族承认的王位继承人继位
succession.en: Hereditary succession within the Chakri dynasty, with the heir in principle designated by the king and recognized by the court and high nobility

structure.zh: 1900年的暹罗政府以国王为最高权威，经过朱拉隆功改革后形成较现代化的中央官僚体系。中央设有内阁式大臣会议与多个部，地方则由原先半自治藩属和总督辖区改编为由曼谷直接控制的行政单位。
structure.en: In 1900 Siam was ruled by the king as supreme authority, but Chulalongkorn's reforms had created a more modern central bureaucracy. The center operated through ministerial councils and specialized ministries, while the provinces were being transformed from semi-autonomous tributary and governorship systems into administrative units directly controlled from Bangkok.

function.zh: 负责省区行政改革、地方官任命、治安与人口户籍管理，是加强中央集权的核心机关
function.en: Responsible for provincial administrative reform, appointment of local officials, internal order, and registration of population; it was the core institution of centralization

function.zh: 负责税收、关税、国库、预算和国家债务管理，推动财政制度现代化
function.en: Handled taxation, customs, the treasury, budgeting, and state debt management, driving fiscal modernization

function.zh: 负责与列强谈判、签订条约、驻外使节事务及维护暹罗独立
function.en: Managed negotiations with the great powers, treaty affairs, overseas missions, and the preservation of Siamese independence

function.zh: 负责陆军编制、征募、军械、训练和边防建设
function.en: Oversaw army organization, recruitment, arsenals, training, and frontier defense

function.zh: 负责法院改革、法典整理、审判监督与削弱领事裁判权影响
function.en: Directed court reform, legal codification, judicial supervision, and efforts to reduce the impact of extraterritorial consular jurisdiction

function.zh: 负责道路、运河、铁路、电报、宫廷学校与近代教育体系建设
function.en: Responsible for roads, canals, railways, telegraphs, court schools, and the construction of a modern education system

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政正由传统城邦与属地体系改组为‘蒙通’行政圈和府、县层级。曼谷通过内政部派任官员，削弱地方世袭贵族与藩属统治者的独立性。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was being reorganized from a traditional network of tributary towns and dependencies into monthon administrative circles and lower provincial units. Bangkok appointed officials through the Ministry of Interior, reducing the autonomy of hereditary nobles and tributary rulers.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系处于传统王令、佛教法文化与近代成文法改革并存阶段。中央正建立更统一的法院和审判程序，以满足现代国家治理并争取修订不平等条约。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined traditional royal decrees, Buddhist legal culture, and modern codification. The central government was building more uniform courts and procedures to meet the standards of a modern state and to strengthen its case for revising unequal treaties.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以地税、关税、消费税、鸦片与酒类专卖收益、华人包税制度残余以及人头与市场税等构成，正逐渐由包税转向官办征收。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation drew from land taxes, customs duties, excise revenues, monopolies on opium and alcohol, remnants of Chinese tax farming, and poll and market taxes; the system was gradually shifting from tax farming to direct state collection.

religion.zh: 以上座部佛教为国教与社会核心，王权与僧团关系密切；同时存在民间精灵信仰、婆罗门仪式以及华人宗教传统。
religion.en: Theravada Buddhism was the state religion and social core, with close ties between kingship and the sangha; popular spirit beliefs, Brahmanical court ritual, and Chinese religious traditions also remained important.

philosophy.zh: 思想上以佛教伦理、王权护法观念、忠君父权秩序与务实改革精神并存，宫廷精英逐步吸收欧洲行政、法律与教育理念。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined Buddhist ethics, the ideal of the king as protector of the faith, hierarchical loyalty, and pragmatic reformism, while court elites increasingly absorbed European ideas on administration, law, and education.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用泰文文字，源自高棉字母传统并适应暹罗语音体系；官方文书中也可见巴利文、梵文术语及部分英文、中文商业记录。
writingSystem.en: The main script was Thai, derived from Khmer writing traditions and adapted to Siamese phonology; official and religious vocabulary also employed Pali and Sanskrit terms, while some English and Chinese records appeared in diplomacy and commerce.

culturalAchievements.zh: 19世纪末的暹罗在宫廷建筑、佛寺修缮、王家编史、地图测绘、近代教育、印刷出版和官制改革方面成就显著。朱拉隆功时期还推动留学、铁路、电报和新式学校，形成兼具传统与现代性的国家文化。
culturalAchievements.en: By the late nineteenth century Siam had achieved notable advances in court architecture, temple restoration, royal historiography, cartography, modern education, printing, and administrative reform. Under Chulalongkorn it also promoted overseas study, railways, telegraphs, and new schools, producing a national culture that blended tradition and modernity.

languageFamily.zh: 官方主要语言为泰语，属于壮侗语系；境内亦广泛使用老挝语、马来语、高棉语、华语方言与孟语等。
languageFamily.en: The principal official language was Thai, part of the Kra-Dai language family; Lao, Malay, Khmer, Chinese dialects, and Mon were also widely spoken within the kingdom.

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年的暹罗经济处于传统农业王国向出口导向型近代经济过渡阶段。稻米出口迅速增长，曼谷成为区域商业中心，国家通过基础设施和财政改革提高了市场整合度，但工业化程度仍低。
gdpDescription.en: In 1900 Siam's economy was in transition from a traditional agrarian kingdom toward an export-oriented modern economy. Rice exports were growing rapidly, Bangkok had become a regional commercial center, and state reforms in infrastructure and finance improved market integration, though industrialization remained limited.

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻种植、林木与柚木采伐、锡矿开采、渔业、手工业加工、内河与海运贸易、王室与民间建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, timber and teak extraction, tin mining, fisheries, handicraft processing, riverine and maritime trade, and royal and private construction

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口稻米、柚木、锡、牲畜、鱼产品和少量橡胶及森林产品；主要进口纺织品、机械、金属制品、武器、奢侈品和工业消费品
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included rice, teak, tin, livestock, fish products, and small amounts of rubber and forest goods; major imports included textiles, machinery, metal goods, arms, luxury items, and manufactured consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富主要体现在稻田、役畜、住房、船只、首饰和亲族网络中。曼谷商人、华人商业社群与地方地主的财富显著高于农民家庭。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was primarily held in rice land, draft animals, houses, boats, jewelry, and kinship networks. Bangkok merchants, Chinese commercial communities, and provincial landholders were significantly wealthier than peasant households.

economicSystem.zh: 以君主国家主导下的市场农业经济为主，兼具王室垄断、私人商贸、华人资本网络与逐步扩大的国际自由贸易要素
economicSystem.en: A monarchy-led market agrarian economy combining royal monopolies, private commerce, Chinese capital networks, and a gradually expanding sphere of international free trade

source.en: Mining, forestry, and state domain income

source.zh: 杂项收费与司法行政收入

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，受益于出口增长和财政集中化，但仍需应对铁路建设、军备现代化和外交压力带来的长期支出。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound, benefiting from export growth and fiscal centralization, though it still faced long-term spending pressures from railway construction, military modernization, and diplomacy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以增加关税和地税征收效率、减少包税依赖、扩大中央预算控制并优先投资基础设施和国家建构为主，强调稳健而非激进举债。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized improving customs and land-tax collection, reducing reliance on tax farming, expanding central budgetary control, and prioritizing infrastructure and state-building, with a preference for prudence over aggressive borrowing.

description.zh: 军队现代化的核心力量，装备步枪、炮兵和工兵单位，主要承担首都防御、省区控制与边境驻防任务。
description.en: The core of military modernization, equipped with rifles, artillery, and engineer units, responsible for defense of the capital, provincial control, and frontier garrison duties.

description.zh: 规模较小，以炮舰、巡逻艇和河海口防御力量为主，用于保卫湄南河口、沿海交通和王国海关利益。
description.en: A smaller force centered on gunboats, patrol craft, and estuarine defense, used to protect the Chao Phraya estuary, coastal communications, and customs interests.

description.zh: 承担地方治安、税收保护、边地巡逻和辅助镇压叛乱的任务，是中央控制地方的重要武装。
description.en: These forces handled provincial security, protection of tax collection, frontier patrols, and auxiliary suppression of unrest, serving as an important instrument of central control.

commanderInChief.zh: 朱拉隆功国王

technology.zh: 军队采用19世纪末欧洲式编制、训练和制服，装备后膛步枪、现代火炮、电报通信和有限蒸汽舰艇，但整体火力、后勤和工业基础远逊于英法列强。
technology.en: The military used late nineteenth-century European-style organization, training, and uniforms, with breech-loading rifles, modern artillery, telegraph communications, and limited steam-powered naval vessels, though its firepower, logistics, and industrial base remained far below those of Britain and France.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自英属缅甸和马来方向的英国压力、法属印度支那方向的法国扩张，以及边疆地区行政整合引发的地方抵抗。暹罗的核心战略是避免与列强直接战争。
threats.en: The main threats came from British pressure from Burma and Malaya, French expansion from Indochina, and local resistance generated by frontier integration. Siam's core strategy was to avoid direct war with the great powers.

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口约八百万，主体为中部泰人、老挝人与北方泰语族群，此外还有高棉人、马来人、孟人、华人和山地民族。人口分布高度农村化，集中于湄南河流域及主要稻作平原。
populationDescription.en: The kingdom had about eight million inhabitants, primarily Central Thai, Lao, and northern Tai-speaking groups, along with Khmer, Malay, Mon, Chinese, and upland peoples. The population was overwhelmingly rural and concentrated in the Chao Phraya basin and major rice-growing plains.

socialClasses.zh: 社会可大致分为王室与贵族、高级官僚、僧侣、华人商人、地方地主与头人、自由农民、渔民工匠以及仍在制度转型中残存的依附劳动群体。
socialClasses.en: Society can be broadly divided into the royal family and nobility, senior bureaucrats, monks, Chinese merchants, provincial landholders and headmen, free peasants, fishermen and artisans, and remnants of dependent labor groups surviving amid institutional transition.

allies.zh: 暹罗没有牢固的正式军事同盟，但与英国和法国分别维持谨慎合作关系，并通过与俄国、德国和其他欧洲国家保持友好往来来平衡列强压力。
allies.en: Siam had no firm formal military alliances, but maintained cautious cooperative relations with both Britain and France, while using friendly ties with Russia, Germany, and other European states to balance great-power pressure.

enemies.zh: 无公开宣战敌国；现实中的主要战略对手是对暹罗领土与主权构成压力的法国殖民势力，其次是可能施压南部与西部边境的英国帝国机构。
enemies.en: It had no openly declared wartime enemies; in practical strategic terms, the principal adversary was French colonial power pressing against Siamese territory and sovereignty, followed by British imperial authorities able to exert pressure on the southern and western frontiers.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持独立、承认部分边界让步以换取核心主权保存、推行行政与法律现代化、并在英法之间实行平衡外交为主。暹罗努力将自己塑造成一个‘文明化’且可治理的现代国家，以减少被殖民的风险。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on preserving independence, accepting limited frontier concessions to safeguard core sovereignty, pursuing administrative and legal modernization, and balancing Britain against France. Siam sought to present itself as a 'civilized' and governable modern state in order to reduce the risk of colonization.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路建设、电报网络、近代印刷、欧洲式军训与军械、测绘与地籍调查、近代学校制度、蒸汽船运输和中央档案行政
keyInnovations.en: Railway construction, telegraph networks, modern printing, European-style military drill and armaments, cartography and cadastral survey, modern schooling, steamship transport, and centralized archival administration

strengths.zh: 暹罗最大的优势在于灵活的外交、相对稳健的财政、日益加强的中央官僚体系、不断增长的稻米出口，以及朱拉隆功推动的制度改革。这些因素使其成为东南亚少数保持正式独立的国家。
strengths.en: Siam's greatest strengths were its flexible diplomacy, relatively sound finances, increasingly effective central bureaucracy, expanding rice exports, and the institutional reforms driven by Chulalongkorn. These factors enabled it to remain one of the few formally independent states in Southeast Asia.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点包括工业基础薄弱、军事实力有限、边疆整合尚未完成、对国际贸易和外国资本依赖上升，以及不平等条约和领事裁判权对主权的限制。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included a thin industrial base, limited military power, incomplete frontier integration, rising dependence on international trade and foreign capital, and constraints on sovereignty imposed by unequal treaties and extraterritorial jurisdiction.

outlook.zh: 若能继续推进财政、法律和教育改革，并维持英法之间的平衡，暹罗在20世纪初仍有较大机会保持独立并进一步建设现代国家；但任何列强冲突升级或国内改革失衡都可能危及其主权。
outlook.en: If it could continue fiscal, legal, and educational reform while maintaining a balance between Britain and France, Siam had a strong chance of preserving independence and further consolidating a modern state in the early twentieth century; however, any escalation in great-power rivalry or serious internal reform failure could endanger its sovereignty.

description.zh: 东南亚少数保持独立的王国，通过改革与外交平衡英法势力。
description.en: One of the few independent Southeast Asian kingdoms, balancing British and French power through reform and diplomacy.

governmentForm.zh: 伊斯兰君主制苏丹国，中央马赫赞政权通过宫廷、总督与地方代理人行使统治
governmentForm.en: Islamic monarchical sultanate in which the central Makhzen authority ruled through the court, governors, and local agents

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与马赫赞官僚、乌理玛与宗教家族、城市商人与手工业者、部族首领与乡村社群、犹太社群及奴仆与附庸构成，城市与部族地区之间差异明显
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the royal household and Makhzen bureaucracy, ulama and religious lineages, urban merchants and artisans, tribal chiefs and rural communities, Jewish communities, and servants and dependents, with a marked divide between urban and tribal regions

rulingClass.zh: 阿拉维王室、马赫赞高官、主要卡伊德与帕夏、宗教学者及与朝廷结盟的显贵家族
rulingClass.en: The Alaouite royal house, senior Makhzen officials, leading qaids and pashas, religious scholars, and notable families allied with the court

succession.zh: 阿拉维王朝的世袭君主制，通常由王朝内部男性继承人即位，但实际继承常受宫廷政治、军队支持与列强压力影响
succession.en: Hereditary Alaouite monarchy, usually passing to a male dynastic heir, though actual succession was shaped by court politics, military backing, and foreign pressure

structure.zh: 1900年的摩洛哥政体以苏丹为最高权威，依托马赫赞行政体系治理。中央朝廷设于非斯，并通过大臣、财政官、司法与宗教机构，以及派驻各城镇与部族地区的总督、帕夏和卡伊德管理全国。许多边远部族地区对中央的服从具有协商性，体现出“马赫赞”与“西巴”并存的政治现实。
structure.en: In 1900 Morocco was headed by the Sultan as supreme authority and governed through the Makhzen administrative system. The central court in Fez ruled through ministers, financial officers, judicial and religious institutions, and through governors, pashas, and qaids posted to towns and tribal regions. In many peripheral tribal areas obedience to the center was negotiated, reflecting the coexistence of Makhzen authority and zones of relative dissidence.

function.zh: 协调朝廷政务、传达苏丹诏令、监督高级官员并处理重要行政事务
function.en: Coordinated court affairs, transmitted the Sultan's orders, supervised senior officials, and handled major administrative matters

function.zh: 征收关税、监理国库收入、管理借款偿付、统筹税收与海关港口事务
function.en: Collected customs duties, supervised treasury receipts, managed debt servicing, and oversaw taxation and port customs

function.zh: 管理伊斯兰法官、宗教基金、清真寺与宗教教育，并维护苏丹作为信士长的宗教合法性
function.en: Managed Islamic judges, religious endowments, mosques, and religious education, while upholding the Sultan's legitimacy as Commander of the Faithful

function.zh: 任命与监督帕夏、卡伊德及地方代理人，处理治安、部族联络和行政命令执行
function.en: Appointed and supervised pashas, qaids, and local agents, handling security, tribal liaison, and enforcement of administrative orders

function.zh: 管理苏丹直属军队、近卫部队、军火采购、堡垒驻军与有限的军事训练改革
function.en: Administered the Sultan's regular troops, guard units, arms procurement, fortress garrisons, and limited military training reforms

function.zh: 处理与欧洲列强及其他国家的外交交涉、领事事务、索赔与商业条约
function.en: Handled diplomacy with European powers and other states, consular affairs, claims, and commercial treaties

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由皇城与主要城市的帕夏、行省与地区的卡伊德以及与中央合作的部族首领共同构成。沿海与城市地区行政控制较强，内陆和山地地区则更多依赖谈判、贡赋与军事威慑。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was carried out by pashas in the imperial and major cities, qaids in provinces and districts, and tribal leaders cooperating with the center. Administrative control was stronger in coastal and urban zones, while inland and mountain regions relied more on negotiation, tribute, and military pressure.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以马立克学派伊斯兰教法为基础，辅以苏丹敕令、地方惯例和部族习惯法。穆斯林事务由卡迪审理，犹太社群在部分内部事务上保有自身法律传统，而涉外纠纷常受领事裁判权影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on Maliki Islamic law, supplemented by sultanic decrees, local custom, and tribal customary law. Muslim affairs were judged by qadis, Jewish communities retained internal legal traditions in some matters, and foreign-related disputes were increasingly affected by consular jurisdiction.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自海关关税、农业与牲畜征收、集市税、城市杂税及地方贡赋。到1900年，关税收入的重要性显著上升，因为对外贸易和债务压力使国家更加依赖港口税源。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation drew mainly from customs duties, agricultural and livestock levies, market taxes, urban imposts, and provincial tribute. By 1900 customs had become especially important, as foreign trade and debt pressure made the state increasingly dependent on port revenues.

religion.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教马立克学派为国教核心，苏丹兼具世俗统治者与信士长身份。苏菲兄弟会、圣裔家族和地方圣者崇拜在社会生活中影响深远，犹太社群则是重要的受保护少数群体。
religion.en: Sunni Islam of the Maliki school formed the religious core of the state, and the Sultan held both secular authority and the role of Commander of the Faithful. Sufi brotherhoods, sharifian lineages, and local saint veneration strongly shaped social life, while Jewish communities formed an important protected minority.

philosophy.zh: 思想基础以伊斯兰法学、阿什尔里神学、苏菲伦理和王朝合法性观念为主，同时城市精英对行政改革、军备现代化和有限技术引进表现出谨慎兴趣。
philosophy.en: Its intellectual foundations rested on Islamic jurisprudence, Ash'ari theology, Sufi ethics, and dynastic legitimacy, while urban elites showed cautious interest in administrative reform, military modernization, and limited technological adoption.

writingSystem.zh: 官方书写以阿拉伯字母书写的古典阿拉伯语与摩洛哥阿拉伯语为主；柏柏尔语言多以口传为主，犹太社群也使用希伯来文和犹太-阿拉伯文传统。
writingSystem.en: Official writing used the Arabic script for Classical Arabic and Moroccan Arabic; Berber languages remained largely oral, while Jewish communities also maintained Hebrew and Judeo-Arabic written traditions.

culturalAchievements.zh: 摩洛哥以非斯、马拉喀什、梅克内斯等古都的宗教学术、马格里布建筑、泽利赫瓷砖、木雕灰泥装饰、皮革与金属手工艺、安达卢斯音乐传统及伊斯兰学术网络而著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Morocco was noted for the religious scholarship of cities such as Fez, Marrakesh, and Meknes, for Maghrebi architecture, zellij tilework, carved wood and stucco, leather and metal crafts, Andalusi musical traditions, and Islamic scholarly networks.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属于亚非语系，包括阿拉伯语支的摩洛哥阿拉伯语以及柏柏尔语群；宗教与高等书面文化以阿拉伯语为主
languageFamily.en: Its principal languages belonged to the Afro-Asiatic family, including Moroccan Arabic of the Arabic branch and Berber languages; Arabic dominated religion and high written culture

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年的摩洛哥经济以农业、畜牧、城市手工业和港口贸易为主，整体生产结构传统但并非停滞。沿海贸易城市与内陆部族经济并存，国家财政能力有限，经济对气候、治安和对外关税收入高度敏感。
gdpDescription.en: In 1900 Morocco's economy was centered on agriculture, pastoralism, urban handicrafts, and port trade; its structure was traditional but not stagnant. Coastal trading cities coexisted with inland tribal economies, state fiscal capacity was limited, and economic performance was highly sensitive to climate, security, and customs income.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、橄榄与果园农业、畜牧业、皮革加工、纺织、地毯、金属工艺、制陶、贸易转运和港口服务
mainIndustries.en: Cereal cultivation, olive and orchard agriculture, livestock raising, leatherworking, textiles, carpets, metal crafts, pottery, mercantile exchange, and port services

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以羊毛、皮革、生皮、牲畜、蜡、杏仁、橄榄油、地毯和部分矿产品为主；进口则有棉纺织品、糖、茶、金属制品、武器、机械器材和奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wool, leather, hides, livestock, wax, almonds, olive oil, carpets, and some minerals; imports included cotton textiles, sugar, tea, metal goods, arms, machinery, and luxury items

name.zh: 摩洛哥里亚尔与哈萨尼比塞塔并用
name.en: Moroccan rial and Hassani peseta in circulation

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭财富集中于土地使用权、牲畜、谷物储备、手工工具和家族首饰。城市商人、宗教家族和朝廷关联显贵拥有较高财富，而多数农村家庭仅维持低度剩余。
householdWealth.en: Most household wealth was held in land-use rights, livestock, grain stores, artisan tools, and family jewelry. Urban merchants, religious lineages, and court-connected notables possessed greater wealth, while most rural households maintained only modest surpluses.

economicSystem.zh: 以传统农业和手工业为基础的混合经济，在城市市场、部族交换和地中海—大西洋对外贸易之间运转；国家干预有限但对关税和政治特许高度依赖，并受到欧洲金融渗透压力。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on traditional agriculture and handicrafts, operating across urban markets, tribal exchange, and Mediterranean-Atlantic foreign trade; state intervention was limited but highly dependent on customs and political concessions, and increasingly pressured by European financial penetration.

category.zh: 公共工程、港口与军械采购
category.en: Public works, ports, and arms purchases

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模不大，现金流高度依赖海关与临时征收，并因宫廷消费、军事支出及欧洲债务压力而脆弱。虽未陷入全面财政崩溃，但已明显受到外部金融影响。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was modest in size, its cash flow heavily dependent on customs and extraordinary collections, and vulnerable to court consumption, military costs, and European debt pressure. It had not collapsed fiscally, but it was already clearly subject to external financial influence.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持王朝秩序、偿付对外义务和保障军事与宫廷开支为先，依赖提高关税、临时加派和借款周转，改革意愿存在但执行受地方阻力与列强干预限制。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized preserving dynastic order, meeting foreign obligations, and sustaining military and court expenditure, relying on customs enhancement, extraordinary levies, and borrowing; reform efforts existed but implementation was constrained by local resistance and foreign interference.

description.zh: 由中央直接控制的主要常备部队，装备水平不一，部分单位接受过有限欧洲式训练，驻防皇城、主要城市与战略要地。
description.en: The main centrally controlled standing force, unevenly equipped, with some units receiving limited European-style training, garrisoning imperial cities, major towns, and strategic points.

description.zh: 包括传统骑兵和随朝廷调动的机动部队，适于巡逻、镇压叛乱与长距离行军，在部族战争环境中仍具重要性。
description.en: Included traditional cavalry and mobile forces moved with the court, suited for patrol, repression of revolts, and long-distance campaigning, and still important in tribal warfare conditions.

description.zh: 由地方卡伊德和结盟部族按需征集，训练和纪律参差，但在地区防御和对内作战中数量可观。
description.en: Raised as needed by local qaids and allied tribes; training and discipline varied greatly, but they could provide substantial numbers for regional defense and internal campaigns.

description.zh: 负责城防、沿海炮台和若干火炮单位，拥有部分进口火炮，但维护、训练和弹药保障相对落后。
description.en: Responsible for city defenses, coastal batteries, and several artillery units, possessing some imported guns, though maintenance, training, and ammunition support lagged behind.

description.zh: 负责宫廷、皇城与苏丹本人安全，是政治忠诚度最高的精锐力量之一。
description.en: Protected the court, imperial residences, and the Sultan himself, and ranked among the most politically loyal elite forces.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹阿卜杜勒-阿齐兹

technology.zh: 军队处于传统与现代化之间，装备有步枪、部分后膛炮和沿海炮台，但补给、训练、组织和通信远逊于欧洲列强。铁路、现代参谋体系和工业化军工基础几乎不存在。
technology.en: The military stood between tradition and modernization, equipped with rifles, some breech-loading artillery, and coastal batteries, but was far inferior to European powers in logistics, training, organization, and communications. Railways, a modern staff system, and an industrial armaments base were largely absent.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自法国和西班牙的扩张压力、欧洲列强借债与外交干预、沿海控制权争夺，以及国内部分部族地区对中央权威的挑战。
threats.en: The main threats came from French and Spanish expansionist pressure, European intervention through debt and diplomacy, struggles over coastal control, and internal challenges to central authority from some tribal regions.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约五百万，以农村人口为主，族群与语言结构复杂，主要包括阿拉伯化居民、各柏柏尔语族群以及城市中的犹太社群。人口分布集中于大西洋沿岸平原、北部城市带、非斯—梅克内斯地区和若干山地谷地。
populationDescription.en: The population was about five million and predominantly rural, with a complex ethnic and linguistic composition including Arabized populations, various Berber-speaking groups, and urban Jewish communities. Population was concentrated in the Atlantic plains, the northern urban belt, the Fez-Meknes region, and certain mountain valleys.

socialClasses.zh: 上层包括王室、马赫赞官僚、宗教贵族、富商与大地主；中间层包括城市手工业者、商人、小地主与学者；下层为广大农民、牧民、城市劳工、佃农与仆役。犹太商人和工匠在城市经济中占有重要位置，部族结构仍深刻影响社会身份。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the royal family, Makhzen officials, religious elites, wealthy merchants, and large landholders; the middle ranks included urban artisans, merchants, small proprietors, and scholars; the lower ranks consisted of peasants, pastoralists, urban laborers, tenants, and servants. Jewish merchants and craftsmen held an important place in urban economic life, and tribal structure continued to deeply shape social identity.

allies.zh: 摩洛哥在1900年没有可靠而正式的强力盟友，通常以平衡法国、西班牙、英国和德国等列强的竞争来维护独立。
allies.en: Morocco had no dependable formal great-power allies in 1900, and generally sought to preserve independence by balancing the rivalries of France, Spain, Britain, and Germany.

enemies.zh: 没有公开宣战的主要敌国，但法国与西班牙是最直接的战略威胁；部分欧洲列强的财政控制和领事特权同样侵蚀其主权。
enemies.en: It had no principal enemies under formal declaration of war, but France and Spain were the most direct strategic threats; the fiscal control and consular privileges of several European powers also eroded its sovereignty.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维持独立、避免单一列强控制、争取外交回旋空间和延缓直接殖民干预为核心。朝廷试图通过条约谈判、贸易让步和列强制衡来保存主权，但实力不足使其处境日益被动。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving independence, preventing domination by any single power, gaining diplomatic room for maneuver, and delaying direct colonial intervention. The court tried to preserve sovereignty through treaty negotiation, commercial concessions, and great-power balancing, but limited strength made its position increasingly defensive.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 技术水平整体仍以前工业和手工业为主，但已接触现代火器、蒸汽航运、港口设施改良、电报和有限机械设备。技术引进主要集中于军事、港口和外交通信领域，尚未形成广泛工业化基础。
keyInnovations.en: Its technological level remained predominantly pre-industrial and artisanal, but it had adopted modern firearms, steam shipping links, improved port facilities, telegraphy, and limited machinery. Technological adoption was concentrated mainly in military affairs, ports, and diplomatic communications, without producing a broad industrial base.

strengths.zh: 王朝合法性深厚，伊斯兰宗教权威稳固，社会韧性强，农业与手工业基础广泛，地处大西洋与地中海之间的战略位置使其在外交上仍有一定筹码。
strengths.en: It possessed deep dynastic legitimacy, strong Islamic religious authority, resilient social structures, a broad agricultural and artisanal base, and a strategic position between the Atlantic and Mediterranean that still gave it some diplomatic leverage.

weaknesses.zh: 中央集权有限，财政脆弱，军队现代化不足，地方统治依赖协商与临时征发，欧洲金融和外交渗透不断加深，沿海与贸易命脉易受外部控制。
weaknesses.en: Its centralization was limited, finances were fragile, military modernization was inadequate, local rule depended on negotiation and ad hoc levies, European financial and diplomatic penetration was deepening, and its coasts and trade lifelines were vulnerable to outside control.

outlook.zh: 1900年的摩洛哥表面上仍然稳定且独立，但若无成功的财政、军事与行政改革，王朝将在未来十年内越来越难抵御法国和西班牙的干预，主权前景趋于恶化。
outlook.en: In 1900 Morocco remained outwardly stable and independent, but without successful fiscal, military, and administrative reform, the dynasty would find it increasingly difficult over the next decade to resist French and Spanish intervention, and its sovereign outlook was deteriorating.

description.zh: 北非仍保持独立的重要苏丹国，但列强财政与外交压力日益加深。
description.en: A still-independent North African sultanate under growing financial and diplomatic pressure from European powers.

governmentForm.zh: 法国殖民联邦行政体制，由交趾支那直辖殖民地与安南、东京、柬埔寨、老挝保护国组成
governmentForm.en: French colonial federal administration composed of the directly ruled colony of Cochinchina and the protectorates of Annam, Tonkin, Cambodia, and Laos

socialStructure.zh: 社会呈明显殖民等级结构：法国官员与侨民居上，随后为本地皇室与传统官绅、城市商人和地主、乡村农民、工匠与劳工，另有少数山地民族与边疆部族保持半整合状态
socialStructure.en: Society followed a marked colonial hierarchy: French officials and settlers at the top, followed by indigenous royalty and traditional mandarins, urban merchants and landlords, rural peasants, artisans and laborers, with various highland and frontier peoples remaining only partially integrated

rulingClass.zh: 法国殖民官僚、军官与商人，以及在保护国体制下被保留的越南阮朝宫廷、柬埔寨王室和老挝地方诸王公
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of French colonial bureaucrats, officers, and businessmen, together with the preserved indigenous elites of the Nguyễn court in Vietnam, the Cambodian monarchy, and Lao princely houses under protectorate arrangements

succession.zh: 最高权力由法国本土宪政程序产生并任命总督；保护国内部君位依各地王朝世袭，但须经法国承认
succession.en: Supreme authority derived from the constitutional system of metropolitan France, which appointed the Governor-General; within the protectorates, royal succession remained dynastic but subject to French recognition

structure.zh: 印度支那总督为最高行政首长，下辖总督府、驻各地的总住理官或统监，以及交趾支那殖民地民政机构和各保护国名义上的本地朝廷。决策集中于河内，财政、关税、公共工程与军事由联邦层面统筹
structure.en: The Governor-General of Indochina was the supreme executive authority, overseeing the Governor-General's office, resident-superiors and residents in the territories, the civil administration of Cochinchina, and the nominal indigenous courts of the protectorates. Decision-making was centralized in Hanoi, while finance, customs, public works, and military matters were coordinated at the federal level

function.zh: 统筹政令、档案、各地行政协调与对巴黎殖民部的报告
function.en: Coordinated decrees, records, territorial administration, and reporting to the Colonial Ministry in Paris

function.zh: 征收人头税、地税、盐酒鸦片专卖收入、关税与预算管理
function.en: Collected poll taxes, land taxes, monopolies on salt, alcohol, and opium, customs duties, and managed the budget

function.zh: 修筑道路、桥梁、港口、堤坝、运河与铁路前期工程
function.en: Built roads, bridges, ports, dikes, canals, and early railway works

function.zh: 管理殖民法院、监狱、治安警察与政治监控
function.en: Administered colonial courts, prisons, police, and political surveillance

name.en: Department of Native Affairs and Education

function.zh: 监督保护国宫廷、地方官绅、学校、翻译与行政培训
function.en: Supervised protectorate courts, local elites, schools, translators, and administrative training

name.en: Department of Health and Maritime Quarantine

function.zh: 负责港口检疫、城市卫生、防疫与医院管理
function.en: Handled port quarantine, urban sanitation, epidemic control, and hospital administration

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理呈二元结构：在交趾支那由法国行政机构直接统治；在东京、安南、柬埔寨和老挝则通过驻在官监督本地王廷、总督、巡抚、知府、县令及乡社头人实施间接统治
localAdmin.en: Local administration was dual in character: Cochinchina was directly ruled by French civil institutions, while Tonkin, Annam, Cambodia, and Laos were indirectly governed through French residents supervising local courts, governors, prefects, district officials, and village notables

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系高度分层：法国人在殖民法院下受法国法与殖民法管辖，本地居民则因地区不同适用法属条例、阮朝成文法残余、习惯法与王室法令；刑事、税务和政治案件 increasingly由殖民当局掌控
legalSystem.en: The legal system was highly stratified: French citizens fell under French and colonial law in colonial courts, while indigenous populations were subject variously to colonial regulations, remnants of Nguyễn law, customary law, and royal decrees; criminal, fiscal, and political cases were increasingly controlled by colonial authorities

taxationSystem.zh: 主要税源包括人头税、土地税、市场税、贸易关税，以及盐、酒、鸦片专卖收入；部分地区仍征收徭役或以劳役替代税赋，财政负担主要落在农民与小商人身上
taxationSystem.en: Main revenues came from poll taxes, land taxes, market dues, customs duties, and monopolies on salt, alcohol, and opium; in some regions corvée labor remained in use or substituted for taxation, with the main burden falling on peasants and petty traders

religion.zh: 主要宗教包括越南地区的佛教、儒教祭祀与道教混合信仰，柬埔寨与老挝的上座部佛教，以及少数天主教社群和地方泛灵信仰
religion.en: Major religious traditions included the syncretic mix of Buddhism, Confucian rites, and Taoist practice in Vietnam, Theravada Buddhism in Cambodia and Laos, along with minority Catholic communities and local animist beliefs

philosophy.zh: 越南官绅社会仍深受儒家伦理、科举传统与君臣秩序影响，但殖民统治正引入法国共和主义、法理行政观念与近代教育思想
philosophy.en: Vietnamese elite society remained deeply shaped by Confucian ethics, examination traditions, and hierarchical political thought, while colonial rule was introducing French republican, legal-administrative, and modern educational ideas

writingSystem.zh: 越南地区并行使用汉字、喃字与日益扩展的国语字母；柬埔寨使用高棉文字，老挝使用老挝文字，法语则是殖民行政和高等教育语言
writingSystem.en: Vietnam used Classical Chinese, Chữ Nôm, and the increasingly expanding romanized quốc ngữ; Cambodia used Khmer script, Laos used Lao script, and French served as the language of colonial administration and higher education

culturalAchievements.zh: 1900年前后的法属印度支那文化成就在于传统宫廷文学、佛寺与王宫建筑、越南学术典籍延续，以及法国推动的测绘、考古、博物馆与殖民城市规划的开端
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural achievements around 1900 included enduring court literature, temple and palace architecture, the continuation of Vietnamese learned textual traditions, and the beginnings of French-sponsored cartography, archaeology, museums, and colonial urban planning

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属南亚语系（高棉语）、台-卡岱语系（老挝语）、南亚语系与汉藏语系边缘族群语言并存；越南语属南亚语系但长期受汉语文化强烈影响，法语为殖民精英语言
languageFamily.en: Major languages included Austroasiatic Khmer, Tai-Kadai Lao, and various minority languages of neighboring families; Vietnamese belonged to the Austroasiatic family but was heavily shaped by long Chinese cultural influence, while French functioned as the language of the colonial elite

gdpDescription.zh: 经济总体以农业为主，稻米种植占绝对核心地位，辅以矿产、林产、手工业与沿海贸易。殖民当局正把区域经济逐步整合进法国帝国贸易体系，但工业化程度仍很低
gdpDescription.en: The economy was overwhelmingly agrarian, with rice cultivation at its center, supplemented by minerals, forest products, handicrafts, and coastal trade. Colonial authorities were progressively integrating the region into the French imperial trading system, but industrialization remained very limited

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻种植、矿业（煤、锡、锌等）、制盐、酒类蒸馏、鸦片加工与销售、林木采伐、渔业、丝织、陶器、地方手工业与港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, mining (coal, tin, zinc, and others), salt production, alcohol distillation, opium processing and retail, timber extraction, fishing, silk weaving, ceramics, local handicrafts, and port commerce

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以稻米、煤炭、胡椒、鱼露、木材、生丝和部分矿产为主；进口则包括纺织品、机械、金属制品、洋酒、药品与殖民行政所需工业品
tradeGoods.en: Exports centered on rice, coal, pepper, fish sauce, timber, raw silk, and selected minerals; imports included textiles, machinery, metal goods, liquor, pharmaceuticals, and industrial items required by the colonial administration

name.zh: 法属印度支那皮阿斯特

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富有限，多表现为土地使用权、耕牛、农具、粮食储备、房屋和少量银币。富裕阶层则拥有大块稻田、城市房产、商业资本及与殖民政权相连的特许经营机会
householdWealth.en: Ordinary household wealth was modest and usually consisted of land-use rights, draft animals, tools, grain stores, dwellings, and small quantities of silver coin. Wealthier groups held larger rice lands, urban property, commercial capital, and concessionary opportunities tied to colonial rule

economicSystem.zh: 殖民型混合经济，以农业税收、专卖制度、对外贸易和特许开发为核心，由法国资本、殖民官僚和本地中间人共同驱动
economicSystem.en: A colonial mixed economy centered on agrarian taxation, state monopolies, foreign trade, and concessionary extraction, driven jointly by French capital, colonial bureaucracy, and indigenous intermediaries

source.zh: 行政收费、矿业与其他收入
source.en: Administrative fees, mining, and other revenues

category.zh: 债务、补贴与对法本土往来
category.en: Debt, subsidies, and transfers connected to metropolitan France

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政储备规模中等，主要用于维持殖民行政稳定、应对局部叛乱、支持公共工程和弥补收支波动；其稳健性依赖专卖收入与对外贸易
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were moderate, intended to maintain colonial stability, respond to local uprisings, support public works, and smooth budgetary fluctuations; their soundness depended heavily on monopoly revenues and foreign trade

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重视收支自给与殖民开发，倾向通过专卖、间接税和低成本本地行政维持盈余，同时把基础设施投资导向出口与军事控制需要
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized budgetary self-sufficiency and colonial development, favoring monopolies, indirect taxation, and relatively low-cost indigenous administration to preserve surpluses, while directing infrastructure investment toward export and military control

description.zh: 由法国海军陆战队步兵、殖民步兵与大批本地土兵组成，是镇压叛乱与守备要地的核心力量
description.en: Composed of French marine infantry, colonial infantry, and large numbers of indigenous riflemen, this was the core force for suppressing revolt and garrisoning key positions

name.zh: 土著辅助兵与地方卫队

description.zh: 包括东京、安南、柬埔寨与老挝地方兵、巡防队和警备部队，负责乡村治安、边境巡逻与情报协助
description.en: Included local troops, rural guards, and security formations in Tonkin, Annam, Cambodia, and Laos, used for village security, frontier patrols, and intelligence support

description.zh: 负责要塞炮、野战炮、筑路、架桥、测绘和河港设施维护
description.en: Handled fortress and field artillery, road building, bridge construction, surveying, and maintenance of riverine and port facilities

description.zh: 规模不大，但在红河、湄公河及沿海港口具有机动优势，承担巡逻、运兵和炮舰外交职能
description.en: Small in scale but mobile on the Red River, Mekong, and coastal ports, carrying out patrol, troop transport, and gunboat diplomacy

description.zh: 承担城市警备、监狱押解、政治侦缉与交通节点守卫任务
description.en: Responsible for urban security, prison escort, political policing, and guarding transport nodes

commanderInChief.zh: 印度支那总督兼法军驻印支高级指挥体系统辖者
commanderInChief.en: The Governor-General of Indochina together with the senior French military command in Indochina

technology.zh: 装备水平属19世纪末殖民军标准，配备连发步枪、速射炮、蒸汽与初期机械化运输工具、电报通信与河川炮舰，但后勤依赖港口和河流体系，空前技术尚未出现
technology.en: Equipment matched late nineteenth-century colonial standards, including repeating rifles, quick-firing artillery, steam and early mechanized transport, telegraph communications, and river gunboats, though logistics depended heavily on ports and river systems and predated air power

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自越南各地持续性反殖民抵抗、山区与边境武装、局部海盗与土匪活动，以及与暹罗和华南边境相关的安全问题；同时需警惕英法在东南亚的战略竞争
threats.en: The main threats came from continuing anti-colonial resistance in Vietnam, armed groups in highland and border regions, localized piracy and banditry, and security issues linked to Siam and the South China frontier; strategic competition with Britain in Southeast Asia also required attention

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1700万，绝大多数居住在农村稻作地区。族群以越南人为主，其次为高棉人、老挝人、华人商民，以及众多山地少数民族。人口增长总体稳定，但受疫病、饥荒与地区差异影响明显
populationDescription.en: The population was about 17 million, with an overwhelming majority living in rural rice-growing areas. Ethnically it was dominated by Vietnamese, followed by Khmer, Lao, Chinese merchant communities, and numerous upland minorities. Overall population growth was stable but strongly affected by disease, famine, and regional disparities

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括法国殖民官员与侨民、本地王室与官绅、地主与税农、华商与城市买办、中小手工业者、农民、雇工与矿工，以及处于边缘治理状态的山地社群
socialClasses.en: Social classes included French colonial officials and settlers, indigenous royalty and mandarins, landlords and tax farmers, Chinese merchants and urban compradors, small artisans, peasants, hired laborers and miners, and upland communities under looser forms of rule

allies.zh: 与法国本土及法国殖民帝国整体保持一体化外交立场；在东亚无独立同盟体系，但在现实上依赖法国海军与帝国外交支持
allies.en: It shared the diplomatic posture of metropolitan France and the wider French colonial empire; it possessed no independent alliance system in East Asia but in practice relied on French naval and imperial diplomatic backing

enemies.zh: 无正式宣战敌国，但长期面对本地反殖民力量；对暹罗保持戒备，并对英国在缅甸、马来亚和中国南部贸易网络中的影响持竞争态度
enemies.en: It had no formally declared enemy state, but faced persistent indigenous anti-colonial forces; it remained wary of Siam and competitive toward British influence in Burma, Malaya, and South China trade networks

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策完全服从法国帝国战略，目标是巩固对湄公河与红河流域的控制、扩大对华南与暹罗边境贸易影响、维持对英制衡，并以条约和军事驻防确保殖民边界稳定
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was wholly subordinate to French imperial strategy, aiming to consolidate control over the Mekong and Red River basins, expand commercial influence toward South China and the Siamese frontier, balance British power, and secure colonial borders through treaties and military garrisons

era.zh: 帝国主义时代

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路与港口建设初期、电报网络、蒸汽航运、现代测绘、殖民卫生制度、机械采矿与法式城市规划开始在主要中心推广，但整体技术扩散主要局限于沿海和行政节点
keyInnovations.en: Early railway and port construction, telegraph networks, steam shipping, modern cartography, colonial public health systems, mechanized mining, and French-style urban planning were being introduced in major centers, though technological diffusion remained largely confined to coastal and administrative nodes

strengths.zh: 拥有稻米和矿产等丰富资源、优越港口与河流交通、法国海军与财政支持，以及能够利用本地传统统治结构实施低成本间接统治
strengths.en: Its strengths included abundant resources such as rice and minerals, advantageous ports and river routes, support from French naval and financial power, and the ability to use indigenous traditional authority for relatively low-cost indirect rule

weaknesses.zh: 殖民统治合法性薄弱，农村税负沉重，地区差异大，工业基础薄弱，行政高度依赖少数法国干部和本地中介，且反殖民情绪长期积累
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were the fragile legitimacy of colonial rule, heavy rural tax burdens, strong regional disparities, a thin industrial base, dependence on a small French cadre and local intermediaries, and the long-term accumulation of anti-colonial sentiment

outlook.zh: 1900年的法属印度支那表面稳定、财政尚可，并处于殖民开发扩张阶段；但随着交通建设、教育传播和社会流动增加，民族主义与反殖民政治在未来数十年内势必增强
outlook.en: In 1900 French Indochina appeared stable on the surface, fiscally workable, and still in a phase of colonial expansion and development; however, improved transport, broader education, and greater social mobility would almost certainly strengthen nationalism and anti-colonial politics over the coming decades

description.zh: 法国在东南亚的殖民联邦，涵盖越南、柬埔寨与老挝各保护地和直辖地。
description.en: France's colonial federation in Southeast Asia, encompassing Vietnam, Cambodia, and Laos under mixed protectorate and direct rule.

governmentForm.zh: 由荷兰王国统治的殖民总督辖区
governmentForm.en: Colonial governor-general administration under the Kingdom of the Netherlands

socialStructure.zh: 社会呈强烈分层：欧洲人居于法律与行政顶层，其次为外来东方人（主要为华人、阿拉伯人与印度人商群），最下为各土著民族；同时各岛内部仍保有王公、摄政与村社等级体系。
socialStructure.en: Society was sharply stratified: Europeans stood at the top in law and administration, followed by Foreign Orientals—mainly Chinese, Arab, and Indian merchant communities—and below them the indigenous peoples; within the islands, princely, regental, and village hierarchies also remained important.

rulingClass.zh: 荷兰殖民官僚、欧洲种植园主与商社资本家，并与爪哇贵族摄政阶层合作统治
rulingClass.en: Dutch colonial bureaucrats, European plantation owners and commercial capitalists, ruling in cooperation with the Javanese regent aristocracy

succession.zh: 宗主国王位依荷兰王室世袭；殖民地总督由海牙任命，并不世袭
succession.en: The metropolitan crown followed hereditary succession in the Dutch royal house; the colony’s governor-general was appointed from The Hague and was not hereditary

structure.zh: 1900年的荷属东印度由巴达维亚总督总揽行政、军事与财政大权，受海牙殖民部与总督会议制约。中央下设总秘书处、财政、内政、司法、教育与宗教、公共工程、农业工商等机关；地方则分为省区、驻地、行政区与土著间接统治单位，在爪哇多依赖摄政，在外岛则由居民官、助理居民官与军事驻地推进统治。
structure.en: In 1900 the Dutch East Indies was headed by a governor-general in Batavia exercising broad administrative, military, and fiscal authority, constrained by the Ministry of Colonies in The Hague and the Council of the Indies. The central government included a general secretariat and departments for finance, internal administration, justice, education and religion, public works, and agriculture, trade, and industry; locally, authority was divided among residencies, districts, and indirectly ruled indigenous polities, relying heavily on regents in Java and on residents, assistant residents, and military stations in the Outer Islands.

function.zh: 处理总督文书、法令发布、跨部门协调与对海牙往来
function.en: Handled the governor-general’s correspondence, promulgation of decrees, interdepartmental coordination, and communication with The Hague

function.zh: 负责税收、关税、垄断收益、国库、会计与国家企业财务
function.en: Managed taxation, customs, monopoly revenues, the treasury, accounting, and finances of state enterprises

function.zh: 监督地方行政、居民官系统、土著政务、警察与人口登记
function.en: Supervised local administration, the resident system, indigenous affairs, police, and population registration

function.zh: 管理法院、检察、监狱、法典实施与分种族法域
function.en: Administered courts, prosecution, prisons, legal codification, and the racially differentiated legal order

name.zh: 教育、宗教与工业事务局
name.en: Department of Education, Religion, and Industry

function.zh: 管理欧式与土著学校、教师、宗教事务监督及部分技术推广
function.en: Oversaw European and indigenous schools, teachers, supervision of religious affairs, and certain technical promotion programs

function.zh: 负责道路、桥梁、港口、灌溉、铁路与政府建筑
function.en: Responsible for roads, bridges, ports, irrigation, railways, and government buildings

name.en: Department of Agriculture, Trade, and Industry

function.zh: 推动试验农业、种植园监管、出口作物统计与商业政策
function.en: Promoted experimental agriculture, supervised plantations, compiled export-crop statistics, and shaped commercial policy

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政核心单位为驻地（residentie），由荷兰居民官统辖，下设助理居民官、控制官与区长；在爪哇和马都拉广泛借助摄政、县长与村长实施间接统治。外岛地区则因征服程度不一，混合直接行政、条约附庸地与军事管制。
localAdmin.en: The key local unit was the residency, ruled by a Dutch resident, below whom stood assistant residents, controllers, and district officials; in Java and Madura, indirect rule relied heavily on regents, district heads, and village chiefs. In the Outer Islands, where conquest and integration were uneven, administration mixed direct rule, treaty dependencies, and military control.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系按族群分层：欧洲人主要适用荷兰法；外来东方人适用特别商事与民事规定；土著居民多受习惯法（adat）与殖民条例共同约束。设有欧洲法院、土著法院与行政裁判机制，体现殖民差别法治。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was stratified by race: Europeans were mainly subject to Dutch law; Foreign Orientals were governed by special commercial and civil provisions; indigenous peoples were largely bound by a combination of customary adat law and colonial regulations. European courts, indigenous courts, and administrative tribunals coexisted in a system of colonial legal dualism.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入来自土地税、进口与出口关税、消费税、鸦片专卖、盐税、铁路与邮政收益，以及部分政府企业利润。乡村地区仍通过地租、劳役折征与地方摊派向殖民国家输送资源。
taxationSystem.en: Public revenue came from land tax, import and export duties, excises, the opium monopoly, salt revenues, railway and postal income, and profits from certain state enterprises. In rural areas, rents, commuted labor obligations, and local levies continued to transfer resources to the colonial state.

religion.zh: 宗教极为多元。多数土著居民信奉伊斯兰教，尤其在爪哇、苏门答腊和沿海地区；巴厘岛以印度教传统为主；部分地区保留泛灵与祖先信仰；欧洲人多为新教徒，也有天主教社群。殖民政府通常避免直接干预伊斯兰教义，但严密监视宗教网络与朝觐往来。
religion.en: Religion was highly diverse. Most indigenous inhabitants were Muslim, especially in Java, Sumatra, and the coastal regions; Bali remained predominantly Hindu; some areas retained animist and ancestral traditions; Europeans were mostly Protestant, with Catholic communities as well. The colonial government generally avoided direct intervention in Islamic doctrine while closely monitoring religious networks and the pilgrimage.

philosophy.zh: 官方意识形态以殖民秩序、商业开发与所谓‘文明化使命’为核心；土著社会思想则由伊斯兰伦理、爪哇宫廷宇宙观、adat习惯法观念与新兴教育精英的改革意识并存。1900年前后，‘伦理政策’尚在形成，标志着由纯粹掠取向有限 paternalistic 改良的转变。
philosophy.en: Official ideology centered on colonial order, commercial exploitation, and a supposed civilizing mission; indigenous thought combined Islamic ethics, Javanese court cosmology, adat conceptions of order, and the reformist consciousness of an emerging educated elite. Around 1900, the Ethical Policy was only beginning to take shape, signaling a shift from pure extraction toward limited paternalistic reform.

writingSystem.zh: 行政和高等商业主要使用拉丁字母书写的荷兰语；马来语亦广泛用拉丁字母与阿拉伯化爪夷字书写；爪哇语、巽他语、巴厘语等仍使用本土文字传统，但在官方治理中地位有限。
writingSystem.en: Administration and higher commerce mainly used Dutch written in the Latin alphabet; Malay was also widely written in both Latin script and Arabic-derived Jawi; Javanese, Sundanese, Balinese, and other languages retained indigenous scripts, though their official role was limited.

culturalAchievements.zh: 荷属东印度在1900年前后形成了庞大的植物园、测绘与民族志知识体系，巴达维亚学会、茂物植物园和殖民统计调查尤为突出。爪哇宫廷文学、蜡染艺术、甘美兰音乐、哇扬皮影戏与伊斯兰书写文化仍极具生命力。铁路、印刷、报刊与学校的扩展也促成跨族群公共空间的萌芽。
culturalAchievements.en: By around 1900, the Dutch East Indies had developed extensive systems of botanical, cartographic, and ethnographic knowledge, exemplified by the Batavian Society, the Buitenzorg Botanical Gardens, and colonial statistical surveys. Javanese court literature, batik arts, gamelan music, wayang shadow theater, and Islamic literary culture remained vibrant. The spread of railways, printing, newspapers, and schools also encouraged the early emergence of a cross-ethnic public sphere.

languageFamily.zh: 以南岛语系为主，辅以南亚语系、汉藏语系汉语方言、阿拉伯语和荷兰语等多语并存
languageFamily.en: Predominantly Austronesian, alongside Austroasiatic influences, Sinitic Chinese dialects, Arabic, and Dutch in a multilingual colonial environment

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模在亚洲殖民地中居前列，基础在于爪哇高度密集农业、政府与私营种植园出口体系、群岛航运和转口贸易。人均产出仍偏低，反映人口稠密、农村贫困与殖民收益外流，但出口能力极强，尤其是糖、咖啡、烟草、锡、橡胶初兴与石油开采。
gdpDescription.en: The economy ranked among the larger colonial economies in Asia, based on Java’s dense agriculture, state and private plantation exports, inter-island shipping, and entrepôt trade. Output per capita remained low, reflecting population pressure, rural poverty, and the outward transfer of colonial profits, yet export capacity was strong, especially in sugar, coffee, tobacco, tin, early rubber, and petroleum extraction.

mainIndustries.zh: 稻作农业、糖业、咖啡、茶叶、烟草、椰干、靛蓝残余生产、金鸡纳、锡矿、煤矿、石油、航运、铁路与港口服务、手工业纺织与蜡染
mainIndustries.en: Rice agriculture, sugar, coffee, tea, tobacco, copra, residual indigo production, cinchona, tin mining, coal, petroleum, shipping, rail and port services, handicraft textiles, and batik

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口糖、咖啡、烟草、茶叶、金鸡纳、胡椒、椰干、锡、石油及部分橡胶；主要进口棉纺织品、机械、铁路器材、金属制品、酒类、鸦片、奢侈消费品与部分食品
tradeGoods.en: Principal exports were sugar, coffee, tobacco, tea, cinchona, pepper, copra, tin, petroleum, and some rubber; principal imports included cotton textiles, machinery, railway equipment, metal goods, alcohol, opium, luxury goods, and some foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 城乡差距和族群差距极大。欧洲与少数华商家庭可积累显著资本、地产和商业资产；大多数爪哇农户土地狭小，常受地租、税赋和债务压力。外岛部分地区仍以自给农业和地方贸易为主，货币化程度不均。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied enormously by region and race. European and some Chinese merchant families could accumulate substantial capital, land, and commercial assets; most Javanese peasant households held small plots and faced pressure from rent, taxes, and debt. In parts of the Outer Islands, subsistence production and local trade still dominated, with uneven monetization.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民出口导向型混合经济：国家控制关键税源与专卖，欧洲私人资本经营大规模种植园和矿业，本地农民、小商贩与华人中间商维持基层生产和流通网络。
economicSystem.en: A colonial export-oriented mixed economy: the state controlled major tax streams and monopolies, European private capital ran large plantations and mines, while indigenous peasants, petty traders, and Chinese intermediaries sustained grassroots production and distribution networks.

source.en: Land tax and indigenous direct taxation

source.zh: 铁路、邮政与国营企业收入
source.en: Railways, post, and state enterprise income

category.zh: 债务、养老金与宗主国成本

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库相对稳健，得益于持续出口和成熟税制，但其稳定依赖国际商品价格、爪哇农业剩余和殖民强制能力。财政虽较许多殖民地更自给，却仍受海牙政策和全球市场波动牵制。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was relatively sound, supported by sustained exports and a mature tax system, but its stability depended on world commodity prices, Java’s agrarian surplus, and coercive colonial capacity. Although more fiscally self-supporting than many colonies, it remained constrained by policy from The Hague and fluctuations in global markets.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，重视预算平衡、专卖收益与基础设施投资，以维持殖民秩序并扩大出口。1900年前后开始出现更强调灌溉、教育与‘土著福利’的伦理政策取向，但规模尚有限。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative, emphasizing balanced budgets, monopoly revenues, and infrastructure investment to preserve colonial order and expand exports. Around 1900 there were early moves toward an Ethical Policy stressing irrigation, education, and limited indigenous welfare, though still on a modest scale.

description.zh: 殖民军主力，由欧洲军官、欧洲士兵、爪哇人、巽他人、安汶人、万鸦老人及其他本地兵员构成，负责镇压起义、驻防要地和外岛扩张。
description.en: The main colonial field force, composed of European officers, European soldiers, Javanese, Sundanese, Ambonese, Menadonese, and other local troops, responsible for suppressing uprisings, garrisoning strategic points, and extending control in the Outer Islands.

description.zh: 用于城市治安、监狱押解、税务与乡村控制，在低强度冲突中配合殖民军行动。
description.en: Used for urban order, prison escort, tax enforcement, and rural control, often supporting the colonial army in low-intensity operations.

description.zh: 规模有限，以炮舰、巡逻舰和港口设施为主，承担海峡巡逻、海盗压制、运兵和沿岸示威任务。
description.en: Limited in size, centered on gunboats, patrol vessels, and port facilities, conducting strait patrols, anti-piracy duties, troop transport, and coastal shows of force.

commanderInChief.zh: 荷属东印度总督兼殖民军最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: Governor-General of the Dutch East Indies as supreme colonial commander

technology.zh: 军队装备以后膛步枪、山炮、机枪与蒸汽船支援为主，通信依赖电报和邮政网络。总体技术高于多数本地政权，但逊于欧洲列强本土军队；更擅长殖民战争、要塞驻防和海峡控制，而非大规模现代会战。
technology.en: The forces were equipped chiefly with breech-loading rifles, mountain artillery, machine guns, and steamship support, while communications relied on telegraph and postal networks. Their technology surpassed that of most local polities but lagged behind the metropolitan armies of the great powers; they were better suited to colonial warfare, garrisoning forts, and controlling straits than to large modern continental battles.

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非欧洲入侵，而是群岛内部的伊斯兰抵抗、地方王公不服从、亚齐战争余波、婆罗洲和苏拉威西边缘地区的不稳，以及英国、法国、德国等列强在东南亚的海权竞争。
threats.en: The main threats were not European invasion but internal Islamic resistance, disobedient local rulers, the lingering effects of the Aceh War, instability in parts of Borneo and Sulawesi, and naval competition in Southeast Asia from powers such as Britain, France, and Germany.

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于爪哇和马都拉，两地以极高密度构成殖民统治与农业税基核心；苏门答腊、婆罗洲、苏拉威西、马鲁古和新几内亚等外岛人口较稀疏、族群更多样。华人社群在城市、港口与内陆贸易网络中具有关键经济地位，欧洲人口则很少但政治权力极大。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated overwhelmingly in Java and Madura, whose very high density formed the core of colonial rule and agrarian taxation; the Outer Islands—Sumatra, Borneo, Sulawesi, the Moluccas, and New Guinea—were more sparsely populated and ethnically diverse. Chinese communities played a key economic role in cities, ports, and inland trade networks, while Europeans were few in number but held disproportionate political power.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为欧洲官员、军官、商社经理与种植园主；次层为华人甲必丹家族、商人、放贷者及阿拉伯与印度商群；土著精英包括爪哇贵族、摄政、王室附庸和伊斯兰学者；广大下层则为农民、佃户、种植园劳工、搬运工、手工业者与渔民。
socialClasses.en: At the top stood European officials, officers, company managers, and plantation owners; beneath them were Chinese officer families, merchants, moneylenders, and Arab and Indian trading communities; indigenous elites included Javanese aristocrats, regents, court dependents, and Islamic scholars; the broad lower strata consisted of peasants, tenants, plantation laborers, porters, artisans, and fishers.

allies.zh: 无独立外交盟友，其对外关系由荷兰王国主导；在地区层面与英国海峡殖民地保持务实合作，并与各地苏丹国、王公国维持从属条约关系。
allies.en: It had no independent diplomatic allies, as external relations were directed by the Kingdom of the Netherlands; regionally it maintained pragmatic cooperation with the British Straits Settlements and subordinate treaty relations with various sultanates and princely states.

enemies.zh: 无正式宣战的主权国家敌人，但在亚齐、巴厘岛若干地区及外岛边缘地带长期面对武装抵抗；同时警惕英国、德国、法国和日本在亚洲海域的势力扩张。
enemies.en: It had no formally declared sovereign-state enemies, but faced enduring armed resistance in Aceh, parts of Bali, and frontier zones of the Outer Islands, while remaining wary of British, German, French, and Japanese expansion in Asian waters.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策服务于荷兰帝国利益，核心是维持群岛完整、确保马六甲与巽他相关航道安全、阻止他国染指外岛，并通过条约、炮舰外交与行政渗透把松散宗主权转化为更直接的领土统治。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy served Dutch imperial interests, centering on preserving the integrity of the archipelago, securing routes linked to the Malacca and Sunda passages, preventing rival powers from gaining a foothold in the Outer Islands, and turning loose suzerainty into direct territorial rule through treaties, gunboat diplomacy, and administrative penetration.

era.zh: 帝国主义时代晚期工业技术殖民体系

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路、蒸汽航运、电报网络、现代港口、灌溉工程、石油开采、金鸡纳种植科学、热带植物学研究、机械化糖厂与殖民统计测绘
keyInnovations.en: Railways, steam shipping, telegraph networks, modern ports, irrigation works, petroleum extraction, cinchona cultivation science, tropical botanical research, mechanized sugar mills, and colonial statistical cartography

strengths.zh: 拥有广阔群岛资源、成熟的出口农业、重要海上交通位置、相对稳健的财政、经验丰富的殖民官僚体系，以及可依托爪哇人口与本地精英实施低成本间接统治。
strengths.en: It possessed vast archipelagic resources, mature export agriculture, a strategic maritime position, relatively solid finances, an experienced colonial bureaucracy, and the ability to govern at relatively low cost by relying on Java’s population base and indigenous elites.

weaknesses.zh: 政权合法性薄弱，建立在种族等级、强制征敛和有限代表性之上；岛屿分散导致统治成本高；对世界市场和少数出口品依赖过深；外岛整合不完全，亚齐等地持续耗费兵力；教育与公共卫生投入不足，孕育长期社会不满。
weaknesses.en: Its legitimacy was fragile, resting on racial hierarchy, coercive extraction, and minimal representation; the dispersed geography raised governing costs; dependence on world markets and a narrow export base was deep; integration of the Outer Islands remained incomplete, with Aceh and other regions consuming troops; and underinvestment in education and public health fostered long-term social discontent.

outlook.zh: 1900年的荷属东印度表面稳定且财政强健，短期内仍是荷兰最有价值的殖民资产。但随着伦理政策、教育扩张、伊斯兰网络活跃和本地精英成长，未来数十年将逐步出现更系统的民族主义政治诉求，对殖民统治构成根本挑战。
outlook.en: In 1900 the Dutch East Indies appeared stable and fiscally strong, and in the short term remained the Netherlands’ most valuable colonial possession. Yet with the Ethical Policy, wider schooling, active Islamic networks, and the growth of indigenous elites, more systematic nationalist demands would gradually emerge over the coming decades, posing a fundamental challenge to colonial rule.

description.zh: 荷兰在群岛世界的庞大殖民行政区，控制爪哇、苏门答腊及外岛广大地区。
description.en: The Netherlands' vast archipelagic colonial administration controlling Java, Sumatra, and broad outer-island territories.

governmentForm.zh: 在英国保护与外交影响下保持高度自治的马来世袭君主制
governmentForm.en: A highly autonomous Malay hereditary monarchy operating under British protection and diplomatic influence

socialStructure.zh: 社会以马来穆斯林君主政体为核心，上层由王室、贵族与州行政官员组成，中层包括阿拉伯裔宗教精英、华人商人、马来地主与乡绅，下层主要为马来农民、渔民、园丘劳工与城市工匠；华人与其他移民社群在商业和矿业中地位重要。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on a Malay Muslim monarchy, with the upper strata composed of the royal family, nobles, and state officials; the middle strata included Arab-descended religious elites, Chinese merchants, Malay landholders, and local notables; and the lower strata consisted mainly of Malay peasants, fishermen, estate laborers, and urban artisans. Chinese and other immigrant communities were especially important in commerce and mining.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹、天猛公王室、马来贵族、州务大臣与受宫廷信任的行政精英
rulingClass.en: The Sultan, the Temenggong royal house, Malay nobles, the Menteri Besar, and trusted administrative elites attached to the court

succession.zh: 依王朝世袭继承，通常由苏丹指定并获宫廷与贵族承认的男性继承人承袭王位
succession.en: Hereditary dynastic succession, generally passing to a male heir designated by the Sultan and recognized by the court and nobility

structure.zh: 1900年的柔佛拥有较为现代化的宫廷—官僚混合体制。苏丹居于最高权力中心，透过州行政会议、州秘书处及各专门部门治理国家。柔佛自1895年颁布成文宪法后，政治架构比多数马来邦更制度化，但英国总顾问对财政、对外事务与行政改革仍具显著影响。
structure.en: In 1900 Johor possessed a relatively modernized court-bureaucratic hybrid system. The Sultan stood at the apex of authority and governed through the State Council, the State Secretariat, and specialized departments. After promulgating a written constitution in 1895, Johor's political order became more institutionalized than that of many Malay states, though the British General Adviser still exercised substantial influence over finance, external affairs, and administrative reform.

function.zh: 统筹王室诏令、公文流转、档案、官员任命与行政协调
function.en: Coordinated royal decrees, official correspondence, archives, appointments, and general administrative coordination

function.zh: 负责预算、关税、地税、执照费、国库与公共债务管理
function.en: Handled budgeting, customs, land revenue, licensing fees, the treasury, and management of public obligations

function.zh: 管理土地授予、种植园租让、测绘、矿权与移民垦殖事务
function.en: Administered land grants, plantation concessions, surveying, mineral rights, and immigrant agricultural settlement

function.zh: 修建道路、桥梁、政府建筑、供水设施与港埠工程
function.en: Constructed roads, bridges, government buildings, waterworks, and harbor facilities

function.zh: 维持城镇治安、侦查犯罪、执行法规并监督监狱与边境秩序
function.en: Maintained urban order, investigated crime, enforced regulations, and supervised prisons and border security

function.zh: 管理民事与刑事法庭、伊斯兰婚姻继承事务及宗教法官体系
function.en: Managed civil and criminal courts, Islamic marriage and inheritance matters, and the network of religious judges

function.zh: 监督马来学校、宗教教育、政府印刷与统计文书工作
function.en: Supervised Malay schools, religious education, government printing, and statistical record-keeping

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由县与区一级官员执行，常见职衔包括县长、地方酋长及村长。传统马来首领仍具影响力，但日益受州政府委任官员与书面规章约束。种植园与矿区则常以执照、特许与警务监管方式间接治理。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was carried out through district and subdistrict officials, commonly including district heads, local chiefs, and village leaders. Traditional Malay headmen retained influence, but were increasingly constrained by state-appointed officers and written regulations. Plantation and mining zones were often governed indirectly through licensing, concessions, and police supervision.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为马来习惯法、伊斯兰法与英式行政法影响的混合体。涉及婚姻、继承与宗教事务多由伊斯兰法庭处理；商业、治安、税务和土地管理则 increasingly 采用成文条例与行政规章。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was a hybrid of Malay customary law, Islamic law, and British-influenced administrative law. Marriage, inheritance, and religious affairs were largely handled by Islamic courts, while commerce, policing, taxation, and land administration increasingly relied on written ordinances and administrative regulations.

taxationSystem.zh: 国家财政主要依靠关税、港口与贸易收费、土地税、种植园和矿业租让收入、鸦片与酒类等执照费，以及司法与行政规费。相比传统贡赋，1900年的柔佛税制更具货币化与官僚化特征。
taxationSystem.en: State finance depended mainly on customs duties, port and trade charges, land taxes, plantation and mining concession revenues, licensing fees on items such as opium and liquor, and judicial and administrative fees. Compared with older tribute patterns, Johor's tax system in 1900 was far more monetized and bureaucratic.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教逊尼派为国教与王权合法性的核心，但社会生活呈多元格局，华人社群保有佛教、道教与民间信仰，印度移民多信奉印度教或伊斯兰教，基督教传教活动亦有限存在。
religion.en: Sunni Islam was the state religion and the core of royal legitimacy, but social life was pluralistic: Chinese communities maintained Buddhist, Daoist, and popular religious traditions; Indian migrants often practiced Hinduism or Islam; and Christian missionary activity existed on a limited scale.

philosophy.zh: 柔佛政治文化强调马来王权、伊斯兰伦理、礼仪秩序与务实改革。苏丹阿布·巴卡以现代行政、对外礼仪和有选择地吸收欧洲制度著称，同时坚持马来王朝身份与宗教权威。
philosophy.en: Johor's political culture emphasized Malay kingship, Islamic ethics, ceremonial order, and pragmatic reform. Sultan Abu Bakar was known for modern administration, diplomatic sophistication, and selective adoption of European institutions, while preserving Malay dynastic identity and religious authority.

writingSystem.zh: 官方与传统马来文长期使用阿拉伯字母的爪夷文，同时在行政、商业与对英往来中 increasingly 使用罗马字母马来文与英语文书。
writingSystem.en: Official and traditional Malay had long been written in Jawi, the Arabic-derived script, while Romanized Malay and English documentation were increasingly used in administration, commerce, and dealings with the British.

culturalAchievements.zh: 19世纪末的柔佛以较早的宪政实验、现代宫廷礼仪、城市建设、新山作为新都的发展、马来文行政文书制度化，以及在马来世界中塑造“文明化而仍保持本土性”的王国形象而著称。
culturalAchievements.en: By the late nineteenth century Johor was noted for early constitutional experimentation, modern court ceremonial, urban development in Johor Bahru as a new capital, the institutionalization of Malay administrative writing, and the crafting of an image of a 'civilized yet indigenous' Malay kingdom within the Malay world.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属南岛语系马来语支，官方核心语言为马来语；英语在高层行政与外交中重要，华人社群亦使用闽南语、潮州话、粤语等汉语方言。
languageFamily.en: The main language belonged to the Austronesian Malayic branch, with Malay as the core official language; English was important in higher administration and diplomacy, and Chinese communities also used Hokkien, Teochew, Cantonese, and other Sinitic varieties.

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年前后的柔佛经济在马来半岛诸邦中属较富庶且增长迅速者，受益于黑胡椒与甘蜜传统作物、后起的橡胶试种、港口贸易、与新加坡经济圈的紧密联结。其总体规模远小于殖民帝国，但对一个人口仅30万的自治邦而言已相当可观。
gdpDescription.en: Around 1900 Johor's economy was among the more prosperous and rapidly growing in the Malay Peninsula, benefiting from traditional pepper and gambier cultivation, early rubber planting, port trade, and close integration with the Singapore economic sphere. Its overall scale was tiny compared with imperial economies, but substantial for an autonomous state of only 300,000 people.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业种植、黑胡椒、甘蜜、稻作、椰子、林产、少量锡矿与其他采掘业、港口服务、区域转口贸易、手工业与建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Plantation agriculture, pepper, gambier, rice cultivation, coconuts, forest products, limited tin and other extractive activity, port services, regional entrepot trade, handicrafts, and construction

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以黑胡椒、甘蜜、木材、农产品、部分矿产与后起橡胶为主；进口以纺织品、金属器具、机械、鸦片、盐、米粮、奢侈品与制成品为主。
tradeGoods.en: Exports centered on pepper, gambier, timber, agricultural produce, some mineral output, and early rubber; imports included textiles, metal goods, machinery, opium, salt, rice, luxury goods, and manufactured products.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异较大。马来农村家庭多拥有小块稻田、果园、渔具或船只；华人商人与种植园经营者掌握较高流动资本；王室与贵族拥有大量土地、税收权与城市地产。总体而言，中下层生活稳定但易受作物价格与粮价波动影响。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied widely. Rural Malay families often possessed small rice plots, orchards, fishing gear, or boats; Chinese merchants and plantation operators held greater liquid capital; and the royal family and nobles controlled substantial land, revenue rights, and urban property. Overall, lower and middle strata were stable but vulnerable to commodity and food-price fluctuations.

economicSystem.zh: 以君主国家监督下的市场经济为主，融合王室特许、土地租让、华人康契制度遗绪、外资商业网络与英帝国自由贸易体系。国家对关键收入来源保有规制权，但整体上鼓励商品化生产与对外贸易。
economicSystem.en: The economy was predominantly a market system under monarchical supervision, combining royal concessions, land leasing, legacies of the Chinese kangchu system, foreign commercial networks, and the wider British imperial free-trade order. The state retained regulatory authority over key revenue streams, but broadly encouraged commodity production and external trade.

source.en: Mining, forest products, and miscellaneous fees

treasuryDescription.zh: 柔佛国库在马来诸邦中相对稳健，得益于苏丹阿布·巴卡时期较审慎的财政管理、贸易税收与土地开发收益。财政并非取之不尽，但足以维持行政现代化、基础设施建设与宫廷体面。
treasuryDescription.en: Johor's treasury was relatively sound by the standards of the Malay states, benefiting from comparatively careful fiscal management under Sultan Abu Bakar, trade receipts, and land-development income. Revenue was not limitless, but sufficient to sustain administrative modernization, infrastructure building, and the dignity of the court.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体保守而务实，追求收支平衡、扩大关税与土地收入基础、避免过重直接课税，并把部分盈余投入道路、港埠与行政建设。英国顾问影响下，预算编制与账目审计日益制度化。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative and pragmatic, seeking balanced budgets, a broader customs and land-revenue base, avoidance of overly heavy direct taxation, and the reinvestment of some surpluses into roads, ports, and administration. Under British advisory influence, budgeting and auditing became increasingly systematized.

description.zh: 以轻步兵为主，负责首都、防御要地、宫廷警卫支援与内部安全，装备以步枪和少量机枪为主。
description.en: Primarily light infantry, responsible for the capital, key defensive positions, support to palace guards, and internal security, equipped mainly with rifles and a small number of machine guns.

description.zh: 兼具军事与警察功能，分驻城市、港口与主要交通线，承担治安、押运、边境巡查与镇压骚乱任务。
description.en: A force combining military and police functions, stationed in towns, ports, and major transport routes, tasked with public order, escorts, border patrols, and suppression of disturbances.

description.zh: 拥有少量旧式野战炮和礼炮，主要用于要塞守备、港口防御与王室礼仪。
description.en: Possessed a small number of older field guns and ceremonial cannon, mainly used for garrison duties, port defense, and royal ceremony.

description.zh: 由地方支持人员、退役士兵与临时征集者组成，战时用于守备、运输与辅助任务。
description.en: Composed of local auxiliaries, former soldiers, and temporarily mobilized men, used in wartime for garrison, transport, and support functions.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹阿布·巴卡（名义统帅），实际训练与组织受州军官及英方影响
commanderInChief.en: Sultan Abu Bakar (nominal commander-in-chief), with practical training and organization influenced by state officers and the British

technology.zh: 军事技术处于晚期19世纪轻武器水平，使用后装步枪、少量机枪、旧式火炮与蒸汽船支持运输；训练、制服和编制部分仿效英军，但规模有限，缺乏重工业与独立军火生产能力。
technology.en: Military technology stood at a late nineteenth-century light-arms level, using breech-loading rifles, a few machine guns, older artillery, and steam transport support. Training, uniforms, and organization were partly modeled on the British, but the force was limited in scale and lacked heavy industry or independent arms production.
