taxationSystem.en: Forced rubber and ivory collection substituted for regular taxation, supplemented by poll taxes; concessionary companies paid rents to the colonial government

religion.zh: 传统万灵信仰和祖先崇拜为主，天主教传教活动在沿海地区有所扩展
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs and ancestor veneration predominated; Catholic missionary activity was expanding in coastal areas

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的部族口头传统、面具和雕刻艺术、多样的音乐与舞蹈传统
culturalAchievements.en: Rich tribal oral traditions, mask and carving arts, and diverse music and dance traditions

languageFamily.zh: 以班图语族为主，另有尼日尔-刚果语系乌班吉语支和尼罗-撒哈拉语系语言，法语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Predominantly Bantu languages, alongside Ubangian (Niger-Congo) and Nilo-Saharan languages; French served as the colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 传统宇宙观和精神信仰体系，天主教传教正在引入西方教育观念
philosophy.en: Traditional cosmological and spiritual belief systems; Catholic missions were introducing Western educational concepts

writingSystem.zh: 绝大多数语言以口头形式传承，法语用拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: The vast majority of languages were transmitted orally; French used the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 经济极度原始，以橡胶和象牙的强制征集为殖民经济核心，自给自足农业和采集为民众生计基础；特许公司制度造成极端剥削
gdpDescription.en: The economy was extremely primitive, with forced rubber and ivory collection as the colonial economic core; subsistence agriculture and gathering formed the basis of popular livelihood; the concessionary company system caused extreme exploitation

mainIndustries.zh: 橡胶采集（强制）、象牙贸易、自给自足农业、渔业、木材采伐
mainIndustries.en: Rubber collection (forced), ivory trade, subsistence agriculture, fisheries, and timber extraction

tradeGoods.zh: 出口橡胶、象牙和木材；进口纺织品、火器、金属制品和酒类
tradeGoods.en: Exports included rubber, ivory, and timber; imports included textiles, firearms, metal goods, and liquor

householdWealth.zh: 本地家庭几乎没有货币财富，资产为简陋住宅、农具和少量牲畜；殖民体制下人口遭受系统性剥夺
householdWealth.en: Local households had virtually no monetary wealth, with assets limited to basic dwellings, farming tools, and few livestock; the colonial system subjected the population to systematic deprivation

economicSystem.zh: 特许公司垄断的殖民掠夺型经济，以强制劳役和资源征集为核心
economicSystem.en: A colonial plunder economy monopolized by concessionary companies, centered on forced labor and resource extraction

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民财政严重入不敷出，依赖巴黎补贴和特许公司租金
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were deeply in deficit, relying on Paris subsidies and concessionary company rents

fiscalPolicy.zh: 最低限度的殖民行政开支，经济开发几乎完全委托给特许公司
fiscalPolicy.en: Minimal colonial administrative spending; economic exploitation was almost entirely delegated to concessionary companies

description.zh: 法国军官指挥的非洲本地征召兵和少量法国士兵
description.en: African recruits under French officers, with a small number of French soldiers

description.zh: 特许公司雇佣的武装人员，用于强制征集橡胶和维持秩序
description.en: Armed personnel employed by concessionary companies for forced rubber collection and order maintenance

commanderInChief.zh: 法属赤道非洲军事指挥官
commanderInChief.en: Military Commander of French Equatorial Africa

technology.zh: 法国步兵装备勒贝尔步枪，特许公司民兵装备杂乱
technology.en: French infantry armed with Lebel rifles; company militia had miscellaneous armaments

threats.zh: 内陆地区大量未征服部族、特许公司暴行引发的叛乱、与比属刚果和德属喀麦隆的边界争端
threats.en: Numerous unconquered tribes in the interior, rebellions provoked by concessionary company atrocities, and border disputes with the Belgian Congo and German Kamerun

populationDescription.zh: 约500万人口（粗略估计），极其多样的民族构成，包括芳族、班图各族、俾格米人等
populationDescription.en: About 5 million (rough estimate), extremely diverse ethnic composition including Fang, various Bantu peoples, Pygmies, and others

socialClasses.zh: 法国殖民官员与特许公司代理、本地酋长、部族农牧民和采集者、受强制劳役压迫的橡胶采集工
socialClasses.en: French colonial officials and company agents, local chiefs, tribal farmers-pastoralists and gatherers, and rubber collectors subjected to forced labor

allies.zh: 作为法国殖民地无独立外交
allies.en: As a French colony, had no independent foreign policy

enemies.zh: 内部抵抗运动和与德国、比利时殖民地的边界竞争
enemies.en: Internal resistance movements and border competition with German and Belgian colonies

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交完全由法国控制
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was entirely controlled by France

era.zh: 前工业时代

keyInnovations.zh: 少量河流汽船航行、极有限的电报线路，现代技术几乎仅存在于殖民据点
keyInnovations.en: Limited river steamship navigation, very few telegraph lines; modern technology existed almost exclusively at colonial outposts

strengths.zh: 丰富的自然资源（橡胶、象牙、木材）、广袤的领土
strengths.en: Abundant natural resources (rubber, ivory, timber) and vast territory

weaknesses.zh: 殖民行政极其薄弱、特许公司暴行造成人口减少和社会崩溃、基础设施几乎不存在、热带疾病肆虐
weaknesses.en: Extremely weak colonial administration, concessionary company atrocities causing population decline and social collapse, virtually no infrastructure, and rampant tropical diseases

outlook.zh: 特许公司制度的暴行将逐渐引起法国国内舆论关注，但短期内殖民统治模式不会根本改变
outlook.en: Concessionary company atrocities would gradually attract attention from French domestic opinion, but the colonial governance model would not fundamentally change in the short term

description.zh: 1900年的法属赤道非洲是法国在中非的殖民地，以特许公司制度进行极端掠夺性管理，强制橡胶征集造成人道灾难。
description.en: In 1900, French Equatorial Africa was France's Central African colony, under an extremely predatory concessionary company system; forced rubber collection caused a humanitarian catastrophe.

governmentForm.zh: 德国殖民地直接统治体制，由帝国殖民局管辖，总督在当地行使最高权力
governmentForm.en: German colonial direct-rule system under the Imperial Colonial Office, with the Governor exercising supreme local authority

socialStructure.zh: 社会由德国殖民官员与定居者、印度裔和阿拉伯裔商人阶层、斯瓦希里沿海城市居民、内陆各部族农牧民组成，种族等级分明
socialStructure.en: Society comprised German colonial officials and settlers, Indian and Arab merchant classes, Swahili coastal urban residents, and inland tribal farmer-pastoralists, with sharp racial hierarchies

rulingClass.zh: 德国总督与殖民行政官员、军官与种植园主
rulingClass.en: The German Governor and colonial administrators, military officers, and plantation owners

succession.zh: 总督由德国皇帝通过殖民局任命
succession.en: The Governor was appointed by the German Emperor through the Colonial Office

structure.zh: 总督为最高行政与军事长官，下设行政区由区长（贝齐尔克主任）管理；沿海城市保留部分斯瓦希里行政传统，内陆部族首领在德国监督下执行基层管理
structure.en: The Governor was the supreme administrative and military authority; districts were managed by district officers (Bezirksamtmänner); coastal cities retained some Swahili administrative traditions; inland tribal chiefs performed basic administration under German supervision

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、政策制定与对柏林殖民局的报告
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, policy-making, and reporting to the Colonial Office in Berlin

function.zh: 征收税赋、管理预算与海关
function.en: Collected taxes, managed the budget, and customs

function.zh: 管理殖民法院、监狱与治安
function.en: Administered colonial courts, prisons, and policing

function.zh: 建设道路、铁路和公共设施
function.en: Built roads, railways, and public facilities

localAdmin.zh: 殖民地划分为行政区，由德国区长管理；部族酋长在德国监督下保留基层行政职能
localAdmin.en: The colony was divided into administrative districts under German district officers; tribal chiefs retained basic administrative functions under German supervision

legalSystem.zh: 双重法律体系：德国人受德国法管辖，非洲人受殖民法规和习惯法管辖，体罚（鞭刑）广泛使用
legalSystem.en: Dual legal system: Germans fell under German law; Africans under colonial regulations and customary law; corporal punishment (flogging) was widely used

taxationSystem.zh: 征收棚屋税（小屋税）、人头税和贸易关税；许多地区以强制劳役代替货币税收
taxationSystem.en: Levied hut tax, poll tax, and trade customs; in many areas forced labor substituted for monetary taxation

religion.zh: 沿海地区以伊斯兰教为主，内陆以传统万灵信仰和祖先崇拜为主，基督教（天主教与新教）传教活动在扩展
religion.en: Islam predominated along the coast; traditional animist beliefs and ancestor veneration inland; Christian (Catholic and Protestant) missionary activity was expanding

culturalAchievements.zh: 斯瓦希里文学与诗歌传统、沿海城市的阿拉伯-斯瓦希里建筑风格、多样的部族艺术与音乐传统
culturalAchievements.en: Swahili literary and poetic traditions, Arab-Swahili architectural style in coastal cities, and diverse tribal arts and musical traditions

languageFamily.zh: 斯瓦希里语（班图语族）为沿海通用语，内陆有数十种班图语和尼罗-撒哈拉语系语言，德语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Swahili (Bantu) served as the coastal lingua franca; dozens of Bantu and Nilo-Saharan languages were spoken inland; German was the colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 沿海伊斯兰学术传统与内陆部族宇宙观并存；德国传教士正在引入基督教教育
philosophy.en: Coastal Islamic scholarly traditions coexisted with inland tribal cosmologies; German missionaries were introducing Christian education

writingSystem.zh: 斯瓦希里语使用阿拉伯文字（正在向拉丁字母转变），德语用拉丁字母，多数内陆语言为口头传承
writingSystem.en: Swahili used Arabic script (transitioning to Latin alphabet); German used Latin alphabet; most inland languages were orally transmitted

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以自给自足农业为主，德国正推动种植园经济发展（咖啡、棉花、剑麻），沿海贸易有悠久传统
gdpDescription.en: The economy was mainly subsistence agriculture; Germany was promoting plantation development (coffee, cotton, sisal); coastal trade had a long tradition

mainIndustries.zh: 种植园农业（咖啡、棉花、剑麻）、自给农业、象牙与橡胶贸易、渔业、沿海贸易
mainIndustries.en: Plantation agriculture (coffee, cotton, sisal), subsistence farming, ivory and rubber trade, fisheries, and coastal commerce

tradeGoods.zh: 出口咖啡、棉花、剑麻、象牙、橡胶和椰干；进口纺织品、金属制品、机械和加工食品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included coffee, cotton, sisal, ivory, rubber, and copra; imports included textiles, metal goods, machinery, and processed foods

householdWealth.zh: 普通非洲家庭拥有土地使用权、牲畜和基本农具；德国种植园主和印度商人控制大量商业财富
householdWealth.en: Ordinary African households held land-use rights, livestock, and basic tools; German plantation owners and Indian merchants controlled significant commercial wealth

economicSystem.zh: 殖民种植园经济与自给自足农业并存，德国资本推动经济作物出口
economicSystem.en: Colonial plantation economy coexisting with subsistence agriculture; German capital drove cash-crop exports

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民财政严重赤字，大量依赖柏林帝国国库的补贴
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were deeply in deficit, heavily reliant on subsidies from the Imperial Treasury in Berlin

fiscalPolicy.zh: 追求殖民地财政自给但远未实现，柏林年度拨款不可或缺
fiscalPolicy.en: Pursued colonial fiscal self-sufficiency but was far from achieving it; annual Berlin appropriations were indispensable

name.zh: 舒茨特鲁佩（殖民防卫军）

description.zh: 由德国军官指挥的非洲阿斯卡里士兵为主，配少量德国士官和士兵
description.en: Mainly African Askari soldiers under German officers, with a small number of German NCOs and soldiers

description.zh: 维持城镇和种植园区治安
description.en: Maintained order in towns and plantation areas

commanderInChief.zh: 德属东非总督

technology.zh: 阿斯卡里装备毛瑟71型和98型步枪与野战炮，训练水平在非洲殖民军中较高
technology.en: Askaris armed with Mauser Model 71 and 98 rifles and field guns; training standards were relatively high among African colonial forces

threats.zh: 内陆部族的持续抵抗（马吉马吉起义将于1905年爆发）、与英属和葡属殖民地的边界紧张
threats.en: Continuing resistance from inland tribes (the Maji Maji Rebellion would erupt in 1905); border tensions with British and Portuguese colonial territories

populationDescription.zh: 约750万人口，极其多样的民族构成，包括苏库马、尼亚姆韦齐、查加、马赛、斯瓦希里等众多部族
populationDescription.en: About 7.5 million, with extremely diverse ethnic composition including Sukuma, Nyamwezi, Chagga, Maasai, Swahili, and many other groups

socialClasses.zh: 德国殖民官员与种植园主、印度裔与阿拉伯裔商人、斯瓦希里城市居民、内陆各部族农牧民、种植园劳工
socialClasses.en: German colonial officials and plantation owners, Indian and Arab merchants, Swahili urban dwellers, inland tribal farmer-pastoralists, and plantation laborers

allies.zh: 作为德国殖民地无独立外交
allies.en: As a German colony, had no independent foreign policy

enemies.zh: 内部抵抗运动，与英国在东非的殖民竞争
enemies.en: Internal resistance movements; colonial competition with Britain in East Africa

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由柏林控制
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was controlled from Berlin

era.zh: 殖民早期开发

keyInnovations.zh: 中央铁路（达累斯萨拉姆至内陆）开始建设、电报线路、达累斯萨拉姆港口改造
keyInnovations.en: Central Railway (Dar es Salaam to interior) under construction, telegraph lines, and Dar es Salaam port improvements

strengths.zh: 丰富的农业资源和适合种植园的土地、阿斯卡里部队战斗力较强、达累斯萨拉姆的港口条件
strengths.en: Rich agricultural resources and plantation-suitable land, relatively capable Askari troops, and Dar es Salaam's port facilities

weaknesses.zh: 殖民财政严重亏损、基础设施极度匮乏、内陆部族抵抗持续、热带疾病限制欧洲人活动
weaknesses.en: Severe colonial financial losses, extremely poor infrastructure, continuing inland tribal resistance, and tropical diseases limiting European activity

outlook.zh: 种植园经济正在发展但殖民统治的粗暴手段将引发大规模起义（1905年马吉马吉起义）
outlook.en: Plantation economy was developing but the brutal methods of colonial rule would provoke a major uprising (the 1905 Maji Maji Rebellion)

description.zh: 1900年的德属东非是德国在非洲最大的殖民地，正推动种植园经济发展，但殖民统治粗暴，内陆部族抵抗持续不断。
description.en: In 1900, German East Africa was Germany's largest African colony, pushing plantation economic development, but colonial rule was harsh and inland tribal resistance persisted.

name.zh: 英属东非（肯尼亚与乌干达）

governmentForm.zh: 英国保护国体制，由外交部（后转殖民部）管辖，专员在当地行使最高权力
governmentForm.en: British protectorate system under the Foreign Office (later Colonial Office), with a Commissioner exercising supreme local authority

socialStructure.zh: 社会由英国殖民官员与少量定居者、印度裔铁路工人和商人、沿海斯瓦希里和阿拉伯商人、内陆各部族（基库尤、卢奥、马赛、坎巴等）组成，种族隔离日益明显
socialStructure.en: Society comprised British colonial officials and few settlers, Indian railway workers and merchants, coastal Swahili and Arab traders, and inland tribes (Kikuyu, Luo, Maasai, Kamba, etc.), with racial segregation increasingly pronounced

rulingClass.zh: 英国专员与殖民行政官员、帝国英属东非公司残余影响
rulingClass.en: The British Commissioner and colonial administrators, with residual influence of the Imperial British East Africa Company

succession.zh: 专员由英国政府任命
succession.en: The Commissioner was appointed by the British government

structure.zh: 英属东非保护国由专员（后改称总督）管理，下设省和区由英国行政官员负责；乌干达保护国单独管理，以间接统治布干达王国等传统王国为特点。乌干达铁路（蒙巴萨-维多利亚湖）正在建设中，是殖民统治的关键基础设施
structure.en: The British East Africa Protectorate was administered by a Commissioner (later Governor), with provinces and districts under British administrative officers; the Uganda Protectorate was separately administered, featuring indirect rule through traditional kingdoms such as Buganda. The Uganda Railway (Mombasa to Lake Victoria) was under construction as critical colonial infrastructure

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政与对伦敦外交部的报告
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration and reporting to the Foreign Office in London

function.zh: 管理乌干达铁路的建设与运营
function.en: Managed construction and operation of the Uganda Railway

function.zh: 维持殖民秩序与边境安全
function.en: Maintained colonial order and border security

function.zh: 征收关税、小屋税及管理财政
function.en: Collected customs, hut taxes, and managed finances

localAdmin.zh: 保护国划分为省和区，由英国行政官员管理；在乌干达通过与布干达王国签订的1900年布干达协议实行间接统治
localAdmin.en: The protectorate was divided into provinces and districts under British administrative officers; in Uganda, indirect rule operated through the 1900 Buganda Agreement with the Kingdom of Buganda

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法与本地习惯法并行，殖民行政官员兼任地方司法长官
legalSystem.en: English common law and local customary law operated in parallel, with colonial administrative officers serving as local magistrates

taxationSystem.zh: 征收小屋税和人头税以强迫非洲人进入货币经济和劳动力市场，辅以贸易关税
taxationSystem.en: Hut taxes and poll taxes were levied to force Africans into the cash economy and labor market, supplemented by trade customs

religion.zh: 沿海以伊斯兰教为主，内陆以传统万灵信仰为主，基督教（英国国教会、天主教）传教活动活跃，乌干达基督教化进展较快
religion.en: Islam predominated along the coast; traditional animist beliefs inland; Christian (Anglican, Catholic) missionary activity was active; Christianization was more advanced in Uganda

culturalAchievements.zh: 斯瓦希里沿海文化传统、布干达王国丰富的宫廷文化、多样的部族艺术与口头文学传统
culturalAchievements.en: Swahili coastal cultural traditions, the rich court culture of the Kingdom of Buganda, and diverse tribal arts and oral literary traditions

languageFamily.zh: 班图语族（基库尤语、卢干达语、斯瓦希里语等）和尼罗语族（卢奥语、马赛语等）为主，英语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Bantu (Kikuyu, Luganda, Swahili, etc.) and Nilotic (Luo, Maasai, etc.) language families predominated; English served as the colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 传统部族价值观与宇宙观为主，基督教传教正在引入西方教育理念；乌干达的宗教战争（天主教vs新教vs穆斯林）记忆犹新
philosophy.en: Traditional tribal values and cosmologies predominated; Christian missions were introducing Western educational concepts; memories of Uganda's religious wars (Catholic vs. Protestant vs. Muslim) remained fresh

writingSystem.zh: 斯瓦希里语使用阿拉伯文和拉丁字母，英语用拉丁字母，多数内陆语言为口头传承，传教士正为部分语言开发拉丁字母拼写
writingSystem.en: Swahili used Arabic and Latin scripts; English used the Latin alphabet; most inland languages were oral, though missionaries were developing Latin-script orthographies for some

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以自给自足农牧业为主，乌干达铁路建设正在开辟内陆地区的商业化潜力；沿海贸易有悠久历史
gdpDescription.en: The economy was mainly subsistence farming and pastoralism; the Uganda Railway construction was opening the interior's commercial potential; coastal trade had a long history

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农牧业、象牙贸易（正在衰退）、沿海贸易、铁路建设、早期种植园实验
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence farming and pastoralism, ivory trade (declining), coastal commerce, railway construction, and early plantation experiments

tradeGoods.zh: 出口象牙、皮革、椰干和少量咖啡；进口纺织品、金属制品、铁路材料和加工食品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included ivory, hides, copra, and small amounts of coffee; imports included textiles, metal goods, railway materials, and processed foods

householdWealth.zh: 非洲家庭拥有土地使用权和牲畜为主要资产，沿海商人有一定商业积累；欧洲人和印度人控制现代经济部门
householdWealth.en: African households held land-use rights and livestock as main assets; coastal merchants had some commercial accumulation; Europeans and Indians controlled the modern economic sector

economicSystem.zh: 殖民初期经济，铁路建设正在重塑经济格局，从贸易站经济向殖民种植园经济过渡
economicSystem.en: An early colonial economy; railway construction was reshaping the economic landscape, transitioning from a trading-post economy toward a colonial plantation economy

treasuryDescription.zh: 保护国财政严重赤字，铁路建设费用由英国国库承担，地方税收远不能覆盖行政开支
treasuryDescription.en: Protectorate finances were deeply in deficit; railway construction was funded by the British Treasury; local tax revenues fell far short of administrative expenses

fiscalPolicy.zh: 铁路建设优先的财政策略，寄望铁路带动商业发展最终实现财政自给
fiscalPolicy.en: Railway-construction-first fiscal strategy, hoping railway-driven commerce would eventually achieve fiscal self-sufficiency

description.zh: 由英国军官指挥的非洲士兵组成的殖民军事力量
description.en: Colonial military force of African soldiers under British officers

description.zh: 维持殖民秩序和保护铁路线
description.en: Maintained colonial order and protected the railway line

commanderInChief.zh: 英属东非军事指挥官
commanderInChief.en: Military Commander of British East Africa

technology.zh: 国王非洲步枪队装备李-恩菲尔德步枪和马克沁机枪，战斗力在东非殖民军中较强
technology.en: King's African Rifles armed with Lee-Enfield rifles and Maxim machine guns; combat capability was relatively strong among East African colonial forces

threats.zh: 内陆部族抵抗（南迪族抵抗正在进行）、与德属东非的边界紧张、铁路沿线安全问题
threats.en: Inland tribal resistance (Nandi resistance was ongoing), border tensions with German East Africa, and security issues along the railway line

populationDescription.zh: 约400万人口，极其多样的民族构成：肯尼亚地区有基库尤、卢奥、卡伦金、坎巴、马赛等族，乌干达有干达、尼奥罗等班图族群和阿乔利等尼罗族群
populationDescription.en: About 4 million people, with extremely diverse ethnic composition: the Kenya region had Kikuyu, Luo, Kalenjin, Kamba, Maasai, and others; Uganda had Ganda, Nyoro, and other Bantu groups plus Acholi and other Nilotic groups

socialClasses.zh: 英国殖民官员、印度铁路工人和商人、沿海阿拉伯与斯瓦希里商人、乌干达王国贵族、内陆各部族农牧民
socialClasses.en: British colonial officials, Indian railway workers and merchants, coastal Arab and Swahili traders, Ugandan kingdom aristocracy, and inland tribal farmer-pastoralists

allies.zh: 作为英国保护国无独立外交；乌干达布干达王国通过1900年协议与英国建立特殊关系
allies.en: As a British protectorate, had no independent foreign policy; the Kingdom of Buganda in Uganda established a special relationship with Britain through the 1900 Agreement

enemies.zh: 内部部族抵抗，与德属东非的殖民竞争
enemies.en: Internal tribal resistance; colonial competition with German East Africa

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦控制
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was controlled from London

era.zh: 殖民初期

keyInnovations.zh: 乌干达铁路建设（1901年完工达维多利亚湖）为最重要的技术工程、电报通信、蒙巴萨港口改善
keyInnovations.en: The Uganda Railway (completed to Lake Victoria in 1901) was the most important engineering project; telegraph communications; Mombasa port improvements

strengths.zh: 乌干达铁路将打开内陆地区巨大经济潜力、蒙巴萨港的战略位置、布干达王国的间接统治模式相对稳定
strengths.en: The Uganda Railway would unlock the interior's vast economic potential; the strategic position of Mombasa port; the relatively stable indirect-rule model through the Kingdom of Buganda

weaknesses.zh: 保护国财政严重依赖英国国库、行政覆盖极为有限、部族抵抗持续、热带疾病限制发展
weaknesses.en: Protectorate finances heavily dependent on the British Treasury, extremely limited administrative coverage, continuing tribal resistance, and tropical diseases limiting development

outlook.zh: 铁路完工将改变东非经济格局，白人定居者开始涌入肯尼亚高地，土地问题将成为长期矛盾根源
outlook.en: Railway completion would transform the East African economic landscape; white settlers were beginning to arrive in the Kenya Highlands, and the land question would become a root cause of long-term conflict

description.zh: 1900年的英属东非保护国以乌干达铁路建设为核心工程，殖民行政正在建立中，蒙巴萨和内罗毕作为新兴殖民城市开始发展。
description.en: In 1900, the British East Africa Protectorate was centered on the Uganda Railway construction; colonial administration was being established, with Mombasa and Nairobi developing as emerging colonial towns.

name.zh: 塞拉利昂殖民地与保护国
name.en: Colony and Protectorate of Sierra Leone

dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the British Crown

governmentForm.zh: 塞拉利昂在1900年由英国殖民地（弗里敦半岛及周边）和保护国（内陆腹地，1896年宣布）两部分组成，由伦敦任命的总督统辖。
governmentForm.en: In 1900, Sierra Leone comprised a Crown Colony (the Freetown peninsula and environs) and a Protectorate (the hinterland, declared in 1896), both governed by a London-appointed Governor.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由克里奥尔精英（获释奴隶后裔）、欧洲官员与商人、内陆各族酋长与平民组成。弗里敦的克里奥尔社群受英式教育、基督教影响深，在商业和行政中占优势地位；内陆以门德人、泰姆内人等族群的酋长制社会为主。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Krio (Creole) elites descended from freed slaves, European officials and merchants, and inland chiefs and commoners of various ethnic groups. The Krio community in Freetown, shaped by English education and Christianity, held a privileged position in commerce and administration, while the interior was dominated by chiefly societies of the Mende, Temne, and other peoples.

rulingClass.zh: 英国总督与殖民官僚、克里奥尔商业与行政精英，以及内陆被承认的土著酋长。
rulingClass.en: The British Governor and colonial bureaucrats, Krio commercial and administrative elites, and recognized indigenous chiefs in the interior.

succession.zh: 总督由英国殖民大臣推荐、王室任命。内陆酋长多依本族传统继承，但须获殖民当局确认。
succession.en: The Governor was recommended by the Colonial Secretary and appointed by the Crown. Inland chiefs generally succeeded by local custom but required colonial confirmation.

structure.zh: 总督为最高行政长官，下设行政委员会与立法委员会协助治理。殖民地部分实行直接统治，保护国部分通过区专员管辖各酋长辖区，实行间接统治。
structure.en: The Governor served as chief executive, advised by an Executive Council and Legislative Council. The Colony was governed directly, while the Protectorate was administered through District Commissioners overseeing chiefdoms under indirect rule.

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、立法事务、人事与对伦敦的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, legislation, staffing, and reporting to London.

function.zh: 管理关税、税收征管、预算及殖民地公共资金。
function.en: Managed customs duties, tax collection, budgets, and colonial public funds.

function.zh: 管辖内陆保护国，协调区专员、土著法庭与酋长事务。
function.en: Administered the interior Protectorate, coordinating District Commissioners, native courts, and chiefly affairs.

function.zh: 维持弗里敦与各贸易站的治安，协助税收和法令执行。
function.en: Maintained order in Freetown and trading stations, assisted with tax enforcement and ordinance compliance.

localAdmin.zh: 殖民地区域实行市政管理，保护国地区通过区专员与下辖酋长辖区层级治理。1898年小屋税战争后，殖民当局加强了对保护国的行政控制。
localAdmin.en: The Colony area had municipal governance, while the Protectorate was administered through District Commissioners and subordinate chiefdoms. After the 1898 Hut Tax War, colonial authorities tightened administrative control over the Protectorate.

legalSystem.zh: 殖民地适用英国普通法，保护国保留部分习惯法在土著法庭中运作，刑事重案由殖民法院审理。
legalSystem.en: English common law applied in the Colony, while the Protectorate retained elements of customary law administered through native courts, with serious criminal cases tried in colonial courts.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自进出口关税、1898年开征的小屋税（保护国）、贸易执照费和印花税。小屋税曾引发大规模反抗。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from import-export customs, the hut tax introduced in 1898 (in the Protectorate), trade licenses, and stamp duties. The hut tax had provoked a major uprising.

religion.zh: 基督教（新教/卫斯理公会为主，天主教亦有分布）与伊斯兰教并存，内陆传统信仰广泛
religion.en: Christianity (mainly Protestant/Wesleyan Methodist, with some Catholicism), Islam, and widespread traditional beliefs in the interior

culturalAchievements.zh: 弗里敦因福拉湾学院（1827年创立）被誉为「西非雅典」，克里奥尔社群发展出独特的英非混合文化，包括克里奥尔语、克里奥尔建筑风格和新闻出版业。
culturalAchievements.en: Freetown, home to Fourah Bay College (founded 1827), was known as the 'Athens of West Africa.' The Krio community developed a distinctive Anglo-African hybrid culture including Krio language, Creole architecture, and a newspaper press.

languageFamily.zh: 英语（官方）、克里奥尔语（通用语）；门德语、泰姆内语等大西洋语族与曼德语族语言
languageFamily.en: English (official), Krio (lingua franca); Mende, Temne, and other Atlantic and Mande languages

philosophy.zh: 克里奥尔社群深受维多利亚式基督教与自由主义思想影响，内陆社会则以传统酋长权威、秘密社团（如波罗社）和伊斯兰学术为主导。
philosophy.en: The Krio community was deeply influenced by Victorian Christianity and liberal thought, while inland society was guided by traditional chiefly authority, secret societies (such as the Poro), and Islamic scholarship.

writingSystem.zh: 英文拉丁字母为官方书写系统，阿拉伯文用于伊斯兰学术，多数本地语言以口传为主。
writingSystem.en: English in the Latin alphabet was the official writing system, Arabic script was used for Islamic scholarship, and most local languages remained primarily oral.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农产品出口为主，棕榈仁、棕榈油和可拉果为主要出口商品；弗里敦港口是重要的贸易中转站。内陆仍以自给农业为主。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on agricultural exports, with palm kernels, palm oil, and kola nuts as chief exports; Freetown's harbor served as an important trade entrepôt. The interior remained largely subsistence-based.

mainIndustries.zh: 棕榈产品加工、可拉果贸易、港口转运、自给农业、小规模渔业
mainIndustries.en: Palm product processing, kola nut trade, port transit, subsistence agriculture, small-scale fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 棕榈仁、棕榈油、可拉果、花生、木材、橡胶、欧洲制成品
tradeGoods.en: Palm kernels, palm oil, kola nuts, groundnuts, timber, rubber, European manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 弗里敦克里奥尔家庭积累较多商业与地产财富，内陆家庭财富主要体现在土地使用权、牲畜、食物储备与亲属网络。
householdWealth.en: Krio households in Freetown accumulated more commercial and property wealth, while inland households held wealth mainly in land-use rights, livestock, food stores, and kinship networks.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民出口型经济，以港口贸易、农产品采集输出和有限的关税保护为特征。
economicSystem.en: A colonial export-oriented economy characterized by port trade, agricultural extraction, and limited customs protection.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民金库储备有限，财政收支基本持平，偶尔需要帝国拨款弥补军事与基础设施开支。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial treasury reserves were modest, with revenues roughly matching expenditures, occasionally requiring imperial grants for military and infrastructure costs.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策侧重关税收入和保护国税收，优先保障行政运转和治安维持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on customs revenue and Protectorate taxation, prioritizing administrative operations and security maintenance.

name.zh: 西非边防军（塞拉利昂营）
name.en: West African Frontier Force (Sierra Leone Battalion)

description.zh: 由英国军官指挥的非洲士兵组成，负责边境巡逻、保护国秩序维持和内陆远征。
description.en: Composed of African soldiers under British officers, responsible for frontier patrols, Protectorate peacekeeping, and inland expeditions.

description.zh: 维持弗里敦与主要贸易站的治安，协助税收征管与法令执行。
description.en: Maintained order in Freetown and major trading stations, assisted with tax collection and ordinance enforcement.

description.zh: 驻守弗里敦港口，负责海防设施和航运安全。
description.en: Garrisoned Freetown harbor, responsible for coastal defenses and shipping security.

commanderInChief.zh: 塞拉利昂总督兼驻军最高长官
commanderInChief.en: Governor of Sierra Leone as commander of local forces

technology.zh: 装备李-恩菲尔德步枪、少量马克沁机枪，依赖河道和人力搬运进行后勤补给。
technology.en: Equipped with Lee-Enfield rifles and a small number of Maxim guns, relying on river transport and human porterage for logistics.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自保护国内陆酋长的反殖民抵抗（1898年小屋税战争记忆犹新）、边境部族冲突和热带疾病。
threats.en: Primary threats came from anti-colonial resistance by Protectorate chiefs (the 1898 Hut Tax War remained a fresh memory), frontier tribal conflicts, and tropical disease.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以门德人、泰姆内人、林巴人等内陆族群为主，弗里敦半岛有独特的克里奥尔社群（约四万人）。绝大多数人口分布在内陆农村地区。
populationDescription.en: The population was dominated by inland peoples including the Mende, Temne, and Limba, while the Freetown peninsula had a distinctive Krio (Creole) community of about 40,000. The vast majority lived in rural interior areas.

socialClasses.zh: 克里奥尔精英、欧洲官员与商人、内陆酋长与长老、穆斯林学者与商人、自耕农民与渔民、劳工。
socialClasses.en: Krio elites, European officials and merchants, inland chiefs and elders, Muslim scholars and traders, peasant farmers and fishermen, laborers.

allies.zh: 宗主国英国；与邻近英属殖民地（冈比亚、黄金海岸）及法属几内亚存在边界协定。
allies.en: Metropolitan Britain; boundary agreements with neighboring British colonies (Gambia, Gold Coast) and French Guinea.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但保护国内部反殖民势力仍为主要安全挑战。
enemies.en: No formal enemy state, but anti-colonial forces within the Protectorate remained the principal security challenge.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交完全服从英国殖民部，重点在于巩固保护国边界、维持贸易通道和防止法国势力渗透。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was entirely subordinate to the British Colonial Office, focusing on securing Protectorate borders, maintaining trade routes, and preventing French encroachment.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期殖民前线

keyInnovations.zh: 蒸汽航运、电报线路（弗里敦至伦敦海底电缆）、现代医疗传教站、机械化港口设施。
keyInnovations.en: Steam shipping, telegraph lines (Freetown-to-London submarine cable), modern medical mission stations, mechanized port facilities.

strengths.zh: 弗里敦拥有西非最好的天然深水港之一，克里奥尔社群教育水平较高，福拉湾学院提供高等教育，与英国贸易网络紧密相连。
strengths.en: Freetown possessed one of the finest natural deep-water harbors in West Africa, the Krio community had relatively high educational attainment, Fourah Bay College provided higher education, and the colony was closely linked to the British trade network.

weaknesses.zh: 保护国新近建立、控制尚不稳固，1898年战争创伤未愈，内陆基础设施极为匮乏，财政基础狭窄。
weaknesses.en: The Protectorate was newly established and control remained tenuous, the trauma of the 1898 war was unhealed, inland infrastructure was extremely poor, and the fiscal base was narrow.

outlook.zh: 殖民统治短期可维持，但保护国治理需要大量投入，内陆发展进程缓慢，社会张力长期存在。
outlook.en: Colonial rule could be maintained in the short term, but governing the Protectorate required significant investment, inland development was slow, and social tensions would persist.

description.zh: 1900年的塞拉利昂是英国在西非的殖民地与保护国，以弗里敦港口和独特的克里奥尔社群闻名，内陆保护国在1898年小屋税战争后处于巩固期。
description.en: In 1900, Sierra Leone was a British colony and protectorate in West Africa, known for Freetown's harbor and its distinctive Krio community, with the hinterland Protectorate in a consolidation phase after the 1898 Hut Tax War.

dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the British Crown

governmentForm.zh: 黄金海岸在1900年由直辖殖民地（沿海地带）、阿散蒂领地和北部领地三部分组成，总督驻阿克拉统辖全境。阿散蒂在1896年被英军占领后处于军事管治过渡期。
governmentForm.en: In 1900 the Gold Coast comprised the Crown Colony (the coastal strip), Ashanti, and the Northern Territories, all under a Governor based in Accra. Ashanti had been under military administration since its occupation in 1896.

socialStructure.zh: 沿海地区由受英式教育的非洲精英（法提人、嘎族等）和欧洲商人与官员组成上层；内陆阿散蒂保留强大的酋长等级制度；北部以部族酋长制社会为主。
socialStructure.en: The coastal zone was led by an English-educated African elite (Fante, Ga, and others) and European merchants and officials; inland Ashanti retained a powerful chiefly hierarchy; the north was dominated by tribal chieftaincy societies.

rulingClass.zh: 英国总督与殖民官僚、沿海受教育非洲精英、被承认的阿散蒂与北部酋长。
rulingClass.en: The British Governor and colonial bureaucrats, English-educated coastal African elites, and recognized Ashanti and Northern chiefs.

succession.zh: 总督由英国殖民大臣任命。各地酋长依本族母系或父系传统继承，须获殖民当局确认。
succession.en: The Governor was appointed by the British Colonial Secretary. Local chiefs succeeded by matrilineal or patrilineal custom, subject to colonial confirmation.

structure.zh: 总督为最高长官，设行政委员会与立法委员会。沿海殖民地实行较完善的区专员制度，阿散蒂由驻扎专员军事管辖，北部领地通过巡回专员与酋长间接统治。
structure.en: The Governor was the chief authority, assisted by Executive and Legislative Councils. The coastal Colony had a developed District Commissioner system, Ashanti was under a Resident with military oversight, and the Northern Territories were governed through travelling commissioners and chiefs under indirect rule.

function.zh: 统筹行政、立法协调和对伦敦的报告。
function.en: Coordinated administration, legislative affairs, and reporting to London.

function.zh: 管理关税收入、殖民预算与公共财政。
function.en: Managed customs revenue, colonial budgets, and public finance.

function.zh: 负责道路、港口、政府建筑和铁路勘建。
function.en: Responsible for roads, harbors, government buildings, and railway development.

function.zh: 管理金矿特许权、土地分配与矿业监管。
function.en: Administered gold mining concessions, land allocation, and mining regulation.

localAdmin.zh: 沿海殖民地通过区专员和市政机构管理，阿散蒂由英国驻扎专员控制（1900年阿散蒂战争正酝酿中），北部依赖酋长间接统治。
localAdmin.en: The coastal Colony was administered through District Commissioners and municipalities, Ashanti was controlled by a British Resident (with the 1900 War of the Golden Stool brewing), and the north relied on chiefly indirect rule.

legalSystem.zh: 沿海适用英国普通法与成文法，内陆部分保留习惯法在土著法庭中运作，金矿纠纷和土地案件受殖民法院管辖。
legalSystem.en: English common law and statute applied on the coast, while customary law was partially retained in native courts inland; mining disputes and land cases fell under colonial courts.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入以进出口关税为核心，辅以矿业特许费、贸易执照和有限的直接税。殖民地财政高度依赖可可与金矿出口。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue centered on import-export customs, supplemented by mining concession fees, trade licenses, and limited direct taxes. Colonial finances depended heavily on cocoa and gold exports.

religion.zh: 基督教（新教各派与天主教）、伊斯兰教与传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity (various Protestant denominations and Catholicism), Islam, and traditional beliefs coexisted

culturalAchievements.zh: 沿海城市形成活跃的报刊、学校与教会文化，阿克拉和开普科斯特拥有英式学校和本土知识分子群体。阿散蒂的金器工艺、肯特布和宫廷艺术享有盛誉。
culturalAchievements.en: Coastal towns developed an active press, school, and church culture, with Accra and Cape Coast home to English-style schools and an indigenous intelligentsia. Ashanti goldwork, kente cloth, and court art were widely renowned.

languageFamily.zh: 英语（官方）；阿坎语（含法提语、特维语）、嘎-丹美语、摩尔语等尼日尔-刚果语系语言
languageFamily.en: English (official); Akan (including Fante, Twi), Ga-Dangme, Mole-Dagbani, and other Niger-Congo languages

philosophy.zh: 沿海精英深受基督教与维多利亚自由主义影响，阿散蒂社会以王权神圣传统与黄金凳神话为核心，北部受伊斯兰教和传统信仰共同影响。
philosophy.en: Coastal elites were deeply influenced by Christianity and Victorian liberalism, Ashanti society centered on sacred kingship and the mythology of the Golden Stool, and the north was shaped by both Islam and traditional beliefs.

writingSystem.zh: 英文拉丁字母为官方书写系统，阿拉伯文用于北部伊斯兰社群，多数本地语言仍以口传为主。
writingSystem.en: English in the Latin alphabet was the official writing system, Arabic script was used in northern Islamic communities, and most local languages remained primarily oral.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 黄金海岸经济在1900年由金矿开采和新兴可可种植业驱动，进出口贸易活跃。可可种植业正在爆发性增长初期，将在此后十年使黄金海岸成为世界最大可可产地。
gdpDescription.en: The Gold Coast economy in 1900 was driven by gold mining and the emerging cocoa industry, with active import-export trade. Cocoa cultivation was at the beginning of an explosive growth that would make the Gold Coast the world's largest cocoa producer within a decade.

mainIndustries.zh: 金矿开采、可可种植（新兴）、棕榈产品、木材、港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Gold mining, cocoa cultivation (emerging), palm products, timber, port trade

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、可可、棕榈油、棕榈仁、橡胶、木材、欧洲制成品
tradeGoods.en: Gold, cocoa, palm oil, palm kernels, rubber, timber, European manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 沿海精英和商人积累了较多商业财富，内陆可可农户开始获得现金收入，但多数家庭仍以自给农业为基础。
householdWealth.en: Coastal elites and merchants accumulated significant commercial wealth, inland cocoa farmers were beginning to earn cash incomes, but most households still relied on subsistence agriculture.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民出口型经济，以金矿特许开发与农产品出口为核心，内陆小农可可种植蓬勃兴起。
economicSystem.en: A colonial export-oriented economy centered on gold mining concessions and agricultural exports, with a burgeoning smallholder cocoa sector in the interior.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民财政状况良好，金矿收入和贸易关税提供了稳定收入来源，但阿散蒂军事行动开支增大。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were in reasonable condition, with gold mining and trade customs providing steady revenue, though Ashanti military operations were increasing costs.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以关税和矿业收入为核心，积极投资铁路以扩大出口能力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on customs and mining revenue, with active investment in railways to expand export capacity.

name.zh: 黄金海岸团（西非边防军）
name.en: Gold Coast Regiment (West African Frontier Force)

description.zh: 英国军官指挥的非洲士兵，负责殖民地防务和阿散蒂军事行动。1900年正面临「黄金凳之战」。
description.en: African soldiers under British officers, responsible for colonial defense and Ashanti operations. In 1900, the force was engaged in the War of the Golden Stool.

description.zh: 维持沿海城市治安和内陆贸易路线安全。
description.en: Maintained order in coastal towns and secured inland trade routes.

name.zh: 皇家海军西非分遣队（协助）

description.zh: 提供海上巡逻和沿海炮火支援。
description.en: Provided naval patrols and coastal fire support.

commanderInChief.zh: 黄金海岸总督兼驻军总指挥
commanderInChief.en: Governor of the Gold Coast as commander of local forces

technology.zh: 装备李-恩菲尔德步枪、马克沁机枪、七磅炮，后勤依赖人力搬运和沿海航运。
technology.en: Equipped with Lee-Enfield rifles, Maxim guns, and seven-pounder artillery, with logistics relying on human porterage and coastal shipping.

threats.zh: 最紧迫威胁为阿散蒂的武装反抗（1900年黄金凳之战），北部领地的部族冲突和法国在边界的扩张压力也构成挑战。
threats.en: The most pressing threat was Ashanti armed resistance (the 1900 War of the Golden Stool), while tribal conflicts in the Northern Territories and French expansionist pressure on the borders also posed challenges.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以阿坎语系各族（法提、阿散蒂、阿基姆等）为主，沿海还有嘎、埃维等族群，北部有达贡巴、莫尔等族群。绝大多数人口居于农村。
populationDescription.en: The population was dominated by Akan-speaking peoples (Fante, Ashanti, Akim, etc.), with Ga, Ewe, and other groups on the coast, and Dagomba, Mole-Dagbani, and others in the north. The vast majority lived in rural areas.

socialClasses.zh: 欧洲官员与商人、受教育非洲精英、传统酋长与长老、商人与工匠、小农与渔民、矿工与劳工。
socialClasses.en: European officials and merchants, educated African elites, traditional chiefs and elders, traders and artisans, smallholder farmers and fishermen, miners and laborers.

allies.zh: 宗主国英国；与法属西非和德属多哥兰存在边界协定。
allies.en: Metropolitan Britain; boundary agreements with French West Africa and German Togoland.

enemies.zh: 阿散蒂联盟残存势力为殖民当局的主要对手。
enemies.en: Remnant Ashanti Confederacy forces were the colonial authorities' principal adversary.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交服从英国殖民部，重点在于吞并阿散蒂、确保北部领地控制和与邻近殖民列强划界。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed the British Colonial Office, focusing on annexing Ashanti, securing control of the Northern Territories, and delimiting borders with neighboring colonial powers.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 金矿机械化开采、铁路建设（塞康第至塔夸线在建中）、电报、蒸汽航运。
keyInnovations.en: Mechanized gold mining, railway construction (Sekondi-Tarkwa line under construction), telegraph, steam shipping.

strengths.zh: 丰富的金矿资源和迅速兴起的可可产业，受教育非洲精英为行政提供人才，多个沿海港口便于贸易。
strengths.en: Rich gold resources and a rapidly emerging cocoa industry, an educated African elite providing administrative talent, and multiple coastal ports facilitating trade.

weaknesses.zh: 阿散蒂抵抗尚未平息（1900年战争进行中），内陆交通极为落后，北部领地行政几乎空白。
weaknesses.en: Ashanti resistance was not yet quelled (the 1900 war was underway), inland transport was extremely poor, and Northern Territories administration was nearly nonexistent.

outlook.zh: 可可和金矿将推动经济快速增长，但需先完成阿散蒂军事征服和铁路基础设施建设。
outlook.en: Cocoa and gold would drive rapid economic growth, but Ashanti military conquest and railway infrastructure development needed to be completed first.

description.zh: 1900年的黄金海岸是英国在西非最具经济潜力的殖民地之一，金矿和可可产业蓬勃发展，但阿散蒂地区正爆发「黄金凳之战」。
description.en: In 1900 the Gold Coast was one of Britain's most economically promising West African colonies, with booming gold and cocoa industries, but Ashanti was erupting into the War of the Golden Stool.

name.zh: 法属马达加斯加殖民地

dynasty.zh: 法兰西第三共和国殖民统治
dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the French Third Republic

governmentForm.zh: 马达加斯加于1896年被法国正式吞并为殖民地，废黜梅里纳女王拉纳瓦洛娜三世。加利耶尼将军自1896年起担任总督，以强硬的「和平征服」政策推行殖民化和内陆征服。
governmentForm.en: Madagascar was formally annexed by France as a colony in 1896, deposing Merina Queen Ranavalona III. General Gallieni served as Governor-General from 1896, pursuing a vigorous policy of 'pacification' and colonial consolidation of the interior.

socialStructure.zh: 旧梅里纳王国的贵族和自由民阶层仍具社会影响，但政治权力已转移至法国殖民当局。法国官员、军人和少量移民居于权力顶端，受同化教育的马达加斯加精英构成中间层，广大农民和沿海各族构成人口主体。
socialStructure.en: The old Merina aristocracy and free commoner class retained social influence, but political power had shifted to French colonial authorities. French officials, soldiers, and a small settler population sat at the top, partially assimilated Malagasy elites formed an intermediate stratum, and the mass of farmers and coastal peoples constituted the population's base.

rulingClass.zh: 法国总督加利耶尼与军政官僚、地方法国驻扎官员、被殖民当局收编的部分前梅里纳官员。
rulingClass.en: Governor-General Gallieni and the French military-administrative bureaucracy, local French resident officials, and some former Merina officials co-opted by the colonial regime.

succession.zh: 总督由法国政府任命。梅里纳王朝已被废黜（拉纳瓦洛娜三世于1897年被流放至阿尔及利亚），无本土王位继承。
succession.en: The Governor-General was appointed by the French government. The Merina dynasty had been deposed (Ranavalona III was exiled to Algeria in 1897), ending local royal succession.

structure.zh: 总督拥有广泛的军政权力，下设民政、财政、司法与公共工程等部门。加利耶尼推行「分而治之」政策，利用各族之间的矛盾，废除梅里纳在沿海族群中的旧有特权，同时建立法国直接统治体系。
structure.en: The Governor-General wielded broad military-civil powers, with departments for civil affairs, finance, justice, and public works. Gallieni pursued a 'divide and rule' policy, exploiting ethnic divisions, abolishing Merina privileges over coastal peoples, and establishing direct French rule.

function.zh: 统筹殖民治理、人事、各族群关系管理与对巴黎的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial governance, staffing, inter-ethnic relations management, and reporting to Paris.

function.zh: 征收人头税、贸易税、关税，管理殖民预算。
function.en: Collected poll taxes, trade taxes, customs duties, and managed the colonial budget.

function.zh: 指挥内陆军事征服和「和平化」行动，管理驻军和地方武装力量。
function.en: Directed inland military conquest and 'pacification' operations, managed garrisons and local armed forces.

function.zh: 建设道路、桥梁，推行法语教育和传教学校规范化。
function.en: Built roads and bridges, implemented French-language education and regulated mission schools.

localAdmin.zh: 全岛分为多个行政区，由法国区官管辖。加利耶尼废除旧梅里纳官制，以法国官员取代之，同时在沿海和内陆利用被承认的地方酋长。
localAdmin.en: The island was divided into administrative districts under French district officers. Gallieni abolished the old Merina administrative system, replacing it with French officials, while using recognized local chiefs in coastal and interior areas.

legalSystem.zh: 法国殖民法为主，对原住民适用简化的「土著法典」（code de l'indigénat），法国公民与马达加斯加人在法律地位上存在根本性差异。
legalSystem.en: French colonial law prevailed, with a simplified 'code de l'indigénat' applied to the indigenous population, creating a fundamental legal distinction between French citizens and Malagasy subjects.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以人头税为核心，辅以关税、强制劳役（corvée）和贸易税。人头税和强制劳役是引发1896-1899年反法起义的重要原因。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation centered on the poll tax, supplemented by customs duties, forced labor (corvée), and trade levies. The poll tax and forced labor were major triggers of the 1896–1899 anti-French insurrection.

religion.zh: 基督教（新教伦敦传道会遗产与天主教并存）、传统马达加斯加祖先信仰
religion.en: Christianity (London Missionary Society Protestant legacy alongside Catholicism), traditional Malagasy ancestor worship

culturalAchievements.zh: 马达加斯加拥有独特的马达加斯加语文学传统（受19世纪传教士推动的拉丁字母书写），梅里纳王宫建筑、织物工艺和音乐传统丰富。法国殖民初期正将法语教育强加于原有的英国新教传教教育体系之上。
culturalAchievements.en: Madagascar possessed a distinctive Malagasy literary tradition (promoted through Latin-script literacy by 19th-century missionaries), rich Merina palace architecture, textile craftsmanship, and musical traditions. Early French colonialism was imposing French-language education over the existing British Protestant mission school system.

languageFamily.zh: 马达加斯加语（南岛语系）为通用语，法语为殖民官方语言
languageFamily.en: Malagasy (Austronesian family) as the common language, French as the colonial official language

philosophy.zh: 传统马达加斯加宇宙观（祖先崇拜、命运观念fady禁忌）与基督教信仰并存，殖民初期「文明使命」意识形态正在渗透。
philosophy.en: Traditional Malagasy cosmology (ancestor veneration, fady taboos, concepts of destiny) coexisted with Christian faith, while the colonial 'civilizing mission' ideology was being imposed.

writingSystem.zh: 马达加斯加语使用拉丁字母书写（19世纪由传教士标准化），法语拉丁字母为官方行政文字。
writingSystem.en: Malagasy was written in the Latin alphabet (standardized by missionaries in the 19th century), with French as the official administrative written language.

unit.en: French francs per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以稻米自给农业为基础，出口方面以牲畜、香草、咖啡、丁香和矿产初期勘探为主。加利耶尼正推行基础设施建设和种植园经济。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on rice-based subsistence agriculture, with exports including cattle, vanilla, coffee, cloves, and preliminary mineral exploration. Gallieni was promoting infrastructure development and plantation agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 稻米种植、畜牧业、香草与咖啡种植、丁香出口、矿产初探、港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, cattle raising, vanilla and coffee growing, clove exports, preliminary mining, port trade

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、牲畜、香草、咖啡、丁香、拉菲亚纤维、黄金微量、法国制成品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, cattle, vanilla, coffee, cloves, raffia fiber, trace gold, French manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 梅里纳贵族家庭仍持有可观的土地和牲畜，法国移民与商人积累新财富，但多数家庭依赖稻田、牛群和亲属网络。
householdWealth.en: Merina aristocratic families still held considerable land and cattle, French settlers and merchants accumulated new wealth, but most households relied on rice paddies, cattle herds, and kinship networks.

unit.en: French francs per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民强制型经济转型，在自给农业基础上推行种植园开发、强制劳役和出口导向。
economicSystem.en: A colonial coercive economic transformation, imposing plantation development, forced labor, and export orientation upon a subsistence agricultural base.

source.zh: 强制劳役折抵与特许费

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民初期军事征服和基础设施建设导致大量赤字，须依赖法国中央拨款填补。
treasuryDescription.en: Early colonial military conquest and infrastructure construction produced substantial deficits, requiring French metropolitan subsidies to cover.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以征服和控制为优先，人头税和强制劳役是核心收入工具，同时积极投入道路与行政基础设施建设。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized conquest and control, with the poll tax and forced labor as core revenue instruments, alongside active investment in roads and administrative infrastructure.

name.zh: 法国殖民步兵（含马达加斯加本地兵）

description.zh: 由法国军官和塞内加尔及马达加斯加本地步兵组成，负责内陆征服和驻防。
description.en: Composed of French officers with Senegalese and Malagasy tirailleurs, responsible for inland conquest and garrison duty.

description.zh: 负责城镇治安、税收征管协助和交通线保护。
description.en: Handled town policing, tax enforcement support, and communications protection.

description.zh: 法国海军在岛周围维持巡逻，保障航运和阻止走私。
description.en: French navy maintained patrols around the island to secure shipping and deter smuggling.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督加利耶尼将军兼全岛军事总指挥
commanderInChief.en: Governor-General Gallieni as supreme military commander of the island

technology.zh: 装备勒贝尔步枪、山炮、蒸汽运输船，内陆行动依赖骡马和人力搬运。军事技术在非洲殖民战争中处于较高水平。
technology.en: Equipped with Lebel rifles, mountain guns, and steam transports, with inland operations relying on mules and human porterage. Military technology was at a comparatively high level for African colonial wars.

threats.zh: 内陆部分地区仍有反法武装抵抗（梅纳兰巴起义余波），边远地区控制薄弱，热带疾病造成大量军队减员。
threats.en: Parts of the interior still harbored anti-French armed resistance (aftermath of the Menalamba rebellion), control over remote areas was weak, and tropical disease caused heavy troop attrition.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以梅里纳人（中央高地）和贝齐米萨拉卡人、萨卡拉瓦人等沿海族群为主，此外有法国军人、官员和少量印度商人。1896年征服战争和随后的起义造成了大量人口损失。
populationDescription.en: The population was composed primarily of Merina (central highlands) and coastal groups including the Betsimisaraka and Sakalava, plus French soldiers, officials, and a small number of Indian merchants. The 1896 conquest war and subsequent insurrection had caused significant population losses.

socialClasses.zh: 法国官员与军人、前梅里纳贵族、受教育马达加斯加精英、传统酋长、自耕农与佃农、强制劳役劳工。
socialClasses.en: French officials and soldiers, former Merina aristocrats, educated Malagasy elites, traditional chiefs, peasant farmers and tenants, corvée laborers.

allies.zh: 宗主国法国；与邻近的科摩罗法属领地和留尼汪行政协调。
allies.en: Metropolitan France; administrative coordination with nearby French Comoros and Réunion.

enemies.zh: 无正式外部敌国，但内部反法起义力量仍活跃于部分地区。英国曾对马达加斯加有外交影响但已承认法国主权。
enemies.en: No formal external enemies, but anti-French insurgent forces remained active in some areas. Britain had previously held diplomatic influence over Madagascar but had recognized French sovereignty.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交完全服从法国，岛屿作为印度洋法属殖民帝国的重要组成部分。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was entirely subordinate to France, with the island serving as a key component of the French Indian Ocean colonial empire.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期殖民征服期
era.en: Late Industrial Age, colonial conquest phase

keyInnovations.zh: 蒸汽航运、电报、军用道路建设、勒贝尔步枪与山炮、传教医疗站。
keyInnovations.en: Steam shipping, telegraph, military road construction, Lebel rifles and mountain guns, mission medical stations.

strengths.zh: 地处印度洋战略要位，岛屿面积大且资源丰富（农产、牲畜、潜在矿产），梅里纳社会有较高的文化发展水平。
strengths.en: Strategically positioned in the Indian Ocean, a large island with diverse resources (agriculture, cattle, potential minerals), and the Merina society had a relatively high cultural development level.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民征服尚未完成，内陆反抗持续，行政控制覆盖面有限，军事开支庞大导致财政赤字。
weaknesses.en: Colonial conquest was not yet complete, inland resistance continued, administrative coverage was limited, and heavy military spending produced fiscal deficits.

outlook.zh: 加利耶尼的强力政策将逐步完成征服与行政整合，但殖民剥削将加深社会矛盾。
outlook.en: Gallieni's vigorous policies would gradually complete conquest and administrative integration, but colonial exploitation would deepen social tensions.

description.zh: 1900年的马达加斯加是法国新近征服的印度洋大岛殖民地，加利耶尼将军正以铁腕手段推行征服和殖民化，内陆部分地区仍有武装抵抗。
description.en: In 1900, Madagascar was a recently conquered French Indian Ocean island colony, where General Gallieni was imposing conquest and colonization with an iron hand, while armed resistance persisted in parts of the interior.

name.zh: 英属南非公司罗得西亚

dynasty.zh: 英属南非公司特许统治
dynasty.en: Chartered rule under the British South Africa Company

governmentForm.zh: 罗得西亚在1900年由英属南非公司（BSAC）依皇家特许状统治，并非直辖殖民地。公司派驻行政长官管理南罗得西亚（索尔兹伯里为首府）和北罗得西亚。1896-1897年绍纳-恩德贝莱起义已被镇压。
governmentForm.en: In 1900, Rhodesia was governed by the British South Africa Company (BSAC) under a royal charter, not as a Crown colony. The Company appointed an Administrator for Southern Rhodesia (capital Salisbury) and Northern Rhodesia. The 1896–1897 Shona-Ndebele rising had been suppressed.

socialStructure.zh: 白人移民（约一万人）占据政治和经济优势地位，控制最好的农业和矿业土地。绍纳人和恩德贝莱人构成人口的绝对多数（约百万），但在起义失败后遭受大规模土地征用和政治压制。
socialStructure.en: White settlers (about 10,000) held political and economic dominance, controlling the best agricultural and mining land. The Shona and Ndebele peoples formed the overwhelming majority (about one million), but suffered large-scale land expropriation and political suppression after the failed uprising.

rulingClass.zh: 英属南非公司董事会（以塞西尔·罗兹为首）、公司行政长官、白人移民农场主和矿业公司。
rulingClass.en: The BSAC Board of Directors (headed by Cecil Rhodes), the Company Administrator, white settler farmers, and mining companies.

succession.zh: 行政长官由英属南非公司任命，须获英国殖民大臣批准。无本地世袭继承制度。
succession.en: The Administrator was appointed by the BSAC, subject to British Colonial Secretary approval. There was no local hereditary succession.

structure.zh: 公司行政长官领导行政，设立法委员会（含少数民选白人成员）。行政机构由公司官员运作，包括土地分配、矿业许可、警务和税收。非洲人口由「土著事务署」管理。
structure.en: The Company Administrator led the executive, with a Legislative Council including a minority of elected white members. Administration was run by Company officials covering land allocation, mining licenses, policing, and taxation. The African population was managed through a 'Native Affairs Department.'

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、立法事务与对公司总部和伦敦的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, legislative affairs, and reporting to Company headquarters and London.

function.zh: 管理土地分配、矿业特许和白人移民安置。
function.en: Managed land allocation, mining concessions, and white settler settlement.

function.zh: 管理非洲人保留地、人头税征收、劳动力征募与酋长关系。
function.en: Administered African reserves, poll tax collection, labor recruitment, and relations with chiefs.

function.zh: 维持治安、边境巡逻和镇压非洲人反抗。
function.en: Maintained order, border patrols, and suppression of African resistance.

localAdmin.zh: 白人移民区设地方行政官，非洲人被限制在保留地内由土著专员监管。被认可的酋长处理日常事务但受严密监控。
localAdmin.en: White settler areas had magistrates, while Africans were confined to reserves supervised by Native Commissioners. Recognized chiefs handled daily affairs but under close surveillance.

legalSystem.zh: 基于开普殖民地罗马-荷兰法和英国法混合体系，非洲人受限制性法规约束（通行证制度、劳动法等）。
legalSystem.en: Based on a hybrid of Cape Colony Roman-Dutch law and English law, with restrictive regulations imposed on Africans (pass laws, labor ordinances, etc.).

taxationSystem.zh: 对非洲人征收人头税和小屋税以迫使其进入工资劳动市场，白人缴纳矿业税和贸易税。公司收取土地出让金和矿业特许费。
taxationSystem.en: Africans were subject to poll tax and hut tax to compel entry into the wage labor market, while whites paid mining and trade taxes. The Company collected land transfer fees and mining concession royalties.

religion.zh: 基督教（英国国教、卫斯理公会等新教各派）与绍纳-恩德贝莱传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity (Anglican, Wesleyan, and other Protestant denominations) alongside Shona-Ndebele traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 索尔兹伯里和布拉瓦约正发展为具有英国殖民风格的小镇，建有教堂、学校和俱乐部。大津巴布韦遗址虽已被发现但殖民者否认其非洲起源。
culturalAchievements.en: Salisbury and Bulawayo were developing as small towns with British colonial character, featuring churches, schools, and clubs. The Great Zimbabwe ruins had been discovered but colonialists denied their African origins.

languageFamily.zh: 英语（官方）；绍纳语、恩德贝莱语（班图语族）为非洲人口主要语言
languageFamily.en: English (official); Shona and Ndebele (Bantu languages) as the main languages of the African population

philosophy.zh: 白人移民社区秉持帝国主义「文明使命」与种族优越论，非洲社会保留祖先崇拜、灵媒传统（在起义中发挥重要作用）。
philosophy.en: The white settler community held to an imperialist 'civilizing mission' and racial supremacist ideology, while African society preserved ancestor veneration and spirit medium traditions (which had played an important role in the uprising).

writingSystem.zh: 英文拉丁字母为官方文字，绍纳语和恩德贝莱语主要为口传语言，传教士开始用拉丁字母记录。
writingSystem.en: English in the Latin alphabet was the official script, while Shona and Ndebele were primarily oral languages being transcribed in Latin script by missionaries.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以金矿开采为核心驱动力（虽不及预期中第二个兰德金矿带），辅以白人农场商业化农业和非洲人自给农业。铁路（从贝拉港延伸至索尔兹伯里）正在建设中。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was driven primarily by gold mining (though it did not match expectations of a 'second Rand'), supplemented by white farm commercial agriculture and African subsistence farming. A railway (extending from Beira to Salisbury) was under construction.

mainIndustries.zh: 金矿开采、白人商业农业、牲畜、运输与铁路建设、零售贸易
mainIndustries.en: Gold mining, white commercial farming, cattle, transport and railway construction, retail trade

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、烟草、牲畜、玉米、矿石、欧洲制成品
tradeGoods.en: Gold, tobacco, cattle, maize, ore, European manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 白人移民拥有大量土地和矿权，非洲家庭在保留地中主要依靠牲畜和农作物。财富分配存在极端种族不平等。
householdWealth.en: White settlers held large landholdings and mining rights, while African families in reserves relied mainly on cattle and crops. Wealth distribution was marked by extreme racial inequality.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 公司特许资本主义，以矿业特许权和白人移民农业为核心，非洲人被迫通过税收进入工资劳动市场。
economicSystem.en: Chartered company capitalism centered on mining concessions and white settler agriculture, with Africans compelled through taxation to enter the wage labor market.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公司财政处于持续亏损状态，矿业收入不达预期，罗兹去世前公司一直在补贴行政开支。
treasuryDescription.en: Company finances were in a state of ongoing loss, with mining revenues falling short of expectations; the Company had been subsidizing administrative costs before Rhodes's death.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以矿业开发和移民安置为导向，通过税收迫使非洲人提供廉价劳动力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was oriented toward mining development and settler settlement, using taxation to compel Africans to provide cheap labor.

description.zh: 兼具警察和军事功能的武装力量，负责治安、边境防务和镇压叛乱。
description.en: A paramilitary force combining police and military functions, responsible for security, border defense, and suppressing rebellion.

description.zh: 白人移民志愿部队，在紧急情况下召集。部分成员正参与南非布尔战争。
description.en: White settler volunteer units, mobilized in emergencies. Some members were currently serving in the South African Boer War.

description.zh: 由非洲人组成的辅助警务力量，执行基层巡逻和情报收集。
description.en: African auxiliary police conducting local patrols and intelligence gathering.

commanderInChief.zh: 罗得西亚行政长官兼英属南非警察总监
commanderInChief.en: Administrator of Rhodesia and Inspector-General of the BSA Police

technology.zh: 装备李-恩菲尔德步枪、马克沁机枪、少量野战炮，骑兵机动性较强。正参与布尔战争积累实战经验。
technology.en: Equipped with Lee-Enfield rifles, Maxim guns, and some field artillery, with cavalry providing good mobility. Forces were gaining combat experience in the ongoing Boer War.

threats.zh: 1896-1897年起义虽已镇压但记忆犹新，非洲人口远超白人形成潜在安全威胁，布尔战争牵制部分兵力。
threats.en: The 1896–1897 uprising, though suppressed, remained a fresh memory; the African population vastly outnumbered whites, posing a latent security concern, and the Boer War was drawing away some forces.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约百万以绍纳人和恩德贝莱人为主，白人移民约一万人集中于索尔兹伯里、布拉瓦约等城镇及农矿区。种族隔离正在形成。
populationDescription.en: The population of roughly one million was predominantly Shona and Ndebele, with about 10,000 white settlers concentrated in towns like Salisbury and Bulawayo and on farming and mining land. Racial segregation was taking shape.

socialClasses.zh: 白人移民（农场主、矿主、商人、官员）、传教士、非洲酋长与长老、非洲自耕农、矿业和农业劳工。
socialClasses.en: White settlers (farmers, mine owners, merchants, officials), missionaries, African chiefs and elders, African peasant farmers, mining and agricultural laborers.

allies.zh: 英国为最终主权保障者，与开普殖民地和纳塔尔有行政联系。布尔战争期间向英军提供志愿兵。
allies.en: Britain as ultimate sovereign guarantor, administrative ties with Cape Colony and Natal. Volunteers were supplied to the British Army during the Boer War.

enemies.zh: 无正式外部敌国，但德兰士瓦共和国在布尔战争前曾构成地区竞争。内部非洲抵抗力量为主要安全关切。
enemies.en: No formal external enemy, though the Transvaal Republic had been a regional rival before the Boer War. Internal African resistance forces were the main security concern.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英属南非公司和英国殖民部共同主导，着重于南部非洲英属领地整合和铁路联通。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was jointly directed by the BSAC and the British Colonial Office, focusing on integration of British southern African territories and railway connectivity.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期殖民开发期
era.en: Late Industrial Age colonial development phase

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路建设（贝拉-索尔兹伯里线1899年通车）、采矿机械、电报、蒸汽运输。
keyInnovations.en: Railway construction (Beira-Salisbury line completed 1899), mining machinery, telegraph, steam transport.

strengths.zh: 丰富的矿产资源潜力，铁路正在接入南非和莫桑比克贸易网络，白人移民社区具有较强组织能力。
strengths.en: Rich mineral resource potential, railways connecting to South African and Mozambican trade networks, and a well-organized white settler community.

weaknesses.zh: 矿业收入低于预期，公司财政亏损，非洲人口的不满和起义记忆构成潜在威胁，种族压迫体制缺乏可持续性。
weaknesses.en: Mining revenues fell below expectations, Company finances were in deficit, African population discontent and uprising memories posed a latent threat, and the racial oppression system lacked sustainability.

outlook.zh: 短期内白人移民统治可持续，但经济须摆脱对单一矿业的依赖，非洲人土地权利问题将成为长期隐患。
outlook.en: White settler rule was sustainable in the short term, but the economy needed to diversify beyond mining dependence, and African land rights would be a long-term source of instability.

description.zh: 1900年的罗得西亚是英属南非公司特许统治下的殖民领地，以矿业开发和白人移民定居为核心，绍纳和恩德贝莱人在起义失败后被限制在保留地中。
description.en: In 1900, Rhodesia was a colonial territory under British South Africa Company charter rule, centered on mining development and white settler colonization, with the Shona and Ndebele confined to reserves after their defeated uprising.

governmentForm.zh: 贝专纳兰于1885年成为英国保护国，以防止德属西南非洲和布尔共和国的扩张。1900年保护国行政由开普敦的英国高级专员管辖，当地驻扎专员驻马费京。本地茨瓦纳酋长保留相当自治权。
governmentForm.en: Bechuanaland became a British protectorate in 1885 to prevent expansion by German South West Africa and the Boer republics. In 1900 the Protectorate was administered under the British High Commissioner in Cape Town, with a Resident Commissioner based in Mafikeng. Local Tswana chiefs retained considerable autonomy.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以茨瓦纳八大酋邦为基本单位，酋长拥有土地分配权和司法权。少量英国官员和传教士在场，白人移民极少。牧民和自耕农构成人口主体。
socialStructure.en: Society was organized around the eight major Tswana chieftaincies, with chiefs holding land allocation and judicial powers. A small number of British officials and missionaries were present, with very few white settlers. Pastoralists and peasant farmers formed the bulk of the population.

rulingClass.zh: 英国驻扎专员与少数殖民官员、茨瓦纳各部酋长（尤其是恩瓦托的卡马三世）。
rulingClass.en: The British Resident Commissioner and a small number of colonial officials, alongside Tswana paramount chiefs (notably Khama III of the Bangwato).

succession.zh: 驻扎专员由英国政府任命。茨瓦纳酋长依各族传统世袭继承，英国当局一般予以承认。
succession.en: The Resident Commissioner was appointed by the British government. Tswana chiefs succeeded by their own hereditary traditions, generally recognized by British authorities.

structure.zh: 保护国实行极简行政，驻扎专员负责总体监督，但各酋邦内部事务大体由酋长自行管理。殖民行政人员极少，主要关注边境安全和布尔战争相关事务。
structure.en: The Protectorate had minimal administration, with the Resident Commissioner providing general oversight while chieftaincies largely managed their own internal affairs. Colonial administrative staff was very small, focused primarily on border security and Boer War-related matters.

function.zh: 负责总体行政、与酋长联络和对高级专员报告。
function.en: Handled overall administration, liaison with chiefs, and reporting to the High Commissioner.

function.zh: 维持基本治安和边境安全，尤其是布尔战争期间的边境防务。
function.en: Maintained basic security and border protection, especially border defense during the Boer War.

function.zh: 征收有限的小屋税和贸易税。
function.en: Collected limited hut taxes and trade levies.

localAdmin.zh: 实际地方治理由各茨瓦纳酋长在其传统辖区（如恩瓦托、夸纳、恩瓦凯策等）内主持。英国当局仅在边界纠纷和严重刑案时介入。
localAdmin.en: Actual local governance was conducted by Tswana chiefs within their traditional territories (e.g. Bangwato, Bakwena, Bangwaketse). British authorities intervened only in border disputes and serious criminal cases.

legalSystem.zh: 双轨法律体系：英国法律处理涉及欧洲人的案件和严重刑事案件，茨瓦纳习惯法在酋长法庭中处理大部分民事和轻微刑事案件。
legalSystem.en: A dual legal system: British law handled cases involving Europeans and serious criminal matters, while Tswana customary law governed most civil and minor criminal cases in chiefly courts.

taxationSystem.zh: 征收有限的小屋税，部分劳动力南下至南非矿区务工（所得汇款构成重要收入来源）。财政规模极小。
taxationSystem.en: Limited hut taxes were collected, with migrant labor to South African mines (whose remittances formed an important income source). Fiscal scale was extremely small.

religion.zh: 基督教（伦敦传道会影响深远，卡马三世本人为虔诚基督徒）与传统茨瓦纳信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity (the London Missionary Society had deep influence, and Khama III himself was a devout Christian) alongside traditional Tswana beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 茨瓦纳社会以精细的牧牛文化、口头文学传统和酋长制治理体系闻名。卡马三世因禁酒和推行基督教式改革而在英国享有良好声誉。
culturalAchievements.en: Tswana society was known for its sophisticated cattle culture, oral literary tradition, and chiefly governance system. Khama III had gained a favorable reputation in Britain for his temperance and Christian reform policies.

languageFamily.zh: 茨瓦纳语（班图语族），英语为行政语言
languageFamily.en: Setswana (Bantu language family), English as administrative language

philosophy.zh: 茨瓦纳传统社会秩序观（酋长权威、年龄等级、牛的社会重要性）与基督教信仰相融合。
philosophy.en: Traditional Tswana concepts of social order (chiefly authority, age grades, the social importance of cattle) blended with Christian faith.

writingSystem.zh: 英文为官方行政文字，茨瓦纳语由传教士以拉丁字母记录，用于教会和初等教育。
writingSystem.en: English served as the official administrative script, with Setswana transcribed in Latin script by missionaries for church and primary education.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济极为简朴，以牧牛和自给农业为主。男性劳动力大量外出至南非矿区务工，汇款构成重要现金收入。贸易规模很小。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was extremely simple, based on cattle herding and subsistence farming. Male migrant labor to South African mines provided important cash income through remittances. Trade volume was very small.

mainIndustries.zh: 牧牛、自给农业、劳动力外输、小规模贸易
mainIndustries.en: Cattle raising, subsistence agriculture, labor export, small-scale trade

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、畜产品、少量粮食，进口欧洲制成品和工具
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, livestock products, small amounts of grain, imported European goods and tools

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富主要体现在牛群规模上，牛是社会地位、婚姻聘礼和经济安全的核心。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was primarily measured in cattle, which were central to social status, bride-price, and economic security.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以畜牧为基础的自给经济，辅以劳动力外输至南非矿区。
economicSystem.en: A pastoral subsistence economy supplemented by migrant labor export to South African mines.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政规模极小，保护国行政以最低成本运行，不足部分由帝国拨款弥补。
treasuryDescription.en: Fiscal scale was extremely small, with the Protectorate running on minimum administrative costs, shortfalls covered by imperial grants.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 极简财政，以维持最低限度行政存在为目标，酋长制社会自我维持大部分治理成本。
fiscalPolicy.en: Minimalist fiscal policy aimed at maintaining the smallest possible administrative presence, with chiefly societies bearing most governance costs themselves.

description.zh: 小规模武装警察，负责边境巡逻和基本治安。布尔战争期间承受压力增大。
description.en: A small armed police force for border patrols and basic security. Under increased pressure during the Boer War.

description.zh: 各酋长维持的传统武装随从，在必要时可召集。
description.en: Traditional armed retinues maintained by chiefs, callable when needed.

commanderInChief.zh: 驻扎专员

technology.zh: 基本步枪武装，无火炮或重装备。通讯和后勤能力极为有限。
technology.en: Basic rifle armament with no artillery or heavy equipment. Communications and logistics were extremely limited.

threats.zh: 布尔战争波及边境安全，马费京被布尔军围攻（1899-1900年马费京之围）。干旱和牛瘟也威胁生存。
threats.en: The Boer War affected border security, with Mafikeng besieged by Boer forces (1899–1900 Siege of Mafeking). Drought and cattle disease also threatened livelihoods.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以茨瓦纳各部族为主（恩瓦托、夸纳、恩瓦凯策等），另有少量科伊桑人和极少数欧洲人。人口密度极低，分散在广阔的半干旱草原上。
populationDescription.en: The population was predominantly Tswana (Bangwato, Bakwena, Bangwaketse, etc.), with small Khoisan groups and very few Europeans. Population density was extremely low, scattered across vast semi-arid grasslands.

socialClasses.zh: 茨瓦纳酋长与王室、自由牧民、自耕农、英国官员与传教士、南非矿区劳工（季节性外出）。
socialClasses.en: Tswana chiefs and royalty, free pastoralists, peasant farmers, British officials and missionaries, South African mine workers (seasonal migrants).

allies.zh: 英国为保护国宗主；卡马三世等酋长在1895年曾亲赴伦敦成功请愿，保住了保护国地位。
allies.en: Britain as the protecting power; chiefs such as Khama III had personally petitioned London in 1895, successfully preserving the Protectorate's status.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。英属南非公司曾试图吞并保护国但被酋长们挫败。布尔共和国在边界构成潜在威胁。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. The BSAC had attempted to absorb the Protectorate but was thwarted by the chiefs. The Boer republics posed a potential border threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交依附于英国保护体制，酋长们积极维护保护国地位以防止被南非或公司吞并。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign relations depended on the British protection framework, with chiefs actively defending protectorate status to prevent absorption by South Africa or the Company.

era.zh: 前工业牧业社会

keyInnovations.zh: 有限的传教教育和医疗，牧场水井技术，少量火器。
keyInnovations.en: Limited mission education and medicine, pastoral well-digging techniques, small arms.

strengths.zh: 酋长制社会内部团结较强，卡马三世领导有方且国际声誉良好，英国保护国地位提供外部安全保障。
strengths.en: Chiefly societies maintained strong internal cohesion, Khama III provided capable leadership with a good international reputation, and British protectorate status offered external security.

weaknesses.zh: 经济极为落后，人口稀少，高度依赖南非劳动力市场，基础设施几乎为零，干旱和牛瘟威胁严重。
weaknesses.en: The economy was extremely undeveloped, population was sparse, there was heavy dependence on the South African labor market, infrastructure was nearly nonexistent, and drought and cattle disease posed severe threats.

outlook.zh: 保护国地位可在短期内维持茨瓦纳社会的相对自治，但南非联邦化压力和经济边缘化将是长期挑战。
outlook.en: Protectorate status could maintain relative Tswana autonomy in the short term, but South African federation pressure and economic marginalization would be long-term challenges.

description.zh: 1900年的贝专纳兰是英国在南部非洲的保护国，茨瓦纳酋长保留较大自治权，经济以畜牧和劳动力外输为主，布尔战争波及边境安全。
description.en: In 1900, Bechuanaland was a British protectorate in southern Africa where Tswana chiefs retained significant autonomy, the economy rested on pastoralism and labor export, and the Boer War was affecting border security.

dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the Kingdom of Italy

governmentForm.zh: 意属索马里兰在1900年前后主要由意大利政府通过特许贸易公司和直接行政管辖，控制范围集中在沿海城镇，内陆游牧地区实际控制力极弱。
governmentForm.en: Around 1900, Italian Somaliland was administered through chartered trading companies and direct Italian governmental control, with authority concentrated in coastal towns and extremely limited effective control over the nomadic interior.

socialStructure.zh: 索马里社会以氏族和次氏族为基本组织单位，游牧畜牧业为主要生计。沿海摩加迪沙等城市有阿拉伯-斯瓦希里混合文化的商人群体。意大利官员和军人人数极少。
socialStructure.en: Somali society was organized by clan and sub-clan, with nomadic pastoralism as the primary livelihood. Coastal cities like Mogadishu had merchant communities of mixed Arab-Swahili culture. Italian officials and soldiers were present in very small numbers.

rulingClass.zh: 意大利殖民官员、索马里氏族长老与苏丹（被殖民当局部分承认）、摩加迪沙阿拉伯商人。
rulingClass.en: Italian colonial officials, Somali clan elders and sultans (partially recognized by colonial authorities), and Arab merchants in Mogadishu.

succession.zh: 总督由意大利殖民部任命。索马里氏族领导权依传统协商继承。
succession.en: The Governor was appointed by the Italian colonial ministry. Somali clan leadership passed through traditional consultative succession.

structure.zh: 殖民行政极为薄弱，仅在摩加迪沙、基斯马尤等沿海据点建立了基本行政机构。内陆广大游牧区实际处于氏族自治状态。
structure.en: Colonial administration was extremely thin, with basic administrative structures only in coastal outposts like Mogadishu and Kismaayo. The vast nomadic interior was effectively under clan self-governance.

function.zh: 统筹殖民事务与对罗马的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial affairs and reported to Rome.

function.zh: 管理驻军、沿海防务和有限的内陆巡逻。
function.en: Managed garrison troops, coastal defense, and limited inland patrols.

function.zh: 征收港口关税和贸易税。
function.en: Collected port customs and trade taxes.

localAdmin.zh: 沿海城镇有基本市政管理，内陆由索马里氏族长老实际治理。殖民当局与部分苏丹签订保护条约但执行力有限。
localAdmin.en: Coastal towns had basic municipal administration, while the interior was effectively governed by Somali clan elders. Colonial authorities had signed protection treaties with some sultans, but enforcement was limited.

legalSystem.zh: 意大利殖民法适用于沿海据点，索马里习惯法（xeer）和伊斯兰法在内陆占主导。
legalSystem.en: Italian colonial law applied in coastal outposts, while Somali customary law (xeer) and Islamic law prevailed in the interior.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自港口关税和贸易税，内陆几乎无法征税。财政规模极小。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from port customs and trade taxes, with almost no taxation possible in the interior. Fiscal scale was extremely small.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 索马里社会拥有丰富的口头诗歌传统，摩加迪沙有阿拉伯-斯瓦希里建筑遗产和伊斯兰学术传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Somali society possessed a rich oral poetry tradition, while Mogadishu had an Arab-Swahili architectural heritage and Islamic scholarly tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 索马里语（库希特语族），阿拉伯语用于宗教和商业，意大利语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Somali (Cushitic language family), Arabic for religion and commerce, Italian as the colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰教与索马里氏族传统（xeer习惯法、游牧自由价值观）共同塑造社会思想。
philosophy.en: Islam and Somali clan traditions (xeer customary law, pastoral freedom values) jointly shaped social thought.

writingSystem.zh: 意大利语和阿拉伯语为书面语言，索马里语以口传为主（尚无标准化书写系统）。
writingSystem.en: Italian and Arabic served as written languages, while Somali remained primarily oral (no standardized writing system yet existed).

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以游牧畜牧为基础，沿海有活跃的香料、牲畜和象牙贸易。摩加迪沙是印度洋贸易网络中的次要港口。现代化商业活动极为有限。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on nomadic pastoralism, with active coastal trade in spices, livestock, and ivory. Mogadishu was a minor port in the Indian Ocean trade network. Modern commercial activity was extremely limited.

mainIndustries.zh: 游牧畜牧、牲畜出口、香料贸易（乳香、没药）、沿海渔业
mainIndustries.en: Nomadic pastoralism, livestock export, spice trade (frankincense, myrrh), coastal fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、兽皮、乳香、没药、象牙、香蕉（初期种植）、布匹与杂货
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, hides, frankincense, myrrh, ivory, bananas (early cultivation), cloth and sundries

name.zh: 意大利里拉（沿海），玛利亚·特蕾莎银币和印度卢比也在流通
name.en: Italian lira (coastal), Maria Theresa thaler and Indian rupee also in circulation

householdWealth.zh: 游牧家庭财富以骆驼、牛、山羊群规模衡量。沿海商人积累了贸易利润和不动产。
householdWealth.en: Nomadic household wealth was measured in herds of camels, cattle, and goats. Coastal merchants accumulated trade profits and real estate.

economicSystem.zh: 游牧畜牧经济与沿海贸易并存，殖民商业渗透极为有限。
economicSystem.en: Nomadic pastoral economy coexisted with coastal trade, with extremely limited colonial commercial penetration.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政严重依赖罗马拨款，本地收入远不足以覆盖军政开支。
treasuryDescription.en: The colony's finances were heavily dependent on Roman subsidies, with local revenue far insufficient to cover military-administrative costs.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持最低限度的沿海存在，依赖意大利中央政府补贴。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained a minimal coastal presence, relying on subsidies from the Italian central government.

description.zh: 由意大利军官和厄立特里亚/索马里本地兵组成，驻守摩加迪沙和沿海据点。
description.en: Composed of Italian officers and Eritrean/Somali local troops, garrisoning Mogadishu and coastal outposts.

description.zh: 索马里本地非正规部队，负责内陆巡逻和氏族联络。
description.en: Somali irregular forces for inland patrols and clan liaison.

description.zh: 小型沿海巡逻力量。
description.en: A small coastal patrol force.

commanderInChief.zh: 意属索马里兰总督

technology.zh: 装备19世纪后期步枪和少量火炮，海军力量极弱。1896年阿杜瓦惨败后意大利对非洲军事扩张趋于谨慎。
technology.en: Equipped with late 19th-century rifles and minimal artillery, with very weak naval presence. After the 1896 Adwa disaster, Italy was cautious about military expansion in Africa.

threats.zh: 穆罕默德·阿卜杜拉·哈桑的德尔维什运动正在集结力量（即将发动「疯狂毛拉」战争），对意大利控制区构成严重威胁。
threats.en: Muhammad Abdullah Hassan's Dervish movement was gathering strength (the 'Mad Mullah' wars were about to begin), posing a serious threat to Italian-controlled areas.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以索马里各氏族的游牧民为主，沿海城市有少量阿拉伯、印度商人和极少数意大利人。人口分布极为分散。
populationDescription.en: The population consisted mainly of nomadic Somali clanspeople, with small numbers of Arab and Indian merchants in coastal cities and very few Italians. Population distribution was extremely dispersed.

socialClasses.zh: 索马里氏族长老与苏丹、游牧民、沿海商人（阿拉伯-索马里-印度裔）、意大利官员与军人。
socialClasses.en: Somali clan elders and sultans, nomadic pastoralists, coastal merchants (Arab-Somali-Indian), Italian officials and soldiers.

allies.zh: 宗主国意大利；与部分索马里苏丹签有保护条约。
allies.en: Metropolitan Italy; protection treaties with some Somali sultans.

enemies.zh: 穆罕默德·阿卜杜拉·哈桑的德尔维什运动为主要对手。与英属索马里兰和埃塞俄比亚存在边界紧张。
enemies.en: Muhammad Abdullah Hassan's Dervish movement as the principal adversary. Border tensions with British Somaliland and Ethiopia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交服从意大利殖民部，重点维持沿海控制、争取国际承认和防范埃塞俄比亚扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed Italian colonial directives, focusing on maintaining coastal control, securing international recognition, and guarding against Ethiopian expansion.

era.zh: 前工业游牧社会与殖民据点
era.en: Pre-industrial nomadic society with colonial outposts

keyInnovations.zh: 沿海港口设施、基本电报、蒸汽航运联系、少量火器扩散。
keyInnovations.en: Coastal port facilities, basic telegraph, steam shipping connections, limited firearms diffusion.

strengths.zh: 沿海贸易位置重要（印度洋航线），索马里畜牧业和香料贸易有一定经济基础。
strengths.en: Important coastal trade position (Indian Ocean routes), with some economic base in Somali pastoralism and spice trade.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民控制极为薄弱，内陆几乎无法治理，德尔维什运动威胁日增，阿杜瓦惨败削弱了意大利的非洲军事信心。
weaknesses.en: Colonial control was extremely weak, the interior was nearly ungovernable, the Dervish movement posed a growing threat, and the Adwa disaster had undermined Italy's African military confidence.

outlook.zh: 意大利将面临长期的德尔维什军事挑战，殖民地开发前景黯淡，维持成本远超收益。
outlook.en: Italy would face a prolonged Dervish military challenge, colonial development prospects were dim, and maintenance costs far exceeded returns.

description.zh: 1900年的意属索马里兰是意大利在非洲之角的脆弱殖民据点，控制范围局限于沿海城镇，内陆游牧地区不受有效管辖，穆罕默德·阿卜杜拉·哈桑的德尔维什运动即将构成严重军事威胁。
description.en: In 1900, Italian Somaliland was a fragile Italian colonial outpost in the Horn of Africa, with control limited to coastal towns, the nomadic interior beyond effective governance, and Muhammad Abdullah Hassan's Dervish movement about to pose a serious military threat.

governmentForm.zh: 英属索马里兰于1884年成为英国保护国，主要为保障亚丁殖民地的肉食供应。1900年行政由英属印度政府通过亚丁管辖（1898年转归外交部），以最小化行政投入为原则。
governmentForm.en: British Somaliland became a British protectorate in 1884, primarily to secure meat supplies for the Aden garrison. In 1900, administration was conducted with minimal investment, having been transferred from British India via Aden to the Foreign Office in 1898.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以伊萨克、达罗德等索马里氏族的游牧民为主，柏培拉等港口城市有少量阿拉伯和印度商人。英国驻员极少。
socialStructure.en: Society was dominated by nomadic pastoralists of the Isaaq, Darod, and other Somali clans, with small numbers of Arab and Indian merchants in port towns like Berbera. British personnel were minimal.

rulingClass.zh: 英国驻扎领事、索马里氏族苏丹与长老（依保护条约被承认）。
rulingClass.en: The British Consul, Somali clan sultans and elders (recognized under protection treaties).

succession.zh: 驻扎领事由英国政府任命。氏族领导权依索马里传统继承。
succession.en: The Consul was appointed by the British government. Clan leadership followed Somali traditional succession.

structure.zh: 极简行政，驻扎领事仅在柏培拉维持小型办事处，内陆完全由索马里氏族自治。
structure.en: Minimal administration, with the Consul maintaining only a small office in Berbera, the interior entirely self-governed by Somali clans.

function.zh: 管理保护国事务、与氏族苏丹联络和港口行政。
function.en: Managed protectorate affairs, liaison with clan sultans, and port administration.

function.zh: 征收柏培拉港口关税。
function.en: Collected customs duties at Berbera port.

function.zh: 维持港口秩序和最低限度的治安。
function.en: Maintained port order and minimal security.

localAdmin.zh: 保护国实行最低限度干预，内陆事务由索马里氏族依传统习惯法（xeer）自行管理。
localAdmin.en: The Protectorate operated on minimum intervention principles, with the interior managed by Somali clans through traditional customary law (xeer).

legalSystem.zh: 柏培拉适用英国法处理涉及外国人的案件，内陆由索马里习惯法和伊斯兰法治理。
legalSystem.en: British law applied in Berbera for cases involving foreigners, while the interior was governed by Somali customary law and Islamic law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入几乎完全来自柏培拉港口关税。内陆无法征税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came almost entirely from Berbera port customs duties. Interior taxation was impossible.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 索马里口头诗歌传统极为丰富，柏培拉是红海-亚丁湾贸易网络中的古老商港。
culturalAchievements.en: Somali oral poetry tradition was extremely rich, and Berbera was an ancient trading port in the Red Sea-Gulf of Aden network.

languageFamily.zh: 索马里语（库希特语族），阿拉伯语用于宗教和商业，英语仅在行政中使用
languageFamily.en: Somali (Cushitic), Arabic for religion and commerce, English only in administration

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰教信仰与索马里氏族传统习惯法深度融合，游牧自由与氏族荣誉是核心价值观。
