philosophy.en: Islamic faith deeply integrated with Somali clan customary traditions, with pastoral freedom and clan honor as core values.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文用于宗教，索马里语以口传为主。英文仅见于行政文书。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script for religious purposes, Somali primarily oral. English appeared only in administrative documents.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以游牧畜牧为绝对主导，柏培拉季节性牲畜贸易（主要供应亚丁）是唯一的重要商业活动。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was overwhelmingly based on nomadic pastoralism, with Berbera's seasonal livestock trade (primarily supplying Aden) as the only significant commercial activity.

mainIndustries.zh: 游牧畜牧、牲畜出口至亚丁、香料采集（乳香、没药）、沿海渔业
mainIndustries.en: Nomadic pastoralism, livestock export to Aden, spice gathering (frankincense, myrrh), coastal fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 活畜（羊、牛、骆驼）、兽皮、乳香、没药、阿拉伯咖啡（转运）
tradeGoods.en: Live animals (sheep, cattle, camels), hides, frankincense, myrrh, Arabian coffee (transit)

name.zh: 印度卢比/英镑（港口），玛利亚·特蕾莎银币（内陆贸易）
name.en: Indian rupee/pound sterling (port), Maria Theresa thaler (inland trade)

householdWealth.zh: 财富以骆驼、牛、山羊群规模衡量。柏培拉商人有一定贸易利润积累。
householdWealth.en: Wealth was measured in herds of camels, cattle, and goats. Berbera merchants had some accumulated trade profits.

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 游牧自给经济为主，柏培拉季节性贸易为唯一的货币化经济活动。
economicSystem.en: Primarily nomadic subsistence economy, with Berbera's seasonal trade as the only monetized economic activity.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政极为窘迫，本地收入不足以支付行政开支，差额由帝国拨款弥补。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances were extremely strained, with local revenue insufficient to cover administrative costs, the shortfall met by imperial grants.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以最低成本维持英国在亚丁湾的战略存在。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained a British strategic presence in the Gulf of Aden at the lowest possible cost.

description.zh: 骆驼骑兵巡逻部队，适应游牧地区作战。即将在德尔维什战争中承受严峻考验。
description.en: Camel-mounted patrol force adapted to nomadic terrain. About to face severe tests in the Dervish wars.

description.zh: 驻守港口和基本设施的小型步兵分队。
description.en: A small infantry detachment guarding the port and basic facilities.

commanderInChief.zh: 英国驻扎领事兼军事指挥官

technology.zh: 基本步枪武装，骆驼机动。通讯和补给极为有限。
technology.en: Basic rifle armament with camel mobility. Communications and supply were extremely limited.

threats.zh: 穆罕默德·阿卜杜拉·哈桑的德尔维什运动正在迅速壮大，将在1900年后对保护国构成严重军事威胁。氏族间冲突也是持续问题。
threats.en: Muhammad Abdullah Hassan's Dervish movement was rapidly growing and would pose a serious military threat to the Protectorate after 1900. Inter-clan conflicts were also a persistent issue.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以伊萨克、达罗德等氏族的游牧索马里人为主，柏培拉有少量阿拉伯和印度商人。英国驻员不超过数十人。
populationDescription.en: The population was predominantly nomadic Somalis of the Isaaq, Darod, and other clans, with small Arab and Indian merchant communities in Berbera. British personnel numbered only dozens.

socialClasses.zh: 氏族苏丹与长老、游牧民、港口商人、宗教学者、英国行政人员。
socialClasses.en: Clan sultans and elders, nomadic pastoralists, port merchants, religious scholars, British administrative staff.

allies.zh: 保护国宗主英国；与亚丁殖民地有密切经济联系。
allies.en: Britain as the protecting power; close economic ties with the Aden colony.

enemies.zh: 穆罕默德·阿卜杜拉·哈桑的德尔维什运动为主要对手。与埃塞俄比亚和意属索马里兰存在边界争议。
enemies.en: Muhammad Abdullah Hassan's Dervish movement as the principal adversary. Border disputes with Ethiopia and Italian Somaliland.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交服从英国外交部，重点维护亚丁湾战略通道安全和保护国边界。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed the British Foreign Office, focusing on Gulf of Aden strategic route security and protectorate borders.

era.zh: 前工业游牧社会

keyInnovations.zh: 柏培拉港口设施、有限的火器扩散、骆驼部队组织。
keyInnovations.en: Berbera port facilities, limited firearms diffusion, camel corps organization.

strengths.zh: 战略位置重要（亚丁湾入口），柏培拉港口是亚丁肉食供应的关键来源。
strengths.en: Important strategic position (Gulf of Aden entrance), Berbera port was a key source of meat supply for Aden.

weaknesses.zh: 行政和军事存在极为薄弱，无法有效控制内陆，德尔维什运动威胁严重，经济基础极为脆弱。
weaknesses.en: Administrative and military presence was extremely thin, the interior could not be effectively controlled, the Dervish threat was serious, and the economic base was extremely fragile.

outlook.zh: 德尔维什战争将迫使英国大幅增加军事投入，否则保护国地位将受到严重挑战。
outlook.en: The Dervish wars would force Britain to significantly increase military investment, or the protectorate's viability would be seriously challenged.

description.zh: 1900年的英属索马里兰是英国在亚丁湾的极简保护国，以柏培拉港口和牲畜贸易为核心，内陆游牧地区不受有效管辖，德尔维什运动的兴起正酝酿危机。
description.en: In 1900, British Somaliland was a minimally administered British protectorate on the Gulf of Aden, centered on Berbera port and livestock trade, with the nomadic interior beyond effective governance and the rise of the Dervish movement brewing a crisis.

name.zh: 意属厄立特里亚殖民地

dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the Kingdom of Italy

governmentForm.zh: 厄立特里亚自1890年正式成为意大利殖民地（意大利在非洲最早的正式殖民地）。1896年阿杜瓦战败后，意大利放弃向埃塞俄比亚扩张，转而巩固厄立特里亚的殖民统治。马蒂尼于1897年出任民政总督，推行行政改革。
governmentForm.en: Eritrea became Italy's first formal African colony in 1890. After the 1896 defeat at Adwa, Italy abandoned expansion into Ethiopia and focused on consolidating colonial rule in Eritrea. Martini was appointed civilian Governor in 1897, pursuing administrative reforms.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由基督教高地农民（提格里尼亚人）、穆斯林低地游牧民、意大利官员与军人、少量印度和阿拉伯商人组成。种族和宗教多样性是突出特征。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised Christian highland farmers (Tigrinya), Muslim lowland pastoralists, Italian officials and soldiers, and small numbers of Indian and Arab merchants. Ethnic and religious diversity was a prominent feature.

rulingClass.zh: 意大利总督马蒂尼与殖民官僚、意大利军官、被殖民当局收编的地方酋长。
rulingClass.en: Italian Governor Martini and the colonial bureaucracy, Italian military officers, and local chiefs co-opted by colonial authorities.

succession.zh: 总督由意大利政府任命。地方酋长依各族传统继承但须获殖民当局确认。
succession.en: The Governor was appointed by the Italian government. Local chiefs succeeded by their own traditions but required colonial confirmation.

structure.zh: 总督拥有广泛行政权，下设民政、军务、财政和司法机构。马蒂尼正推行从军政向民政的转型，建立较完善的区行政体系。
structure.en: The Governor held broad administrative powers, with civil affairs, military, finance, and judicial institutions. Martini was transitioning from military to civilian governance, establishing a more developed district administration system.

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、法律制定与对罗马的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, lawmaking, and reporting to Rome.

function.zh: 管理殖民驻军、阿斯卡里部队和边境防务。
function.en: Managed colonial garrisons, Ascari forces, and border defense.

function.zh: 征收关税、盐税和地方税收。
function.en: Collected customs duties, salt tax, and local taxes.

function.zh: 建设铁路、道路和城市基础设施（阿斯马拉城市建设正在推进）。
function.en: Built railways, roads, and urban infrastructure (Asmara urban development was underway).

localAdmin.zh: 全境分为行政区，由意大利区官管辖。高地和低地采用不同的行政方式，高地依赖被承认的酋长，低地则通过军事据点控制。
localAdmin.en: The territory was divided into administrative districts under Italian district officers. Different administrative approaches were used in highlands and lowlands: highlands relied on recognized chiefs, lowlands were controlled through military posts.

legalSystem.zh: 意大利殖民法适用于欧洲人和城市地区，习惯法和伊斯兰法在各族社区中保留部分效力。
legalSystem.en: Italian colonial law applied to Europeans and urban areas, while customary law and Islamic law retained partial effect in various ethnic communities.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税（马萨瓦港）、盐税、畜税和人头税为主。财政收入有限。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation rested on customs (Massawa port), salt tax, livestock tax, and poll tax. Revenue remained limited.

religion.zh: 东正教基督教（科普特传统，高地提格里尼亚人）与逊尼派伊斯兰教（低地）并存
religion.en: Orthodox Christianity (Coptic tradition, highland Tigrinya) coexisted with Sunni Islam (lowlands)

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿斯马拉正开始发展为意大利风格的殖民城市。提格里尼亚人有悠久的吉兹文字书写传统和东正教宗教艺术。马萨瓦是红海沿岸历史悠久的贸易城市。
culturalAchievements.en: Asmara was beginning to develop as an Italian-style colonial city. The Tigrinya people had a long tradition of Ge'ez script literacy and Orthodox religious art. Massawa was a historically important Red Sea trading city.

languageFamily.zh: 提格里尼亚语、提格雷语（闪米特语族）、库什特诸语；意大利语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Tigrinya, Tigre (Semitic), Cushitic languages; Italian as the colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 东正教基督教传统与伊斯兰苏菲传统并存，意大利殖民「文明使命」意识形态叠加其上。
philosophy.en: Orthodox Christian tradition coexisted with Islamic Sufi traditions, with Italian colonial 'civilizing mission' ideology overlaid upon them.

writingSystem.zh: 吉兹文字（用于提格里尼亚语和宗教文献）、阿拉伯文（穆斯林社群）、意大利语拉丁字母（行政）。
writingSystem.en: Ge'ez script (for Tigrinya and religious texts), Arabic (Muslim communities), Italian in Latin alphabet (administration).

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农牧业为基础，马萨瓦港口贸易为主要商业活动。意大利正投资铁路（马萨瓦-阿斯马拉线在建中）和城市建设。盐业是重要收入来源。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on agriculture and pastoralism, with Massawa port trade as the main commercial activity. Italy was investing in railways (Massawa-Asmara line under construction) and urban development. The salt industry was an important revenue source.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧业、盐业、港口贸易、铁路建设、意大利移民小型商业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, pastoralism, salt production, port trade, railway construction, small Italian settler businesses

tradeGoods.zh: 盐、牲畜、兽皮、珍珠、咖啡（转运）、意大利制成品
tradeGoods.en: Salt, livestock, hides, pearls, coffee (transit), Italian manufactured goods

name.zh: 意大利里拉与厄立特里亚塔勒罗

householdWealth.zh: 高地农民持有土地和牲畜，低地游牧民以驼群和牛群为富。意大利移民和商人在城市积累新财富。
householdWealth.en: Highland farmers held land and livestock, lowland nomads measured wealth in camel and cattle herds. Italian settlers and merchants accumulated new wealth in towns.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民经济，以港口贸易和意大利国家投资为驱动，本地经济仍以农牧自给为基础。
economicSystem.en: A colonial economy driven by port trade and Italian state investment, with the local economy still based on agricultural and pastoral subsistence.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政严重依赖意大利中央拨款，军事开支占主导。马蒂尼正试图通过行政改革提高财政效率。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were heavily dependent on Italian metropolitan subsidies, with military spending dominant. Martini was attempting to improve fiscal efficiency through administrative reform.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 在阿杜瓦惨败后转向内部巩固，以最小军事成本维持殖民控制并推进基础设施建设。
fiscalPolicy.en: After the Adwa disaster, policy shifted toward internal consolidation, maintaining colonial control at minimum military cost while advancing infrastructure development.

description.zh: 由意大利军官指挥的厄立特里亚本地步兵，阿杜瓦战役中表现出色，是意大利殖民军最精锐的部队。
description.en: Eritrean local infantry under Italian officers, distinguished at Adwa, the most elite troops in the Italian colonial army.

description.zh: 意大利本土调派的正规军，驻防阿斯马拉和马萨瓦。
description.en: Regular Italian troops deployed from the homeland, garrisoning Asmara and Massawa.

description.zh: 维持治安和埃塞俄比亚边境巡逻。
description.en: Maintained order and patrolled the Ethiopian border.

commanderInChief.zh: 厄立特里亚总督马蒂尼兼军事最高指挥
commanderInChief.en: Governor Martini of Eritrea as supreme military commander

technology.zh: 装备意大利制卡尔卡诺步枪、山炮和马克沁机枪。阿斯卡里部队是非洲殖民军中训练最精良的本地部队之一。
technology.en: Equipped with Italian Carcano rifles, mountain guns, and Maxim machine guns. The Ascari were among the best-trained local colonial troops in Africa.

threats.zh: 埃塞俄比亚在阿杜瓦胜利后实力增强，成为主要潜在威胁。低地部族袭扰和边境紧张也是安全隐患。
threats.en: Ethiopia, strengthened after its Adwa victory, was the main potential threat. Lowland tribal raiding and border tensions also posed security concerns.

populationDescription.zh: 人口由高地提格里尼亚基督教农民、低地提格雷和其他族群的穆斯林游牧民组成，另有约4,000名意大利移民集中在阿斯马拉和马萨瓦。
populationDescription.en: The population comprised highland Tigrinya Christian farmers, lowland Tigre and other Muslim pastoralist groups, plus about 4,000 Italian settlers concentrated in Asmara and Massawa.

socialClasses.zh: 意大利官员与移民、高地提格里尼亚地主与农民、低地游牧酋长与牧民、城市商人（印度、阿拉伯裔）、阿斯卡里军人。
socialClasses.en: Italian officials and settlers, highland Tigrinya landowners and farmers, lowland pastoral chiefs and herders, urban merchants (Indian, Arab), Ascari soldiers.

allies.zh: 宗主国意大利；与英属苏丹和法属吉布提有边境协调。
allies.en: Metropolitan Italy; border coordination with British Sudan and French Djibouti.

enemies.zh: 埃塞俄比亚在阿杜瓦胜利后为主要地区竞争对手，虽已签订和约但紧张关系持续。
enemies.en: Ethiopia, after its Adwa victory, was the main regional rival; despite a peace treaty, tensions persisted.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交服从意大利殖民部，重点在于巩固殖民地边界、维持与埃塞俄比亚的和平和发展红海贸易。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed Italian colonial directives, focusing on consolidating colonial borders, maintaining peace with Ethiopia, and developing Red Sea trade.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 马萨瓦-阿斯马拉铁路建设中（工程壮举，穿越陡峭地形）、电报、蒸汽航运、阿斯马拉城市规划。
keyInnovations.en: Massawa-Asmara railway under construction (an engineering feat through steep terrain), telegraph, steam shipping, Asmara urban planning.

strengths.zh: 红海战略位置重要（马萨瓦港），阿斯卡里部队训练精良，马蒂尼推行有效的行政改革，阿斯马拉具有良好的高地气候。
strengths.en: Important Red Sea strategic position (Massawa port), well-trained Ascari forces, Martini's effective administrative reforms, and Asmara's favorable highland climate.

weaknesses.zh: 经济基础薄弱，财政严重依赖意大利补贴，阿杜瓦惨败的阴影削弱了殖民扩张信心，与埃塞俄比亚的紧张关系持续存在。
weaknesses.en: Weak economic base, heavy fiscal dependence on Italian subsidies, the shadow of the Adwa disaster undermining colonial expansion confidence, and persistent tensions with Ethiopia.

outlook.zh: 马蒂尼的改革将改善殖民治理，铁路建成后经济可能有所改善，但厄立特里亚将长期作为意大利的高成本战略殖民地存在。
outlook.en: Martini's reforms would improve colonial governance, and the economy might improve once the railway was completed, but Eritrea would long remain a high-cost strategic colony for Italy.

description.zh: 1900年的厄立特里亚是意大利在非洲之角的核心殖民地，在阿杜瓦惨败后从扩张转向内部巩固，马蒂尼总督推行行政改革和基础设施建设，阿斯卡里部队闻名非洲。
description.en: In 1900, Eritrea was Italy's core colony in the Horn of Africa, shifting from expansion to internal consolidation after the Adwa disaster, with Governor Martini pursuing administrative reform and infrastructure development, and the Ascari troops renowned across Africa.

name.en: Colony of German South West Africa

dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the German Empire

governmentForm.zh: 德属西南非洲于1884年成为德国保护领，1900年由莱特温总督管辖。殖民当局通过条约和军事手段控制赫雷罗人和纳马人的土地，积极推行德国移民定居和牧场开发。
governmentForm.en: German South West Africa became a German protectorate in 1884, governed by Governor Leutwein in 1900. Colonial authorities controlled Herero and Nama lands through treaties and military force, actively promoting German settler colonization and ranching.

socialStructure.zh: 德国移民（约4,600人）与军人占据经济和政治主导，赫雷罗人（约8万人）和纳马人（约2万人）被渐进地剥夺土地和牲畜，其他族群如达马拉人和圣人散居各地。
socialStructure.en: German settlers (about 4,600) and military personnel held economic and political dominance, while Herero (about 80,000) and Nama (about 20,000) were progressively dispossessed of land and cattle, with Damara, San, and other groups scattered throughout.

rulingClass.zh: 莱特温总督与德国殖民官僚、德国移民农场主、军官和柏林殖民司。
rulingClass.en: Governor Leutwein and the German colonial bureaucracy, German settler ranchers, military officers, and the Berlin Colonial Department.

succession.zh: 总督由德国皇帝任命。无本地王朝继承。
succession.en: The Governor was appointed by the German Emperor. There was no local dynastic succession.

structure.zh: 总督统辖全境，下设行政、军事、财政和司法机构。莱特温采取「分而治之」策略，利用赫雷罗和纳马之间的矛盾。殖民行政逐渐从军政向民政转型。
structure.en: The Governor oversaw the entire territory, with administrative, military, fiscal, and judicial institutions. Leutwein employed a 'divide and rule' strategy, exploiting tensions between Herero and Nama. Colonial administration was gradually transitioning from military to civil governance.

function.zh: 统筹殖民治理、移民事务与对柏林的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial governance, settler affairs, and reporting to Berlin.

function.zh: 管理殖民军事力量、边境防务和对土著的军事行动。
function.en: Managed colonial military forces, border defense, and military operations against indigenous peoples.

function.zh: 管理土地分配、德国移民安置和牧场特许。
function.en: Managed land allocation, German settler placement, and ranching concessions.

function.zh: 征收税费、管理贸易和殖民预算。
function.en: Collected taxes, managed trade, and administered the colonial budget.

localAdmin.zh: 设区行政官（Bezirksamt）管辖各区，德国移民区有较完善的市政，土著保留地由殖民当局监管的酋长管理。
localAdmin.en: District offices (Bezirksämter) administered each district, German settler areas had more developed municipal governance, and native reserves were managed by chiefs under colonial oversight.

legalSystem.zh: 德国殖民法对欧洲人适用，土著受限制性法规约束（通行证制度、劳动法规）。赫雷罗和纳马的土地权利受到系统性侵蚀。
legalSystem.en: German colonial law applied to Europeans, while indigenous peoples were subject to restrictive regulations (pass laws, labor ordinances). Herero and Nama land rights were systematically eroded.

taxationSystem.zh: 对土著征收牲畜税和人头税，德国移民缴纳贸易税和土地税。帝国政府提供大量补贴。
taxationSystem.en: Indigenous peoples paid livestock and poll taxes, German settlers paid trade and land taxes. The imperial government provided substantial subsidies.

religion.zh: 基督教（德国路德宗和莱茵传教会为主）与赫雷罗-纳马传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity (German Lutheran and Rhenish Mission predominant) alongside Herero-Nama traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 温得和克正发展为具有德国殖民风格的小城，建有教堂、学校和啤酒厂。赫雷罗社会以牛文化和独特的服饰传统闻名。莱茵传教会在教育和文化记录方面做了大量工作。
culturalAchievements.en: Windhoek was developing into a small town with German colonial character, featuring churches, schools, and breweries. Herero society was known for its cattle culture and distinctive dress traditions. The Rhenish Mission did extensive work in education and cultural documentation.

languageFamily.zh: 德语（官方）、赫雷罗语（班图语族）、纳马语（科伊桑语系）、南非荷兰语
languageFamily.en: German (official), Otjiherero (Bantu), Khoekhoegowab/Nama (Khoisan), Afrikaans

philosophy.zh: 德国殖民移民社区秉持帝国主义和种族优越观念，赫雷罗社会以牛群崇拜和祖先圣火（okuruwo）为核心精神传统。
philosophy.en: The German colonial settler community held imperialist and racial supremacist views, while Herero society centered spiritually on cattle veneration and the sacred ancestral fire (okuruwo).

writingSystem.zh: 德文为官方文字，赫雷罗语和纳马语由传教士以拉丁字母记录。
writingSystem.en: German was the official written language, with Herero and Nama transcribed in Latin script by missionaries.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以牧场畜牧业为核心，德国移民发展大牧场，赫雷罗人维持传统牧牛。矿产勘探（铜、钻石前景）正在进行。经济高度依赖德国补贴。
gdpDescription.en: The economy centered on ranching, with German settlers developing large ranches and Herero maintaining traditional cattle herding. Mineral exploration (copper, diamond prospects) was underway. The economy was heavily dependent on German subsidies.

mainIndustries.zh: 大牧场畜牧业、传统牧牛、矿产勘探（铜矿）、小规模贸易、运输
mainIndustries.en: Large-scale ranching, traditional cattle herding, mineral exploration (copper), small-scale trade, transport

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、兽皮、鸵鸟羽毛、铜矿石、德国制成品
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, hides, ostrich feathers, copper ore, German manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 德国移民农场主积累了大量土地和牲畜，赫雷罗家庭财富以牛群衡量但正被殖民者系统性侵夺。
householdWealth.en: German settler ranchers accumulated large landholdings and livestock, while Herero household wealth was measured in cattle herds but was being systematically expropriated by colonists.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民牧场资本主义，以德国移民土地占有和牲畜贸易为核心，土著经济被边缘化。
economicSystem.en: Colonial ranching capitalism centered on German settler land occupation and livestock trade, with indigenous economies marginalized.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政严重入不敷出，德国帝国政府承担大部分开支。殖民地经济尚不具备自给能力。
treasuryDescription.en: The colony's finances were deeply in deficit, with the German imperial government bearing most costs. The colonial economy was not yet self-sustaining.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以帝国补贴维持军事存在和移民安置，逐步加重对土著的税收以迫使其提供劳动力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Imperial subsidies sustained military presence and settler settlement, with gradually increasing indigenous taxation to compel labor provision.

description.zh: 由德国军官和士兵组成的殖民军事力量，装备精良。
description.en: Colonial military force composed of German officers and soldiers, well equipped.

description.zh: 维持移民区秩序、执行通行证法和劳动法规。
description.en: Maintained order in settler areas, enforced pass laws and labor ordinances.

description.zh: 德国移民志愿武装，紧急情况下召集。
description.en: German settler volunteer militia, mobilized in emergencies.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督莱特温兼保护军总司令
commanderInChief.en: Governor Leutwein as commander of the Schutztruppe

technology.zh: 装备毛瑟步枪、克虏伯野战炮、马克沁机枪，骑兵机动性较强。德国军事技术在殖民地处于较高水平。
technology.en: Equipped with Mauser rifles, Krupp field guns, and Maxim machine guns, with good cavalry mobility. German military technology was at a comparatively high level in the colonial context.

threats.zh: 赫雷罗人和纳马人对土地被掠夺的不满日益加深，武装反抗的可能性正在上升（1904年将爆发赫雷罗和纳马起义）。边境也面临一定安全压力。
threats.en: Herero and Nama resentment over land dispossession was deepening, and the possibility of armed rebellion was rising (the Herero and Nama revolt would erupt in 1904). Border security also faced some pressure.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约20万，赫雷罗人约8万为最大族群，纳马人约2万，达马拉人约3万，圣人约2万，其他族群约2万，德国移民约4,600人。
populationDescription.en: The population was roughly 200,000, with Herero (about 80,000) as the largest group, Nama (about 20,000), Damara (about 30,000), San (about 20,000), other groups (about 20,000), and German settlers (about 4,600).

socialClasses.zh: 德国移民（农场主、商人、官员、军人）、传教士、赫雷罗酋长与牧民、纳马酋长与牧民、合同劳工。
socialClasses.en: German settlers (ranchers, merchants, officials, soldiers), missionaries, Herero chiefs and herders, Nama chiefs and herders, contract laborers.

allies.zh: 宗主国德意志帝国；与邻近的英属贝专纳兰和葡属安哥拉有边界协定。
allies.en: Metropolitan German Empire; boundary agreements with neighboring British Bechuanaland and Portuguese Angola.

enemies.zh: 无正式外部敌国，但赫雷罗和纳马内部反抗力量正在积蓄。英国在南部非洲的影响力构成战略竞争。
enemies.en: No formal external enemies, but Herero and Nama internal resistance forces were building. British influence in southern Africa constituted strategic competition.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交服从柏林殖民司，重点在于巩固殖民地边界、推进德国移民和防范英国势力扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed the Berlin Colonial Department, focusing on consolidating colonial borders, advancing German settlement, and guarding against British expansion.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 窄轨铁路（斯瓦科普蒙德至温得和克线在建中）、电报、现代步枪与火炮、水井钻探技术。
keyInnovations.en: Narrow-gauge railway (Swakopmund-Windhoek line under construction), telegraph, modern rifles and artillery, well-drilling technology.

strengths.zh: 德国军事和行政能力较强，牧场开发潜力大，矿产资源前景看好（钻石将于1908年被发现）。
strengths.en: Strong German military and administrative capacity, substantial ranching potential, promising mineral prospects (diamonds would be discovered in 1908).

weaknesses.zh: 经济严重依赖帝国补贴，土著反抗情绪日益高涨，殖民地人口稀少且干旱环境恶劣，移民吸引力有限。
weaknesses.en: Heavy economic dependence on imperial subsidies, rising indigenous resentment, sparse colonial population in a harsh arid environment, and limited appeal for immigration.

outlook.zh: 殖民者对赫雷罗和纳马的持续压迫将在数年内引发灾难性起义，但在短期内莱特温的「分而治之」策略尚能维持表面和平。
outlook.en: Continued colonial oppression of the Herero and Nama would trigger a catastrophic uprising within a few years, but in the short term Leutwein's 'divide and rule' strategy could maintain a surface peace.

description.zh: 1900年的德属西南非洲是德意志帝国在南部非洲的殖民地，莱特温总督推行移民定居和土地征用，赫雷罗人和纳马人对殖民掠夺的不满正在加深。
description.en: In 1900, German South West Africa was the German Empire's colony in southern Africa, with Governor Leutwein promoting settler colonization and land expropriation, while Herero and Nama resentment over colonial dispossession was deepening.

dynasty.en: Colonial rule under the German Empire

governmentForm.zh: 喀麦隆于1884年成为德国保护领，1900年由普特卡默总督统辖。殖民政权控制沿海和主要河流沿线地区，内陆仍有广大区域处于征服过程中。布亚位于喀麦隆山脚，气候较凉爽。
governmentForm.en: Kamerun became a German protectorate in 1884, governed by Governor Puttkamer in 1900. Colonial authority controlled the coast and major river corridors, while large interior areas were still being conquered. Buea, at the foot of Mount Cameroon, offered a cooler climate.

socialStructure.zh: 社会极为多元，包括沿海杜阿拉商人精英、内陆数百个不同族群的酋长制社会、德国官员和商人（约数百人）、以及大量种植园劳工。
socialStructure.en: Society was extremely diverse, including coastal Douala merchant elites, chiefly societies of hundreds of different inland ethnic groups, German officials and merchants (a few hundred), and a large plantation labor force.

rulingClass.zh: 总督普特卡默与德国殖民官僚、德国种植园主和贸易公司、被殖民当局承认的沿海和内陆酋长。
rulingClass.en: Governor Puttkamer and the German colonial bureaucracy, German plantation owners and trading companies, and coastal and inland chiefs recognized by colonial authorities.

succession.zh: 总督由德国皇帝任命。地方酋长依各族传统继承但须获殖民确认。
succession.en: The Governor was appointed by the German Emperor. Local chiefs succeeded by their own traditions but required colonial confirmation.

structure.zh: 总督拥有广泛行政权，下设行政、军事、司法和财政机构。殖民政权在沿海建立了较完善的行政体系，内陆征服和行政延伸仍在进行中。普特卡默因专横独断而饱受批评。
structure.en: The Governor held broad administrative powers, with administrative, military, judicial, and fiscal institutions. Colonial authority had established a more developed administrative system on the coast, while inland conquest and administrative extension were ongoing. Puttkamer was criticized for his autocratic style.

function.zh: 统筹殖民治理与对柏林的报告。
function.en: Coordinated colonial governance and reporting to Berlin.

function.zh: 管理殖民军事力量、内陆征服行动和治安维持。
function.en: Managed colonial military forces, inland conquest operations, and policing.

function.zh: 管理种植园开发、劳动力征募和贸易监管。
function.en: Managed plantation development, labor recruitment, and trade regulation.

function.zh: 征收关税、贸易税和种植园税。
function.en: Collected customs duties, trade taxes, and plantation levies.

localAdmin.zh: 沿海和河流沿线设区行政站，内陆通过军事远征和被承认的酋长实行间接控制。许多内陆地区尚未被有效征服。
localAdmin.en: Administrative stations were established along the coast and rivers, with the interior controlled indirectly through military expeditions and recognized chiefs. Many inland areas had not yet been effectively conquered.

legalSystem.zh: 德国殖民法对欧洲人适用，土著受「土著法规」约束，包括强制劳役和体罚。各族习惯法在地方层面部分保留。
legalSystem.en: German colonial law applied to Europeans, with indigenous peoples subject to 'native ordinances' including forced labor and corporal punishment. Ethnic customary law was partially retained at the local level.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税为主要收入来源，辅以种植园税、贸易执照费和有限的人头税。强制劳役是实际税收的重要形式。
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties were the main revenue source, supplemented by plantation taxes, trade licenses, and limited poll taxes. Forced labor was an important form of de facto taxation.

religion.zh: 基督教（巴塞尔传教会和天主教帕洛廷会）与本地传统信仰和北部伊斯兰教并存
religion.en: Christianity (Basel Mission and Catholic Pallottines) alongside local traditional beliefs and northern Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 杜阿拉等沿海社群发展出混合的欧非商业文化，巴塞尔传教会建立了学校体系和圣经翻译。喀麦隆高地以丰富的王国传统和艺术品（如巴蒙王国的木雕和铜器）闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Coastal communities like the Douala developed a mixed Euro-African commercial culture, the Basel Mission established school systems and Bible translations. The Cameroon Grassfields were known for rich kingdom traditions and artwork (such as Bamun woodcarving and bronze-casting).

languageFamily.zh: 德语（官方）；杜阿拉语、富尔富尔德语、巴蒙语等数百种尼日尔-刚果和阿非亚语系语言
languageFamily.en: German (official); Douala, Fulfulde, Bamun, and hundreds of other Niger-Congo and Afro-Asiatic languages

philosophy.zh: 多元文化共存：沿海基督教传教影响、北部富拉尼伊斯兰传统、高地王国的王权神圣传统和丰富的口头文化。
philosophy.en: Diverse cultural coexistence: coastal Christian missionary influence, northern Fulani Islamic tradition, Grassfield kingdom sacred kingship traditions, and rich oral cultures.

writingSystem.zh: 德文为官方行政文字，阿拉伯文用于北部穆斯林社群，巴蒙国王恩焦亚发明了独特的巴蒙文字（Shü-mom），传教士以拉丁字母记录部分本地语言。
writingSystem.en: German served as the official administrative script, Arabic was used in northern Muslim communities, King Njoya of Bamun invented the unique Bamun script (Shü-mom), and missionaries transcribed some local languages in Latin script.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以种植园农业（可可、棕榈、橡胶）和贸易为驱动。喀麦隆山脚的维多利亚种植园和沿海贸易构成出口核心。内陆以自给农业和畜牧为主。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was driven by plantation agriculture (cocoa, palm, rubber) and trade. Plantations near Mount Cameroon at Victoria and coastal trade formed the export core. The interior relied on subsistence agriculture and pastoralism.

mainIndustries.zh: 可可与橡胶种植园、棕榈产品、木材、象牙贸易、畜牧业（北部）、港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Cocoa and rubber plantations, palm products, timber, ivory trade, pastoralism (north), port trade

tradeGoods.zh: 可可、橡胶、棕榈油、棕榈仁、象牙、木材、德国制成品
tradeGoods.en: Cocoa, rubber, palm oil, palm kernels, ivory, timber, German manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 德国种植园主和贸易公司积累较多财富，杜阿拉商人有一定商业积累，内陆绝大多数家庭以自给农业和少量贸易为生。
householdWealth.en: German plantation owners and trading companies accumulated considerable wealth, Douala merchants had some commercial accumulation, while the vast majority of inland households relied on subsistence farming and small-scale trade.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民种植园经济，以强制劳动和出口农产品为核心，辅以沿海贸易和内陆自给农业。
economicSystem.en: A colonial plantation economy centered on forced labor and export agriculture, supplemented by coastal trade and interior subsistence farming.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政处于赤字状态，内陆军事行动开支巨大，须依赖帝国拨款。种植园出口收入正在增长但尚不足以实现财政自给。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were in deficit, with inland military operations costing heavily and requiring imperial subsidies. Plantation export revenues were growing but not yet sufficient for fiscal self-sufficiency.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以种植园经济发展和出口增长为目标，同时维持军事征服以扩大有效控制区域。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed at plantation economic development and export growth, while maintaining military conquest to expand effective control.

description.zh: 由德国军官指挥的本地步兵和少量德国士兵，负责内陆征服和驻防。
description.en: Local infantry under German officers with some German soldiers, responsible for inland conquest and garrison duty.

description.zh: 维持沿海和种植园地区的治安，协助劳动力征募。
description.en: Maintained order in coastal and plantation areas, assisted with labor recruitment.

description.zh: 执行内陆军事远征，征服尚未臣服的族群。
description.en: Conducted inland military expeditions to subjugate unconquered peoples.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督普特卡默兼保护军总指挥
commanderInChief.en: Governor Puttkamer as commander of the Schutztruppe

technology.zh: 装备毛瑟步枪和少量火炮，但热带丛林地形严重制约重装备使用。后勤依赖河流和人力搬运。
technology.en: Equipped with Mauser rifles and limited artillery, but tropical jungle terrain severely constrained heavy equipment use. Logistics depended on rivers and human porterage.

threats.zh: 内陆诸多族群尚未被征服，反殖民抵抗持续发生。北部富拉尼酋长国和高地王国仍具独立军事力量。热带疾病造成大量减员。
threats.en: Many inland peoples had not yet been conquered, with anti-colonial resistance continuing. Northern Fulani emirates and Grassfield kingdoms still possessed independent military capability. Tropical disease caused heavy attrition.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约250万，族群极为多样，包括沿海杜阿拉人、高地巴蒙人和巴米莱克人、北部富拉尼人和豪萨人、南部法庐人和贝蒂人等。德国人仅数百。
populationDescription.en: The population of about 2.5 million was extremely ethnically diverse, including coastal Douala, Grassfield Bamun and Bamileke, northern Fulani and Hausa, southern Fang and Beti, and others. Germans numbered only a few hundred.

socialClasses.zh: 德国官员与种植园主、杜阿拉商人精英、内陆酋长与长老、种植园劳工、自耕农民和渔民。
socialClasses.en: German officials and plantation owners, Douala merchant elites, inland chiefs and elders, plantation laborers, peasant farmers and fishermen.

allies.zh: 宗主国德意志帝国；与英属尼日利亚和法属赤道非洲有边界协定。
allies.en: Metropolitan German Empire; boundary agreements with British Nigeria and French Equatorial Africa.

enemies.zh: 无正式外部敌国，但内陆反殖民抵抗力量是主要安全挑战。英法在边界地区的势力渗透也引起警惕。
enemies.en: No formal external enemies, but inland anti-colonial resistance was the main security challenge. British and French encroachment in border areas also raised concerns.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交服从柏林殖民司，重点在于扩大有效控制范围、发展种植园经济和维护与英法的边界协定。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed the Berlin Colonial Department, focusing on expanding effective control, developing the plantation economy, and maintaining boundary agreements with Britain and France.

era.zh: 工业时代晚期热带殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 种植园农业技术（可可、橡胶种植）、河流蒸汽运输、电报、传教学校与医疗站。
keyInnovations.en: Plantation agriculture techniques (cocoa, rubber cultivation), river steam transport, telegraph, mission schools and medical stations.

strengths.zh: 热带气候和肥沃土地适合种植园经济，可可和橡胶出口前景良好，杜阿拉港是重要贸易枢纽，族群多样性使殖民「分而治之」策略有效。
strengths.en: Tropical climate and fertile soil suited plantation agriculture, cocoa and rubber exports had good prospects, Douala port was an important trade hub, and ethnic diversity made colonial 'divide and rule' strategies effective.

weaknesses.zh: 内陆大面积地区尚未征服，殖民行政覆盖不足，强制劳役引发广泛不满，热带疾病对欧洲人影响严重，普特卡默的独裁管理引发内部批评。
weaknesses.en: Large interior areas remained unconquered, colonial administrative coverage was insufficient, forced labor provoked widespread resentment, tropical disease seriously affected Europeans, and Puttkamer's autocratic management drew internal criticism.

outlook.zh: 种植园经济将持续增长，但内陆征服需要长期军事投入，殖民治理质量有待改善。
outlook.en: The plantation economy would continue growing, but inland conquest required long-term military investment, and colonial governance quality needed improvement.

description.zh: 1900年的德属喀麦隆是德意志帝国在西非的热带殖民地，以种植园经济和沿海贸易为核心，内陆广大地区的征服仍在进行中。
description.en: In 1900, German Kamerun was the German Empire's tropical colony in West Africa, centered on plantation agriculture and coastal trade, with the conquest of the vast interior still underway.

ruler.zh: 维多利亚女王（各殖民地总督代理）

dynasty.zh: 汉诺威-萨克森-科堡-哥达王朝

governmentForm.zh: 六个自治殖民地即将联合为联邦自治领
governmentForm.en: Six self-governing colonies about to federate into a Commonwealth dominion

socialStructure.zh: 英裔中产阶级与工人阶级为主体，爱尔兰裔为第二大群体，华人和太平洋岛民遭歧视，原住民被排斥在殖民社会之外
socialStructure.en: British-origin middle and working classes predominated, Irish-origin settlers the second largest group, Chinese and Pacific Islanders discriminated against, Aboriginal peoples excluded from colonial society

rulingClass.zh: 英裔牧场主、矿业资本家、殖民官员和议会政治家
rulingClass.en: British-origin pastoralists, mining capitalists, colonial officials, and parliamentary politicians

succession.zh: 各殖民地总督由伦敦任命；联邦宪法已通过公投，总督将由英王任命
succession.en: Colonial governors appointed by London; the federal constitution had been approved by referendum, with the Governor-General to be appointed by the Crown

structure.zh: 六个殖民地（新南威尔士、维多利亚、昆士兰、南澳、西澳、塔斯马尼亚）各有自治议会，联邦宪法已于1900年获批准，将于1901年1月1日生效
structure.en: Six colonies (New South Wales, Victoria, Queensland, South Australia, Western Australia, Tasmania) each with self-governing parliaments; the federal constitution was ratified in 1900 and would take effect January 1, 1901

function.zh: 各殖民地的最高行政机关
function.en: Supreme executive authority of each colony

function.zh: 立法和预算审批
function.en: Legislation and budget approval

function.zh: 筹备联邦政府的建立
function.en: Preparation for establishment of the federal government

localAdmin.zh: 各殖民地由总督和议会治理，地方层面由市议会和郡委员会管辖
localAdmin.en: Each colony governed by governor and parliament, with local level administered by city councils and shire councils

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法体系，各殖民地有独立法院系统
legalSystem.en: English common law system, each colony with its own independent court system

taxationSystem.zh: 关税（将统一为联邦关税）、土地税、所得税（部分殖民地），矿业特许权使用费
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties (to be unified as federal tariffs), land taxes, income tax (in some colonies), mining royalties

religion.zh: 英国国教、天主教（爱尔兰裔）、卫斯理宗和长老会为主要教派；原住民保持传统信仰
religion.en: Anglican, Catholic (Irish-origin), Methodist, and Presbyterian as major denominations; Aboriginal peoples maintained traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 民族主义文学兴起（亨利·劳森、班卓·帕特森）、《公报》杂志的丛林文学传统、海德堡画派、板球和澳式足球成为民族认同象征
culturalAchievements.en: Rise of nationalist literature (Henry Lawson, Banjo Paterson), the Bulletin magazine's bush literary tradition, Heidelberg School painting, cricket and Australian Rules football as symbols of national identity

languageFamily.zh: 英语为主；原住民语言约250种但在衰退中
languageFamily.en: English dominant; approximately 250 Aboriginal languages, but in decline

philosophy.zh: 自由主义、平等主义和劳工运动思想并存；「白澳」种族主义意识形态影响深远
philosophy.en: Liberalism, egalitarianism, and labor movement ideology coexisted; 'White Australia' racial ideology was deeply influential

writingSystem.zh: 英文书写
writingSystem.en: English script

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年的澳大利亚是世界上人均最富裕的经济体之一，黄金开采和羊毛出口为两大支柱，制造业和城市服务业快速发展。刚走出1890年代的经济萧条。
gdpDescription.en: In 1900 Australia was one of the world's wealthiest economies per capita, with gold mining and wool exports as twin pillars, manufacturing and urban services rapidly growing. The country was just emerging from the 1890s depression.

mainIndustries.zh: 黄金和矿石开采、绵羊牧场与羊毛出口、小麦种植、制造业、铁路建设、造船、肉类冷冻出口
mainIndustries.en: Gold and ore mining, sheep pastoral farming and wool exports, wheat cultivation, manufacturing, railway construction, shipbuilding, frozen meat exports

tradeGoods.zh: 出口羊毛、黄金、小麦、冷冻肉类和矿石；进口制造品、机械、纺织品和消费品
tradeGoods.en: Exported wool, gold, wheat, frozen meat, and ores; imported manufactured goods, machinery, textiles, and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 中产阶级和技术工人生活水平全球领先，工人阶级也享有较高工资；大牧场主和矿业巨头积累了大量财富
householdWealth.en: Middle class and skilled workers enjoyed world-leading living standards; the working class also earned relatively high wages; large pastoralists and mining magnates had accumulated great wealth

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场资本主义与新兴劳工运动保护并存，强大的工会和仲裁制度
economicSystem.en: Free-market capitalism coexisting with emerging labor movement protections, strong unions, and arbitration system

source.zh: 土地税与矿业特许权费

treasuryDescription.zh: 各殖民地政府储备合计。1890年代经济危机后财政状况正在恢复。
treasuryDescription.en: Combined reserves of colonial governments. Fiscal conditions were recovering after the 1890s economic crisis.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 关税保护主义（维多利亚）与自由贸易（新南威尔士）的争论即将在联邦层面统一。
fiscalPolicy.en: The debate between tariff protectionism (Victoria) and free trade (New South Wales) was about to be resolved at the federal level.

description.zh: 六个殖民地的志愿军和民兵部队，正在布尔战争中派遣远征军。
description.en: Volunteer and militia forces of six colonies, currently dispatching expeditionary forces to the Boer War.

description.zh: 各殖民地海军力量，附属于皇家海军澳大利亚站。
description.en: Colonial naval forces, attached to the Royal Navy's Australia Station.

description.zh: 已派往南非参加布尔战争的志愿兵。
description.en: Volunteers dispatched to South Africa for the Boer War.

commanderInChief.zh: 各殖民地总督为名义军事统帅
commanderInChief.en: Colonial governors as nominal military commanders

technology.zh: 装备李-恩菲尔德步枪、马克西姆机枪和野战炮，骑兵在布尔战争中表现优异。
technology.en: Equipped with Lee-Enfield rifles, Maxim machine guns, and field artillery; cavalry performed outstandingly in the Boer War.

threats.zh: 地缘位置偏远的安全焦虑、对亚洲大国（尤其是日本崛起）的忧虑推动联邦化进程。
threats.en: Security anxieties over remote geographic position and concerns about rising Asian powers (especially Japan) were driving the federation process.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约377万，绝大多数为英裔和爱尔兰裔移民后代。原住民人口因殖民暴力和疾病锐减至约10万。华人和太平洋岛民约5万。
populationDescription.en: Population about 3.77 million, the vast majority descendants of British and Irish immigrants. Aboriginal population had plummeted to approximately 100,000 due to colonial violence and disease. Chinese and Pacific Islanders numbered about 50,000.

socialClasses.zh: 牧场主与矿业资本家、城市中产阶级和专业人士、技术工人和工会成员、农场劳工、矿工，以及被排斥的原住民群体
socialClasses.en: Pastoralists and mining capitalists, urban middle class and professionals, skilled workers and union members, farm laborers, miners, and the marginalized Aboriginal population

allies.zh: 大英帝国为宗主国和主要安全保障；在布尔战争中向英国派遣远征军。
allies.en: The British Empire as metropolitan power and primary security guarantor; dispatched expeditionary forces to Britain in the Boer War.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但对法属太平洋领地和日本崛起存在安全忧虑。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but security concerns about French Pacific territories and the rise of Japan.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交事务由伦敦主导，但通过参加帝国会议和布尔战争展示日益增长的自主意识。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign affairs directed by London, but growing autonomy demonstrated through participation in imperial conferences and the Boer War.

era.zh: 第二次工业革命时代

keyInnovations.zh: 广泛的铁路网（超过2万公里）、电报通信、冷冻船技术革命化肉类出口、采矿机械化、灌溉技术。
keyInnovations.en: Extensive railway network (over 20,000 km), telegraph communications, refrigerated shipping revolutionizing meat exports, mechanized mining, irrigation technology.

strengths.zh: 人均收入全球最高之一、丰富的矿产和农牧业资源、民主传统深厚、工人阶级组织力强。
strengths.en: Among the world's highest per-capita income, rich mineral and pastoral resources, deep democratic traditions, strong working-class organization.

weaknesses.zh: 人口稀少且高度城市化、对英国市场和资本依赖严重、种族主义（白澳政策）、原住民权利遭剥夺。
weaknesses.en: Small and highly urbanized population, heavy dependence on British markets and capital, racism (White Australia policy), Aboriginal rights stripped away.

outlook.zh: 联邦将于1901年1月1日正式成立，标志澳大利亚从六个分散殖民地走向统一国家。白澳政策将成为联邦首批立法之一。
outlook.en: The Commonwealth would be formally established on January 1, 1901, marking Australia's transition from six separate colonies to a unified nation. The White Australia policy would be among the first federal legislation enacted.

description.zh: 1900年的澳大利亚处于联邦建国前夕，六个富裕的自治殖民地即将合并为澳大利亚联邦，是世界上人均最富裕的地区之一，正以布尔战争远征军展示其日益增长的国际存在感。
description.en: In 1900 Australia stood on the eve of federation, with six prosperous self-governing colonies about to merge into the Commonwealth of Australia, one of the world's wealthiest regions per capita, demonstrating its growing international presence through Boer War expeditionary forces.

dynasty.zh: 萨克森-科堡-哥达王朝（英国王室）

governmentForm.zh: 英国自治殖民地，拥有民选议会和责任内阁
governmentForm.en: British self-governing colony with elected parliament and responsible cabinet

socialStructure.zh: 英裔移民后代为社会主体，毛利人约占人口6%，社会流动性较高，女性已获得选举权
socialStructure.en: Descendants of British immigrants formed the social majority, Māori about 6% of population, relatively high social mobility, women had already gained the vote

rulingClass.zh: 大地主、商人、议会政治家
rulingClass.en: Large landowners, merchants, parliamentary politicians

succession.zh: 总督由英国王室任命，总理由议会多数产生
succession.en: Governor appointed by the British Crown, Prime Minister produced by parliamentary majority

structure.zh: 两院制议会（上院立法委员会、下院众议院），总督为名义元首，责任内阁制政府
structure.en: Bicameral parliament (upper Legislative Council, lower House of Representatives), Governor as nominal head of state, responsible cabinet government

function.zh: 政府行政中枢
function.en: Executive hub of government

function.zh: 管理毛利人事务和土地
function.en: Managed Māori affairs and land

function.zh: 劳动立法和劳资仲裁
function.en: Labor legislation and industrial arbitration

localAdmin.zh: 地方由市议会和区委员会管辖；毛利人有四个专属议会席位
localAdmin.en: Local level administered by city and borough councils; Māori had four dedicated parliamentary seats

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法体系，1893年成为世界上首个赋予女性投票权的自治国家
legalSystem.en: English common law system; in 1893 became the world's first self-governing country to grant women the vote

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、土地税、所得税（1891年引入）、遗产税
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties, land taxes, income tax (introduced 1891), estate duties

religion.zh: 英国国教、长老会、天主教和卫斯理宗为主要教派；毛利人中拉塔纳运动等本土基督教形式兴起
religion.en: Anglican, Presbyterian, Catholic, and Methodist as major denominations; among Māori, indigenous Christian movements such as Rātana were emerging

culturalAchievements.zh: 渐进社会改革先驱（女性选举权、养老金制度、劳资仲裁法）、凯瑟琳·曼斯菲尔德等文学人才崭露头角
culturalAchievements.en: Pioneer of progressive social reform (women's suffrage, old-age pensions, industrial arbitration law); literary talents like Katherine Mansfield beginning to emerge

languageFamily.zh: 英语为主，毛利语为少数民族语言
languageFamily.en: English dominant, Māori as a minority language

philosophy.zh: 进步主义和社会自由主义思想影响深远，新西兰自诩「社会实验室」
philosophy.en: Progressivism and social liberalism deeply influential; New Zealand styled itself as a 'social laboratory'

writingSystem.zh: 英文为主要书写文字
writingSystem.en: English as the main written language

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年的新西兰经济以农牧业出口为核心，冷冻船技术使肉类和乳制品远销英国，黄金开采是第二支柱。人均收入在世界排名前列。
gdpDescription.en: In 1900 New Zealand's economy centered on pastoral exports, with refrigerated shipping enabling meat and dairy to reach British markets; gold mining was the second pillar. Per-capita income ranked among the world's highest.

mainIndustries.zh: 绵羊牧场与羊毛出口、冷冻肉类出口、乳制品加工出口、黄金开采、木材加工
mainIndustries.en: Sheep pastoral farming and wool exports, frozen meat exports, dairy processing exports, gold mining, timber processing

tradeGoods.zh: 出口羊毛、冷冻羊肉和牛肉、黄油和奶酪、黄金和木材；进口制造品、机械、纺织品和消费品
tradeGoods.en: Exported wool, frozen mutton and beef, butter and cheese, gold, and timber; imported manufactured goods, machinery, textiles, and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 工人和农民生活水平较高，社会保障制度在全球处于领先地位
householdWealth.en: Workers and farmers enjoyed relatively high living standards; social security system among the world's most advanced

unit.en: pounds sterling per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 国家干预型资本主义，政府积极介入劳资关系和社会福利
economicSystem.en: State-interventionist capitalism, with government actively involved in labor relations and social welfare

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况稳健，公共债务主要用于铁路等基础设施建设。
treasuryDescription.en: Sound fiscal position, with public debt mainly incurred for infrastructure such as railways.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 进步税制政策，通过土地税和累进所得税资助社会福利改革。
fiscalPolicy.en: Progressive taxation policy, funding social welfare reforms through land taxes and graduated income tax.

description.zh: 包括步兵、骑兵和炮兵的志愿武装力量。
description.en: Volunteer armed forces including infantry, cavalry, and artillery.

description.zh: 派往南非参加布尔战争的志愿兵，骑射技术出色。
description.en: Volunteers dispatched to South Africa for the Boer War, with excellent mounted marksmanship.

commanderInChief.zh: 兰弗利总督（名义上）

technology.zh: 装备李-恩菲尔德步枪和野战炮，新西兰骑兵在布尔战争中因丛林战技能受赞誉。
technology.en: Equipped with Lee-Enfield rifles and field artillery; New Zealand mounted troops praised in the Boer War for bush warfare skills.

threats.zh: 对法国在太平洋扩张和远东局势不安；主要依赖英国皇家海军提供海上安全。
threats.en: Uneasy about French Pacific expansion and Far Eastern developments; primarily relied on the Royal Navy for maritime security.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约77万，其中欧裔约72万、毛利人约4.5万。淘金热和土地政策吸引了大量移民。
populationDescription.en: Population about 770,000, with approximately 720,000 of European descent and 45,000 Māori. Gold rushes and land policies attracted many immigrants.

socialClasses.zh: 大地主和商人、城市中产阶级、技术工人和工会成员、小农和牧羊工、毛利土地所有者和劳工
socialClasses.en: Large landowners and merchants, urban middle class, skilled workers and union members, smallholders and shepherds, Māori landowners and laborers

allies.zh: 大英帝国为宗主国；积极参与帝国会议和布尔战争。
allies.en: The British Empire as metropolitan power; actively participated in imperial conferences and the Boer War.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国。
enemies.en: No direct enemies.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交附属于伦敦，但通过布尔战争展现日益增长的帝国忠诚与自主意识。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy subordinate to London, but growing imperial loyalty and autonomy demonstrated through the Boer War.

era.zh: 第二次工业革命时代

keyInnovations.zh: 冷冻船技术、铁路网络、电报和电话通信、蒸汽动力矿业机械。
keyInnovations.en: Refrigerated shipping technology, railway network, telegraph and telephone communications, steam-powered mining machinery.

strengths.zh: 社会改革领先全球（女性选举权、养老金）、人均收入高、农牧业出口竞争力强。
strengths.en: World-leading social reforms (women's suffrage, old-age pensions), high per-capita income, strong pastoral export competitiveness.

weaknesses.zh: 人口稀少、经济高度依赖英国市场和资本、毛利人在土地战争后被边缘化。
weaknesses.en: Small population, heavy economic dependence on British markets and capital, Māori marginalized after the land wars.

outlook.zh: 新西兰将于1907年获得自治领地位，继续作为「社会实验室」推进改革，但对英国的经济依赖将长期持续。
outlook.en: New Zealand would gain Dominion status in 1907, continuing as a 'social laboratory' for reform, but economic dependence on Britain would persist long-term.

description.zh: 1900年的新西兰是大英帝国最进步的自治殖民地之一，以女性选举权、养老金制度和劳资仲裁法闻名于世，经济以羊毛和冷冻肉类出口为支柱。
description.en: In 1900 New Zealand was one of the British Empire's most progressive self-governing colonies, world-renowned for women's suffrage, old-age pensions, and industrial arbitration, with an economy based on wool and frozen meat exports.

governmentForm.zh: 法国直辖殖民地，总督由巴黎殖民部任命，行使行政与司法权力
governmentForm.en: French direct-rule colony with a governor appointed by the Ministry of Colonies in Paris exercising executive and judicial authority

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民官员与商人居顶层，本地酋长充当中间人，前达荷美王国贵族保留部分社会声望，广大丰族与约鲁巴农民构成社会主体
socialStructure.en: French colonial officials and merchants at top, local chiefs serving as intermediaries, former Dahomean aristocracy retaining partial social prestige, broad Fon and Yoruba peasantry forming the majority

rulingClass.zh: 法国殖民行政官员及被任命的本地酋长
rulingClass.en: French colonial administrators and appointed local chiefs

succession.zh: 总督由法国殖民部任命和调任
succession.en: Governor appointed and rotated by the French Ministry of Colonies

structure.zh: 殖民总督为最高行政长官，下设行政、司法、财政各局；地方通过cercle（行政区）和canton（分区）实行间接统治，利用被任命的本地酋长执行政令
structure.en: Colonial governor as chief executive with administrative, judicial, and fiscal bureaux; local governance through cercles and cantons using appointed indigenous chiefs for policy execution

function.zh: 总理殖民地行政、法令颁布及对巴黎汇报
function.en: Overall colonial administration, decree issuance, and reporting to Paris

function.zh: 管理本地酋长事务、人口登记与治安
function.en: Managing local chieftaincy affairs, population registration, and public order

function.zh: 税收征管、预算编制与殖民地财务
function.en: Tax collection, budgeting, and colonial finances

localAdmin.zh: 行政区（cercle）与分区（canton）制，由法国行政官与本地酋长共同管理
localAdmin.en: Cercle and canton system jointly administered by French officials and local chiefs

legalSystem.zh: 法国殖民法与本地习惯法并行，法国公民适用法国法律，本地人适用习惯法法庭
legalSystem.en: Dual system of French colonial law and indigenous customary law; French citizens under French law, locals under customary courts

taxationSystem.zh: 人头税（impôt de capitation）为主，辅以贸易关税和市场税
taxationSystem.en: Head tax (impôt de capitation) as primary levy, supplemented by trade duties and market taxes

religion.zh: 伏都教（Vodun）为主要传统信仰，天主教传教团活跃，伊斯兰教在北部传播
religion.en: Vodun as the predominant traditional faith, active Catholic missions, Islam spreading in the north

culturalAchievements.zh: 达荷美王宫浮雕艺术传统延续，丰族口述史与赞歌传统，青铜铸造工艺
culturalAchievements.en: Continuation of Dahomean palace bas-relief tradition, Fon oral history and praise-song traditions, bronze-casting craftsmanship

languageFamily.zh: 丰语（格贝语支）、约鲁巴语为主要本地语言，法语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Fon (Gbe branch) and Yoruba as major local languages, French as official language

philosophy.zh: 伏都教宇宙观与祖先崇拜体系，法国'文明使命'殖民意识形态开始渗透
philosophy.en: Vodun cosmology and ancestor veneration system, French 'mission civilisatrice' ideology beginning to permeate

writingSystem.zh: 法语拉丁字母为官方书写系统，本地语言以口述为主
writingSystem.en: French Latin script as official writing system, local languages primarily oral

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以棕榈油和棕榈仁出口为主导的殖民地经济，法国商行垄断对外贸易
gdpDescription.en: Colonial economy dominated by palm oil and palm kernel exports, French trading houses monopolizing foreign trade

mainIndustries.zh: 棕榈油加工、棕榈仁采集、自给农业、手工纺织
mainIndustries.en: Palm oil processing, palm kernel collection, subsistence farming, artisanal weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：棕榈油、棕榈仁、玉米；进口：棉布、金属制品、酒类、火器
tradeGoods.en: Exports: palm oil, palm kernels, maize; Imports: cotton cloth, metalware, spirits, firearms

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户拥有少量耕地与棕榈树，贵族家庭保有传统财富但殖民税负加重
householdWealth.en: Average households held small plots and palm trees; aristocratic families retained traditional wealth but colonial taxation increased burdens

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民出口导向型经济，法国商行主导贸易，强制劳役制度（prestation）辅助基础设施建设
economicSystem.en: Colonial export-oriented economy, French trading houses dominating commerce, forced labor (prestation) system supporting infrastructure construction

description.zh: 以本地非洲士兵为主、法国军官指挥的殖民步兵
description.en: Colonial infantry composed mainly of local African soldiers commanded by French officers

description.zh: 维持内部治安与税收征管的准军事警察
description.en: Paramilitary police maintaining internal order and tax enforcement

commanderInChief.zh: 殖民地总督兼驻军最高指挥
commanderInChief.en: Colonial governor serving as supreme military commander

technology.zh: 法制勒贝尔步枪、山炮，西非殖民部队标准装备
technology.en: French Lebel rifles, mountain guns; standard West African colonial force equipment

threats.zh: 北部伊斯兰抵抗势力，前达荷美王室忠诚者零星反抗，法英边境争议
threats.en: Northern Islamic resistance, sporadic revolts by loyalists of the former Dahomean royal house, Anglo-French border disputes

populationDescription.zh: 以丰族为主，约鲁巴、阿贾、巴里巴等族群分布各地
populationDescription.en: Predominantly Fon, with Yoruba, Aja, Bariba, and other ethnic groups distributed throughout

description.zh: 殖民地权力核心，控制行政与贸易
description.en: Power core of the colony, controlling administration and trade

description.zh: 殖民体制中的中间人，保留有限社会权威
description.en: Intermediaries in the colonial system retaining limited social authority

description.zh: 从事自给农业、棕榈采集与手工业的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace engaged in subsistence farming, palm harvesting, and handicrafts

allies.zh: 隶属法属西非联邦，与法国本土及其他法属殖民地联系紧密
allies.en: Part of French West Africa federation, closely linked to metropolitan France and other French colonies

enemies.zh: 北部反殖民抵抗力量；与英属尼日利亚存在边境摩擦
enemies.en: Northern anti-colonial resistance; border friction with British Nigeria

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交权，一切对外事务由法国殖民部处理
foreignPolicy.en: No independent foreign policy; all external affairs handled by the French Ministry of Colonies

era.zh: 早期殖民工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 法国引入电报通信、蒸汽船航运、现代港口设施（科托努港）
keyInnovations.en: French-introduced telegraph communications, steamship navigation, modern port facilities (Cotonou harbor)

strengths.zh: 棕榈油出口经济稳定，法国军事保障安全，港口贸易基础设施
strengths.en: Stable palm oil export economy, French military security guarantee, port trade infrastructure

weaknesses.zh: 殖民剥削加重民众负担，强制劳役引发不满，本地精英权力被边缘化
weaknesses.en: Colonial exploitation increasing popular burdens, forced labor causing resentment, local elites marginalized from power

outlook.zh: 将被整合入法属西非联邦体系，殖民经济进一步深化
outlook.en: Will be further integrated into the French West Africa federation system with deepening colonial economy

description.zh: 1894年法国击败达荷美王国后建立的殖民地，以棕榈油出口为经济支柱，前王国社会结构在殖民统治下逐步瓦解。
description.en: Colony established after France defeated the Kingdom of Dahomey in 1894, with palm oil exports as economic pillar; the former kingdom's social structure was gradually dismantled under colonial rule.

name.zh: 拉各斯殖民地与约鲁巴腹地
英属拉各斯殖民地与南尼日利亚保护国
name.en: British Lagos Colony & Protectorate of Southern Nigeria

ruler.zh: 总督威廉·麦格雷戈爵士

dynasty.zh: 大不列颠及爱尔兰联合王国
dynasty.en: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland

governmentForm.zh: 英国皇家殖民地与保护国并行体制，拉各斯为直辖殖民地，约鲁巴腹地为保护国
governmentForm.en: Dual British Crown Colony and Protectorate system; Lagos as direct Crown Colony, Yoruba hinterland as protectorate

socialStructure.zh: 英国殖民官员与欧洲商人占据权力顶层，拉各斯受过西式教育的非洲精英（萨罗人等）形成新兴中产，约鲁巴各邦传统酋长保有地方权威，广大农民和手工业者构成社会基础
socialStructure.en: British officials and European merchants at the top, Western-educated African elites in Lagos (Saro, etc.) forming a new middle class, Yoruba traditional chiefs retaining local authority, broad peasantry and artisans as the social base

rulingClass.zh: 英国殖民官员、欧洲商行代表、约鲁巴传统奥巴（oba）在保护国内保留权力
rulingClass.en: British colonial officials, European trading house representatives, Yoruba traditional obas retaining power within the protectorate

succession.zh: 总督由英国殖民部任命；约鲁巴各邦奥巴按传统方式继承但需获英国认可
succession.en: Governor appointed by the Colonial Office; Yoruba obas succeeding by traditional methods but requiring British recognition

structure.zh: 拉各斯总督兼任南尼日利亚保护国高级专员，下设行政委员会和立法委员会；保护国地区通过驻扎官（Resident）与地区专员管理约鲁巴各邦
structure.en: Lagos Governor doubling as High Commissioner of the Southern Nigeria Protectorate, with Executive and Legislative Councils; protectorate areas managed through Residents and District Commissioners overseeing Yoruba states

function.zh: 协调殖民地行政事务、公文管理与政策执行
function.en: Coordinating colonial administrative affairs, document management, and policy execution

function.zh: 税收征管、关税管理与殖民地预算
function.en: Tax collection, customs administration, and colonial budgeting

function.zh: 管理殖民地法院与本地法庭体系
function.en: Managing colonial courts and indigenous tribunal systems

localAdmin.zh: 拉各斯市政直辖，约鲁巴腹地通过驻扎官-酋长间接统治体系管理
localAdmin.en: Lagos under direct municipal rule, Yoruba hinterland managed through Resident-chief indirect rule system

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法适用于拉各斯殖民地，保护国兼行英国法与约鲁巴习惯法
legalSystem.en: English common law applied in Lagos Colony, protectorate combining English law and Yoruba customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 拉各斯以关税与贸易税为主，保护国征收贡赋与市场税
taxationSystem.en: Lagos relying on customs and trade taxes, protectorate collecting tribute and market levies

religion.zh: 约鲁巴传统信仰（奥里沙崇拜）、基督教（圣公会与卫理公会为主）、伊斯兰教三者并存
religion.en: Yoruba traditional religion (Orisha worship), Christianity (mainly Anglican and Methodist), and Islam coexisting

culturalAchievements.zh: 约鲁巴木雕与铜铸艺术、伊费与贝宁青铜传统、拉各斯报刊文化兴起、萨罗知识分子群体
culturalAchievements.en: Yoruba woodcarving and bronze-casting arts, Ife and Benin bronze traditions, emerging Lagos press culture, Saro intellectual community

languageFamily.zh: 约鲁巴语为主要语言，英语为官方语言，拉各斯商业混合语（皮钦英语）通行
languageFamily.en: Yoruba as major language, English as official language, Lagos commercial pidgin widely spoken

philosophy.zh: 约鲁巴伊法（Ifá）占卜哲学体系，基督教与伊斯兰神学并行传播，拉各斯精英中泛非主义思想萌芽
philosophy.en: Yoruba Ifá divination philosophical system, parallel spread of Christian and Islamic theology, embryonic pan-Africanist ideas among Lagos elites

writingSystem.zh: 英语拉丁字母为官方文字，约鲁巴语拉丁化书写由传教士推广，阿拉伯字母用于伊斯兰经学
writingSystem.en: English Latin script as official writing, Latinized Yoruba writing promoted by missionaries, Arabic script used for Islamic scholarship

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以可可、棕榈产品和橡胶出口为主导，拉各斯为西非重要商港，欧洲商行与本地商人并存
gdpDescription.en: Dominated by cocoa, palm products, and rubber exports; Lagos as major West African commercial port; coexistence of European trading houses and local merchants

mainIndustries.zh: 可可种植、棕榈油加工、橡胶采集、拉各斯港口贸易、手工纺织与染布
mainIndustries.en: Cocoa cultivation, palm oil processing, rubber collection, Lagos port trade, artisanal weaving and cloth-dyeing

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：可可、棕榈油、棕榈仁、橡胶；进口：棉布、金属制品、酒类、机械
tradeGoods.en: Exports: cocoa, palm oil, palm kernels, rubber; Imports: cotton textiles, metalware, spirits, machinery

name.en: British pound and West African silver coinage

householdWealth.zh: 拉各斯商人阶层积累可观财富，约鲁巴腹地农户以土地和可可园为主要资产
householdWealth.en: Lagos merchant class accumulating considerable wealth; Yoruba hinterland households with land and cocoa farms as main assets

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民自由贸易体制，欧洲商行主导出口贸易，本地商人参与中间贸易与零售
economicSystem.en: Colonial free-trade regime; European trading houses dominating exports, local merchants participating in intermediary trade and retail

name.en: West African Frontier Force (WAFF) Lagos Battalion

description.zh: 英国军官指挥的本地非洲士兵，负责殖民地防御与治安
description.en: Local African soldiers commanded by British officers for colonial defense and policing

description.zh: 维持城市与港口治安的殖民警察
description.en: Colonial police maintaining urban and port security

commanderInChief.zh: 总督兼驻军最高指挥官
commanderInChief.en: Governor serving as commander-in-chief of garrison forces

technology.zh: 英制李-恩菲尔德步枪、马克沁机枪、炮艇
technology.en: British Lee-Enfield rifles, Maxim guns, gunboats

threats.zh: 内陆约鲁巴各邦间冲突余波，贝宁王国抵抗（1897年征服后），北部伊斯兰国家威胁
threats.en: Aftershocks of inter-Yoruba conflicts, Benin Kingdom resistance (after 1897 conquest), northern Islamic state threats

populationDescription.zh: 约鲁巴各族群为主体，拉各斯有萨罗回归者、巴西裔、欧洲侨民等多元人口
populationDescription.en: Predominantly Yoruba ethnic groups, Lagos with diverse population including Saro returnees, Brazilians, and European expatriates

description.zh: 殖民地权力与经济命脉的掌控者
description.en: Controllers of colonial power and economic lifelines

description.zh: 受过西式教育的拉各斯中产阶层，包括律师、教师、商人
description.en: Western-educated Lagos middle class including lawyers, teachers, and merchants

description.zh: 约鲁巴各邦奥巴及其廷臣，保留地方社会权威
description.en: Yoruba obas and their courtiers retaining local social authority

description.zh: 从事农业、手工业和搬运劳动的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace engaged in agriculture, handicrafts, and porter labor

allies.zh: 作为英国殖民地，与其他英属西非领地联系紧密，阿贝奥库塔的埃格巴联合政府保持半独立条约关系
allies.en: As British colony, closely linked to other British West African territories; Egba United Government of Abeokuta maintaining semi-independent treaty relations

enemies.zh: 内陆抵抗势力，与法属达荷美的边境紧张关系
enemies.en: Inland resistance forces, border tensions with French Dahomey

foreignPolicy.zh: 由英国殖民部统一管理对外事务，持续向内陆扩展殖民统治
foreignPolicy.en: External affairs managed by the British Colonial Office, continuing inland expansion of colonial rule

era.zh: 殖民早期现代化

keyInnovations.zh: 拉各斯港口设施、铁路建设（1896年开工）、电报通信、印刷出版业
keyInnovations.en: Lagos port facilities, railway construction (begun 1896), telegraph communications, printing and publishing industry

strengths.zh: 拉各斯作为西非商业中心的地位，多元化出口经济，受教育精英阶层
strengths.en: Lagos's status as a West African commercial hub, diversified export economy, educated elite class

weaknesses.zh: 殖民统治下本地自治权缩减，约鲁巴各邦整合未完成，对英国市场过度依赖
weaknesses.en: Shrinking local autonomy under colonial rule, incomplete integration of Yoruba states, excessive dependence on British markets

outlook.zh: 即将与北尼日利亚保护国合并，殖民经济将进一步以出口导向深化
outlook.en: Approaching merger with the Northern Nigeria Protectorate; colonial economy to deepen further with export orientation

description.zh: 英国在约鲁巴地区的殖民据点，以拉各斯为中心向内陆扩展，1900年前后正式建立南尼日利亚保护国体制，约鲁巴传统政治结构在殖民间接统治下被重塑。
description.en: British colonial foothold in Yoruba territory expanding inland from Lagos; the Southern Nigeria Protectorate system was formally established around 1900, with Yoruba traditional political structures being reshaped under colonial indirect rule.

name.zh: 法属上沃尔特地区莫西诸邦
name.en: Mossi States in French Upper Volta Territory

ruler.zh: 莫格·纳巴·科姆二世（名义）；法国行政官实权
ruler.en: Mogho Naba Koom II (ceremonial); French administrators holding real power

rulerTitle.zh: 莫格·纳巴（莫西皇帝，仪式性）/ 法国区长官
rulerTitle.en: Mogho Naba (Mossi Emperor, ceremonial) / French Commandant de Cercle

dynasty.zh: 莫西纳巴王朝（仪式性延续）

governmentForm.zh: 法国殖民保护地，莫格·纳巴保留仪式性权威但行政实权归法国军官
governmentForm.en: French colonial protectorate; Mogho Naba retaining ceremonial authority while administrative power rested with French officers

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民军官居于权力顶层，莫西王族与纳孔布塞贵族保留社会声望，农民（塔尔塞）构成人口主体
socialStructure.en: French colonial officers at the power apex, Mossi royals and Nakombse nobility retaining social prestige, peasant farmers (Talse) forming the population majority

rulingClass.zh: 法国军政官员与被保留的莫西传统酋长
rulingClass.en: French military-administrative officials and retained Mossi traditional chiefs

succession.zh: 莫格·纳巴按莫西传统由选举委员会选出，但需获法国当局批准
succession.en: Mogho Naba selected by traditional electoral council per Mossi custom but requiring French approval

structure.zh: 法国行政区（cercle）制度叠加莫西传统层级，法国区长官管辖，莫格·纳巴与各地方纳巴协助行政
structure.en: French cercle system overlaid on Mossi traditional hierarchy; French Commandant de Cercle in charge, Mogho Naba and regional Nabas assisting administration

function.zh: 殖民行政管理、税收与劳役征发
function.en: Colonial administration, tax collection, and labor conscription

function.zh: 传统仪式、地方纠纷调解与社会凝聚
function.en: Traditional ceremonies, local dispute mediation, and social cohesion

localAdmin.zh: 法国cercle-canton体系与莫西传统省份（纳巴辖区）并行运作
localAdmin.en: French cercle-canton system operating in parallel with Mossi traditional provinces (Naba jurisdictions)

legalSystem.zh: 法国殖民法与莫西习惯法并行，重大案件由法国法庭审理
legalSystem.en: French colonial law and Mossi customary law in parallel; major cases tried by French courts

taxationSystem.zh: 法国人头税为主，莫西传统贡赋制度部分延续
taxationSystem.en: French head tax as primary levy, Mossi traditional tribute system partially continued

religion.zh: 莫西传统信仰（祖先崇拜与大地神崇拜）为主，伊斯兰教在商人群体中传播
religion.en: Mossi traditional religion (ancestor and earth-spirit worship) predominant, Islam spreading among merchant communities

culturalAchievements.zh: 莫西面具雕刻传统，口述王朝历史，纳巴宫廷仪式体系
culturalAchievements.en: Mossi mask-carving tradition, oral dynastic histories, Naba court ceremonial system

languageFamily.zh: 莫雷语（古尔语支）为主要语言，法语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Mooré (Gur branch) as major language, French as colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 莫西王权神圣观与祖先崇拜哲学
philosophy.en: Mossi sacred kingship concept and ancestor veneration philosophy

writingSystem.zh: 莫雷语以口述为主，法语拉丁字母为官方文字
writingSystem.en: Mooré primarily oral, French Latin script as official writing

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 自给农业为主的内陆经济，贸易有限，殖民开发尚处初级阶段
gdpDescription.en: Inland economy dominated by subsistence agriculture, limited trade, colonial development still in early stages

mainIndustries.zh: 粟、高粱种植，牲畜饲养，手工棉纺织，乳木果采集
mainIndustries.en: Millet and sorghum cultivation, livestock herding, artisanal cotton weaving, shea nut collection

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：牲畜、乳木果油、棉布；进口：盐、科拉果、金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Exports: livestock, shea butter, cotton cloth; Imports: salt, kola nuts, metalware

householdWealth.zh: 以牲畜、粮食储备和家族土地为主要财富形式
householdWealth.en: Livestock, grain reserves, and family land as primary wealth forms

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 传统自给农业为基础，法国殖民经济开始引入强制劳役与现金作物要求
economicSystem.en: Traditional subsistence agriculture as base, French colonial economy beginning to introduce forced labor and cash-crop requirements

description.zh: 法国军官指挥的非洲步兵，维持殖民秩序
description.en: African infantry under French officers maintaining colonial order

description.zh: 纳巴宫廷保留的传统卫队，已无实际军事功能
description.en: Traditional guard retained by the Naba court, no longer functionally military

commanderInChief.zh: 法国行政区长官兼军事指挥
commanderInChief.en: French Commandant de Cercle as military commander

technology.zh: 法制步枪为殖民驻军装备，本地武士仍使用传统弓矛
technology.en: French rifles for colonial garrison, local warriors still using traditional bows and spears

threats.zh: 周边萨赫勒地区的零星抵抗，法国对劳役征发引起的社会不满
threats.en: Sporadic resistance in the surrounding Sahel, social discontent caused by French labor conscription

populationDescription.zh: 莫西族为主体，另有古隆西、博博、洛比等族群
populationDescription.en: Mossi as majority, with Gurunsi, Bobo, Lobi, and other ethnic groups

description.zh: 莫西王族与贵族，保留社会声望与仪式性权力
description.en: Mossi royals and nobles retaining social prestige and ceremonial power

description.zh: 从事粟、高粱种植的广大自耕农
description.en: Broad owner-cultivators engaged in millet and sorghum farming

description.zh: 铁匠、纺织工、长途贸易商
description.en: Blacksmiths, weavers, and long-distance traders

allies.zh: 法属西非联邦框架下与周边法属殖民地联系
allies.en: Linked to neighboring French colonies within the French West Africa federation framework

enemies.zh: 无正式敌对关系，但法国征服记忆犹新
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but memory of French conquest still fresh

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交，由法国殖民当局统一管理
foreignPolicy.en: No independent diplomacy; managed by French colonial authorities

era.zh: 前工业时代（殖民初期）

keyInnovations.zh: 传统冶铁技术延续，法国开始引入道路建设与邮政通信
keyInnovations.en: Continuation of traditional iron-smelting, France beginning road construction and postal communications

strengths.zh: 莫西社会凝聚力强，纳巴制度提供稳定治理框架，自给经济基本满足生存需求
strengths.en: Strong Mossi social cohesion, Naba system providing stable governance framework, subsistence economy meeting basic survival needs

weaknesses.zh: 殖民统治剥夺政治自主权，强制劳役加重人民负担，内陆位置限制贸易发展
weaknesses.en: Colonial rule depriving political autonomy, forced labor increasing popular burdens, inland location limiting trade development

outlook.zh: 将被更深整合入法属西非殖民经济体系，传统权威继续仪式性存在
outlook.en: To be more deeply integrated into the French West African colonial economic system, traditional authority continuing in ceremonial form

description.zh: 1896-97年被法国征服的莫西诸邦，莫格·纳巴保留仪式性权威但实权归法国殖民官员，内陆自给经济开始受殖民体制冲击。
description.en: Mossi States conquered by France in 1896-97; the Mogho Naba retained ceremonial authority but real power belonged to French colonial officials; the inland subsistence economy was beginning to be disrupted by the colonial system.

governmentForm.zh: 法国直辖殖民地，总督对巴黎殖民部负责，内陆征服仍在进行中
governmentForm.en: French direct-rule colony; governor answerable to Paris Ministry of Colonies; inland conquest still ongoing

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民官员与商人控制沿海，内陆多族群社会结构基本保留，贝特族、巴乌莱族、塞努福族各有传统领导体制
socialStructure.en: French officials and merchants controlling the coast; inland multi-ethnic social structures largely preserved; Bété, Baoulé, Senufo each with traditional leadership systems

rulingClass.zh: 法国殖民行政官员、沿海贸易商行
rulingClass.en: French colonial administrators, coastal trading houses

succession.zh: 总督由法国殖民部任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by the French Ministry of Colonies

structure.zh: 殖民总督为最高行政长官，沿海地区行政完善，内陆仍以军事管制为主，部分地区尚未有效占领
structure.en: Colonial governor as chief executive; coastal administration well-established, interior still under military governance, some areas not yet effectively occupied

function.zh: 殖民行政总管与对巴黎汇报
function.en: Colonial administrative oversight and reporting to Paris

function.zh: 管理沿海贸易与关税征收
function.en: Managing coastal trade and customs collection

localAdmin.zh: 沿海行政区与内陆军事区并行，大量地区仍在'平定'进程中
localAdmin.en: Coastal administrative zones and inland military zones in parallel; many areas still in 'pacification' process

legalSystem.zh: 法国殖民法适用于欧洲人与沿海居民，内陆部分适用本地习惯法
legalSystem.en: French colonial law applied to Europeans and coastal residents; inland areas partially under local customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 沿海关税与贸易税为主，内陆人头税征收困难
taxationSystem.en: Coastal customs and trade taxes as primary revenue; inland head tax collection difficult

religion.zh: 多种本地传统信仰（万物有灵论）、天主教传教活动开始、北部伊斯兰教
religion.en: Various local traditional beliefs (animism), Catholic missionary activity beginning, Islam in the north

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴乌莱金饰工艺、塞努福木雕、丹族面具艺术、多元口述文学传统
culturalAchievements.en: Baoulé goldwork, Senufo woodcarving, Dan mask art, diverse oral literature traditions

languageFamily.zh: 迪乌拉语（曼德语支）为商业通用语，巴乌莱语、贝特语等为地方语言，法语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Dioula (Mande branch) as commercial lingua franca, Baoulé, Bété etc. as local languages, French as official language

philosophy.zh: 各族群本土宇宙观与祖先崇拜体系
philosophy.en: Indigenous cosmologies and ancestor veneration systems of various ethnic groups

writingSystem.zh: 法语拉丁字母为官方文字，本地语言口述为主，北部使用阿拉伯字母
writingSystem.en: French Latin script as official writing, local languages primarily oral, Arabic script used in the north

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以象牙、橡胶、棕榈产品出口为支柱的沿海殖民经济，内陆经济仍以自给农业为主
gdpDescription.en: Coastal colonial economy built on ivory, rubber, and palm product exports; inland economy still primarily subsistence agriculture

mainIndustries.zh: 象牙贸易、野生橡胶采集、棕榈油加工、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Ivory trade, wild rubber collection, palm oil processing, subsistence farming

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：象牙、橡胶、棕榈油、木材；进口：棉布、酒类、金属制品、火器
tradeGoods.en: Exports: ivory, rubber, palm oil, timber; Imports: cotton cloth, spirits, metalware, firearms

householdWealth.zh: 沿海商业人口有一定积累，内陆农户以土地与牲畜为主要财产
householdWealth.en: Coastal commercial population with some accumulation; inland households with land and livestock as main assets

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 沿海殖民出口经济，内陆传统自给经济，法国商行主导对外贸易
economicSystem.en: Coastal colonial export economy, inland traditional subsistence economy, French trading houses dominating foreign trade

description.zh: 法国军官指挥的非洲步兵，负责内陆'平定'与殖民秩序维持
description.en: African infantry under French officers for inland 'pacification' and colonial order maintenance

description.zh: 沿海港口与城镇治安
description.en: Coastal port and town security

commanderInChief.zh: 殖民地军区指挥官

technology.zh: 法制步枪与山炮，适用于丛林作战的轻装备
technology.en: French rifles and mountain guns, light equipment suited for jungle warfare

threats.zh: 内陆未征服地区的武装抵抗，巴乌莱族反抗运动（将持续至1911年）
threats.en: Armed resistance in unconquered inland areas, Baoulé resistance movement (to continue until 1911)

populationDescription.zh: 超过60个族群，主要包括巴乌莱、贝特、塞努福、迪乌拉等
populationDescription.en: Over 60 ethnic groups, mainly including Baoulé, Bété, Senufo, Dioula, and others

description.zh: 殖民官员与商人
description.en: Colonial officials and merchants

description.zh: 迪乌拉商人网络与各族传统领袖
description.en: Dioula merchant networks and traditional leaders of various ethnic groups

description.zh: 从事自给农业与森林产品采集的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace engaged in subsistence farming and forest product collection

allies.zh: 法属西非联邦成员，与法属几内亚、法属苏丹联系
allies.en: Member of French West Africa federation, linked with French Guinea and French Sudan

enemies.zh: 内陆抵抗势力，尤其是巴乌莱族和北部部分群体
enemies.en: Inland resistance forces, particularly the Baoulé and some northern groups

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交，由法国殖民部管理
foreignPolicy.en: No independent diplomacy; managed by the French Ministry of Colonies

era.zh: 殖民初期

keyInnovations.zh: 法国引入沿海港口设施与电报线路，内陆仍以传统技术为主
keyInnovations.en: French-introduced coastal port facilities and telegraph lines; interior still relying on traditional technology

strengths.zh: 丰富的森林资源与象牙储备，沿海贸易通道
strengths.en: Rich forest resources and ivory reserves, coastal trade access

weaknesses.zh: 内陆征服尚未完成，基础设施极度匮乏，殖民统治根基薄弱
weaknesses.en: Inland conquest not yet complete, extreme infrastructure deficit, weak colonial governance foundations

outlook.zh: 法国将继续内陆'平定'战争，殖民经济将逐步从象牙转向种植园经济
outlook.en: France to continue inland 'pacification' wars; colonial economy to gradually shift from ivory to plantation agriculture

description.zh: 1893年建立的法国殖民地，1900年时沿海地区已在法国控制下但内陆征服仍在进行，巴乌莱等族群持续武装抵抗。
description.en: French colony established in 1893; by 1900 the coastal zone was under French control but inland conquest was still ongoing, with armed resistance continuing from the Baoulé and other groups.

ruler.zh: 西博尔古：法国行政官；东博尔古：英国驻扎官；传统统治者基日王（Kisra）保留仪式权力
ruler.en: West Borgu: French administrator; East Borgu: British Resident; traditional ruler Kisra retaining ceremonial power

rulerTitle.zh: 法国区长 / 英国驻扎官 / 博尔古传统王
rulerTitle.en: French Commandant / British Resident / Traditional Borgu King

dynasty.zh: 瓦索伊-基斯拉王朝（仪式性延续）

capital.zh: 尼基（西博尔古）/ 布萨（东博尔古）

governmentForm.zh: 1898年英法协定将博尔古一分为二，东部归英国保护，西部归法国管辖，传统政治结构在殖民叠加下维持
governmentForm.en: 1898 Anglo-French Convention split Borgu in two; east under British protection, west under French jurisdiction; traditional political structures maintained under colonial overlay

socialStructure.zh: 殖民官员居于顶层，巴塔努/瓦苏贵族保留社会声望，巴里巴农民为主体
socialStructure.en: Colonial officials at the top, Batonu/Wasangari nobility retaining social prestige, Bariba farmers as majority

rulingClass.zh: 英法殖民官员与传统巴里巴贵族
rulingClass.en: Anglo-French colonial officials and traditional Bariba nobility

succession.zh: 传统王位继承制在殖民监督下延续
succession.en: Traditional royal succession continuing under colonial supervision

structure.zh: 西博尔古纳入法属达荷美行政体系，东博尔古归英属北尼日利亚保护国管辖，各自保留本地酋长体制
structure.en: West Borgu incorporated into French Dahomey administrative system, East Borgu under British Northern Nigeria Protectorate, each retaining local chieftaincy systems

function.zh: 殖民行政管理与本地事务监督
function.en: Colonial administration and local affairs oversight

localAdmin.zh: 传统酋长在殖民监督下处理地方事务
localAdmin.en: Traditional chiefs handling local affairs under colonial supervision

legalSystem.zh: 殖民法与巴里巴习惯法并行
legalSystem.en: Colonial law and Bariba customary law in parallel

taxationSystem.zh: 法区征收人头税，英区征收贡赋
taxationSystem.en: French zone levying head tax, British zone collecting tribute

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教与巴里巴传统信仰并存
religion.en: Islam and Bariba traditional religion coexisting

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴里巴骑术传统、嘎尼节（Gaani）庆典、口述史诗
culturalAchievements.en: Bariba equestrian tradition, Gaani festival celebrations, oral epics

languageFamily.zh: 巴里巴语（古尔语支）为主要语言
languageFamily.en: Bariba (Gur branch) as major language

philosophy.zh: 巴里巴武士贵族伦理与伊斯兰教义融合
philosophy.en: Bariba warrior-aristocratic ethics blended with Islamic teachings

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母用于伊斯兰教育，法/英语拉丁字母为殖民行政文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script for Islamic education, French/English Latin script for colonial administration

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以自给农牧业为基础的内陆经济，跨撒哈拉贸易中转功能因殖民分割而削弱
gdpDescription.en: Inland economy based on subsistence agro-pastoralism; trans-Saharan trade transit function weakened by colonial partition

mainIndustries.zh: 粟、高粱种植，畜牧，手工纺织
mainIndustries.en: Millet and sorghum cultivation, pastoralism, artisanal weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：牲畜、棉花；进口：盐、科拉果、金属器具
tradeGoods.en: Exports: livestock, cotton; Imports: salt, kola nuts, metal tools

householdWealth.zh: 牲畜与土地为主要家庭财产
householdWealth.en: Livestock and land as primary household wealth

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 传统自给经济为主，殖民贸易体系开始渗透
economicSystem.en: Traditional subsistence economy as base, colonial trade system beginning to penetrate

description.zh: 少量殖民兵力与巴里巴传统骑士
description.en: Small colonial forces and Bariba traditional cavalrymen

commanderInChief.zh: 殖民区长/驻扎官

technology.zh: 殖民步枪与传统骑兵武器并存
technology.en: Colonial rifles and traditional cavalry weapons coexisting

threats.zh: 英法分治造成的地方不稳定，周边游牧群体袭扰
threats.en: Local instability caused by Anglo-French partition, raids from surrounding nomadic groups

populationDescription.zh: 巴里巴族为主体，另有富拉尼、登迪等族群
populationDescription.en: Bariba as majority, with Fulani, Dendi, and other ethnic groups

description.zh: 巴里巴统治家族与武士贵族
description.en: Bariba ruling families and warrior aristocracy

description.zh: 从事农牧业的广大平民
description.en: Broad commoners engaged in farming and herding

allies.zh: 东博尔古与英属北尼日利亚，西博尔古与法属达荷美关联
allies.en: East Borgu linked to British Northern Nigeria, West Borgu to French Dahomey

enemies.zh: 无正式敌对关系
enemies.en: No formal enemies

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交，分属英法殖民体系
foreignPolicy.en: No independent diplomacy; divided between British and French colonial systems

era.zh: 前工业时代

keyInnovations.zh: 传统冶铁与骑术，殖民影响尚浅
keyInnovations.en: Traditional iron-smelting and horsemanship; colonial influence still shallow

strengths.zh: 巴里巴骑士传统维系社会凝聚力，跨区域贸易网络残存
strengths.en: Bariba cavalry tradition maintaining social cohesion, remnants of cross-regional trade networks

weaknesses.zh: 英法分割破坏了博尔古政治统一，经济边缘化加剧
weaknesses.en: Anglo-French partition destroying Borgu's political unity, increasing economic marginalization

outlook.zh: 将分别融入英法殖民行政体系，传统政治实体逐步消解
outlook.en: To be separately absorbed into British and French colonial systems, traditional polity gradually dissolving

description.zh: 1898年英法协定将博尔古诸邦一分为二，巴里巴传统政治结构在殖民分治下维持仪式性存在。
description.en: The 1898 Anglo-French Convention split the Borgu States in two; Bariba traditional political structures maintained ceremonial existence under colonial partition.

name.zh: 拉比赫·祖拜尔军事政权

governmentForm.zh: 军事独裁政权，拉比赫以武力推翻博尔努谢胡后自立统治，依靠奴隶兵和火器维持权力
governmentForm.en: Military dictatorship; Rabih overthrew the Bornu Shehu by force and ruled through slave soldiers and firearms

socialStructure.zh: 拉比赫的巴津格尔（奴隶兵）军团居于权力核心，原博尔努贵族被边缘化，商人与农民受军事掠夺之苦
socialStructure.en: Rabih's bazinger (slave soldiers) at the power core, original Bornu nobility marginalized, merchants and farmers suffering from military predation

rulingClass.zh: 拉比赫及其巴津格尔军事集团
rulingClass.en: Rabih and his bazinger military clique

succession.zh: 军事强人统治，无明确继承制度，拉比赫之子法德勒拉赫为可能继承人
succession.en: Strongman rule without clear succession; Rabih's son Fadlallah as potential successor

structure.zh: 拉比赫实行军事专制，通过军事首领管理各地区，原博尔努行政体系部分被保留但服从军事指挥
structure.en: Rabih exercising military autocracy through military chiefs governing regions; original Bornu administrative system partially retained but subordinated to military command

function.zh: 军事作战指挥、奴隶兵征募与武器管理
function.en: Military operations command, slave-soldier recruitment, and arms management

function.zh: 征收贡赋与粮食供应
function.en: Tribute collection and food supply

localAdmin.zh: 军事首领分管各区，依靠强制手段维持统治
localAdmin.en: Military chiefs governing districts through coercive means

legalSystem.zh: 军事法与伊斯兰法混合，拉比赫个人意志为最终裁决
legalSystem.en: Mix of military law and Islamic law; Rabih's personal will as final arbiter

taxationSystem.zh: 强制贡赋与掠夺并行，对商队征收通行费
taxationSystem.en: Forced tribute and pillage in parallel; transit fees levied on caravans

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（马利基学派），拉比赫以圣战名义合法化统治
religion.en: Islam (Maliki school); Rabih legitimizing rule in the name of jihad

culturalAchievements.zh: 博尔努千年伊斯兰学术传统在战乱中衰退，卡努里语口述文学延续
culturalAchievements.en: Bornu's millennium-old Islamic scholarly tradition declining amid warfare; Kanuri oral literature continuing

languageFamily.zh: 卡努里语为主要语言，阿拉伯语为宗教与行政语言
languageFamily.en: Kanuri as major language, Arabic as religious and administrative language

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰教义与博尔努传统政治思想，拉比赫的圣战意识形态
philosophy.en: Islamic doctrine and Bornu traditional political thought; Rabih's jihad ideology

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母书写卡努里语和阿拉伯语
