writingSystem.en: Arabic script for writing Kanuri and Arabic

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 因拉比赫军事统治导致经济严重萎缩，商路被破坏，农业生产下降
gdpDescription.en: Economy severely contracted due to Rabih's military rule; trade routes disrupted, agricultural production declining

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业（粟、高粱）、畜牧、残余的乍得湖渔业、奴隶贸易（衰落中）
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence farming (millet, sorghum), pastoralism, remnant Lake Chad fisheries, slave trade (declining)

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：牲畜、兽皮、乳木果；进口：火器、弹药、布匹
tradeGoods.en: Exports: livestock, hides, shea nuts; Imports: firearms, ammunition, cloth

name.zh: 马利亚·特蕾莎银元与贝壳

householdWealth.zh: 战乱导致普通民众财产损失严重，大量人口流离失所
householdWealth.en: Warfare causing severe property losses among common people; large displaced populations

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 军事掠夺经济叠加传统农牧业，商路因战争中断
economicSystem.en: Military predatory economy overlaid on traditional agro-pastoralism; trade routes disrupted by war

description.zh: 拉比赫的核心武装力量，配备步枪与火炮
description.en: Rabih's core armed force equipped with rifles and artillery

description.zh: 配备长矛与火枪的骑兵
description.en: Cavalry armed with lances and muskets

description.zh: 操作缴获和购买的火炮
description.en: Operating captured and purchased artillery pieces

commanderInChief.zh: 拉比赫·祖拜尔亲自统帅

technology.zh: 步枪、火炮（多为缴获品与从苏丹走私），设防城寨
technology.en: Rifles, artillery (mostly captured or smuggled from Sudan), fortified encampments

threats.zh: 法国远征军从三个方向逼近（三支纵队即将于1900年4月会师），英国从南部施压
threats.en: French expeditionary forces approaching from three directions (three columns to converge in April 1900), British pressure from the south

populationDescription.zh: 卡努里族为主体，另有阿拉伯人、富拉尼人、豪萨人；拉比赫军队中有大量来自尼罗河流域的士兵
populationDescription.en: Kanuri as majority, with Arabs, Fulani, Hausa; Rabih's army containing many soldiers from the Nile valley

description.zh: 拉比赫及其军事首领，掌控政治与军事权力
description.en: Rabih and his military chiefs controlling political and military power

description.zh: 被边缘化的前统治阶层
description.en: Marginalized former ruling class

description.zh: 受战乱之苦的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace suffering from warfare

allies.zh: 几无外交盟友，试图从苏丹和利比亚获取武器供应
allies.en: Virtually no diplomatic allies; attempting to obtain arms supply from Sudan and Libya

enemies.zh: 法国三路远征军（即将进攻）、英属北尼日利亚、流亡中的博尔努谢胡
enemies.en: French three-column expedition (about to attack), British Northern Nigeria, exiled Bornu Shehu

foreignPolicy.zh: 孤立状态，拉比赫试图通过外交拖延法国进攻但未能成功
foreignPolicy.en: Isolated state; Rabih attempted to delay French attack through diplomacy but failed

era.zh: 火器时代（后装枪与火炮）

keyInnovations.zh: 拉比赫军队装备后装步枪与火炮，建造设防土城（tata）
keyInnovations.en: Rabih's army equipped with breech-loading rifles and artillery; construction of fortified earth encampments (tata)

strengths.zh: 拉比赫拥有萨赫勒地区最强大的本土军事力量，配备现代火器
strengths.en: Rabih possessing the most powerful indigenous military force in the Sahel, equipped with modern firearms

weaknesses.zh: 四面受敌，法国三路合围在即，民心离散，经济因长年战争而崩溃
weaknesses.en: Encircled on all sides, French three-column convergence imminent, popular support lost, economy collapsed from years of war

outlook.zh: 1900年4月法国将在库塞里战役击败拉比赫，博尔努将成为法属乍得的一部分
outlook.en: France will defeat Rabih at the Battle of Kousséri in April 1900; Bornu will become part of French Chad

description.zh: 军阀拉比赫·祖拜尔在1893年征服博尔努后建立的军事政权，依靠奴隶兵和火器统治，1900年初法国三路远征军正在合围，拉比赫将于同年4月被击杀。
description.en: Military regime established by warlord Rabih az-Zubayr after conquering Bornu in 1893, ruling through slave soldiers and firearms; by early 1900, three French expeditionary columns were converging, and Rabih would be killed in April of that year.

name.zh: 法属几内亚保护地·富塔贾隆

ruler.zh: 阿尔马米·布巴卡尔·比罗（法国扶植）；法国驻扎官掌实权
ruler.en: Almami Bokar Biro (French-installed); French Resident holding real power

rulerTitle.zh: 阿尔马米（名义）/ 法国驻扎官

dynasty.zh: 富塔贾隆伊玛目国阿尔马米家族（仪式性）

governmentForm.zh: 法国殖民保护地，原伊玛目国的双阿尔马米轮换制被废除，法国扶植傀儡阿尔马米
governmentForm.en: French colonial protectorate; the original Imamate's dual Almami rotation system abolished, France installing puppet Almami

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民官员为最高权力层，富拉尼贵族（传统领主）保留社会地位，大量前奴隶和附庸农民构成社会基础
socialStructure.en: French colonial officials as highest power layer; Fulani nobility (traditional lords) retaining social status; large population of former slaves and dependent farmers forming the social base

rulingClass.zh: 法国殖民行政官员与被保留的富拉尼贵族
rulingClass.en: French colonial administrators and retained Fulani nobility

succession.zh: 阿尔马米由法国当局选定和任命
succession.en: Almami selected and appointed by French authorities

structure.zh: 法国驻扎官监督全局，原伊玛目国的省（diwal）制度被保留但省长需法国认可
structure.en: French Resident overseeing the whole; the Imamate's original provincial (diwal) system retained but provincial chiefs requiring French approval

function.zh: 殖民行政监督与税收管理
function.en: Colonial administrative oversight and tax management

function.zh: 传统仪式、宗教事务与地方纠纷调解
function.en: Traditional ceremonies, religious affairs, and local dispute mediation

localAdmin.zh: 省（diwal）-地区（missidi）两级体制在殖民监督下运作
localAdmin.en: Provincial (diwal) and district (missidi) two-tier system operating under colonial supervision

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰法（沙里亚）在地方事务中继续适用，重大事务由法国法庭裁决
legalSystem.en: Islamic law (Sharia) continuing for local affairs; major matters adjudicated by French courts

taxationSystem.zh: 法国人头税取代传统贡赋体系
taxationSystem.en: French head tax replacing the traditional tribute system

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（蒂贾尼苏菲教团为主），富塔贾隆为西非重要伊斯兰学术中心
religion.en: Islam (Tijaniyya Sufi order predominant); Futa Jallon as a major West African Islamic scholarly center

culturalAchievements.zh: 普拉尔语伊斯兰诗歌传统、富拉尼口述史诗、伊斯兰经学院（madrasa）网络
culturalAchievements.en: Pulaar Islamic poetry tradition, Fulani oral epics, Islamic madrasa network

languageFamily.zh: 普拉尔语（富拉语）为主要语言，阿拉伯语为宗教学术语言，法语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Pulaar (Fula) as major language, Arabic as religious-scholarly language, French as colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰改革主义与苏菲神秘主义传统
philosophy.en: Islamic reformism and Sufi mystical traditions

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母书写普拉尔语（阿贾米文字），阿拉伯语用于宗教文献
writingSystem.en: Arabic script for writing Pulaar (Ajami script), Arabic for religious texts

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧业和农业为基础的高原经济，长途贸易传统被殖民经济改造
gdpDescription.en: Highland economy based on pastoralism and agriculture; long-distance trade tradition being reshaped by colonial economy

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧（牛群为核心财富）、稻米与粟种植、手工皮革加工、长途贸易
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism (cattle as core wealth), rice and millet cultivation, artisanal leather processing, long-distance trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：牲畜、兽皮、黄金、蜂蜡；进口：盐、棉布、金属器具
tradeGoods.en: Exports: livestock, hides, gold, beeswax; Imports: salt, cotton cloth, metal tools

name.zh: 法属西非法郎与传统铁条货币
name.en: French West African franc and traditional iron-bar currency

householdWealth.zh: 富拉尼贵族以牛群为主要财富，普通农户拥有少量土地与牲畜
householdWealth.en: Fulani nobility with cattle herds as main wealth; ordinary farmers holding small plots and some livestock

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 传统畜牧农业经济叠加殖民贸易体制，强制劳役开始引入
economicSystem.en: Traditional pastoral-agricultural economy overlaid with colonial trade system; forced labor beginning to be introduced

description.zh: 法国军官指挥的非洲步兵驻扎要地
description.en: African infantry under French officers garrisoning key positions

description.zh: 协助殖民当局维持治安的本地武装
description.en: Local armed forces assisting colonial authorities in maintaining order

commanderInChief.zh: 法国驻扎官兼军事指挥
commanderInChief.en: French Resident doubling as military commander

technology.zh: 法制步枪为殖民驻军装备，本地武装仍使用传统武器
technology.en: French rifles for colonial garrison; local forces still using traditional weapons

threats.zh: 反法起义余波，奴隶解放引起的社会动荡
threats.en: Aftermath of anti-French uprisings, social upheaval caused by slave emancipation

populationDescription.zh: 富拉尼族为主体，另有贾隆凯、苏苏等族群及大量前奴隶后裔
populationDescription.en: Fulani as majority, with Jalonke, Susu, and other groups plus large former slave-descendant populations

description.zh: 传统土地与牲畜所有者，伊斯兰学者家族
description.en: Traditional landowners and cattle proprietors, Islamic scholarly families

description.zh: 自耕农与小型畜牧者
description.en: Owner-cultivators and small-scale pastoralists

description.zh: 法国名义上解放的前奴隶，实际上仍受经济与社会束缚
description.en: Former slaves nominally freed by France but still bound by economic and social constraints

allies.zh: 法属西非联邦框架下与法属塞内加尔、法属苏丹联系
allies.en: Linked to French Senegal and French Sudan within the French West Africa federation framework

enemies.zh: 反法抵抗已基本平息
enemies.en: Anti-French resistance largely suppressed

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交权，由法国殖民当局管理
foreignPolicy.en: No independent diplomacy; managed by French colonial authorities

era.zh: 前工业时代（殖民初期）

keyInnovations.zh: 传统冶铁与皮革工艺，法国开始引入道路与邮政
keyInnovations.en: Traditional iron-smelting and leatherwork; France beginning to introduce roads and postal services

strengths.zh: 伊斯兰学术传统深厚，畜牧业经济基础稳固，社会凝聚力较强
strengths.en: Deep Islamic scholarly tradition, solid pastoral economic base, relatively strong social cohesion

weaknesses.zh: 殖民征服后政治自主权丧失，奴隶制废除引起社会结构震荡，经济被殖民体制重塑
weaknesses.en: Political autonomy lost after colonial conquest, slave abolition causing social structural upheaval, economy being reshaped by colonial system

outlook.zh: 将被深度整合入法属几内亚殖民经济体系，传统伊玛目国体制逐步消解
outlook.en: To be deeply integrated into the French Guinea colonial economic system; traditional Imamate structure gradually dissolving

description.zh: 1896年法国完成征服的富塔贾隆伊玛目国，传统双阿尔马米轮换制被废除，法国扶植傀儡统治者，深厚的伊斯兰学术传统在殖民体制下维持。
description.en: The Futa Jallon Imamate, whose French conquest was completed in 1896; the traditional dual-Almami rotation system was abolished, France installed puppet rulers, and the deep Islamic scholarly tradition was maintained under the colonial system.

name.zh: 达马加拉姆苏丹国（津德尔）

ruler.zh: 苏丹阿马杜·库兰达加（被法国废黜后流放）
ruler.en: Sultan Amadou Kourandaga (deposed and exiled by France)

rulerTitle.zh: 苏丹（已被废黜）/ 法国军事指挥官代管

governmentForm.zh: 1899年被法国征服后处于军事占领状态，苏丹被废黜，法国军官临时管理
governmentForm.en: Under military occupation after French conquest in 1899; sultan deposed, French military officers administering temporarily

socialStructure.zh: 法国军事占领者控制局势，原苏丹宫廷被解散，豪萨商人与农民维持日常经济活动
socialStructure.en: French military occupiers controlling the situation; original sultan's court dissolved; Hausa merchants and farmers maintaining daily economic activities

rulingClass.zh: 法国军事官员
rulingClass.en: French military officers

succession.zh: 苏丹制中断，法国军政过渡期
succession.en: Sultanate succession interrupted; French military administration in transition

structure.zh: 法国军事管制，原苏丹行政体系被打散，法国军官直接管理城市与周边地区
structure.en: French military governance; original sultan's administrative system dismantled; French officers directly managing the city and surrounding areas

function.zh: 军事占领管理与治安维持
function.en: Military occupation management and security maintenance

localAdmin.zh: 法国军事直管，部分利用原有地方首领
localAdmin.en: Direct French military administration, partially utilizing existing local leaders

legalSystem.zh: 军事管制法为主，伊斯兰法在地方民事事务中继续适用
legalSystem.en: Martial law as primary; Islamic law continuing for local civil affairs

taxationSystem.zh: 征服初期税收体系混乱，法国开始引入人头税
taxationSystem.en: Tax system chaotic in early conquest period; France beginning to introduce head tax

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（马利基学派），津德尔为跨撒哈拉伊斯兰学术网络节点
religion.en: Islam (Maliki school); Zinder as a node in the trans-Saharan Islamic scholarly network

culturalAchievements.zh: 豪萨建筑传统、皮革与染布工艺、伊斯兰手稿抄写传统
culturalAchievements.en: Hausa architectural tradition, leather and cloth-dyeing craftsmanship, Islamic manuscript-copying tradition

languageFamily.zh: 豪萨语为主要语言，阿拉伯语为宗教语言，法语开始引入
languageFamily.en: Hausa as major language, Arabic as religious language, French being introduced

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰教义与豪萨传统政治思想
philosophy.en: Islamic doctrine and Hausa traditional political thought

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母书写豪萨语（阿贾米）与阿拉伯语
writingSystem.en: Arabic script for writing Hausa (Ajami) and Arabic

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽城市，以商业和手工业见长，征服导致经济活动受干扰
gdpDescription.en: Trans-Saharan trade hub city, noted for commerce and handicrafts; conquest disrupting economic activities

mainIndustries.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易中转、皮革加工、靛蓝染布、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Trans-Saharan trade transit, leather processing, indigo dyeing, subsistence farming

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：皮革制品、靛蓝染布、牲畜；进口：盐、北非商品、欧洲制造品
tradeGoods.en: Exports: leather goods, indigo cloth, livestock; Imports: salt, North African goods, European manufactures

name.zh: 马利亚·特蕾莎银元与贝壳

householdWealth.zh: 津德尔商人有可观积累，农村家庭以土地和牲畜为主要财产
householdWealth.en: Zinder merchants with considerable accumulation; rural households with land and livestock as main assets

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易商业经济与自给农业并存，法国征服导致贸易中断
economicSystem.en: Trans-Saharan commercial economy coexisting with subsistence farming; French conquest causing trade disruption

description.zh: 征服后留驻的法国殖民步兵
description.en: French colonial infantry garrisoned after conquest

description.zh: 本地人组成的辅助警卫
description.en: Auxiliary guards composed of local recruits

commanderInChief.zh: 法国驻军指挥官

technology.zh: 法制步枪，苏丹国原有武器被收缴
technology.en: French rifles; sultanate's original weapons confiscated

threats.zh: 地方不满情绪，图阿雷格游牧民袭扰
threats.en: Local discontent, Tuareg nomad raids

populationDescription.zh: 豪萨族为主体，另有图阿雷格、富拉尼等族群
populationDescription.en: Hausa as majority, with Tuareg, Fulani, and other ethnic groups

description.zh: 从事跨撒哈拉贸易的豪萨商人
description.en: Hausa merchants engaged in trans-Saharan trade

description.zh: 皮革工、染工、铁匠等
description.en: Leatherworkers, dyers, blacksmiths, etc.

description.zh: 从事粟、高粱种植与牲畜饲养的民众
description.en: People engaged in millet and sorghum cultivation and livestock herding

allies.zh: 被法国征服，无独立外交
allies.en: Conquered by France; no independent diplomacy

enemies.zh: 法国占领者（从当地视角）
enemies.en: French occupiers (from local perspective)

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交能力，由法国军事当局管理
foreignPolicy.en: No independent diplomatic capability; managed by French military authorities

era.zh: 前工业贸易城市

keyInnovations.zh: 豪萨传统建筑与冶金技术，跨撒哈拉商路信息网络
keyInnovations.en: Hausa traditional architecture and metallurgy, trans-Saharan trade route information networks

strengths.zh: 津德尔作为贸易枢纽的地理优势，豪萨商人网络的韧性
strengths.en: Zinder's geographic advantage as a trade hub, resilience of Hausa merchant networks

weaknesses.zh: 刚被征服的社会创伤，政治权力完全丧失，贸易网络被殖民边界割裂
weaknesses.en: Social trauma of recent conquest, complete loss of political power, trade networks severed by colonial boundaries

outlook.zh: 将成为法属尼日尔军事领地的一部分，津德尔暂时作为法国在尼日尔的行政中心
outlook.en: To become part of the French Military Territory of Niger; Zinder temporarily serving as France's administrative center in Niger

description.zh: 1899年被法国征服的豪萨城邦，跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽，苏丹被废黜流放，正处于法国军事管制向殖民行政过渡期。
description.en: Hausa city-state conquered by France in 1899; a trans-Saharan trade hub, sultan deposed and exiled; in transition from French military rule to colonial administration.

name.zh: 法属中刚果·泰凯保护地

ruler.zh: 马科科·伊卢一世（名义）；法国特许公司与行政官掌实权
ruler.en: Makoko Iloo I (nominal); French concessionary companies and administrators holding real power

rulerTitle.zh: 马科科（泰凯王，名义）/ 法属中刚果行政长官
rulerTitle.en: Makoko (Teke King, nominal) / French Middle Congo Administrator

dynasty.zh: 泰凯马科科王朝（仪式性延续）

governmentForm.zh: 法属赤道非洲殖民地框架下，大部分领土以特许公司制（concession）经营，马科科保留仪式性地位
governmentForm.en: Within French Equatorial Africa colonial framework; most territory operated under concessionary company system; Makoko retaining ceremonial status

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民官员与特许公司管理层在顶层，泰凯传统酋长为中间人，广大泰凯与姆博希农民受特许公司强制劳役压迫
socialStructure.en: French officials and concessionary company managers at top; Teke traditional chiefs as intermediaries; broad Teke and Mbochi peasantry oppressed by concessionary company forced labor

rulingClass.zh: 法国特许公司经理与殖民行政官员
rulingClass.en: French concessionary company managers and colonial administrators

succession.zh: 马科科按泰凯传统继承但需法国认可
succession.en: Makoko succeeding by Teke tradition but requiring French recognition

structure.zh: 法属赤道非洲总督统辖，中刚果殖民地行政官管理日常事务，大片领土被授予私人特许公司开发
structure.en: Under French Equatorial Africa Governor-General; Middle Congo colonial administrator managing daily affairs; vast territories granted to private concessionary companies for exploitation

function.zh: 殖民行政管理与特许公司监督
function.en: Colonial administration and concessionary company oversight

function.zh: 橡胶与象牙采集组织、强制劳役管理
function.en: Organization of rubber and ivory collection, forced labor management

localAdmin.zh: 特许公司代替政府行使大部分地方管理职能
localAdmin.en: Concessionary companies exercising most local administrative functions in place of government

legalSystem.zh: 法国殖民法名义上适用，实际上特许公司在其领地内自行执法
legalSystem.en: French colonial law nominally applicable; in practice concessionary companies enforcing their own rules within their territories

taxationSystem.zh: 强制橡胶采集配额实质上替代了货币税收
taxationSystem.en: Forced rubber collection quotas effectively replacing monetary taxation

religion.zh: 泰凯传统信仰（恩基拉精灵崇拜）为主，天主教传教活动在布拉柴维尔周边开始
religion.en: Teke traditional religion (Nkira spirit worship) predominant; Catholic missionary activity beginning around Brazzaville

culturalAchievements.zh: 泰凯面具与权力雕像（毕铁基）传统，口述历史与仪式音乐
culturalAchievements.en: Teke mask and power figure (biteki) tradition, oral histories and ritual music

languageFamily.zh: 泰凯语（班图语支）为主，林加拉语作为河流贸易通用语传播，法语为殖民语言
languageFamily.en: Teke (Bantu branch) predominant, Lingala spreading as river trade lingua franca, French as colonial language

philosophy.zh: 泰凯宇宙观中的精灵世界与祖先力量
philosophy.en: Teke cosmological concepts of spirit world and ancestral power

writingSystem.zh: 法语拉丁字母为殖民文字，本地语言口述为主
writingSystem.en: French Latin script as colonial writing; local languages primarily oral

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 特许公司制下的掠夺性经济，强制橡胶采集和象牙贸易为殖民收入支柱，本地居民遭受严重剥削
gdpDescription.en: Predatory economy under the concessionary system; forced rubber collection and ivory trade as colonial revenue pillars; local population suffering severe exploitation

mainIndustries.zh: 野生橡胶采集（强制）、象牙贸易、自给农业、刚果河航运
mainIndustries.en: Wild rubber collection (forced), ivory trade, subsistence farming, Congo River navigation

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：橡胶、象牙、木材；进口：棉布、金属制品、酒类、火器
tradeGoods.en: Exports: rubber, ivory, timber; Imports: cotton cloth, metalware, spirits, firearms

householdWealth.zh: 本地民众在强制劳役制度下贫困化严重
householdWealth.en: Local population severely impoverished under forced labor system

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 特许公司垄断制，强制橡胶与象牙采集，类似刚果自由邦的掠夺模式
economicSystem.en: Concessionary company monopoly system; forced rubber and ivory collection; predatory model similar to the Congo Free State

name.zh: 法属赤道非洲殖民步兵

description.zh: 法国军官指挥的非洲步兵
description.en: African infantry under French officers

description.zh: 强制执行橡胶采集配额的私人武装
description.en: Private armed forces enforcing rubber collection quotas

commanderInChief.zh: 法属赤道非洲军事指挥官

technology.zh: 法制步枪，内河炮艇
technology.en: French rifles, river gunboats

threats.zh: 本地居民因强制劳役的反抗，内陆未征服地区的武装抵抗
threats.en: Local population resistance to forced labor, armed resistance in unconquered inland areas

populationDescription.zh: 泰凯族为主，另有姆博希、刚果等班图语族群
populationDescription.en: Teke as majority, with Mbochi, Kongo, and other Bantu-speaking groups

name.zh: 恩科（马科科宫廷所在地）
法国殖民者与特许公司人员
name.en: French colonists and concessionary company staff

description.zh: 殖民权力与经济掠夺的执行者
description.en: Executors of colonial power and economic exploitation

description.zh: 在殖民体制下充当中间人
description.en: Serving as intermediaries under the colonial system

description.zh: 受强制劳役制度压迫的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace oppressed by the forced labor system

allies.zh: 法属赤道非洲联邦成员
allies.en: Member of French Equatorial Africa federation

enemies.zh: 内部反殖民抵抗
enemies.en: Internal anti-colonial resistance

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交权，由法国殖民当局管理
foreignPolicy.en: No independent diplomacy; managed by French colonial authorities

era.zh: 前工业时代（殖民掠夺期）

keyInnovations.zh: 刚果河蒸汽船航运，布拉柴维尔作为河港开始发展
keyInnovations.en: Congo River steamship navigation; Brazzaville beginning to develop as a river port

strengths.zh: 刚果河航运战略位置，丰富的热带森林资源
strengths.en: Strategic Congo River navigation position, rich tropical forest resources

weaknesses.zh: 特许公司制导致极端剥削与人口减少，行政能力低下，本地社会遭受严重破坏
weaknesses.en: Concessionary system causing extreme exploitation and population decline, poor administrative capacity, severe damage to local society

outlook.zh: 特许公司制的暴行将引发国际关注（类似刚果自由邦），殖民行政将逐步取代特许公司
outlook.en: Concessionary system atrocities to attract international attention (similar to Congo Free State); colonial administration to gradually replace concessionary companies

description.zh: 1880年马科科与法国签约后建立的殖民保护地，1900年时大部分领土由法国特许公司以掠夺性方式经营，强制橡胶采集造成严重人道灾难。
description.en: Colonial protectorate established after Makoko's treaty with France in 1880; by 1900 most territory was operated by French concessionary companies in a predatory manner, with forced rubber collection causing severe humanitarian disaster.

ruler.zh: 尼米·科特·阿姆布威基二世

governmentForm.zh: 半自治王国，名义上在刚果自由邦管辖范围内但实际上仍保持相当自主，尼米通过传统政治议会统治
governmentForm.en: Semi-autonomous kingdom nominally within Congo Free State jurisdiction but maintaining considerable autonomy; Nyim ruling through traditional political council

socialStructure.zh: 尼米与布匈格贵族居于顶层，各附属族群（凯特、肖瓦等）酋长组成政治议会，织布工与雕刻师等工匠有崇高社会地位
socialStructure.en: Nyim and Bushoong nobility at the top; chiefs of subordinate groups (Kete, Shoowa, etc.) forming political council; weavers, carvers, and other artisans holding high social status

rulingClass.zh: 布匈格王族与各族群酋长议会
rulingClass.en: Bushoong royals and inter-ethnic council of chiefs

succession.zh: 尼米从布匈格王族中选出，需经贵族议会认可
succession.en: Nyim selected from Bushoong royals, requiring approval of the noble council

structure.zh: 尼米为最高统治者，由三级政治议会辅佐：宫廷议会、族群酋长议会、地方长老议会
structure.en: Nyim as supreme ruler, assisted by three-tier political councils: court council, ethnic chiefs' council, and local elders' council

function.zh: 协助尼米处理国政、司法与外交事务
function.en: Assisting the Nyim in state affairs, justice, and external relations

function.zh: 管理对外贸易与市场事务
function.en: Managing foreign trade and market affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各附属族群酋长自治其族群事务，向尼米宫廷进贡
localAdmin.en: Subordinate ethnic chiefs governing their own group affairs, paying tribute to the Nyim's court

legalSystem.zh: 库巴习惯法体系，尼米为最高司法裁决者
legalSystem.en: Kuba customary law system; Nyim as supreme judicial arbiter

taxationSystem.zh: 贡赋制度：各附属族群向宫廷缴纳布匹、象牙、食物等实物贡赋
taxationSystem.en: Tribute system: subordinate groups paying cloth, ivory, food, and other in-kind tribute to the court

religion.zh: 库巴传统信仰：造物神恩加安（Ngaan）崇拜、祖先祭祀、自然精灵信仰
religion.en: Kuba traditional religion: worship of creator god Ngaan, ancestor rites, nature spirit beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 拉菲亚棕榈布织造（库巴布匹为非洲艺术瑰宝）、木雕王像（ndop）、几何纹样装饰艺术
culturalAchievements.en: Raffia palm cloth weaving (Kuba textiles as African art treasures), wooden royal portrait statues (ndop), geometric pattern decorative arts

languageFamily.zh: 布匈格语（班图语支）为主要语言
languageFamily.en: Bushoong (Bantu branch) as major language

philosophy.zh: 库巴创世神话与王权神圣观，'文雅人'（bwiin）理想人格概念
philosophy.en: Kuba creation mythology and sacred kingship concept; 'civilized person' (bwiin) ideal personality concept

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统为主，拉菲亚布上的几何纹样具有象征意义
writingSystem.en: Primarily oral tradition; geometric patterns on raffia cloth carrying symbolic meaning

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以精致手工业（布匹、雕刻）与贡赋制度为核心的王国经济，开始感受刚果自由邦橡胶经济的压力
gdpDescription.en: Kingdom economy centered on refined handicrafts (textiles, carvings) and tribute system; beginning to feel pressure from Congo Free State rubber economy

mainIndustries.zh: 拉菲亚布织造、木雕工艺、铁器锻造、自给农业（木薯、粟）
mainIndustries.en: Raffia cloth weaving, woodcarving, ironwork, subsistence farming (cassava, millet)

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：拉菲亚布匹、雕刻品、象牙；进口：珠子、铜制品、欧洲商品
tradeGoods.en: Exports: raffia textiles, carvings, ivory; Imports: beads, copper goods, European merchandise

householdWealth.zh: 布匹储备为重要家庭财富指标，贵族家庭拥有丰富的布匹与艺术品收藏
householdWealth.en: Cloth reserves as important household wealth indicator; noble families owning rich collections of textiles and art

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋制王国经济与手工业专业化生产，刚果自由邦经济体系开始渗透
economicSystem.en: Tribute-based kingdom economy with specialized handicraft production; Congo Free State economic system beginning to penetrate

description.zh: 尼米宫廷卫队与各族群召集的武装民兵
description.en: Nyim's court guard and armed militia levied from subordinate groups

commanderInChief.zh: 尼米兼军事最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: Nyim serving as supreme military commander

technology.zh: 传统铁制武器与少量贸易获得的火器
technology.en: Traditional iron weapons and small number of firearms obtained through trade

threats.zh: 刚果自由邦势力扩张，橡胶采集压力可能波及库巴领土
threats.en: Congo Free State power expansion; rubber collection pressure potentially reaching Kuba territory

populationDescription.zh: 布匈格族为核心，另有凯特、肖瓦、恩贡戈等十余个附属族群
populationDescription.en: Bushoong as core, with over a dozen subordinate groups including Kete, Shoowa, Ngongo, and others

description.zh: 布匈格王族与各族群酋长
description.en: Bushoong royals and ethnic chiefs

description.zh: 享有崇高社会地位的织布工、雕刻师、铁匠
description.en: Weavers, carvers, and blacksmiths enjoying high social status

description.zh: 从事自给农业的广大平民
description.en: Broad commoners engaged in subsistence farming

allies.zh: 试图维持与刚果自由邦的和平关系以保全自治
allies.en: Attempting to maintain peaceful relations with the Congo Free State to preserve autonomy

enemies.zh: 刚果自由邦的扩张野心构成主要威胁
enemies.en: Congo Free State's expansionist ambitions constituting the main threat

foreignPolicy.zh: 尼米采取外交规避策略，试图延缓殖民力量渗透
foreignPolicy.en: Nyim adopting diplomatic avoidance strategy, attempting to delay colonial force penetration

era.zh: 精致手工业时代

keyInnovations.zh: 高度发达的拉菲亚布织造技术，精密几何纹样设计，木雕王像传统
keyInnovations.en: Highly developed raffia cloth weaving technology, precise geometric pattern design, wooden royal portrait tradition

strengths.zh: 独特而精致的艺术文化传统，稳定的政治体系，相对富裕的手工业经济
strengths.en: Unique and refined artistic-cultural tradition, stable political system, relatively prosperous handicraft economy

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量无法抵御殖民入侵，地理上被刚果自由邦包围，外部压力日增
weaknesses.en: Military force insufficient to resist colonial invasion, geographically surrounded by the Congo Free State, external pressure increasing

outlook.zh: 刚果自由邦将逐步侵蚀库巴自治权，但库巴文化传统将在殖民压力下顽强延续
outlook.en: Congo Free State will gradually erode Kuba autonomy, but Kuba cultural traditions will tenaciously endure under colonial pressure

description.zh: 刚果自由邦境内仍保持相当自治的班图王国，以精致的拉菲亚布匹织造和木雕艺术闻名，1900年时尚未被直接殖民统治，但外部压力日增。
description.en: A Bantu kingdom within the Congo Free State maintaining considerable autonomy, famed for refined raffia textile weaving and woodcarving arts; not yet under direct colonial rule by 1900 but facing increasing external pressure.

name.zh: 叶凯王国残余/刚果自由邦
name.en: Yeke Kingdom Remnant / Congo Free State

name.zh: 叶凯王国残余（刚果自由邦加丹加区）
name.en: Yeke Kingdom Remnant (Congo Free State Katanga District)

ruler.zh: 穆克兰达·班图（姆西里之子，傀儡酋长）；比利时军官掌实权
ruler.en: Mukanda Bantu (son of Msiri, puppet chief); Belgian officers holding real power

rulerTitle.zh: 酋长（傀儡）/ 比利时区长

governmentForm.zh: 刚果自由邦直辖下的殖民地区，姆西里1891年被杀后叶凯王国崩溃，比利时官员直接管理
governmentForm.en: District under direct Congo Free State rule; Yeke Kingdom collapsed after Msiri's killing in 1891; Belgian officers managing directly

socialStructure.zh: 比利时殖民军官与加丹加公司代表居权力中心，叶凯残余贵族保留象征性地位，本地民众承受强制劳役
socialStructure.en: Belgian military officers and Katanga Company representatives at power center; remnant Yeke nobility retaining symbolic status; local populace bearing forced labor

rulingClass.zh: 比利时殖民军官与加丹加特别委员会（CSK）代表
rulingClass.en: Belgian colonial officers and Comité Spécial du Katanga (CSK) representatives

succession.zh: 酋长由比利时当局任命
succession.en: Chiefs appointed by Belgian authorities

structure.zh: 刚果自由邦加丹加区行政体制，比利时区长管理，加丹加特别委员会负责矿业开发
structure.en: Congo Free State Katanga district administrative system; Belgian District Commissioner managing; Comité Spécial du Katanga responsible for mining development

function.zh: 殖民行政管理与治安维持
function.en: Colonial administration and security maintenance

function.zh: 矿产资源勘探与开发管理
function.en: Mineral resource exploration and development management

localAdmin.zh: 比利时直接管理，辅以被任命的本地酋长
localAdmin.en: Direct Belgian administration supplemented by appointed local chiefs

legalSystem.zh: 刚果自由邦法律体系，利奥波德二世的法令为最高权威
legalSystem.en: Congo Free State legal system; Leopold II's decrees as supreme authority

taxationSystem.zh: 强制劳役与实物贡赋并行
taxationSystem.en: Forced labor and in-kind tribute in parallel

religion.zh: 本地传统信仰，天主教传教活动开始渗透
religion.en: Local traditional religion; Catholic missionary activity beginning to penetrate

culturalAchievements.zh: 叶凯冶铜传统（延续千年加丹加铜矿开采史），跨区域贸易文化
culturalAchievements.en: Yeke copper-smelting tradition (continuing millennium-old Katanga copper mining history), cross-regional trade culture

languageFamily.zh: 基叶凯语与其他班图语言，斯瓦希里语为贸易通用语
languageFamily.en: KiYeke and other Bantu languages; Swahili as trade lingua franca

philosophy.zh: 叶凯战士传统与本地精灵信仰
philosophy.en: Yeke warrior traditions and local spirit beliefs

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统为主，阿拉伯字母因东非贸易影响有少量使用
writingSystem.en: Primarily oral tradition; Arabic script in limited use due to East African trade influences

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 加丹加铜矿资源潜力巨大但大规模工业开采尚未开始
gdpDescription.en: Katanga's enormous copper mining potential not yet industrially developed

mainIndustries.zh: 传统冶铜、自给农业、象牙与橡胶采集
mainIndustries.en: Traditional copper smelting, subsistence farming, ivory and rubber collection

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：铜十字锭、象牙、橡胶；进口：布匹、珠子、火器
tradeGoods.en: Exports: copper cross-ingots, ivory, rubber; Imports: cloth, beads, firearms

householdWealth.zh: 姆西里统治时期积累的财富已被殖民征服消耗，民众贫困化
householdWealth.en: Wealth accumulated during Msiri's rule consumed by colonial conquest; population impoverished

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民掠夺经济，比利时特许公司开始勘探加丹加矿藏
economicSystem.en: Colonial predatory economy; Belgian concessionary companies beginning to explore Katanga mineral deposits

description.zh: 比利时军官指挥的刚果自由邦殖民军
description.en: Congo Free State colonial army commanded by Belgian officers

description.zh: 保护矿业勘探人员的私人武装
description.en: Private forces protecting mining exploration personnel

commanderInChief.zh: 比利时区军事指挥官

technology.zh: 比利时制步枪与马克沁机枪
technology.en: Belgian rifles and Maxim machine guns

threats.zh: 本地反殖民抵抗，周边部族冲突
threats.en: Local anti-colonial resistance, surrounding tribal conflicts

populationDescription.zh: 叶凯族为核心，另有隆达、本巴、卢巴等班图族群
populationDescription.en: Yeke as core, with Lunda, Bemba, Luba, and other Bantu groups

description.zh: 殖民官员与矿业勘探人员
description.en: Colonial officers and mining prospectors

description.zh: 姆西里王朝后裔，保留象征性地位
description.en: Descendants of Msiri's dynasty retaining symbolic status

description.zh: 从事农业与传统冶铜的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace engaged in farming and traditional copper smelting

allies.zh: 无独立外交，隶属刚果自由邦
allies.en: No independent diplomacy; subordinate to the Congo Free State

enemies.zh: 无正式敌对关系
enemies.en: No formal enemies

foreignPolicy.zh: 由刚果自由邦管理一切对外事务
foreignPolicy.en: All external affairs managed by the Congo Free State

era.zh: 传统冶金时代向工业矿业过渡期
era.en: Transition from traditional metallurgy to industrial mining

keyInnovations.zh: 千年铜冶炼传统，比利时地质勘探开始揭示加丹加矿藏规模
keyInnovations.en: Millennium-old copper smelting tradition; Belgian geological surveys beginning to reveal the scale of Katanga mineral deposits

strengths.zh: 加丹加地区蕴含世界级铜钴矿藏，传统冶金技术基础
strengths.en: Katanga region containing world-class copper-cobalt deposits, traditional metallurgical technology base

weaknesses.zh: 叶凯王国已被摧毁，本地人口沦为殖民劳工
weaknesses.en: Yeke Kingdom destroyed, local population reduced to colonial laborers

outlook.zh: 加丹加将成为世界最重要的铜矿区之一，联合矿业公司（UMHK）即将成立（1906年）
outlook.en: Katanga will become one of the world's most important copper mining regions; UMHK to be founded soon (1906)

description.zh: 姆西里1891年被杀后崩溃的叶凯王国，其领地现为刚果自由邦加丹加区，比利时正在勘探将改变世界的铜钴矿藏。
description.en: The Yeke Kingdom collapsed after Msiri's killing in 1891; its territory now forms the Katanga district of the Congo Free State, where Belgium was prospecting copper-cobalt deposits that would change the world.

name.zh: 奥文本杜诸王国（葡属安哥拉高地）

ruler.zh: 比耶国王恩达卢马三世；葡萄牙殖民控制加强中
ruler.en: King Ndunduma III of Bié; Portuguese colonial control tightening

governmentForm.zh: 多个奥文本杜王国松散并存，各有索马统治，葡萄牙殖民控制从沿海向高地渗透
governmentForm.en: Multiple Ovimbundu kingdoms loosely coexisting, each ruled by a Soma; Portuguese colonial control penetrating from coast to highlands

socialStructure.zh: 各邦索马与贵族组成统治层，长途贸易商形成中间阶层，广大农民与前奴隶构成社会基础
socialStructure.en: Somas and nobility forming ruling layer; long-distance traders forming middle stratum; broad peasantry and former slaves as social base

rulingClass.zh: 奥文本杜各邦索马王族与贸易贵族
rulingClass.en: Soma royal families and trading nobility of various Ovimbundu states

succession.zh: 各邦王位世袭，需经长老会议认可
succession.en: Royal succession hereditary, requiring elder council approval

structure.zh: 各奥文本杜邦国保持独立政治结构，索马通过贵族议会统治；葡萄牙军事哨站开始建立
structure.en: Each Ovimbundu state maintaining independent political structure; Portuguese military posts beginning to be established

function.zh: 国政管理、司法与贸易监督
function.en: State administration, justice, and trade oversight

function.zh: 管理长途贸易商队与橡胶贸易
function.en: Managing long-distance trade caravans and rubber trade

localAdmin.zh: 各邦索马自治
localAdmin.en: Somas self-governing

legalSystem.zh: 奥文本杜习惯法，索马为最高裁决者
legalSystem.en: Ovimbundu customary law; Soma as supreme arbiter

taxationSystem.zh: 贡赋制度与贸易税并行
taxationSystem.en: Tribute system and trade taxes in parallel

religion.zh: 奥文本杜传统信仰（祖先崇拜与占卜），基督教传教（美国公理会）影响增长
religion.en: Ovimbundu traditional religion (ancestor worship and divination), growing Christian missionary influence (American Board)

culturalAchievements.zh: 长途贸易商队传统，口述历史传统
culturalAchievements.en: Long-distance trade caravan tradition, oral history traditions

languageFamily.zh: 温本杜语（班图语支）为主要语言，葡萄牙语在沿海传播
languageFamily.en: Umbundu (Bantu branch) as major language; Portuguese spreading in coastal areas

philosophy.zh: 奥文本杜祖先崇拜与占卜哲学体系
philosophy.en: Ovimbundu ancestor veneration and divination philosophical system

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统为主，传教士开始以拉丁字母书写温本杜语
writingSystem.en: Primarily oral tradition; missionaries beginning to write Umbundu in Latin script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以橡胶贸易和长途商队贸易为经济支柱
gdpDescription.en: Rubber trade and long-distance caravan trade as economic pillars

mainIndustries.zh: 橡胶采集与贸易、长途商队贸易、自给农业（玉米、高粱）、蜂蜡采集
mainIndustries.en: Rubber collection and trade, long-distance caravan trade, subsistence farming (maize, sorghum), beeswax collection

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：橡胶、蜂蜡、象牙；进口：棉布、火器、酒类
tradeGoods.en: Exports: rubber, beeswax, ivory; Imports: cotton cloth, firearms, spirits

name.zh: 葡属安哥拉雷亚尔与实物交换

householdWealth.zh: 贸易商家庭积累可观财富，普通农户以牲畜和粮储为主
householdWealth.en: Trader households accumulating considerable wealth; ordinary farmers with livestock and grain stores

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 长途贸易商业经济与自给农业并存，橡胶贸易繁荣期
economicSystem.en: Long-distance commercial trade economy coexisting with subsistence farming; rubber trade boom period

description.zh: 配备火枪的王国武装力量
description.en: Kingdom armed forces equipped with muskets

commanderInChief.zh: 各邦索马分别统帅本邦武装
commanderInChief.en: Each Soma commanding their own state's forces

technology.zh: 前装滑膛火枪为主要武器，少量后装步枪通过贸易获得
technology.en: Muzzle-loading muskets as primary weapons; small number of breech-loading rifles obtained through trade

threats.zh: 葡萄牙殖民军向高地推进
threats.en: Portuguese colonial army advancing toward the highlands

populationDescription.zh: 奥文本杜族为主体，分为比耶、瓦姆布、恩加兰杰等多个邦国
populationDescription.en: Ovimbundu as majority, divided into Bié, Wambu, Ngalangi, and other states

description.zh: 各邦统治家族
description.en: Ruling families of each state

description.zh: 经营跨区域商队的商人阶层
description.en: Merchant class operating cross-regional caravans

description.zh: 从事农业的广大民众
description.en: Broad populace engaged in farming

allies.zh: 各奥文本杜邦国之间有松散联盟关系
allies.en: Loose alliance relations among Ovimbundu states

enemies.zh: 葡萄牙殖民军（殖民控制日益收紧）
enemies.en: Portuguese colonial army (colonial control increasingly tightening)

foreignPolicy.zh: 试图在维持贸易关系的同时抵制葡萄牙政治控制
foreignPolicy.en: Attempting to resist Portuguese political control while maintaining trade relations

era.zh: 火器贸易时代

keyInnovations.zh: 长途商队贸易网络组织技术，火枪使用与维护
keyInnovations.en: Long-distance caravan trade network organization, firearms use and maintenance

strengths.zh: 成熟的长途贸易网络，武装力量具一定规模
strengths.en: Mature long-distance trade networks, armed forces of considerable size

weaknesses.zh: 各邦缺乏统一指挥，火器质量劣于葡军
weaknesses.en: Lack of unified command, firearms quality inferior to Portuguese army

outlook.zh: 葡萄牙将在1902年发动大规模征服战争，奥文本杜各王国将在1904年前全部被征服
outlook.en: Portugal will launch a large-scale conquest war in 1902; all Ovimbundu kingdoms will be conquered by 1904

description.zh: 安哥拉中部高原的奥文本杜诸王国，以长途商队贸易著称，1900年时葡萄牙殖民控制日益加紧。
description.en: The Ovimbundu kingdoms of the central Angolan highlands, famed for long-distance caravan trade; by 1900 Portuguese colonial control was tightening.

name.zh: 斯威士兰（英国保护下的德兰士瓦代管）

ruler.zh: 王太后拉博齐贝尼·姆德卢利（摄政）

rulerTitle.zh: 恩德洛武卡齐（王太后/摄政）

governmentForm.zh: 斯威士传统王权在英国保护下维持，王太后拉博齐贝尼为年幼国王索布扎二世摄政
governmentForm.en: Swazi traditional monarchy maintained under British protection; Queen Regent Labotsibeni regent for young King Sobhuza II

socialStructure.zh: 德拉米尼王族居顶层，各氏族酋长组成传统权力结构，白人定居者掌握大量土地特许权
socialStructure.en: Dlamini royals at top; clan chiefs forming traditional power structure; white settlers holding extensive land concessions

rulingClass.zh: 德拉米尼王族与氏族酋长议会
rulingClass.en: Dlamini royals and clan chiefs' council

succession.zh: 德拉米尼王朝世袭
succession.en: Dlamini dynasty hereditary succession

structure.zh: 传统双元统治（国王与王太后）在英国监督下维持
structure.en: Traditional dual rule maintained under British supervision

function.zh: 传统国政管理与抵制土地流失的外交努力
function.en: Traditional state administration and diplomatic efforts to resist land loss

function.zh: 监督殖民保护事务
function.en: Overseeing colonial protectorate affairs

localAdmin.zh: 传统氏族酋长管理地方事务
localAdmin.en: Traditional clan chiefs managing local affairs

legalSystem.zh: 斯威士习惯法与英国法并行
legalSystem.en: Swazi customary law and English law in parallel

taxationSystem.zh: 传统牲畜贡赋与英国征收的小额赋税
taxationSystem.en: Traditional cattle tribute and small British-imposed levies

religion.zh: 斯威士传统信仰（祖先崇拜）为主，基督教传教增长
religion.en: Swazi traditional religion (ancestor worship) predominant, growing Christian missionary activity

culturalAchievements.zh: 因瓦拉（Incwala）王权仪式、芦苇舞（Umhlanga）传统
culturalAchievements.en: Incwala kingship ceremony, Reed Dance (Umhlanga) tradition

languageFamily.zh: 斯威士语（恩古尼班图语支）
languageFamily.en: SiSwati (Nguni Bantu branch)

philosophy.zh: 斯威士王权神圣观与祖先崇拜
philosophy.en: Swazi sacred kingship concept and ancestor veneration

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统为主，传教士引入拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Primarily oral tradition; missionaries introducing Latin script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以牲畜饲养和自给农业为基础
gdpDescription.en: Based on cattle herding and subsistence farming

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、自给农业（玉米、高粱）、小规模锡矿
mainIndustries.en: Cattle herding, subsistence farming (maize, sorghum), small-scale tin mining

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：牲畜、兽皮；进口：棉布、金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Exports: livestock, hides; Imports: cotton cloth, metalware

name.en: British pound and South African currency

householdWealth.zh: 牲畜为最重要家庭财富，土地权面临白人特许权侵蚀
householdWealth.en: Cattle as most important household wealth; land rights threatened by white concessions

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 传统畜牧自给经济与白人定居者商业经济并存
economicSystem.en: Traditional pastoral subsistence economy coexisting with white settler commercial economy

description.zh: 按年龄组编制的传统军团
description.en: Age-set organized traditional regiments

commanderInChief.zh: 王太后摄政兼名义最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: Queen Regent as nominal supreme commander

technology.zh: 传统盾矛为主要武器，少量火器
technology.en: Traditional shields and spears; small number of firearms

threats.zh: 白人定居者的土地侵占，布尔战争波及
threats.en: White settler land encroachment, Boer War spillover

populationDescription.zh: 斯威士族为主体
populationDescription.en: Swazi as majority

description.zh: 王朝统治家族
description.en: Royal ruling family

description.zh: 各氏族传统领袖
description.en: Traditional leaders

description.zh: 从事畜牧与农业的广大平民
description.en: Broad commoners

description.zh: 持有土地特许权的欧洲移民
description.en: European immigrants holding land concessions

allies.zh: 英国（保护国关系）
allies.en: Britain (protectorate relationship)

enemies.zh: 布尔人德兰士瓦共和国
enemies.en: Boer Transvaal Republic

foreignPolicy.zh: 利用英布矛盾维护斯威士自治
foreignPolicy.en: Exploiting Anglo-Boer tensions to preserve Swazi autonomy

era.zh: 传统农牧时代

keyInnovations.zh: 传统冶铁技术，白人定居者引入犁耕
keyInnovations.en: Traditional iron-smelting; white settlers introducing plough farming

strengths.zh: 王太后拉博齐贝尼出色的外交能力
strengths.en: Queen Regent Labotsibeni's outstanding diplomatic ability

weaknesses.zh: 三分之二的土地已被白人特许权覆盖
weaknesses.en: Two-thirds of land already covered by white concessions

outlook.zh: 布尔战争后将转为英国直接管理的保护国
outlook.en: After the Boer War will transition to a British-administered protectorate

description.zh: 德拉米尼王朝统治的小王国，王太后拉博齐贝尼以杰出外交手腕维护斯威士利益，但白人土地特许权严重威胁王国生存。
description.en: Small kingdom under the Dlamini dynasty; Queen Regent Labotsibeni preserving Swazi interests through outstanding diplomacy, but white land concessions severely threatening the kingdom's survival.

name.zh: 祖鲁兰（纳塔尔殖民地附属领土）
name.en: Zululand (territory annexed to Colony of Natal)

ruler.zh: 迪努祖鲁·卡塞奇瓦约（流放中）；英国地方行政官管理
ruler.en: Dinuzulu kaCetshwayo (in exile); British magistrates administering

enemies.zh: 无正式敌对关系
