structure.en: Imperial centralized system; Oromo regions governed by Amhara governors; naftanya garrisons maintaining control

function.zh: 帝国行政与税收
function.en: Imperial administration and taxation

function.zh: 军事驻防与土地分配
function.en: Military garrison and land allocation

localAdmin.zh: 纳夫坦尼亚定居者直接管理加巴尔农民
localAdmin.en: Naftanya settlers directly managing gabbar peasants

legalSystem.zh: 埃塞俄比亚帝国法律，奥罗莫加达制度被边缘化
legalSystem.en: Ethiopian imperial law; Oromo Gadaa system marginalized

taxationSystem.zh: 加巴尔制度：农民须上缴大部分收成
taxationSystem.en: Gabbar system: farmers surrendering most of harvest

religion.zh: 奥罗莫传统信仰（瓦卡崇拜）、伊斯兰教与正教三者并存
religion.en: Oromo traditional religion (Waaqeffanna), Islam, and Orthodox Christianity coexisting

culturalAchievements.zh: 加达民主制度传统（被征服前的独特政治体系）、奥罗莫口述文学
culturalAchievements.en: Gadaa democratic system tradition, Oromo oral literature

languageFamily.zh: 奥罗莫语（库希特语支）
languageFamily.en: Oromo (Cushitic branch)

philosophy.zh: 加达制度中的民主治理思想、瓦卡一神论
philosophy.en: Democratic thought in Gadaa system; Waaqeffanna monotheism

writingSystem.zh: 阿姆哈拉语吉兹字母为帝国文字，奥罗莫语口述为主
writingSystem.en: Amharic Ge'ez script as imperial writing; Oromo primarily oral

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 奥罗莫地区农业富庶（咖啡原产地），但加巴尔制度导致农民贫困化
gdpDescription.en: Oromo regions agriculturally rich (origin of coffee) but gabbar system impoverishing farmers

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡种植、粮食农业（台夫、大麦）、畜牧
mainIndustries.en: Coffee cultivation, grain farming (teff, barley), pastoralism

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：咖啡、兽皮、象牙、蜂蜜；进口：棉布、盐、金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Exports: coffee, hides, ivory, honey; Imports: cloth, salt, metalware

name.zh: 马利亚·特蕾莎银元与盐条
name.en: Maria Theresa thaler and salt bars

householdWealth.zh: 加巴尔农民被剥夺大部分产出
householdWealth.en: Gabbar farmers stripped of most output

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 帝国封建经济体制，加巴尔制度为核心剥削机制
economicSystem.en: Imperial feudal economic system; gabbar as core exploitation mechanism

description.zh: 配备步枪的阿姆哈拉军事定居者
description.en: Amhara military settlers armed with rifles

description.zh: 征召的奥罗莫武装
description.en: Oromo forces levied when needed

commanderInChief.zh: 各省总督代皇帝行使军事指挥权
commanderInChief.en: Provincial governors commanding on emperor's behalf

technology.zh: 法国与俄国提供的步枪与山炮
technology.en: French and Russian-supplied rifles and mountain guns

threats.zh: 奥罗莫反抗运动，帝国边境摩擦
threats.en: Oromo resistance, imperial border friction

populationDescription.zh: 奥罗莫各支系为主体，另有阿姆哈拉定居者
populationDescription.en: Various Oromo branches as majority; plus Amhara settlers

description.zh: 征服者阶层
description.en: Conqueror class

description.zh: 与帝国合作的本地精英
description.en: Local elites cooperating with empire

description.zh: 被加巴尔制度束缚的奥罗莫农民
description.en: Oromo farmers bound by gabbar system

allies.zh: 作为埃塞俄比亚帝国领土，无独立外交
allies.en: No independent diplomacy as imperial territory

enemies.zh: 奥罗莫反帝国抵抗持续
enemies.en: Oromo anti-imperial resistance continuing

foreignPolicy.zh: 由亚的斯亚贝巴管理
foreignPolicy.en: Managed by Addis Ababa

era.zh: 帝国扩张时代

keyInnovations.zh: 阿杜瓦战役后引入的现代步枪与火炮
keyInnovations.en: Modern rifles and artillery after Battle of Adwa

strengths.zh: 咖啡产地的农业富庶
strengths.en: Agricultural richness of coffee region

weaknesses.zh: 加巴尔制度的严酷剥削引发持续不满
weaknesses.en: Harsh gabbar exploitation causing persistent discontent

outlook.zh: 奥罗莫地区将作为帝国经济支柱，民族意识将逐步觉醒
outlook.en: Oromo territories to continue as empire's economic pillar; national consciousness to gradually awaken

description.zh: 1880-90年代被孟尼利克二世征服的奥罗莫诸领地，通过纳夫坦尼亚制度和加巴尔制度被纳入帝国，加达民主制度遭压制。
description.en: Oromo territories conquered by Menelik II in 1880s-90s, incorporated through naftanya and gabbar systems; the Gadaa democratic system suppressed.

name.zh: 埃塞俄比亚帝国哈拉尔省
name.en: Harar Province of the Ethiopian Empire

ruler.zh: 拉斯·马康南·沃尔德·米卡埃尔

governmentForm.zh: 埃塞俄比亚帝国直辖省份，由拉斯·马康南治理
governmentForm.en: Province directly under Ethiopian Empire; governed by Ras Makonnen

socialStructure.zh: 拉斯·马康南及阿姆哈拉随从居权力中心，哈拉里城市精英保留商业地位
socialStructure.en: Ras Makonnen and Amhara retinue at center; Harari urban elite retaining commercial status

rulingClass.zh: 拉斯·马康南及其阿姆哈拉军政官员
rulingClass.en: Ras Makonnen and his Amhara military-political officials

succession.zh: 省总督由皇帝任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by emperor

structure.zh: 拉斯·马康南实行相对开明的治理，保留哈拉尔城市自治传统
structure.en: Ras Makonnen practicing relatively enlightened governance; preserving Harar's urban autonomy

function.zh: 省级行政与贸易监督
function.en: Provincial administration and trade oversight

function.zh: 管理吉布提方向进出口
function.en: Managing imports/exports toward Djibouti

localAdmin.zh: 哈拉尔城由城市长老协助管理
localAdmin.en: Harar city managed with urban elder assistance

legalSystem.zh: 帝国法与伊斯兰法在哈拉尔并行
legalSystem.en: Imperial law and Islamic law operating in Harar

taxationSystem.zh: 贸易关税为主，辅以土地税
taxationSystem.en: Trade customs as primary, supplemented by land tax

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为哈拉尔主要信仰（'第四圣城'），正教基督教在阿姆哈拉人中信奉
religion.en: Islam as Harar's primary faith ('fourth holy city'); Orthodox Christianity among Amhara

culturalAchievements.zh: 哈拉尔城墙（朱格尔），独特的哈拉里建筑，咖啡文化，兰波曾居此处
culturalAchievements.en: Harar walls (Jugol), unique Harari architecture, coffee culture, Rimbaud once lived here

languageFamily.zh: 哈拉里语（闪语支），奥罗莫语，索马里语，阿姆哈拉语
languageFamily.en: Harari (Semitic), Oromo, Somali, Amharic

philosophy.zh: 哈拉尔伊斯兰学术传统与苏菲神秘主义
philosophy.en: Harar Islamic scholarly tradition and Sufi mysticism

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母为哈拉尔传统文字，吉兹字母为帝国行政文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script as traditional Harar writing; Ge'ez as imperial administrative script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 哈拉尔为埃塞俄比亚东部商贸枢纽，咖啡出口中心
gdpDescription.en: Harar as eastern Ethiopia's commercial hub and coffee export center

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡贸易、长途商队贸易、手工业（银器、编织）
mainIndustries.en: Coffee trade, long-distance caravan trade, handicrafts (silverwork, weaving)

tradeGoods.zh: 出口：咖啡、兽皮、象牙、蜂蜡；进口：棉布、武器、工业制品
tradeGoods.en: Exports: coffee, hides, ivory, beeswax; Imports: cloth, arms, manufactures

householdWealth.zh: 哈拉里商人家庭富裕
householdWealth.en: Harari merchant households prosperous

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 商贸中心型经济，拉斯·马康农鼓励对外贸易
economicSystem.en: Trade-hub economy; Ras Makonnen encouraging foreign trade

description.zh: 配备现代步枪的精锐部队，阿杜瓦战役中表现卓越
description.en: Elite forces with modern rifles; distinguished at Adwa

description.zh: 可动员的地方武装
description.en: Mobilizable local forces

commanderInChief.zh: 拉斯·马康农

technology.zh: 法国与俄国供应的现代步枪与山炮
technology.en: French and Russian-supplied modern rifles and mountain guns

threats.zh: 索马里游牧部落袭扰，意大利厄立特里亚威胁
threats.en: Somali nomadic raiding; Italian Eritrea threats

populationDescription.zh: 哈拉尔城以哈拉里人为主，周边为奥罗莫与索马里
populationDescription.en: Harar city predominantly Harari; surroundings Oromo and Somali

description.zh: 拉斯·马康农随从与帝国官员
description.en: Ras Makonnen's retinue and officials

description.zh: 咖啡与长途贸易的富裕商人
description.en: Wealthy merchants in coffee and long-distance trade

description.zh: 奥罗莫与索马里裔农牧民
description.en: Oromo and Somali agro-pastoralists

allies.zh: 作为帝国省份，外交由亚的斯亚贝巴管理；马康农为帝国首席外交家
allies.en: Diplomacy managed by Addis Ababa; Makonnen the empire's chief diplomat

enemies.zh: 意大利厄立特里亚，索马里武装部落
enemies.en: Italian Eritrea, armed Somali tribes

foreignPolicy.zh: 拉斯·马康农代表帝国处理东部边境外交
foreignPolicy.en: Ras Makonnen handling eastern border diplomacy for the empire

era.zh: 帝国现代化初期

keyInnovations.zh: 亚的斯亚贝巴-吉布提铁路规划通过哈拉尔地区
keyInnovations.en: Addis Ababa-Djibouti railway planned through Harar region

strengths.zh: 咖啡贸易带来经济繁荣，拉斯·马康农卓越治理
strengths.en: Economic prosperity from coffee trade, Ras Makonnen's outstanding governance

weaknesses.zh: 基础设施落后，对外贸易路线受制于法属吉布提
weaknesses.en: Backward infrastructure; trade routes dependent on French Djibouti

outlook.zh: 吉布提铁路将使哈拉尔成为埃塞俄比亚门户，马康农之子将成为海尔·塞拉西皇帝
outlook.en: Djibouti railway to make Harar Ethiopia's gateway; Makonnen's son will become Emperor Haile Selassie

description.zh: 1887年被征服后由拉斯·马康农治理的哈拉尔省，以咖啡贸易和伊斯兰文化遗产著称，马康农之子即未来的海尔·塞拉西一世。
description.en: Harar Province governed by Ras Makonnen after 1887 conquest; famed for coffee trade and Islamic heritage; Makonnen's son would become Emperor Haile Selassie I.

ruler.zh: 尼古拉二世（兼芬兰大公）
ruler.en: Nicholas II (also Grand Duke of Finland)

rulerTitle.en: Grand Duke (held by the Russian Emperor)

governmentForm.zh: 俄罗斯帝国内享有广泛自治权的立宪大公国，拥有独立的议会、法律和行政体系，但正面临俄国化政策威胁
governmentForm.en: A constitutional grand duchy with broad autonomy within the Russian Empire, possessing its own parliament, laws, and administration, but facing threats from Russification policies

socialStructure.zh: 社会由瑞典语贵族与地主上层、芬兰语知识分子与新兴资产阶级中层、城市工人和广大自耕农构成。芬兰语与瑞典语之间的语言问题是重要的社会分界线。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised a Swedish-speaking nobility and landowning upper class, a Finnish-speaking intelligentsia and emerging bourgeoisie, urban workers, and a broad class of independent farmers. The language question between Finnish and Swedish was a major social dividing line.

rulingClass.zh: 瑞典语贵族、芬兰参议院成员、总督府官僚
rulingClass.en: Swedish-speaking nobility, Finnish Senate members, and Governor-General's bureaucracy

succession.zh: 大公之位由俄国沙皇自动继承
succession.en: The grand ducal title was automatically inherited by the Russian Emperor

structure.zh: 芬兰拥有独立的参议院（政府）和四等级议会，总督长官由沙皇任命代表帝国利益。1899年尼古拉二世发布《二月宣言》试图限制芬兰自治，引发强烈抵抗。
structure.en: Finland possessed its own Senate (government) and four-estate Diet; a Governor-General appointed by the Tsar represented imperial interests. In 1899 Nicholas II issued the February Manifesto attempting to curtail Finnish autonomy, provoking fierce resistance.

function.zh: 芬兰自治政府行政机关，分为经济部和司法部两大部门
function.en: Executive body of Finnish autonomous government, divided into Economic and Judicial departments

function.zh: 代表沙皇在芬兰的最高权威，监督芬兰自治机构
function.en: Represented the Tsar's supreme authority in Finland, supervising Finnish autonomous institutions

function.zh: 管理芬兰独立的财政和税收体系
function.en: Managed Finland's independent fiscal and taxation system

function.zh: 管理芬兰独立的教育体系，包括赫尔辛基大学
function.en: Oversaw Finland's independent education system, including the University of Helsinki

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过省长、市政委员会和乡镇自治机构运行，芬兰保有独立于俄国的地方治理传统。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provincial governors, municipal councils, and township self-governing bodies; Finland maintained local governance traditions independent of Russia.

legalSystem.zh: 芬兰保有独立的法律体系，源自瑞典时代法律传统，俄国化政策正威胁这一独立性。
legalSystem.en: Finland retained an independent legal system rooted in Swedish-era legal traditions; Russification policies were threatening this independence.

taxationSystem.zh: 芬兰拥有独立的税收体系，不向俄国帝国缴纳一般税收，但为帝国军事提供一定拨款。
taxationSystem.en: Finland had an independent tax system, paying no general taxes to the Russian Empire, though providing certain military appropriations.

religion.zh: 路德宗（绝大多数）
religion.en: Lutheranism (vast majority)

culturalAchievements.zh: 《卡勒瓦拉》民族史诗的出版推动了芬兰民族意识觉醒；西贝柳斯的音乐作品（如《芬兰颂》）成为民族精神象征；赫尔辛基大学是北欧重要学术中心。
culturalAchievements.en: Publication of the Kalevala national epic drove Finnish national awakening; Sibelius's musical works (such as Finlandia) became symbols of national spirit; the University of Helsinki was a major Nordic academic center.

languageFamily.zh: 乌拉尔语系－芬兰-乌戈尔语族（芬兰语），瑞典语为上层语言
languageFamily.en: Uralic, Finno-Ugric (Finnish), with Swedish as the upper-class language

philosophy.zh: 芬兰民族主义（芬诺曼运动）、北欧自由主义与路德宗伦理
philosophy.en: Finnish nationalism (Fennoman movement), Nordic liberalism, and Lutheran ethics

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以林业和木材加工为核心，造纸工业正快速增长。农业仍占重要地位，但工业化正在加速。芬兰拥有独立于俄国的货币（芬兰马克）。
gdpDescription.en: The economy centered on forestry and timber processing, with the paper industry growing rapidly. Agriculture remained important, but industrialization was accelerating. Finland had its own currency (Finnish markka) independent of Russia.

mainIndustries.zh: 林业、造纸、木材加工、纺织、机械制造、农业
mainIndustries.en: Forestry, paper production, timber processing, textiles, machinery, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 纸浆、纸张、木材、黄油、谷物
tradeGoods.en: Pulp, paper, timber, butter, grain

householdWealth.zh: 自耕农家庭较为稳定，城市工人阶级正在扩大。芬兰的识字率在全球名列前茅，教育投资带来的人力资本积累效果显著。
householdWealth.en: Independent farming households were relatively stable; the urban working class was expanding. Finland's literacy rate ranked among the highest globally, with significant human capital accumulation from educational investment.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主、国家参与林业管理的混合经济体系，在俄国帝国关税框架内运作但保有货币独立。
economicSystem.en: A market-oriented mixed economy with state involvement in forestry management, operating within the Russian imperial customs framework but retaining monetary independence.

source.en: Railways and other state enterprise income

treasuryDescription.zh: 芬兰财政独立且管理审慎，国库状况良好。
treasuryDescription.en: Finland's finances were independent and prudently managed, with a healthy treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重视教育和基础设施投资，税收管理效率较高。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized education and infrastructure investment, with relatively efficient tax administration.

description.zh: 芬兰大公国自有军队，编入俄罗斯帝国军事体系但保有独立编制。1901年俄国化政策将废除芬兰独立军制。
description.en: The Grand Duchy's own troops, integrated into the Russian imperial military system but retaining independent organization. The 1901 Russification policies would abolish Finland's independent military.

commanderInChief.zh: 沙皇尼古拉二世（通过总督代行）
commanderInChief.en: Tsar Nicholas II (acting through the Governor-General)

technology.zh: 装备和训练标准与俄罗斯帝国军相当，使用莫辛-纳甘步枪等制式武器。
technology.en: Equipment and training standards comparable to the Russian Imperial Army, using standard weapons such as the Mosin-Nagant rifle.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自俄国化政策对芬兰自治权的侵蚀，以及俄国可能废除芬兰独立军制的计划。
threats.en: The primary threat was Russification policies eroding Finnish autonomy, and Russian plans to potentially abolish Finland's independent military.

populationDescription.zh: 约270万人，以芬兰语人口为主（约86%），瑞典语人口约13%，另有少量萨米人和俄罗斯人。
populationDescription.en: About 2.7 million, predominantly Finnish-speaking (about 86%), with about 13% Swedish-speaking, plus small Sami and Russian minorities.

socialClasses.zh: 瑞典语贵族与地主、芬兰语知识分子与资产阶级、城市工人、自耕农与佃农
socialClasses.en: Swedish-speaking nobility and landowners, Finnish-speaking intelligentsia and bourgeoisie, urban workers, independent farmers and tenants

allies.zh: 作为俄罗斯帝国组成部分无独立外交，但芬兰民族运动获得北欧和西欧的同情。
allies.en: Had no independent foreign policy as part of the Russian Empire, but the Finnish national movement gained sympathy in Scandinavia and Western Europe.

enemies.zh: 俄国化政策使芬兰与圣彼得堡中央政府关系紧张。
enemies.en: Russification policies strained Finland's relations with the central government in St. Petersburg.

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交权，但通过文化外交和国际呼吁争取外界对芬兰自治权的支持。
foreignPolicy.en: Had no independent foreign policy rights, but sought international support for Finnish autonomy through cultural diplomacy and appeals.

era.zh: 第二次工业革命时期，林业和造纸工业领先
era.en: Second Industrial Revolution era, leading in forestry and paper industries

keyInnovations.zh: 现代造纸技术、铁路网络建设、农业机械化、全民识字教育
keyInnovations.en: Modern paper manufacturing, railway network construction, agricultural mechanization, universal literacy education

strengths.zh: 高识字率、发达的教育体系、强劲的林业和造纸工业、稳健的财政管理、强烈的民族凝聚力。
strengths.en: High literacy rate, advanced educational system, strong forestry and paper industries, sound fiscal management, and intense national cohesion.

weaknesses.zh: 受制于俄国化政策、无独立外交和军事权、国内语言问题分裂社会、工业化尚处早期。
weaknesses.en: Constrained by Russification, lacking independent foreign and military policy, domestic language question dividing society, and industrialization still in early stages.

outlook.zh: 1905年俄国革命将为芬兰带来新的政治改革机遇，但独立之路仍然漫长。
outlook.en: The 1905 Russian Revolution would bring new political reform opportunities for Finland, but the road to independence remained long.

description.zh: 1900年的芬兰大公国是俄罗斯帝国内享有广泛自治权的立宪政体，以高识字率和林业经济著称，但正面临沙皇俄国化政策的严峻挑战。
description.en: In 1900, the Grand Duchy of Finland was a constitutional polity with broad autonomy within the Russian Empire, renowned for its high literacy and forestry economy, but facing severe challenges from tsarist Russification policies.

ruler.zh: 克里斯蒂安九世（丹麦国王兼冰岛国王）
ruler.en: Christian IX (King of Denmark and Iceland)

governmentForm.zh: 丹麦王国下的自治领，拥有自己的议会（阿尔庭）和1874年宪法
governmentForm.en: An autonomous territory under the Danish Crown, with its own parliament (Althing) and 1874 Constitution

socialStructure.zh: 高度同质的小型社会，以渔民和农场主为主体，无贵族阶级，社会平等程度较高。
socialStructure.en: A highly homogeneous small society, composed primarily of fishermen and farmers, with no noble class and relatively high social equality.

rulingClass.zh: 丹麦王室代表、阿尔庭议员和富裕渔业主
rulingClass.en: Danish crown representatives, Althing members, and wealthy fishing operators

succession.zh: 随丹麦王位世袭继承
succession.en: Inherited with the Danish throne

structure.zh: 阿尔庭为冰岛立法机构（世界最古老的议会之一），1874年获得有限自治权。冰岛部长在哥本哈根办公，地方行政相对独立。1904年将获得内政自治。
structure.en: The Althing served as Iceland's legislature (one of the world's oldest parliaments), gaining limited home rule in 1874. The Icelandic minister was based in Copenhagen; local administration was relatively independent. Home rule would be achieved in 1904.

function.zh: 管理冰岛内政、法律和财政事务
function.en: Managed Icelandic internal, legal, and fiscal affairs

function.zh: 支持议会运作和立法程序
function.en: Supported parliamentary operations and legislative processes

localAdmin.zh: 通过地方行政区和自治市运作，基层治理传统深厚。
localAdmin.en: Operated through local administrative districts and municipalities, with deep traditions of grassroots governance.

legalSystem.zh: 基于丹麦法律传统和冰岛本地习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Based on Danish legal traditions and Icelandic local customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以渔业税和土地税为主的简单税制。
taxationSystem.en: A simple tax system based primarily on fishery and land taxes.

religion.zh: 路德宗
religion.en: Lutheranism

culturalAchievements.zh: 保留了中世纪萨迦文学传统，冰岛语是最接近古北欧语的活语言。冰岛民族主义运动正推动文化独立。
culturalAchievements.en: Preserved medieval saga literary traditions; Icelandic was the living language closest to Old Norse. The Icelandic nationalist movement was driving cultural independence.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－日耳曼语族－北日耳曼语支（冰岛语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic, North Germanic (Icelandic)

philosophy.zh: 冰岛民族主义、北欧民主传统和路德宗伦理
philosophy.en: Icelandic nationalism, Nordic democratic traditions, and Lutheran ethics

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（含冰岛特有字母）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (with Icelandic-specific characters)

gdpDescription.zh: 经济极度依赖渔业，尤其是鳕鱼捕捞。绵羊畜牧为第二大产业。经济正从自给自足向出口导向转型，但极端天气和火山活动仍构成巨大风险。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was extremely dependent on fisheries, especially cod. Sheep farming was the second largest sector. The economy was transitioning from subsistence to export orientation, but extreme weather and volcanic activity remained major risks.

mainIndustries.zh: 渔业、绵羊畜牧、羊毛加工
mainIndustries.en: Fisheries, sheep farming, wool processing

tradeGoods.zh: 盐腌鳕鱼、羊毛、羊肉
tradeGoods.en: Salted cod, wool, mutton

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭为渔民或小农，生活简朴但不极端贫困。识字率很高。
householdWealth.en: Most households were fishermen or small farmers, living simply but not in extreme poverty. Literacy rates were very high.

economicSystem.zh: 以渔业和畜牧为基础的市场经济，深度融入丹麦贸易体系。
economicSystem.en: A market economy based on fisheries and livestock, deeply integrated into the Danish trading system.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政规模极小但基本平衡。
treasuryDescription.en: Extremely small fiscal scale but roughly balanced.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 有限的财政收入主要用于基本行政和教育。
fiscalPolicy.en: Limited revenue was primarily directed toward basic administration and education.

description.zh: 冰岛无自有军队，防务由丹麦负责。
description.en: Iceland had no military of its own; defense was the responsibility of Denmark.

commanderInChief.zh: 丹麦国王

technology.zh: 无军事技术。
technology.en: No military technology.

threats.zh: 地理位置偏远提供了天然防护，防务依赖丹麦。
threats.en: Remote geographical location provided natural protection; defense depended on Denmark.

populationDescription.zh: 约8万人，几乎全为冰岛人，高度同质社会，识字率极高。
populationDescription.en: About 80,000, almost entirely Icelandic, a highly homogeneous society with extremely high literacy.

socialClasses.zh: 渔民、自耕农、牧民、少数商人和官员
socialClasses.en: Fishermen, independent farmers, herders, a small number of merchants and officials

allies.zh: 作为丹麦属地无独立外交，通过丹麦与北欧国家保持联系。
allies.en: Had no independent foreign policy as a Danish territory; maintained Nordic ties through Denmark.

enemies.zh: 无外部敌人，但与丹麦中央政府之间存在自治权争议。
enemies.en: No external enemies, but had autonomy disputes with the Danish central government.

foreignPolicy.zh: 民族运动推动争取更大自治权直至独立。
foreignPolicy.en: The national movement pushed for greater autonomy leading toward independence.

era.zh: 前工业到工业化过渡期，渔业技术现代化中
era.en: Pre-industrial to industrial transition, with fisheries technology modernizing

keyInnovations.zh: 甲板渔船逐步取代露天小船、初步港口设施建设、全民识字教育
keyInnovations.en: Decked fishing vessels gradually replacing open boats, initial harbor construction, universal literacy education

strengths.zh: 极高的识字率和文化凝聚力、丰富的渔业资源、悠久的民主传统。
strengths.en: Extremely high literacy and cultural cohesion, rich fishery resources, and an ancient democratic tradition.

weaknesses.zh: 人口极少、经济高度单一、地理隔离、无军事力量。
weaknesses.en: Tiny population, highly mono-sectoral economy, geographical isolation, and no military.

outlook.zh: 1904年将获得内政自治，渔业现代化将推动经济增长，独立运动将在20世纪上半叶持续发展。
outlook.en: Home rule would be achieved in 1904, fisheries modernization would drive economic growth, and the independence movement would continue through the first half of the 20th century.

description.zh: 1900年的冰岛是丹麦王国下的自治领，以渔业和萨迦文学传统著称的北大西洋小型社会，正在争取更大的政治自治权。
description.en: In 1900, Iceland was an autonomous territory under the Danish Crown, a small North Atlantic society renowned for its fisheries and saga literary traditions, striving for greater political autonomy.

governmentForm.zh: 萨赫勒伊斯兰苏丹国，正面临法国殖民势力入侵
governmentForm.en: A Sahelian Islamic sultanate, facing French colonial encroachment

socialStructure.zh: 苏丹和马巴贵族占据顶层，伊斯兰学者和贸易商人为中层，农牧民和奴隶为底层。社会结构与1840年相比变化不大，但法国殖民威胁日益严重。
socialStructure.en: The sultan and Maba nobles at the top, Islamic scholars and merchants in the middle, farmer-pastoralists and slaves at the bottom. Social structure had changed little since 1840, but French colonial threats were intensifying.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹家族和马巴贵族
rulingClass.en: The sultan's family and Maba nobles

succession.zh: 苏丹之位在王族内经宫廷选择传承
succession.en: The sultanate passed within the royal family by court selection

structure.zh: 苏丹通过宫廷体系和各省阿基德治国。由于法国殖民者从西南方向推进，瓦达伊正加强军事和外交活动以维护独立。
structure.en: The sultan governed through the court system and provincial agids. With French colonizers advancing from the southwest, Wadai was strengthening military and diplomatic activity to preserve independence.

function.zh: 辅佐苏丹决策，协调军事和外交
function.en: Advised the sultan, coordinating military and diplomatic affairs

function.zh: 管理各省行政、税收和军事
function.en: Managed provincial governance, taxation, and military affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各省由苏丹任命的阿基德管理。
localAdmin.en: Provinces managed by sultan-appointed agids.

legalSystem.zh: 马利基学派伊斯兰法与当地习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Maliki Islamic law and local customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 农牧民贡纳、贸易税和附庸族群贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Farmer-pastoralist tribute, trade taxes, and vassal contributions.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马利基学派）
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school)

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿贝歇继续作为跨撒哈拉贸易和伊斯兰学术中心，与塞努西教团有密切联系。
culturalAchievements.en: Abéché continued as a center of trans-Saharan trade and Islamic scholarship, with close links to the Senussi order.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（马巴语），阿拉伯语为宗教和商业语言
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan (Maba), Arabic as language of religion and commerce

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰信仰和对法国殖民入侵的抵抗意识
philosophy.en: Islamic faith and resistance consciousness against French colonial intrusion

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

gdpDescription.zh: 经济仍以牧业、旱作农业和跨撒哈拉贸易为基础，但法国殖民扩张正切断部分传统贸易路线。
gdpDescription.en: The economy remained based on pastoralism, dryland farming, and trans-Saharan trade, but French colonial expansion was cutting off some traditional trade routes.

mainIndustries.zh: 牧业、旱作农业、跨撒哈拉贸易
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, dryland farming, trans-Saharan trade

tradeGoods.zh: 象牙、鸵鸟羽毛、皮革、棉布；进口火器、布料、盐
tradeGoods.en: Ivory, ostrich feathers, hides, cotton cloth; imports of firearms, textiles, salt

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银元与实物交换

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭为自给自足的农牧民。
householdWealth.en: Most households were subsistence farmer-pastoralists.

economicSystem.zh: 传统萨赫勒贡纳和贸易经济，受法国殖民扩张威胁。
economicSystem.en: Traditional Sahelian tribute and trade economy, threatened by French colonial expansion.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库因军事开支增加而日益紧张。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was increasingly strained by rising military expenditure.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政日益向军事防务倾斜，以应对法国殖民威胁。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was increasingly tilting toward military defense to counter the French colonial threat.

description.zh: 苏丹的精锐常备武装。
description.en: The sultan's elite standing force.

description.zh: 各族群提供的骑兵力量。
description.en: Cavalry forces provided by various peoples.

description.zh: 步兵和配备火器的士兵，火器比例较1840年有所增加。
description.en: Infantry and firearm-equipped soldiers; the proportion of firearms had increased since 1840.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹杜杜·穆尔拉

technology.zh: 火器比例增加，但仍以骑兵冲锋为主要战术。面对法国的现代武器（大炮、连发步枪）处于明显劣势。
technology.en: Firearm proportion increased, but cavalry charges remained the primary tactic. Faced a clear disadvantage against French modern weapons (artillery, repeating rifles).

threats.zh: 法国殖民军从西南方向推进是最严重的威胁，瓦达伊是中非最后几个独立的非欧洲政权之一。
threats.en: French colonial forces advancing from the southwest posed the gravest threat; Wadai was one of the last independent non-European polities in Central Africa.

populationDescription.zh: 约100万人，以马巴族为核心，另有众多附庸族群。
populationDescription.en: About 1 million, with the Maba as the core group and numerous vassal peoples.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹王族与贵族、伊斯兰学者、贸易商人、农牧民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Sultan's royal family and nobles, Islamic scholars, merchants, farmer-pastoralists, slaves

allies.zh: 与塞努西教团和利比亚有联系，试图获取奥斯曼帝国的支持以对抗法国。
allies.en: Connected with the Senussi order and Libya, seeking Ottoman support against France.

enemies.zh: 法国是最主要的敌人，法军正从乍得湖地区向东推进。
enemies.en: France was the principal enemy, with French forces advancing eastward from the Lake Chad area.

foreignPolicy.zh: 全力抵抗法国殖民扩张，通过外交联系寻求伊斯兰世界的支持。
foreignPolicy.en: Resisted French colonial expansion with all means, seeking support from the Islamic world through diplomatic contacts.

era.zh: 前工业时代，面对工业化殖民势力
era.en: Pre-industrial era, confronting industrialized colonial powers

keyInnovations.zh: 增加火器采购、通过塞努西网络获取情报和物资
keyInnovations.en: Increased firearms procurement, intelligence and supplies obtained through the Senussi network

strengths.zh: 强大的骑兵传统、伊斯兰文化凝聚力、与塞努西教团的联系。
strengths.en: Strong cavalry tradition, Islamic cultural cohesion, connections with the Senussi order.

weaknesses.zh: 军事技术远落后于法国、经济基础脆弱、贸易路线被切断。
weaknesses.en: Military technology far behind France, fragile economic base, trade routes being cut.

outlook.zh: 瓦达伊将成为中非最后被法国征服的主要苏丹国之一，1909年法军最终攻占阿贝歇。
outlook.en: Wadai would become one of the last major sultanates in Central Africa to fall to France, with French forces finally capturing Abéché in 1909.

description.zh: 1900年的瓦达伊帝国是中非最后几个独立的伊斯兰苏丹国之一，正面临法国殖民势力的致命威胁。
description.en: In 1900, the Wadai Empire was one of the last independent Islamic sultanates in Central Africa, facing a lethal threat from French colonial forces.

governmentForm.zh: 法国直辖殖民地，四公社居民享有法国公民权，其余地区实行殖民行政管理
governmentForm.en: A direct French colony; residents of the Four Communes enjoyed French citizenship while the rest was under colonial administration

socialStructure.zh: 社会由法国殖民官员和商人上层、四公社的混血与非洲裔法国公民中层、内陆传统酋长和伊斯兰学者、广大农牧民构成。种姓制度在沃洛夫等族群中仍然存在。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised French colonial officials and merchants at the top; mixed-race and African French citizens of the Four Communes in the middle; interior traditional chiefs and Islamic scholars; and the broad farming and herding populace. Caste systems still existed among the Wolof and other groups.

rulingClass.zh: 法国殖民行政官僚、法国商人和四公社精英
rulingClass.en: French colonial bureaucrats, French merchants, and Four Communes elites

succession.zh: 总督由法国政府任命
succession.en: The governor was appointed by the French government

structure.zh: 塞内加尔是法属西非联邦的核心殖民地，总督府设在圣路易（后迁至达喀尔）。四公社（圣路易、戈雷、达喀尔、吕菲斯克）享有特殊的法国公民身份，可选举议员进入法国国民议会。
structure.en: Senegal was the core colony of French West Africa, with the governor's office in Saint-Louis (later moving to Dakar). The Four Communes (Saint-Louis, Gorée, Dakar, Rufisque) enjoyed special French citizenship, electing a deputy to the French National Assembly.

function.zh: 全面管理殖民地行政、治安和经济政策
function.en: Overall administration of colonial governance, security, and economic policy

function.zh: 管理铁路、港口和基础设施建设
function.en: Managed railways, ports, and infrastructure construction

function.zh: 管理法国公民区以外的非洲人口和传统酋长
function.en: Administered African populations and traditional chiefs outside the citizenship zones

localAdmin.zh: 四公社实行市政自治，内陆地区通过殖民行政区和传统酋长间接治理。
localAdmin.en: The Four Communes had municipal self-government; interior regions were governed indirectly through colonial districts and traditional chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 四公社适用法国法律，其余地区适用原住民法和伊斯兰法。
legalSystem.en: French law applied in the Four Communes; native and Islamic law applied elsewhere.

taxationSystem.zh: 人头税、贸易税和花生出口税为主要收入来源。
taxationSystem.en: Capitation tax, trade duties, and peanut export taxes were the main revenue sources.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（多数，苏非教团尤其影响巨大）、传统非洲宗教、天主教（少数）
religion.en: Islam (majority, with Sufi orders particularly influential), traditional African religions, Catholicism (minority)

culturalAchievements.zh: 圣路易和戈雷岛是法属非洲最早的殖民定居点，形成了独特的混血克里奥尔文化。穆里德教团和提贾尼教团的伊斯兰学术传统深厚。
culturalAchievements.en: Saint-Louis and Gorée Island were the earliest French colonial settlements in Africa, developing a distinctive mixed Creole culture. The Mouride and Tijaniyya orders maintained deep Islamic scholarly traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（沃洛夫语为通用语）、法语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo (Wolof as lingua franca), French as official language

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰苏非主义与法国共和主义的独特并存
philosophy.en: A distinctive coexistence of Islamic Sufism and French republicanism

writingSystem.zh: 法语使用拉丁字母，伊斯兰学术使用阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: French in Latin alphabet, Arabic script for Islamic scholarship

gdpDescription.zh: 经济由花生种植和出口主导，花生是法国工业（特别是植物油和肥皂制造）的重要原料。达喀尔-圣路易铁路促进了内陆农产品外运。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was dominated by peanut cultivation and export, a vital raw material for French industry (especially vegetable oil and soap manufacturing). The Dakar-Saint-Louis railway facilitated the transport of interior agricultural products.

mainIndustries.zh: 花生种植与出口、渔业、小规模商业、港口服务
mainIndustries.en: Peanut cultivation and export, fisheries, small-scale commerce, port services

tradeGoods.zh: 花生、花生油、阿拉伯胶、鱼类；进口法国制造品、棉布、金属器具
tradeGoods.en: Peanuts, peanut oil, gum arabic, fish; imports of French manufactures, cotton cloth, metal goods

householdWealth.zh: 四公社居民生活水平相对较高；内陆农民高度依赖花生单一种植，易受市场波动影响。
householdWealth.en: Four Communes residents had relatively higher living standards; interior farmers were highly dependent on monoculture peanut farming and vulnerable to market fluctuations.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民地出口导向经济，以花生为单一经济作物，服务于法国宗主国工业需求。
economicSystem.en: A colonial export-oriented economy with peanuts as a monoculture cash crop, serving French metropolitan industrial needs.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政需要法国补贴维持平衡。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances required French subsidies to maintain balance.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政服务于殖民开发目标，重视基础设施以促进出口。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy served colonial development goals, prioritizing infrastructure to promote exports.

description.zh: 由法国军官指挥的非洲士兵部队，是法国殖民军在西非的主力。
description.en: African soldiers commanded by French officers; the mainstay of French colonial forces in West Africa.

description.zh: 法国本土派遣的驻军部队。
description.en: Garrison troops dispatched from metropolitan France.

commanderInChief.zh: 法国驻塞内加尔总督

technology.zh: 装备法国制式步枪和火炮，拥有对内陆非洲政权的压倒性火力优势。
technology.en: Equipped with French standard rifles and artillery, possessing overwhelming firepower advantage over interior African polities.

threats.zh: 内陆地区仍有抵抗运动，穆里德教团的影响力需要殖民当局警惕。
threats.en: Resistance movements persisted in the interior; the Mouride order's influence required colonial vigilance.

populationDescription.zh: 约150万人，以沃洛夫人、塞雷尔人、图库洛尔人和曼丁哥人为主要族群，另有少量法国人和混血克里奥尔人。
populationDescription.en: About 1.5 million, with Wolof, Serer, Toucouleur, and Mandinka as major groups, plus small French and mixed Creole populations.

socialClasses.zh: 法国殖民官员与商人、四公社公民精英、传统酋长与伊斯兰学者、农牧民、种姓底层与前奴隶
socialClasses.en: French colonial officials and merchants, Four Communes citizen elites, traditional chiefs and Islamic scholars, farmer-pastoralists, lower castes and former slaves

allies.zh: 作为法国殖民地无独立外交。
allies.en: No independent foreign policy as a French colony.

enemies.zh: 内陆仍有对法国殖民统治的抵抗。
enemies.en: Resistance to French colonial rule persisted in the interior.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由法国控制，塞内加尔是法属西非联邦的行政中心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by France; Senegal served as the administrative center of French West Africa.

era.zh: 殖民现代化初期

keyInnovations.zh: 达喀尔-圣路易铁路、现代港口设施、电报通信、殖民医疗服务
keyInnovations.en: Dakar-Saint-Louis railway, modern port facilities, telegraph communications, colonial medical services

strengths.zh: 四公社的公民权传统在非洲殖民地中独特、达喀尔港的战略位置、花生出口经济。
strengths.en: The Four Communes' citizenship tradition was unique among African colonies; Dakar port's strategic location; and peanut export economy.

weaknesses.zh: 经济高度依赖单一作物、殖民压迫和强制劳动、大多数人口无公民权、教育普及率极低。
weaknesses.en: Extreme dependence on a single crop, colonial oppression and forced labor, the majority lacking citizenship, and extremely low education rates.

outlook.zh: 塞内加尔将成为法属西非的政治和文化中心，四公社的公民权传统将为日后非洲民族主义运动提供独特的政治资源。
outlook.en: Senegal would become the political and cultural center of French West Africa; the Four Communes' citizenship tradition would provide unique political resources for later African nationalist movements.

description.zh: 1900年的法属塞内加尔是法属西非联邦的核心殖民地，以花生出口和四公社公民权传统为特色。
description.en: In 1900, French Senegal was the core colony of French West Africa, distinguished by its peanut exports and the unique citizenship tradition of the Four Communes.

description.zh: 义和团运动在华北达到高潮，围攻北京东交民巷的外国使馆区长达55天。清廷对列强宣战，八国联军随后发兵进攻北京。
description.en: The Boxer Uprising reached its peak in northern China, besieging the foreign legation quarter in Beijing for 55 days. The Qing court declared war on the foreign powers, and an Eight-Nation Alliance subsequently marched on Beijing.

description.zh: 清朝与八国联军签订《辛丑条约》，赔款四亿五千万两白银，允许外国驻军北京。这是近代中国丧权辱国程度最深的条约之一。
description.en: The Qing Dynasty signed the Boxer Protocol with the Eight-Nation Alliance, agreeing to pay 450 million taels of silver in indemnities and allowing foreign troops to be stationed in Beijing. It was one of the most humiliating treaties in modern Chinese history.

description.zh: 六个英属澳大利亚殖民地正式合并为澳大利亚联邦，成为英联邦内的自治领。新宪法确立了联邦制和议会民主制。
description.en: Six British Australian colonies formally united to create the Commonwealth of Australia, becoming a dominion within the British Empire. The new constitution established a federal system and parliamentary democracy.

description.zh: 英国与日本签订同盟条约，承认彼此在远东的利益，尤其在中国和朝鲜。这是近代亚洲国家首次与欧洲列强缔结平等军事同盟。
description.en: Britain and Japan signed an alliance treaty recognizing each other's interests in the Far East, particularly in China and Korea. This was the first equal military alliance between an Asian nation and a European great power in modern history.

description.zh: 英国与布尔共和国签订《弗里尼欣条约》，第二次布尔战争结束。特兰斯瓦尔和奥兰治自由邦被并入英帝国，英国采用集中营等残酷手段引发国际谴责。
description.en: Britain and the Boer republics signed the Treaty of Vereeniging, ending the Second Boer War. The Transvaal and Orange Free State were absorbed into the British Empire, while Britain's use of concentration camps drew international condemnation.

description.zh: 日本因争夺满洲和朝鲜的控制权对俄罗斯帝国发动突袭，日俄战争爆发。这是近代史上亚洲国家首次在大规模战争中击败欧洲列强。
description.en: Japan launched a surprise attack on the Russian Empire over control of Manchuria and Korea, beginning the Russo-Japanese War. It was the first time in modern history that an Asian nation defeated a European great power in a major war.

description.zh: 1905年1月「血腥星期日」事件引爆俄国革命，工人罢工、农民暴动和军队哗变席卷全国。沙皇被迫颁布《十月宣言》，同意设立国家杜马。
description.en: The 'Bloody Sunday' massacre in January 1905 ignited revolution across Russia, with workers' strikes, peasant uprisings, and military mutinies sweeping the country. The Tsar was forced to issue the October Manifesto, agreeing to establish a State Duma.

description.zh: 日本与俄国在美国调停下签订《朴茨茅斯条约》，日本获得南满铁路控制权和对朝鲜的优先地位。日本由此确立了亚洲列强的地位。
description.en: Japan and Russia signed the Treaty of Portsmouth under American mediation. Japan gained control of the South Manchuria Railway and a predominant position in Korea, establishing itself as a major power in Asia.

description.zh: 全印穆斯林联盟在达卡成立，旨在保护印度穆斯林的政治权利和利益。这一组织日后在南亚政治中发挥关键作用，最终推动了巴基斯坦的建国运动。
description.en: The All-India Muslim League was founded in Dhaka to protect the political rights and interests of India's Muslims. This organization later played a pivotal role in South Asian politics, ultimately driving the movement for the creation of Pakistan.

description.zh: 英国和俄国签订协约，划分了两国在波斯、阿富汗和西藏的势力范围。英俄协约与英法协约一起构成了三国协约体系，成为一战前欧洲同盟格局的关键。
description.en: Britain and Russia signed a convention dividing their spheres of influence in Persia, Afghanistan, and Tibet. The Anglo-Russian Convention, together with the Entente Cordiale, formed the Triple Entente, a key alignment in pre-WWI European alliances.

title.zh: 奥匈帝国吞并波斯尼亚

description.zh: 奥匈帝国正式吞并波斯尼亚-黑塞哥维那，引发塞尔维亚和俄国的强烈抗议。此事件加剧了巴尔干地区的紧张局势，成为一战爆发的远因之一。
description.en: Austria-Hungary formally annexed Bosnia-Herzegovina, provoking fierce protests from Serbia and Russia. This event intensified tensions in the Balkans and became one of the underlying causes of World War I.

description.zh: 日本迫使大韩帝国签订《日韩合并条约》，朝鲜半岛沦为日本殖民地。此后长达35年的殖民统治深刻影响了朝鲜半岛的现代历史进程。
description.en: Japan forced the Korean Empire to sign the Japan-Korea Annexation Treaty, turning the Korean Peninsula into a Japanese colony. The subsequent 35 years of colonial rule profoundly shaped the modern history of the Korean Peninsula.

title.en: Xinhai Revolution Overthrows the Qing Dynasty

description.zh: 武昌起义引发全国连锁反应，各省纷纷宣布独立。1912年1月，中华民国临时政府成立，2月清帝退位，结束了两千多年的帝制。
description.en: The Wuchang Uprising triggered a chain reaction across the country, with provinces declaring independence one after another. The provisional Republic of China was established in January 1912, and the Qing Emperor abdicated in February, ending over two millennia of imperial rule.

title.zh: 巴拿马独立与运河条约

description.zh: 巴拿马在美国支持下脱离哥伦比亚独立，随即与美国签订运河条约。美国获得巴拿马运河区的永久租借权，开始修建连接大西洋和太平洋的运河。
description.en: Panama declared independence from Colombia with U.S. support and immediately signed a canal treaty with the United States. The U.S. gained a perpetual lease on the Canal Zone and began constructing the canal linking the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans.

description.zh: 挪威议会宣布解除与瑞典的联合，经公民投票后和平实现独立。哈康七世被选为挪威国王，开启了挪威作为独立君主国的新纪元。
description.en: The Norwegian parliament declared the dissolution of the union with Sweden, and independence was peacefully achieved through a referendum. Haakon VII was elected King of Norway, beginning a new era for the country as an independent monarchy.

description.zh: 统一与进步委员会发动军事政变，迫使苏丹阿卜杜勒·哈米德二世恢复宪法统治。青年土耳其党掌权后推行现代化改革，但也加剧了帝国内部的民族矛盾。
description.en: The Committee of Union and Progress staged a military coup, forcing Sultan Abdul Hamid II to restore constitutional rule. The Young Turks pursued modernization reforms after seizing power but also intensified ethnic tensions within the empire.

title.zh: 莱特兄弟首次动力飞行

description.zh: 奥维尔和威尔伯·莱特在北卡罗来纳州基蒂霍克完成人类历史上首次持续动力飞行。这一发明开启了航空时代，深刻改变了交通、军事和全球连接方式。
description.en: Orville and Wilbur Wright achieved the first sustained powered flight in human history at Kitty Hawk, North Carolina. This invention ushered in the aviation age, profoundly transforming transportation, warfare, and global connectivity.

description.zh: 英国皇家邮轮泰坦尼克号在北大西洋撞击冰山后沉没，超过1500人遇难。这一海难是当时最严重的海上灾难之一，促使国际社会加强了航海安全法规。
description.en: The RMS Titanic sank in the North Atlantic after striking an iceberg, with over 1,500 lives lost. It was one of the deadliest maritime disasters of the time and led to significant improvements in international maritime safety regulations.

description.zh: 巴尔干联盟（塞尔维亚、希腊、保加利亚、黑山）联合进攻奥斯曼帝国，夺取其在欧洲的大部分领土。战争重塑了巴尔干政治版图，但也埋下了更大冲突的种子。
description.en: The Balkan League (Serbia, Greece, Bulgaria, Montenegro) jointly attacked the Ottoman Empire, seizing most of its remaining European territories. The war reshaped the Balkan political map but also sowed the seeds of greater conflict.

description.zh: 美国旧金山发生7.9级大地震并引发大火，造成超过3000人死亡，城市大部分被毁。这是美国历史上最严重的自然灾害之一，灾后重建推动了抗震建筑技术的发展。
description.en: A magnitude 7.9 earthquake struck San Francisco, triggering fires that killed over 3,000 people and destroyed much of the city. It remains one of the worst natural disasters in U.S. history, and the rebuilding effort advanced earthquake-resistant construction techniques.

description.zh: 意大利王国对奥斯曼帝国宣战，入侵利比亚的的黎波里塔尼亚和昔兰尼加。意土战争以意大利胜利告终，利比亚成为意大利殖民地。
description.en: The Kingdom of Italy declared war on the Ottoman Empire and invaded the Libyan regions of Tripolitania and Cyrenaica. The Italo-Turkish War ended in Italian victory, and Libya became an Italian colony.

description.zh: 英国和法国签订《挚诚协约》，解决了两国在非洲殖民地的多处争端。法国承认英国在埃及的地位，英国承认法国在摩洛哥的利益，奠定了一战前三国协约的基础。
description.en: Britain and France signed the Entente Cordiale, resolving multiple colonial disputes in Africa. France recognized British predominance in Egypt while Britain acknowledged French interests in Morocco, laying the groundwork for the pre-WWI Triple Entente.

description.zh: 开普殖民地、纳塔尔、特兰斯瓦尔和奥兰治河殖民地合并为南非联邦，成为英联邦自治领。新政府在少数白人统治下建立了种族隔离制度的雏形。
description.en: The Cape Colony, Natal, Transvaal, and Orange River Colony merged to form the Union of South Africa as a dominion of the British Empire. The new government, under white minority rule, laid the early foundations of the apartheid system.

description.zh: 穆罕默德·阿里·沙在俄国支持下炮轰议会，试图推翻立宪改革。革命力量在大不里士等地抵抗，最终推翻了沙王，恢复了宪法秩序。
description.en: Mohammad Ali Shah, backed by Russia, bombarded the parliament in an attempt to overthrow constitutional reforms. Revolutionary forces resisted in Tabriz and other cities, ultimately deposing the Shah and restoring constitutional order.
